authors_text: Baichuan Huang,Abdeslam Boularias,Jingjin Yu
title: Parallel Monte Carlo Tree Search with Batched Rigid-body Simulations for Speeding up Long-Horizon Episodic Robot Planning
title_zh: 并行蒙特卡罗树搜索与批量刚体仿真加速长视野情景机器人规划
abstract: We propose a novel Parallel Monte Carlo tree search with Batched Simulations (PMBS) algorithm for accelerating long-horizon, episodic robotic planning tasks. Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) is an effective heuristic search algorithm for solving episodic decision-making problems whose underlying search spaces are expansive. Leveraging a GPU-based large-scale simulator, PMBS introduces massive parallelism into MCTS for solving planning tasks through the batched execution of a large number of concurrent simulations, which allows for more efficient and accurate evaluations of the expected cost-to-go over large action spaces. When applied to the challenging manipulation tasks of object retrieval from clutter, PMBS achieves a speedup of over $30\times$ with an improved solution quality, in comparison to a serial MCTS implementation. We show that PMBS can be directly applied to real robot hardware with negligible sim-to-real differences. Supplementary material, including video, can be found at https://github.com/arc-l/pmbs.
summary: We propose a novel Parallel Monte Carlo tree search with Batched Simulations (PMBS) algorithm for accelerating long-horizon, episodic robotic planning tasks. Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) is an effective heuristic search algorithm for solving episodic decision-making problems whose underlying search spaces are expansive. Leveraging a GPU-based large-scale simulator, PMBS introduces massive parallelism into MCTS for solving planning tasks through the batched execution of a large number of concurrent simulations, which allows for more efficient and accurate evaluations of the expected cost-to-go over large action spaces. When applied to the challenging manipulation tasks of object retrieval from clutter, PMBS achieves a speedup of over $30\times$ with an improved solution quality, in comparison to a serial MCTS implementation. We show that PMBS can be directly applied to real robot hardware with negligible sim-to-real differences. Supplementary material, including video, can be found at https://github.com/arc-l/pmbs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的并行蒙特卡罗树搜索与批量模拟（PMBS）算法，用于加速长视野、情景机器人规划任务。蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）是一种有效的启发式搜索算法，用于解决其潜在搜索空间广阔的情景决策问题。 Leveraging a GPU-based large-scale simulator, PMBS introduces massive parallelism into MCTS for solving planning tasks through the batched execution of a large number of concurrent simulations, which allows for more efficient and accurate evaluations of the expected cost-to-go over large action spaces.当应用于从杂乱中检索对象的挑战性操作任务时，与串行 MCTS 实现相比，PMBS 实现了超过 30 倍的加速，同时提高了解决方案质量。我们证明 PMBS 可以直接应用于真实的机器人硬件，模拟与真实的差异可以忽略不计。包括视频在内的补充材料可以在 https://github.com/arc-l/pmbs 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PMBS的并行蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，通过批量刚体模拟加速长时域机器人规划任务。
AI.motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在处理长时域、高维动作空间的机器人规划任务时效率低下，难以满足复杂场景需求。
AI.method: 基于GPU的大规模模拟器，通过批量执行大量并行模拟引入并行计算，优化MCTS的期望成本评估过程。
AI.result: 在杂乱环境中物体抓取任务中，PMBS相比串行MCTS实现30倍加速且提升解的质量，且能直接应用于真实机器人硬件。
AI.conclusion: PMBS通过硬件加速与算法改进有效解决了长时域规划的效率问题，为复杂机器人任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Parallel Monte Carlo Tree Search with Batched Rigid-body Simulations for Speeding up Long-Horizon Episodic Robot Planning 并行蒙特卡罗树搜索与批量刚体仿真加速长视野情景机器人规划 We propose a novel Parallel Monte Carlo tree search with Batched Simulations (PMBS) algorithm for accelerating long-horizon, episodic robotic planning tasks. Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) is an effective heuristic search algorithm for solving episodic decision-making problems whose underlying search spaces are expansive. Leveraging a GPU-based large-scale simulator, PMBS introduces massive parallelism into MCTS for solving planning tasks through the batched execution of a large number of concurrent simulations, which allows for more efficient and accurate evaluations of the expected cost-to-go over large action spaces. When applied to the challenging manipulation tasks of object retrieval from clutter, PMBS achieves a speedup of over $30\times$ with an improved solution quality, in comparison to a serial MCTS implementation. We show that PMBS can be directly applied to real robot hardware with negligible sim-to-real differences. Supplementary material, including video, can be found at https://github.com/arc-l/pmbs. 我们提出了一种新颖的并行蒙特卡罗树搜索与批量模拟（PMBS）算法，用于加速长视野、情景机器人规划任务。蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）是一种有效的启发式搜索算法，用于解决其潜在搜索空间广阔的情景决策问题。 Leveraging a GPU-based large-scale simulator, PMBS introduces massive parallelism into MCTS for solving planning tasks through the batched execution of a large number of concurrent simulations, which allows for more efficient and accurate evaluations of the expected cost-to-go over large action spaces.当应用于从杂乱中检索对象的挑战性操作任务时，与串行 MCTS 实现相比，PMBS 实现了超过 30 倍的加速，同时提高了解决方案质量。我们证明 PMBS 可以直接应用于真实的机器人硬件，模拟与真实的差异可以忽略不计。包括视频在内的补充材料可以在 https://github.com/arc-l/pmbs 上找到。 本文提出了一种名为PMBS的并行蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，通过批量刚体模拟加速长时域机器人规划任务。 Baichuan Huang,Abdeslam Boularias,Jingjin Yu cs.RO

authors_text: John Tan Chong Min,Mehul Motani
title: DropNet: Reducing Neural Network Complexity via Iterative Pruning
title_zh: DropNet：通过迭代修剪降低神经网络复杂性
comment: Published at ICML 2020. Code can be found at https://github.com/tanchongmin/DropNet
comments: Published at ICML 2020. Code can be found at https://github.com/tanchongmin/DropNet
abstract: Modern deep neural networks require a significant amount of computing time and power to train and deploy, which limits their usage on edge devices. Inspired by the iterative weight pruning in the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis, we propose DropNet, an iterative pruning method which prunes nodes/filters to reduce network complexity. DropNet iteratively removes nodes/filters with the lowest average post-activation value across all training samples. Empirically, we show that DropNet is robust across diverse scenarios, including MLPs and CNNs using the MNIST, CIFAR-10 and Tiny ImageNet datasets. We show that up to 90% of the nodes/filters can be removed without any significant loss of accuracy. The final pruned network performs well even with reinitialization of the weights and biases. DropNet also has similar accuracy to an oracle which greedily removes nodes/filters one at a time to minimise training loss, highlighting its effectiveness.
summary: Modern deep neural networks require a significant amount of computing time and power to train and deploy, which limits their usage on edge devices. Inspired by the iterative weight pruning in the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis, we propose DropNet, an iterative pruning method which prunes nodes/filters to reduce network complexity. DropNet iteratively removes nodes/filters with the lowest average post-activation value across all training samples. Empirically, we show that DropNet is robust across diverse scenarios, including MLPs and CNNs using the MNIST, CIFAR-10 and Tiny ImageNet datasets. We show that up to 90% of the nodes/filters can be removed without any significant loss of accuracy. The final pruned network performs well even with reinitialization of the weights and biases. DropNet also has similar accuracy to an oracle which greedily removes nodes/filters one at a time to minimise training loss, highlighting its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络需要大量的计算时间和能力来训练和部署，这限制了它们在边缘设备上的使用。受彩票假设中迭代权重剪枝的启发，我们提出了 DropNet，一种迭代剪枝方法，可剪枝节点/过滤器以降低网络复杂性。 DropNet 迭代地删除所有训练样本中平均激活后值最低的节点/过滤器。根据经验，我们表明 DropNet 在各种场景中都具有鲁棒性，包括使用 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 Tiny ImageNet 数据集的 MLP 和 CNN。我们表明，高达 90% 的节点/过滤器可以被删除，而不会显着损失准确性。即使重新初始化权重和偏差，最终的修剪网络也表现良好。 DropNet 还具有与预言机类似的准确性，预言机一次贪婪地删除一个节点/过滤器以最大程度地减少训练损失，从而凸显了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DropNet方法，通过迭代剪枝减少神经网络复杂度，以提升在边缘设备上的应用可行性。
AI.motivation: 现代深度神经网络计算资源消耗大，限制了其在计算能力有限的边缘设备上的部署。
AI.method: 基于彩票假设，迭代移除节点/滤波器中平均后激活值最低的部分，适用于MLP和CNN等多种网络结构。
AI.result: 实验显示可移除高达90%的节点/滤波器而准确率无明显下降，且剪枝后网络在重新初始化后仍保持良好性能。
AI.conclusion: DropNet是一种有效且稳健的网络剪枝方法，能在保持精度的同时显著降低模型复杂度，适用于多种应用场景。

Inspired by the iterative weight pruning in the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis, we propose DropNet, an iterative pruning method which prunes nodes/filters to reduce network complexity. DropNet iteratively removes nodes/filters with the lowest average post-activation value across all training samples. Empirically, we show that DropNet is robust across diverse scenarios, including MLPs and CNNs using the MNIST, CIFAR-10 and Tiny ImageNet datasets. We show that up to 90% of the nodes/filters can be removed without any significant loss of accuracy. The final pruned network performs well even with reinitialization of the weights and biases. DropNet also has similar accuracy to an oracle which greedily removes nodes/filters one at a time to minimise training loss, highlighting its effectiveness. 现代深度神经网络需要大量的计算时间和能力来训练和部署，这限制了它们在边缘设备上的使用。受彩票假设中迭代权重剪枝的启发，我们提出了 DropNet，一种迭代剪枝方法，可剪枝节点/过滤器以降低网络复杂性。 DropNet 迭代地删除所有训练样本中平均激活后值最低的节点/过滤器。根据经验，我们表明 DropNet 在各种场景中都具有鲁棒性，包括使用 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 Tiny ImageNet 数据集的 MLP 和 CNN。我们表明，高达 90% 的节点/过滤器可以被删除，而不会显着损失准确性。即使重新初始化权重和偏差，最终的修剪网络也表现良好。 DropNet 还具有与预言机类似的准确性，预言机一次贪婪地删除一个节点/过滤器以最大程度地减少训练损失，从而凸显了其有效性。 本文提出DropNet方法，通过迭代剪枝减少神经网络复杂度，以提升在边缘设备上的应用可行性。 John Tan Chong Min,Mehul Motani cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hu Yu,Jie Huang,Yajing Liu,Qi Zhu,Man Zhou,Feng Zhao
title: Source-Free Domain Adaptation for Real-world Image Dehazing
title_zh: 用于现实世界图像去雾的无源域适应
abstract: Deep learning-based source dehazing methods trained on synthetic datasets have achieved remarkable performance but suffer from dramatic performance degradation on real hazy images due to domain shift. Although certain Domain Adaptation (DA) dehazing methods have been presented, they inevitably require access to the source dataset to reduce the gap between the source synthetic and target real domains. To address these issues, we present a novel Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SFUDA) image dehazing paradigm, in which only a well-trained source model and an unlabeled target real hazy dataset are available. Specifically, we devise the Domain Representation Normalization (DRN) module to make the representation of real hazy domain features match that of the synthetic domain to bridge the gaps. With our plug-and-play DRN module, unlabeled real hazy images can adapt existing well-trained source networks. Besides, the unsupervised losses are applied to guide the learning of the DRN module, which consists of frequency losses and physical prior losses. Frequency losses provide structure and style constraints, while the prior loss explores the inherent statistic property of haze-free images. Equipped with our DRN module and unsupervised loss, existing source dehazing models are able to dehaze unlabeled real hazy images. Extensive experiments on multiple baselines demonstrate the validity and superiority of our method visually and quantitatively.
summary: Deep learning-based source dehazing methods trained on synthetic datasets have achieved remarkable performance but suffer from dramatic performance degradation on real hazy images due to domain shift. Although certain Domain Adaptation (DA) dehazing methods have been presented, they inevitably require access to the source dataset to reduce the gap between the source synthetic and target real domains. To address these issues, we present a novel Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SFUDA) image dehazing paradigm, in which only a well-trained source model and an unlabeled target real hazy dataset are available. Specifically, we devise the Domain Representation Normalization (DRN) module to make the representation of real hazy domain features match that of the synthetic domain to bridge the gaps. With our plug-and-play DRN module, unlabeled real hazy images can adapt existing well-trained source networks. Besides, the unsupervised losses are applied to guide the learning of the DRN module, which consists of frequency losses and physical prior losses. Frequency losses provide structure and style constraints, while the prior loss explores the inherent statistic property of haze-free images. Equipped with our DRN module and unsupervised loss, existing source dehazing models are able to dehaze unlabeled real hazy images. Extensive experiments on multiple baselines demonstrate the validity and superiority of our method visually and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 在合成数据集上训练的基于深度学习的源去雾方法取得了显着的性能，但由于域转移而在真实模糊图像上出现性能急剧下降。尽管已经提出了某些域适应（DA）去雾方法，但它们不可避免地需要访问源数据集以缩小源合成域与目标真实域之间的差距。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）图像去雾范例，其中只有经过良好训练的源模型和未标记的目标真实模糊数据集可用。具体来说，我们设计了域表示标准化（DRN）模块，使真实模糊域特征的表示与合成域的表示相匹配，以弥合差距。通过我们的即插即用 DRN 模块，未标记的真实模糊图像可以适应现有的训练有素的源网络。此外，无监督损失用于指导 DRN 模块的学习，其中包括频率损失和物理先验损失。频率损失提供结构和风格约束，而先验损失则探索无雾图像的固有统计特性。配备我们的 DRN 模块和无监督损失，现有的源去雾模型能够对未标记的真实模糊图像进行去雾。对多个基线的广泛实验从视觉上和定量上证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需源数据的领域自适应图像去雾方法，解决合成数据训练模型在真实雾化图像上性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的去雾方法在合成数据集上表现良好，但在真实场景中因领域差异导致性能显著下降，而现有领域自适应方法需依赖源数据集，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计领域表示归一化（DRN）模块，通过频率损失和物理先验损失引导模型学习，使真实雾化图像特征与合成领域对齐，实现无监督自适应。
AI.result: 在多个基线模型上实验表明，该方法在视觉效果和定量指标上均优于现有方法，有效缓解了领域偏移问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SFUDA框架无需源数据即可实现跨领域适应，为真实场景图像去雾提供了高效可行的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需源数据的领域自适应图像去雾方法，解决合成数据训练模型在真实雾化图像上性能下降的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 基于深度学习的去雾方法在合成数据集上表现良好，但在真实场景中因领域差异导致性能显著下降，而现有领域自适应方法需依赖源数据集，限制了实际应用。

search_text: Source-Free Domain Adaptation for Real-world Image Dehazing 用于现实世界图像去雾的无源域适应 Deep learning-based source dehazing methods trained on synthetic datasets have achieved remarkable performance but suffer from dramatic performance degradation on real hazy images due to domain shift. Although certain Domain Adaptation (DA) dehazing methods have been presented, they inevitably require access to the source dataset to reduce the gap between the source synthetic and target real domains. To address these issues, we present a novel Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SFUDA) image dehazing paradigm, in which only a well-trained source model and an unlabeled target real hazy dataset are available. Specifically, we devise the Domain Representation Normalization (DRN) module to make the representation of real hazy domain features match that of the synthetic domain to bridge the gaps. With our plug-and-play DRN module, unlabeled real hazy images can adapt existing well-trained source networks. Besides, the unsupervised losses are applied to guide the learning of the DRN module, which consists of frequency losses and physical prior losses. Frequency losses provide structure and style constraints, while the prior loss explores the inherent statistic property of haze-free images. Equipped with our DRN module and unsupervised loss, existing source dehazing models are able to dehaze unlabeled real hazy images. Extensive experiments on multiple baselines demonstrate the validity and superiority of our method visually and quantitatively. 在合成数据集上训练的基于深度学习的源去雾方法取得了显着的性能，但由于域转移而在真实模糊图像上出现性能急剧下降。尽管已经提出了某些域适应（DA）去雾方法，但它们不可避免地需要访问源数据集以缩小源合成域与目标真实域之间的差距。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）图像去雾范例，其中只有经过良好训练的源模型和未标记的目标真实模糊数据集可用。具体来说，我们设计了域表示标准化（DRN）模块，使真实模糊域特征的表示与合成域的表示相匹配，以弥合差距。通过我们的即插即用 DRN 模块，未标记的真实模糊图像可以适应现有的训练有素的源网络。此外，无监督损失用于指导 DRN 模块的学习，其中包括频率损失和物理先验损失。频率损失提供结构和风格约束，而先验损失则探索无雾图像的固有统计特性。配备我们的 DRN 模块和无监督损失，现有的源去雾模型能够对未标记的真实模糊图像进行去雾。对多个基线的广泛实验从视觉上和定量上证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。 本文提出了一种无需源数据的领域自适应图像去雾方法，解决合成数据训练模型在真实雾化图像上性能下降的问题。 Hu Yu,Jie Huang,Yajing Liu,Qi Zhu,Man Zhou,Feng Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Min Zhao,Fan Bao,Chongxuan Li,Jun Zhu
title: EGSDE: Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation via Energy-Guided Stochastic Differential Equations
title_zh: EGSDE：通过能量引导随机微分方程进行不成对的图像到图像转换
abstract: Score-based diffusion models (SBDMs) have achieved the SOTA FID results in unpaired image-to-image translation (I2I). However, we notice that existing methods totally ignore the training data in the source domain, leading to sub-optimal solutions for unpaired I2I. To this end, we propose energy-guided stochastic differential equations (EGSDE) that employs an energy function pretrained on both the source and target domains to guide the inference process of a pretrained SDE for realistic and faithful unpaired I2I. Building upon two feature extractors, we carefully design the energy function such that it encourages the transferred image to preserve the domain-independent features and discard domain-specific ones. Further, we provide an alternative explanation of the EGSDE as a product of experts, where each of the three experts (corresponding to the SDE and two feature extractors) solely contributes to faithfulness or realism. Empirically, we compare EGSDE to a large family of baselines on three widely-adopted unpaired I2I tasks under four metrics. EGSDE not only consistently outperforms existing SBDMs-based methods in almost all settings but also achieves the SOTA realism results without harming the faithful performance. Furthermore, EGSDE allows for flexible trade-offs between realism and faithfulness and we improve the realism results further (e.g., FID of 51.04 in Cat to Dog and FID of 50.43 in Wild to Dog on AFHQ) by tuning hyper-parameters. The code is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/EGSDE.
summary: Score-based diffusion models (SBDMs) have achieved the SOTA FID results in unpaired image-to-image translation (I2I). However, we notice that existing methods totally ignore the training data in the source domain, leading to sub-optimal solutions for unpaired I2I. To this end, we propose energy-guided stochastic differential equations (EGSDE) that employs an energy function pretrained on both the source and target domains to guide the inference process of a pretrained SDE for realistic and faithful unpaired I2I. Building upon two feature extractors, we carefully design the energy function such that it encourages the transferred image to preserve the domain-independent features and discard domain-specific ones. Further, we provide an alternative explanation of the EGSDE as a product of experts, where each of the three experts (corresponding to the SDE and two feature extractors) solely contributes to faithfulness or realism. Empirically, we compare EGSDE to a large family of baselines on three widely-adopted unpaired I2I tasks under four metrics. EGSDE not only consistently outperforms existing SBDMs-based methods in almost all settings but also achieves the SOTA realism results without harming the faithful performance. Furthermore, EGSDE allows for flexible trade-offs between realism and faithfulness and we improve the realism results further (e.g., FID of 51.04 in Cat to Dog and FID of 50.43 in Wild to Dog on AFHQ) by tuning hyper-parameters. The code is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/EGSDE.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的扩散模型 (SBDM) 在不成对的图像到图像转换 (I2I) 中取得了 SOTA FID 结果。然而，我们注意到现有方法完全忽略源域中的训练数据，导致未配对 I2I 的解决方案次优。为此，我们提出了能量引导随机微分方程（EGSDE），它采用在源域和目标域上预训练的能量函数来指导预训练 SDE 的推理过程，以实现真实且忠实的不成对 I2I。在两个特征提取器的基础上，我们仔细设计了能量函数，以鼓励传输的图像保留与域无关的特征并丢弃特定于域的特征。此外，我们提供了 EGSDE 作为专家产品的另一种解释，其中三位专家（对应于 SDE 和两个特征提取器）中的每一位都只对忠实性或现实性做出贡献。根据经验，我们将 EGSDE 与四个指标下三个广泛采用的不配对 I2I 任务的一大组基线进行比较。 EGSDE 不仅在几乎所有设置中始终优于现有的基于 SBDM 的方法，而且在不损害忠实性能的情况下实现了 SOTA 真实性结果。此外，EGSDE 允许在真实性和忠实度之间进行灵活的权衡，并且我们通过调整超参数进一步提高真实性结果（例如，AFHQ 上 Cat to Dog 中的 FID 为 51.04，Wild to Dog 中的 FID 为 50.43）。该代码可从 https://github.com/ML-GSAI/EGSDE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量引导的随机微分方程（EGSDE）方法，用于无配对图像到图像的翻译任务，旨在提升生成图像的真实感和保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分数扩散模型（SBDM）的方法在无配对图像翻译中忽略了源域数据，导致结果不理想。本文希望通过利用源域和目标域的预训练能量函数来改进这一问题。
AI.method: 设计了一个结合源域和目标域预训练能量函数的框架，通过两个特征提取器引导随机微分方程（SDE）的推理过程，使生成图像保留跨域特征并去除域特定特征。同时将EGSDE解释为三个专家（SDE和两个特征提取器）的乘积，分别负责保真度或真实感。
AI.result: EGSDE在三个常用无配对任务中超越了现有SBDM方法，在真实感指标上达到SOTA，且在保持保真度的同时允许灵活调整真实感与保真度的权衡，例如在AFHQ数据集上Cat到Dog的FID为51.04，Wild到Dog的FID为50.43。
AI.conclusion: EGSDE通过整合源域与目标域信息，有效提升了无配对图像翻译的质量，并提供了真实感与保真度的灵活控制，为相关任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tae Bok Lee,Sujy Han,Yong Seok Heo
title: Continuous Facial Motion Deblurring
title_zh: 连续面部运动去模糊
abstract: We introduce a novel framework for continuous facial motion deblurring that restores the continuous sharp moment latent in a single motion-blurred face image via a moment control factor. Although a motion-blurred image is the accumulated signal of continuous sharp moments during the exposure time, most existing single image deblurring approaches aim to restore a fixed number of frames using multiple networks and training stages. To address this problem, we propose a continuous facial motion deblurring network based on GAN (CFMD-GAN), which is a novel framework for restoring the continuous moment latent in a single motion-blurred face image with a single network and a single training stage. To stabilize the network training, we train the generator to restore continuous moments in the order determined by our facial motion-based reordering process (FMR) utilizing domain-specific knowledge of the face. Moreover, we propose an auxiliary regressor that helps our generator produce more accurate images by estimating continuous sharp moments. Furthermore, we introduce a control-adaptive (ContAda) block that performs spatially deformable convolution and channel-wise attention as a function of the control factor. Extensive experiments on the 300VW datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework generates a various number of continuous output frames by varying the moment control factor. Compared with the recent single-to-single image deblurring networks trained with the same 300VW training set, the proposed method show the superior performance in restoring the central sharp frame in terms of perceptual metrics, including LPIPS, FID and Arcface identity distance. The proposed method outperforms the existing single-to-video deblurring method for both qualitative and quantitative comparisons.
summary: We introduce a novel framework for continuous facial motion deblurring that restores the continuous sharp moment latent in a single motion-blurred face image via a moment control factor. Although a motion-blurred image is the accumulated signal of continuous sharp moments during the exposure time, most existing single image deblurring approaches aim to restore a fixed number of frames using multiple networks and training stages. To address this problem, we propose a continuous facial motion deblurring network based on GAN (CFMD-GAN), which is a novel framework for restoring the continuous moment latent in a single motion-blurred face image with a single network and a single training stage. To stabilize the network training, we train the generator to restore continuous moments in the order determined by our facial motion-based reordering process (FMR) utilizing domain-specific knowledge of the face. Moreover, we propose an auxiliary regressor that helps our generator produce more accurate images by estimating continuous sharp moments. Furthermore, we introduce a control-adaptive (ContAda) block that performs spatially deformable convolution and channel-wise attention as a function of the control factor. Extensive experiments on the 300VW datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework generates a various number of continuous output frames by varying the moment control factor. Compared with the recent single-to-single image deblurring networks trained with the same 300VW training set, the proposed method show the superior performance in restoring the central sharp frame in terms of perceptual metrics, including LPIPS, FID and Arcface identity distance. The proposed method outperforms the existing single-to-video deblurring method for both qualitative and quantitative comparisons.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于连续面部运动去模糊的新颖框架，该框架通过力矩控制因子恢复单个运动模糊面部图像中潜在的连续锐利力矩。尽管运动模糊图像是曝光时间内连续锐利时刻的累积信号，但大多数现有的单图像去模糊方法旨在使用多个网络和训练阶段恢复固定数量的帧。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 GAN 的连续面部运动去模糊网络（CFMD-GAN），这是一种利用单个网络和单个训练阶段恢复单个运动模糊面部图像中潜在的连续矩的新颖框架。为了稳定网络训练，我们训练生成器按照基于面部运动的重新排序过程（FMR）利用面部特定领域知识确定的顺序恢复连续时刻。此外，我们提出了一个辅助回归器，可以通过估计连续锐矩来帮助我们的生成器生成更准确的图像。此外，我们引入了一个控制自适应（ContAda）块，该块根据控制因子执行空间可变形卷积和通道注意力。对 300VW 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的框架通过改变力矩控制因子来生成各种数量的连续输出帧。与最近使用相同 300VW 训练集训练的单对单图像去模糊网络相比，该方法在感知指标（包括 LPIPS、FID 和 Arcface 身份距离）方面显示出恢复中心锐帧的优越性能。在定性和定量比较方面，所提出的方法都优于现有的单视频去模糊方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CFMD-GAN的新框架，用于从单张运动模糊的人脸图像中恢复连续的清晰时刻。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去模糊方法通常需要多个网络和训练阶段来恢复固定数量的帧，无法有效处理连续运动模糊问题。
AI.method: 基于GAN设计单网络单阶段框架，结合面部运动重排序（FMR）、辅助回归器和控制自适应（ContAda）模块，通过控制因子实现连续清晰时刻的恢复。
AI.result: 在300VW数据集上实验表明，该方法在LPIPS、FID和Arcface等感知指标上优于现有单图到单图及单图到视频的去模糊方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过单网络结构和控制因子机制，有效解决了连续面部运动模糊恢复问题，取得了优于现有方法的定性和定量结果。

search_text: Continuous Facial Motion Deblurring 连续面部运动去模糊 We introduce a novel framework for continuous facial motion deblurring that restores the continuous sharp moment latent in a single motion-blurred face image via a moment control factor. Although a motion-blurred image is the accumulated signal of continuous sharp moments during the exposure time, most existing single image deblurring approaches aim to restore a fixed number of frames using multiple networks and training stages. To address this problem, we propose a continuous facial motion deblurring network based on GAN (CFMD-GAN), which is a novel framework for restoring the continuous moment latent in a single motion-blurred face image with a single network and a single training stage. To stabilize the network training, we train the generator to restore continuous moments in the order determined by our facial motion-based reordering process (FMR) utilizing domain-specific knowledge of the face. Moreover, we propose an auxiliary regressor that helps our generator produce more accurate images by estimating continuous sharp moments. Furthermore, we introduce a control-adaptive (ContAda) block that performs spatially deformable convolution and channel-wise attention as a function of the control factor. Extensive experiments on the 300VW datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework generates a various number of continuous output frames by varying the moment control factor. Compared with the recent single-to-single image deblurring networks trained with the same 300VW training set, the proposed method show the superior performance in restoring the central sharp frame in terms of perceptual metrics, including LPIPS, FID and Arcface identity distance. The proposed method outperforms the existing single-to-video deblurring method for both qualitative and quantitative comparisons. 我们引入了一种用于连续面部运动去模糊的新颖框架，该框架通过力矩控制因子恢复单个运动模糊面部图像中潜在的连续锐利力矩。尽管运动模糊图像是曝光时间内连续锐利时刻的累积信号，但大多数现有的单图像去模糊方法旨在使用多个网络和训练阶段恢复固定数量的帧。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 GAN 的连续面部运动去模糊网络（CFMD-GAN），这是一种利用单个网络和单个训练阶段恢复单个运动模糊面部图像中潜在的连续矩的新颖框架。为了稳定网络训练，我们训练生成器按照基于面部运动的重新排序过程（FMR）利用面部特定领域知识确定的顺序恢复连续时刻。此外，我们提出了一个辅助回归器，可以通过估计连续锐矩来帮助我们的生成器生成更准确的图像。此外，我们引入了一个控制自适应（ContAda）块，该块根据控制因子执行空间可变形卷积和通道注意力。对 300VW 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的框架通过改变力矩控制因子来生成各种数量的连续输出帧。与最近使用相同 300VW 训练集训练的单对单图像去模糊网络相比，该方法在感知指标（包括 LPIPS、FID 和 Arcface 身份距离）方面显示出恢复中心锐帧的优越性能。在定性和定量比较方面，所提出的方法都优于现有的单视频去模糊方法。 本文提出了一种名为CFMD-GAN的新框架，用于从单张运动模糊的人脸图像中恢复连续的清晰时刻。 Tae Bok Lee,Sujy Han,Yong Seok Heo cs.CV

authors_text: Yosuke Mizutani,Blair D. Sullivan
title: Improved Parameterized Complexity of Happy Set Problems
title_zh: 改进快乐集问题的参数化复杂性
abstract: We present fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithms for two problems, Maximum Happy Set (MaxHS) and Maximum Edge Happy Set (MaxEHS)--also known as Densest k-Subgraph. Given a graph $G$ and an integer $k$, MaxHS asks for a set $S$ of $k$ vertices such that the number of $\textit{happy vertices}$ with respect to $S$ is maximized, where a vertex $v$ is happy if $v$ and all its neighbors are in $S$. We show that MaxHS can be solved in time $\mathcal{O}\left(2^\textsf{mw} \cdot \textsf{mw} \cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$ and $\mathcal{O}\left(8^\textsf{cw} \cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$, where $\textsf{mw}$ and $\textsf{cw}$ denote the $\textit{modular-width}$ and the $\textit{clique-width}$ of $G$, respectively. This resolves the open questions posed in literature. The MaxEHS problem is an edge-variant of MaxHS, where we maximize the number of $\textit{happy edges}$, the edges whose endpoints are in $S$. In this paper we show that MaxEHS can be solved in time $f(\textsf{nd})\cdot|V(G)|^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ and $\mathcal{O}\left(2^{\textsf{cd}}\cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$, where $\textsf{nd}$ and $\textsf{cd}$ denote the $\textit{neighborhood diversity}$ and the $\textit{cluster deletion number}$ of $G$, respectively, and $f$ is some computable function. This result implies that MaxEHS is also fixed-parameter tractable by $\textit{twin cover number}$.
summary: We present fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithms for two problems, Maximum Happy Set (MaxHS) and Maximum Edge Happy Set (MaxEHS)--also known as Densest k-Subgraph. Given a graph $G$ and an integer $k$, MaxHS asks for a set $S$ of $k$ vertices such that the number of $\textit{happy vertices}$ with respect to $S$ is maximized, where a vertex $v$ is happy if $v$ and all its neighbors are in $S$. We show that MaxHS can be solved in time $\mathcal{O}\left(2^\textsf{mw} \cdot \textsf{mw} \cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$ and $\mathcal{O}\left(8^\textsf{cw} \cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$, where $\textsf{mw}$ and $\textsf{cw}$ denote the $\textit{modular-width}$ and the $\textit{clique-width}$ of $G$, respectively. This resolves the open questions posed in literature. The MaxEHS problem is an edge-variant of MaxHS, where we maximize the number of $\textit{happy edges}$, the edges whose endpoints are in $S$. In this paper we show that MaxEHS can be solved in time $f(\textsf{nd})\cdot|V(G)|^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ and $\mathcal{O}\left(2^{\textsf{cd}}\cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$, where $\textsf{nd}$ and $\textsf{cd}$ denote the $\textit{neighborhood diversity}$ and the $\textit{cluster deletion number}$ of $G$, respectively, and $f$ is some computable function. This result implies that MaxEHS is also fixed-parameter tractable by $\textit{twin cover number}$.
abstract_zh: 我们针对两个问题提出了固定参数易处理 (FPT) 算法：最大快乐集 (MaxHS) 和最大边缘快乐集 (MaxEHS)——也称为最密集 k 子图。给定一个图 $G$ 和一个整数 $k$，MaxHS 要求一组 $S$ 的 $k$ 个顶点，使得相对于 $S$ 的 $\textit{happy vertices}$ 的数量最大化，其中如果 $v$ 及其所有邻居都在 $S$ 中，则顶点 $v$ 是快乐的。我们证明 MaxHS 可以在时间 $\mathcal{O}\left(2^\textsf{mw} \cdot \textsf{mw} \cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$ 和 $\mathcal{O}\left(8^\textsf{cw} \cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$ 上求解，其中 $\textsf{mw}$ 和$\textsf{cw}$分别表示$G$的$\textit{modular-width}$和$\textit{clique-width}$。这解决了文献中提出的悬而未决的问题。 MaxEHS 问题是 MaxHS 的边变体，其中我们最大化 $\textit{happy Edges}$ 的数量，即端点位于 $S$ 中的边。在本文中，我们证明 MaxEHS 可以在时间 $f(\textsf{nd})\cdot|V(G)|^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 和 $\mathcal{O}\left(2^{\textsf{cd}}\cdot k^2 \cdot |V(G)|\right)$ 上求解，其中 $\textsf{nd}$ 和 $\textsf{cd}$ 表示分别是$\textit{邻域多样性}$和$G$的$\textit{簇删除数}$，$f$是一些可计算函数。这个结果意味着 MaxEHS 也可以通过 $\textit{twin cover number}$ 进行固定参数处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个问题（最大快乐集和最大边快乐集）的固定参数可解算法，利用图的结构参数改进了参数化复杂度。
AI.motivation: 解决最大快乐集（MaxHS）和最大边快乐集（MaxEHS）问题的参数化复杂度长期存在开放性问题，需设计更高效的固定参数算法。
AI.method: 基于图的模块宽度（modular-width）、团宽（clique-width）、邻域多样性（neighborhood diversity）和聚类删除数（cluster deletion number）等结构参数，设计固定参数算法并分析时间复杂度。
AI.result: MaxHS可在O(2^mw·mw·k²·|V|)和O(8^cw·k²·|V|)时间内解决；MaxEHS可在f(nd)·|V|^O(1)和O(2^cd·k²·|V|)时间内解决，且对孪生覆盖数（twin cover number）也具有FPT性质。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合图的结构参数，本文改进了两类快乐集问题的参数化复杂度，解决了长期存在的开放问题，并为相关问题提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Chenxi Ma,Bo Yan,Weimin Tan,Xuhao Jiang
title: Perception-Oriented Stereo Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 面向感知的立体图像超分辨率
abstract: Recent studies of deep learning based stereo image super-resolution (StereoSR) have promoted the development of StereoSR. However, existing StereoSR models mainly concentrate on improving quantitative evaluation metrics and neglect the visual quality of super-resolved stereo images. To improve the perceptual performance, this paper proposes the first perception-oriented stereo image super-resolution approach by exploiting the feedback, provided by the evaluation on the perceptual quality of StereoSR results. To provide accurate guidance for the StereoSR model, we develop the first special stereo image super-resolution quality assessment (StereoSRQA) model, and further construct a StereoSRQA database. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our StereoSR approach significantly improves the perceptual quality and enhances the reliability of stereo images for disparity estimation.
summary: Recent studies of deep learning based stereo image super-resolution (StereoSR) have promoted the development of StereoSR. However, existing StereoSR models mainly concentrate on improving quantitative evaluation metrics and neglect the visual quality of super-resolved stereo images. To improve the perceptual performance, this paper proposes the first perception-oriented stereo image super-resolution approach by exploiting the feedback, provided by the evaluation on the perceptual quality of StereoSR results. To provide accurate guidance for the StereoSR model, we develop the first special stereo image super-resolution quality assessment (StereoSRQA) model, and further construct a StereoSRQA database. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our StereoSR approach significantly improves the perceptual quality and enhances the reliability of stereo images for disparity estimation.
abstract_zh: 近年来基于深度学习的立体图像超分辨率（StereoSR）的研究推动了StereoSR的发展。然而，现有的StereoSR模型主要集中在提高定量评估指标上，而忽略了超分辨率立体图像的视觉质量。为了提高感知性能，本文通过利用对 StereoSR 结果的感知质量评估提供的反馈，提出了第一个面向感知的立体图像超分辨率方法。为了给StereoSR模型提供准确的指导，我们开发了第一个专门的立体图像超分辨率质量评估（StereoSRQA）模型，并进一步构建了StereoSRQA数据库。大量实验表明，我们的 StereoSR 方法显着提高了感知质量，并增强了立体图像视差估计的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向感知的立体图像超分辨率方法，旨在提升超分立体图像的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有立体图像超分辨率模型过度关注量化指标，忽视了超分结果的视觉感知质量。
AI.method: 开发首个立体图像超分辨率质量评估模型（StereoSRQA）及数据库，通过感知质量反馈指导超分过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升感知质量，并增强立体图像的视差估计可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 面向感知的立体图像超分方法能有效改善视觉效果与立体信息可靠性。

motivation: 现有立体图像超分辨率模型过度关注量化指标，忽视了超分结果的视觉感知质量。

search_text: Perception-Oriented Stereo Image Super-Resolution 面向感知的立体图像超分辨率 Recent studies of deep learning based stereo image super-resolution (StereoSR) have promoted the development of StereoSR. However, existing StereoSR models mainly concentrate on improving quantitative evaluation metrics and neglect the visual quality of super-resolved stereo images. To improve the perceptual performance, this paper proposes the first perception-oriented stereo image super-resolution approach by exploiting the feedback, provided by the evaluation on the perceptual quality of StereoSR results. To provide accurate guidance for the StereoSR model, we develop the first special stereo image super-resolution quality assessment (StereoSRQA) model, and further construct a StereoSRQA database. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our StereoSR approach significantly improves the perceptual quality and enhances the reliability of stereo images for disparity estimation. 近年来基于深度学习的立体图像超分辨率（StereoSR）的研究推动了StereoSR的发展。然而，现有的StereoSR模型主要集中在提高定量评估指标上，而忽略了超分辨率立体图像的视觉质量。为了提高感知性能，本文通过利用对 StereoSR 结果的感知质量评估提供的反馈，提出了第一个面向感知的立体图像超分辨率方法。为了给StereoSR模型提供准确的指导，我们开发了第一个专门的立体图像超分辨率质量评估（StereoSRQA）模型，并进一步构建了StereoSRQA数据库。大量实验表明，我们的 StereoSR 方法显着提高了感知质量，并增强了立体图像视差估计的可靠性。 本文提出一种面向感知的立体图像超分辨率方法，旨在提升超分立体图像的视觉质量。 Chenxi Ma,Bo Yan,Weimin Tan,Xuhao Jiang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Nikhil P Ghanathe,Steve Wilton
title: T-RECX: Tiny-Resource Efficient Convolutional neural networks with early-eXit
title_zh: T-REX：具有早期退出功能的小资源高效卷积神经网络
comment: Accepted at 20th ACM International Conference on Computing Frontiers
comments: Accepted at 20th ACM International Conference on Computing Frontiers
abstract: Deploying Machine learning (ML) on milliwatt-scale edge devices (tinyML) is gaining popularity due to recent breakthroughs in ML and Internet of Things (IoT). Most tinyML research focuses on model compression techniques that trade accuracy (and model capacity) for compact models to fit into the KB-sized tiny-edge devices. In this paper, we show how such models can be enhanced by the addition of an early exit intermediate classifier. If the intermediate classifier exhibits sufficient confidence in its prediction, the network exits early thereby, resulting in considerable savings in time. Although early exit classifiers have been proposed in previous work, these previous proposals focus on large networks, making their techniques suboptimal/impractical for tinyML applications. Our technique is optimized specifically for tiny-CNN sized models. In addition, we present a method to alleviate the effect of network overthinking by leveraging the representations learned by the early exit. We evaluate T-RecX on three CNNs from the MLPerf tiny benchmark suite for image classification, keyword spotting and visual wake word detection tasks. Our results show that T-RecX 1) improves the accuracy of baseline network, 2) achieves 31.58% average reduction in FLOPS in exchange for one percent accuracy across all evaluated models. Furthermore, we show that our methods consistently outperform popular prior works on the tiny-CNNs we evaluate.
summary: Deploying Machine learning (ML) on milliwatt-scale edge devices (tinyML) is gaining popularity due to recent breakthroughs in ML and Internet of Things (IoT). Most tinyML research focuses on model compression techniques that trade accuracy (and model capacity) for compact models to fit into the KB-sized tiny-edge devices. In this paper, we show how such models can be enhanced by the addition of an early exit intermediate classifier. If the intermediate classifier exhibits sufficient confidence in its prediction, the network exits early thereby, resulting in considerable savings in time. Although early exit classifiers have been proposed in previous work, these previous proposals focus on large networks, making their techniques suboptimal/impractical for tinyML applications. Our technique is optimized specifically for tiny-CNN sized models. In addition, we present a method to alleviate the effect of network overthinking by leveraging the representations learned by the early exit. We evaluate T-RecX on three CNNs from the MLPerf tiny benchmark suite for image classification, keyword spotting and visual wake word detection tasks. Our results show that T-RecX 1) improves the accuracy of baseline network, 2) achieves 31.58% average reduction in FLOPS in exchange for one percent accuracy across all evaluated models. Furthermore, we show that our methods consistently outperform popular prior works on the tiny-CNNs we evaluate.
abstract_zh: 由于机器学习和物联网 (IoT) 的最新突破，在毫瓦级边缘设备 (tinyML) 上部署机器学习 (ML) 越来越受欢迎。大多数tinyML 研究都集中在模型压缩技术上，这些技术会牺牲精度（和模型容量）来换取紧凑模型，以适应KB 大小的微型边缘设备。在本文中，我们展示了如何通过添加早期退出中间分类器来增强此类模型。如果中间分类器对其预测表现出足够的信心，网络就会提前退出，从而节省大量时间。尽管在之前的工作中已经提出了早期的退出分类器，但这些之前的建议主要关注大型网络，使得它们的技术对于tinyML应用来说不是最优的/不切实际的。我们的技术专门针对微型 CNN 尺寸模型进行了优化。此外，我们提出了一种通过利用早期退出学到的表示来减轻网络过度思考的影响的方法。我们在 MLPerf 微型基准套件中的三个 CNN 上评估 T-RecX，用于图像分类、关键词识别和视觉唤醒词检测任务。我们的结果表明，T-RecX 1) 提高了基线网络的准确性，2) 将 FLOPS 平均降低了 31.58%，以换取所有评估模型 1% 的准确性。此外，我们表明，我们的方法始终优于我们评估的微型 CNN 上流行的先前研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出T-RECX方法，在微型卷积神经网络中引入早期退出机制，以提升边缘设备上的资源效率。
AI.motivation: 现有早期退出技术针对大型网络，难以适应资源受限的微型ML模型（tinyML），需优化以兼顾准确率与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计针对微型CNN的早期退出分类器，利用早期特征缓解网络过拟合，并在MLPerf微型基准测试中验证效果。
AI.result: 在三个微型CNN任务中，平均减少31.58%计算量（仅损失1%准确率），且优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: T-RECX通过优化早期退出机制，有效提升微型神经网络的资源效率与准确率，适用于边缘计算场景。

search_text: T-RECX: Tiny-Resource Efficient Convolutional neural networks with early-eXit T-REX：具有早期退出功能的小资源高效卷积神经网络 Deploying Machine learning (ML) on milliwatt-scale edge devices (tinyML) is gaining popularity due to recent breakthroughs in ML and Internet of Things (IoT). Most tinyML research focuses on model compression techniques that trade accuracy (and model capacity) for compact models to fit into the KB-sized tiny-edge devices. In this paper, we show how such models can be enhanced by the addition of an early exit intermediate classifier. If the intermediate classifier exhibits sufficient confidence in its prediction, the network exits early thereby, resulting in considerable savings in time. Although early exit classifiers have been proposed in previous work, these previous proposals focus on large networks, making their techniques suboptimal/impractical for tinyML applications. Our technique is optimized specifically for tiny-CNN sized models. In addition, we present a method to alleviate the effect of network overthinking by leveraging the representations learned by the early exit. We evaluate T-RecX on three CNNs from the MLPerf tiny benchmark suite for image classification, keyword spotting and visual wake word detection tasks. Our results show that T-RecX 1) improves the accuracy of baseline network, 2) achieves 31.58% average reduction in FLOPS in exchange for one percent accuracy across all evaluated models. Furthermore, we show that our methods consistently outperform popular prior works on the tiny-CNNs we evaluate. 由于机器学习和物联网 (IoT) 的最新突破，在毫瓦级边缘设备 (tinyML) 上部署机器学习 (ML) 越来越受欢迎。大多数tinyML 研究都集中在模型压缩技术上，这些技术会牺牲精度（和模型容量）来换取紧凑模型，以适应KB 大小的微型边缘设备。在本文中，我们展示了如何通过添加早期退出中间分类器来增强此类模型。如果中间分类器对其预测表现出足够的信心，网络就会提前退出，从而节省大量时间。尽管在之前的工作中已经提出了早期的退出分类器，但这些之前的建议主要关注大型网络，使得它们的技术对于tinyML应用来说不是最优的/不切实际的。我们的技术专门针对微型 CNN 尺寸模型进行了优化。此外，我们提出了一种通过利用早期退出学到的表示来减轻网络过度思考的影响的方法。我们在 MLPerf 微型基准套件中的三个 CNN 上评估 T-RecX，用于图像分类、关键词识别和视觉唤醒词检测任务。我们的结果表明，T-RecX 1) 提高了基线网络的准确性，2) 将 FLOPS 平均降低了 31.58%，以换取所有评估模型 1% 的准确性。此外，我们表明，我们的方法始终优于我们评估的微型 CNN 上流行的先前研究。 本文提出T-RECX方法，在微型卷积神经网络中引入早期退出机制，以提升边缘设备上的资源效率。 Nikhil P Ghanathe,Steve Wilton cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Daichi Zhang,Fanzhao Lin,Yingying Hua,Pengju Wang,Dan Zeng,Shiming Ge
title: Deepfake Video Detection with Spatiotemporal Dropout Transformer
title_zh: 使用时空压差变压器进行 Deepfake 视频检测
abstract: While the abuse of deepfake technology has caused serious concerns recently, how to detect deepfake videos is still a challenge due to the high photo-realistic synthesis of each frame. Existing image-level approaches often focus on single frame and ignore the spatiotemporal cues hidden in deepfake videos, resulting in poor generalization and robustness. The key of a video-level detector is to fully exploit the spatiotemporal inconsistency distributed in local facial regions across different frames in deepfake videos. Inspired by that, this paper proposes a simple yet effective patch-level approach to facilitate deepfake video detection via spatiotemporal dropout transformer. The approach reorganizes each input video into bag of patches that is then fed into a vision transformer to achieve robust representation. Specifically, a spatiotemporal dropout operation is proposed to fully explore patch-level spatiotemporal cues and serve as effective data augmentation to further enhance model's robustness and generalization ability. The operation is flexible and can be easily plugged into existing vision transformers. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach against 25 state-of-the-arts with impressive robustness, generalizability, and representation ability.
summary: While the abuse of deepfake technology has caused serious concerns recently, how to detect deepfake videos is still a challenge due to the high photo-realistic synthesis of each frame. Existing image-level approaches often focus on single frame and ignore the spatiotemporal cues hidden in deepfake videos, resulting in poor generalization and robustness. The key of a video-level detector is to fully exploit the spatiotemporal inconsistency distributed in local facial regions across different frames in deepfake videos. Inspired by that, this paper proposes a simple yet effective patch-level approach to facilitate deepfake video detection via spatiotemporal dropout transformer. The approach reorganizes each input video into bag of patches that is then fed into a vision transformer to achieve robust representation. Specifically, a spatiotemporal dropout operation is proposed to fully explore patch-level spatiotemporal cues and serve as effective data augmentation to further enhance model's robustness and generalization ability. The operation is flexible and can be easily plugged into existing vision transformers. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach against 25 state-of-the-arts with impressive robustness, generalizability, and representation ability.
abstract_zh: 虽然 Deepfake 技术的滥用最近引起了严重关注，但由于每帧的高度逼真合成，如何检测 Deepfake 视频仍然是一个挑战。现有的图像级方法通常关注单帧，而忽略深度假视频中隐藏的时空线索，导致泛化性和鲁棒性较差。视频级检测器的关键是充分利用深度伪造视频中不同帧的局部面部区域分布的时空不一致性。受此启发，本文提出了一种简单而有效的补丁级方法，通过时空 Dropout Transformer 促进深度伪造视频检测。该方法将每个输入视频重新组织成补丁包，然后将其输入视觉转换器以实现稳健的表示。具体来说，提出了时空 dropout 操作，以充分探索补丁级时空线索，并作为有效的数据增强，进一步增强模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。操作灵活，可以轻松插入现有的视觉转换器。大量的实验证明了我们的方法针对 25 种最先进的方法的有效性，并且具有令人印象深刻的鲁棒性、泛化性和表示能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空丢弃变换器的补丁级方法，用于检测深度伪造视频。
AI.motivation: 现有图像级方法仅关注单帧图像，忽略深度伪造视频中隐藏的时空线索，导致泛化性和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 将视频重新组织为补丁集合输入视觉变换器，并提出时空丢弃操作以增强时空线索利用和模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在25种最先进方法对比中展现优异的鲁棒性、泛化能力和表征能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空丢弃变换器有效挖掘局部面部区域的时空不一致性，为深度伪造检测提供简单有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Wenyu Liang,Fen Fang,Cihan Acar,Wei Qi Toh,Ying Sun,Qianli Xu,Yan Wu
title: Visuo-Tactile Manipulation Planning Using Reinforcement Learning with Affordance Representation
title_zh: 使用强化学习和可供性表示进行视觉触觉操作规划
abstract: Robots are increasingly expected to manipulate objects in ever more unstructured environments where the object properties have high perceptual uncertainty from any single sensory modality. This directly impacts successful object manipulation. In this work, we propose a reinforcement learning-based motion planning framework for object manipulation which makes use of both on-the-fly multisensory feedback and a learned attention-guided deep affordance model as perceptual states. The affordance model is learned from multiple sensory modalities, including vision and touch (tactile and force/torque), which is designed to predict and indicate the manipulable regions of multiple affordances (i.e., graspability and pushability) for objects with similar appearances but different intrinsic properties (e.g., mass distribution). A DQN-based deep reinforcement learning algorithm is then trained to select the optimal action for successful object manipulation. To validate the performance of the proposed framework, our method is evaluated and benchmarked using both an open dataset and our collected dataset. The results show that the proposed method and overall framework outperform existing methods and achieve better accuracy and higher efficiency.
summary: Robots are increasingly expected to manipulate objects in ever more unstructured environments where the object properties have high perceptual uncertainty from any single sensory modality. This directly impacts successful object manipulation. In this work, we propose a reinforcement learning-based motion planning framework for object manipulation which makes use of both on-the-fly multisensory feedback and a learned attention-guided deep affordance model as perceptual states. The affordance model is learned from multiple sensory modalities, including vision and touch (tactile and force/torque), which is designed to predict and indicate the manipulable regions of multiple affordances (i.e., graspability and pushability) for objects with similar appearances but different intrinsic properties (e.g., mass distribution). A DQN-based deep reinforcement learning algorithm is then trained to select the optimal action for successful object manipulation. To validate the performance of the proposed framework, our method is evaluated and benchmarked using both an open dataset and our collected dataset. The results show that the proposed method and overall framework outperform existing methods and achieve better accuracy and higher efficiency.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越期望机器人能够在更加非结构化的环境中操纵物体，在这些环境中，物体属性对于任何单一的感官模态都具有高度的感知不确定性。这直接影响成功的对象操作。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的运动规划框架，用于对象操纵，该框架利用动态多感官反馈和学习的注意力引导的深度可供性模型作为感知状态。可供性模型是从多种感官模式中学习的，包括视觉和触觉（触觉和力/扭矩），旨在预测和指示具有相似外观但不同内在属性（例如质量分布）的物体的多种可供性（即抓握性和可推性）的可操纵区域。然后训练基于 DQN 的深度强化学习算法来选择成功操作对象的最佳动作。为了验证所提出框架的性能，我们使用开放数据集和我们收集的数据集对我们的方法进行评估和基准测试。结果表明，所提出的方法和整体框架优于现有方法，并实现了更好的精度和更高的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的视觉-触觉操作规划框架，通过多感官反馈和学习的注意力引导的亲和力模型，提升机器人在不确定环境中的物体操作能力。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态感知在复杂环境中难以准确识别物体内在属性（如质量分布），导致操作失败。需融合多感官信息并建模物体可操作区域（如抓取性、推挤性）以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建多模态亲和力模型（视觉+触觉力/扭矩），预测物体可操作区域；基于DQN的强化学习算法结合实时多感官反馈进行动作决策；在公开数据集和自建数据集上验证性能。
AI.result: 相较现有方法，该框架在操作准确率和效率上均有显著提升，尤其在外观相似但内在属性差异的物体操作任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 多感官融合与亲和力表征的结合有效解决了复杂环境中物体操作的感知不确定性问题，为机器人自主操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chenxi Ma,Bo Yan,Qing Lin,Weimin Tan,Siming Chen
title: Rethinking Super-Resolution as Text-Guided Details Generation
title_zh: 重新思考超分辨率作为文本引导的细节生成
abstract: Deep neural networks have greatly promoted the performance of single image super-resolution (SISR). Conventional methods still resort to restoring the single high-resolution (HR) solution only based on the input of image modality. However, the image-level information is insufficient to predict adequate details and photo-realistic visual quality facing large upscaling factors (x8, x16). In this paper, we propose a new perspective that regards the SISR as a semantic image detail enhancement problem to generate semantically reasonable HR image that are faithful to the ground truth. To enhance the semantic accuracy and the visual quality of the reconstructed image, we explore the multi-modal fusion learning in SISR by proposing a Text-Guided Super-Resolution (TGSR) framework, which can effectively utilize the information from the text and image modalities. Different from existing methods, the proposed TGSR could generate HR image details that match the text descriptions through a coarse-to-fine process. Extensive experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the effect of the TGSR, which exploits the text reference to recover realistic images.
summary: Deep neural networks have greatly promoted the performance of single image super-resolution (SISR). Conventional methods still resort to restoring the single high-resolution (HR) solution only based on the input of image modality. However, the image-level information is insufficient to predict adequate details and photo-realistic visual quality facing large upscaling factors (x8, x16). In this paper, we propose a new perspective that regards the SISR as a semantic image detail enhancement problem to generate semantically reasonable HR image that are faithful to the ground truth. To enhance the semantic accuracy and the visual quality of the reconstructed image, we explore the multi-modal fusion learning in SISR by proposing a Text-Guided Super-Resolution (TGSR) framework, which can effectively utilize the information from the text and image modalities. Different from existing methods, the proposed TGSR could generate HR image details that match the text descriptions through a coarse-to-fine process. Extensive experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the effect of the TGSR, which exploits the text reference to recover realistic images.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络极大地提升了单图像超分辨率（SISR）的性能。传统方法仍然仅基于图像模态的输入来恢复单个高分辨率（HR）解。然而，面对较大的放大因素（x8、x16），图像级信息不足以预测足够的细节和照片般逼真的视觉质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的视角，将 SISR 视为语义图像细节增强问题，以生成忠实于地面事实的语义合理的 HR 图像。为了提高重建图像的语义准确性和视觉质量，我们通过提出文本引导超分辨率（TGSR）框架来探索 SISR 中的多模态融合学习，该框架可以有效地利用来自文本和图像模态的信息。与现有方法不同，所提出的 TGSR 可以通过从粗到细的过程生成与文本描述相匹配的 HR 图像细节。大量的实验和消融研究证明了 TGSR 的效果，它利用文本参考来恢复真实的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文将图像超分辨率任务重新定义为文本引导的细节生成问题，提出结合文本和图像信息的多模态融合框架TGSR以生成更真实的高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 传统单图像超分辨率方法在大倍数超采样时因仅依赖图像信息而难以生成足够细节和真实感，需引入文本信息增强语义准确性。
AI.method: 提出文本引导超分辨率框架TGSR，通过多模态融合学习利用文本和图像信息，并采用粗到细的生成过程匹配文本描述生成细节。
AI.result: 实验和消融研究验证了TGSR通过文本参考恢复真实图像的有效性，证明其在语义准确性和视觉质量上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 将超分辨率视为文本引导的细节增强问题，结合多模态信息能显著提升大倍数超采样下的图像重建效果。

authors_text: Zhe Chen,Jing Zhang,Yufei Xu,Dacheng Tao
title: Transformer-based Context Condensation for Boosting Feature Pyramids in Object Detection
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的上下文压缩，用于增强目标检测中的特征金字塔
abstract: Current object detectors typically have a feature pyramid (FP) module for multi-level feature fusion (MFF) which aims to mitigate the gap between features from different levels and form a comprehensive object representation to achieve better detection performance. However, they usually require heavy cross-level connections or iterative refinement to obtain better MFF result, making them complicated in structure and inefficient in computation. To address these issues, we propose a novel and efficient context modeling mechanism that can help existing FPs deliver better MFF results while reducing the computational costs effectively. In particular, we introduce a novel insight that comprehensive contexts can be decomposed and condensed into two types of representations for higher efficiency. The two representations include a locally concentrated representation and a globally summarized representation, where the former focuses on extracting context cues from nearby areas while the latter extracts key representations of the whole image scene as global context cues. By collecting the condensed contexts, we employ a Transformer decoder to investigate the relations between them and each local feature from the FP and then refine the MFF results accordingly. As a result, we obtain a simple and light-weight Transformer-based Context Condensation (TCC) module, which can boost various FPs and lower their computational costs simultaneously. Extensive experimental results on the challenging MS COCO dataset show that TCC is compatible to four representative FPs and consistently improves their detection accuracy by up to 7.8 % in terms of average precision and reduce their complexities by up to around 20% in terms of GFLOPs, helping them achieve state-of-the-art performance more efficiently. Code will be released.
summary: Current object detectors typically have a feature pyramid (FP) module for multi-level feature fusion (MFF) which aims to mitigate the gap between features from different levels and form a comprehensive object representation to achieve better detection performance. However, they usually require heavy cross-level connections or iterative refinement to obtain better MFF result, making them complicated in structure and inefficient in computation. To address these issues, we propose a novel and efficient context modeling mechanism that can help existing FPs deliver better MFF results while reducing the computational costs effectively. In particular, we introduce a novel insight that comprehensive contexts can be decomposed and condensed into two types of representations for higher efficiency. The two representations include a locally concentrated representation and a globally summarized representation, where the former focuses on extracting context cues from nearby areas while the latter extracts key representations of the whole image scene as global context cues. By collecting the condensed contexts, we employ a Transformer decoder to investigate the relations between them and each local feature from the FP and then refine the MFF results accordingly. As a result, we obtain a simple and light-weight Transformer-based Context Condensation (TCC) module, which can boost various FPs and lower their computational costs simultaneously. Extensive experimental results on the challenging MS COCO dataset show that TCC is compatible to four representative FPs and consistently improves their detection accuracy by up to 7.8 % in terms of average precision and reduce their complexities by up to around 20% in terms of GFLOPs, helping them achieve state-of-the-art performance more efficiently. Code will be released.
abstract_zh: 当前的目标检测器通常具有用于多级特征融合（MFF）的特征金字塔（FP）模块，其旨在缩小不同级别特征之间的差距并形成全面的目标表示以实现更好的检测性能。然而，它们通常需要大量的跨级连接或迭代细化才能获得更好的MFF结果，使得它们结构复杂且计算效率低。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖且高效的上下文建模机制，可以帮助现有的 FP 提供更好的 MFF 结果，同时有效降低计算成本。特别是，我们引入了一种新颖的见解，即可以将综合上下文分解并压缩为两种类型的表示形式，以提高效率。这两种表示包括局部集中表示和全局概括表示，前者专注于从附近区域提取上下文线索，而后者则提取整个图像场景的关键表示作为全局上下文线索。通过收集压缩的上下文，我们使用 Transformer 解码器来研究它们与 FP 中每个局部特征之间的关系，然后相应地细化 MFF 结果。因此，我们获得了一个简单且轻量级的基于 Transformer 的上下文压缩（TCC）模块，它可以提高各种 FP 并同时降低其计算成本。在具有挑战性的 MS COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验结果表明，TCC 与四种代表性 FP 兼容，并且在平均精度方面持续将其检测精度提高高达 7.8%，在 GFLOP 方面将其复杂性降低高达约 20%，从而帮助它们更有效地实现最先进的性能。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的上下文压缩模块（TCC），用于增强目标检测中的特征金字塔（FP）模块，从而提升检测性能并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的目标检测器通常使用特征金字塔（FP）模块进行多级特征融合（MFF），但这些方法需要复杂的跨级连接或迭代优化，导致结构复杂且计算效率低下。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的上下文建模机制，将全面的上下文分解为局部集中表示和全局摘要表示，并使用Transformer解码器分析这些表示与FP中每个局部特征之间的关系，以优化MFF结果。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上的实验表明，TCC模块能够兼容四种代表性FP，将检测精度提升最高达7.8%（平均精度），同时将计算复杂度降低约20%（GFLOPs）。
AI.conclusion: TCC模块是一种简单且轻量的解决方案，能够有效增强FP性能并降低计算成本，为高效目标检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Transformer-based Context Condensation for Boosting Feature Pyramids in Object Detection 基于 Transformer 的上下文压缩，用于增强目标检测中的特征金字塔 Current object detectors typically have a feature pyramid (FP) module for multi-level feature fusion (MFF) which aims to mitigate the gap between features from different levels and form a comprehensive object representation to achieve better detection performance. However, they usually require heavy cross-level connections or iterative refinement to obtain better MFF result, making them complicated in structure and inefficient in computation. To address these issues, we propose a novel and efficient context modeling mechanism that can help existing FPs deliver better MFF results while reducing the computational costs effectively. In particular, we introduce a novel insight that comprehensive contexts can be decomposed and condensed into two types of representations for higher efficiency. The two representations include a locally concentrated representation and a globally summarized representation, where the former focuses on extracting context cues from nearby areas while the latter extracts key representations of the whole image scene as global context cues. By collecting the condensed contexts, we employ a Transformer decoder to investigate the relations between them and each local feature from the FP and then refine the MFF results accordingly. As a result, we obtain a simple and light-weight Transformer-based Context Condensation (TCC) module, which can boost various FPs and lower their computational costs simultaneously. Extensive experimental results on the challenging MS COCO dataset show that TCC is compatible to four representative FPs and consistently improves their detection accuracy by up to 7.8 % in terms of average precision and reduce their complexities by up to around 20% in terms of GFLOPs, helping them achieve state-of-the-art performance more efficiently. Code will be released. 当前的目标检测器通常具有用于多级特征融合（MFF）的特征金字塔（FP）模块，其旨在缩小不同级别特征之间的差距并形成全面的目标表示以实现更好的检测性能。然而，它们通常需要大量的跨级连接或迭代细化才能获得更好的MFF结果，使得它们结构复杂且计算效率低。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖且高效的上下文建模机制，可以帮助现有的 FP 提供更好的 MFF 结果，同时有效降低计算成本。特别是，我们引入了一种新颖的见解，即可以将综合上下文分解并压缩为两种类型的表示形式，以提高效率。这两种表示包括局部集中表示和全局概括表示，前者专注于从附近区域提取上下文线索，而后者则提取整个图像场景的关键表示作为全局上下文线索。通过收集压缩的上下文，我们使用 Transformer 解码器来研究它们与 FP 中每个局部特征之间的关系，然后相应地细化 MFF 结果。因此，我们获得了一个简单且轻量级的基于 Transformer 的上下文压缩（TCC）模块，它可以提高各种 FP 并同时降低其计算成本。在具有挑战性的 MS COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验结果表明，TCC 与四种代表性 FP 兼容，并且在平均精度方面持续将其检测精度提高高达 7.8%，在 GFLOP 方面将其复杂性降低高达约 20%，从而帮助它们更有效地实现最先进的性能。代码将被发布。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的上下文压缩模块（TCC），用于增强目标检测中的特征金字塔（FP）模块，从而提升检测性能并降低计算成本。 Zhe Chen,Jing Zhang,Yufei Xu,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Clément L. Canonne,Ilias Diakonikolas,Daniel M. Kane,Sihan Liu
title: Near-Optimal Bounds for Testing Histogram Distributions
title_zh: 测试直方图分布的近乎最优界限
abstract: We investigate the problem of testing whether a discrete probability distribution over an ordered domain is a histogram on a specified number of bins. One of the most common tools for the succinct approximation of data, $k$-histograms over $[n]$, are probability distributions that are piecewise constant over a set of $k$ intervals. The histogram testing problem is the following: Given samples from an unknown distribution $\mathbf{p}$ on $[n]$, we want to distinguish between the cases that $\mathbf{p}$ is a $k$-histogram versus $\varepsilon$-far from any $k$-histogram, in total variation distance. Our main result is a sample near-optimal and computationally efficient algorithm for this testing problem, and a nearly-matching (within logarithmic factors) sample complexity lower bound. Specifically, we show that the histogram testing problem has sample complexity $\widetilde Θ(\sqrt{nk} / \varepsilon + k / \varepsilon^2 + \sqrt{n} / \varepsilon^2)$.
summary: We investigate the problem of testing whether a discrete probability distribution over an ordered domain is a histogram on a specified number of bins. One of the most common tools for the succinct approximation of data, $k$-histograms over $[n]$, are probability distributions that are piecewise constant over a set of $k$ intervals. The histogram testing problem is the following: Given samples from an unknown distribution $\mathbf{p}$ on $[n]$, we want to distinguish between the cases that $\mathbf{p}$ is a $k$-histogram versus $\varepsilon$-far from any $k$-histogram, in total variation distance. Our main result is a sample near-optimal and computationally efficient algorithm for this testing problem, and a nearly-matching (within logarithmic factors) sample complexity lower bound. Specifically, we show that the histogram testing problem has sample complexity $\widetilde Θ(\sqrt{nk} / \varepsilon + k / \varepsilon^2 + \sqrt{n} / \varepsilon^2)$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究测试有序域上的离散概率分布是否是指定数量的箱上的直方图的问题。用于简洁近似数据的最常用工具之一，$[n]$ 上的 $k$ 直方图，是在一组 $k$ 区间上分段常数的概率分布。直方图测试问题如下：给定来自 $[n]$ 上未知分布 $\mathbf{p}$ 的样本，我们想要区分 $\mathbf{p}$ 是 $k$ 直方图与 $\varepsilon$ 远离任何 $k$ 直方图的情况，在总变化距离上。我们的主要结果是针对该测试问题的近乎最优且计算高效的示例算法，以及几乎匹配（在对数因子内）的样本复杂度下限。具体来说，我们表明直方图测试问题的样本复杂度为 $\widetilde θ(\sqrt{nk} / \varepsilon + k / \varepsilon^2 + \sqrt{n} / \varepsilon^2)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过样本高效判断一个离散概率分布是否为指定分箱数的直方图分布。
AI.motivation: k-直方图是数据近似的常用工具，但缺乏对测试其分布性质的最优样本复杂度分析。
AI.method: 设计近似最优的统计测试算法，并通过理论分析建立样本复杂度的上下界。
AI.result: 提出样本复杂度为~Θ(√(nk)/ε + k/ε² + √n/ε²)的测试算法及匹配的下界证明。
AI.conclusion: 实现了直方图分布测试问题的近似最优样本复杂度界，算法兼具高效性与理论保证。

authors_text: Yu Wang,Guan Gui,Yun Lin,Hsiao-Chun Wu,Chau Yuen,Fumiyuki Adachi
title: Few-Shot Specific Emitter Identification via Deep Metric Ensemble Learning
title_zh: 通过深度度量集成学习进行少样本特定发射器识别
abstract: Specific emitter identification (SEI) is a highly potential technology for physical layer authentication that is one of the most critical supplement for the upper-layer authentication. SEI is based on radio frequency (RF) features from circuit difference, rather than cryptography. These features are inherent characteristic of hardware circuits, which difficult to counterfeit. Recently, various deep learning (DL)-based conventional SEI methods have been proposed, and achieved advanced performances. However, these methods are proposed for close-set scenarios with massive RF signal samples for training, and they generally have poor performance under the condition of limited training samples. Thus, we focus on few-shot SEI (FS-SEI) for aircraft identification via automatic dependent surveillance-broadcast (ADS-B) signals, and a novel FS-SEI method is proposed, based on deep metric ensemble learning (DMEL). Specifically, the proposed method consists of feature embedding and classification. The former is based on metric learning with complex-valued convolutional neural network (CVCNN) for extracting discriminative features with compact intra-category distance and separable inter-category distance, while the latter is realized by an ensemble classifier. Simulation results show that if the number of samples per category is more than 5, the average accuracy of our proposed method is higher than 98\%. Moreover, feature visualization demonstrates the advantages of our proposed method in both discriminability and generalization. The codes of this paper can be downloaded from GitHub(https://github.com/BeechburgPieStar/Few-Shot-Specific-Emitter-Identification-via-Deep-Metric-Ensemble-Learning)
summary: Specific emitter identification (SEI) is a highly potential technology for physical layer authentication that is one of the most critical supplement for the upper-layer authentication. SEI is based on radio frequency (RF) features from circuit difference, rather than cryptography. These features are inherent characteristic of hardware circuits, which difficult to counterfeit. Recently, various deep learning (DL)-based conventional SEI methods have been proposed, and achieved advanced performances. However, these methods are proposed for close-set scenarios with massive RF signal samples for training, and they generally have poor performance under the condition of limited training samples. Thus, we focus on few-shot SEI (FS-SEI) for aircraft identification via automatic dependent surveillance-broadcast (ADS-B) signals, and a novel FS-SEI method is proposed, based on deep metric ensemble learning (DMEL). Specifically, the proposed method consists of feature embedding and classification. The former is based on metric learning with complex-valued convolutional neural network (CVCNN) for extracting discriminative features with compact intra-category distance and separable inter-category distance, while the latter is realized by an ensemble classifier. Simulation results show that if the number of samples per category is more than 5, the average accuracy of our proposed method is higher than 98\%. Moreover, feature visualization demonstrates the advantages of our proposed method in both discriminability and generalization. The codes of this paper can be downloaded from GitHub(https://github.com/BeechburgPieStar/Few-Shot-Specific-Emitter-Identification-via-Deep-Metric-Ensemble-Learning)
abstract_zh: 特定发射器识别（SEI）是一种极具潜力的物理层认证技术，是对上层认证最关键的补充之一。 SEI 基于电路差异的射频 (RF) 特性，而不是密码学。这些特征是硬件电路固有的特性，难以仿冒。最近，人们提出了各种基于深度学习（DL）的传统SEI方法，并取得了先进的性能。然而，这些方法都是针对具有大量射频信号样本进行训练的近距离场景而提出的，在训练样本有限的情况下，它们通常表现不佳。因此，我们专注于通过自动相关监视广播（ADS-B）信号进行飞机识别的小样本SEI（FS-SEI），并提出了一种基于深度度量集成学习（DMEL）的新型FS-SEI方法。具体来说，所提出的方法包括特征嵌入和分类。前者基于复值卷积神经网络（CVCNN）的度量学习，用于提取具有紧凑的类内距离和可分离的类间距离的判别特征，而后者则通过集成分类器实现。仿真结果表明，如果每个类别的样本数量超过 5，我们提出的方法的平均准确率高于 98%。此外，特征可视化展示了我们提出的方法在可区分性和泛化性方面的优势。本文代码可以从GitHub下载(https://github.com/BeechburgPieStar/Few-Shot-Specific-Emitter-Identification-via-Deep-Metric-Ensemble-Learning)

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度度量集成学习的少样本特定发射机识别方法，用于飞机识别。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大量样本训练，在样本有限时性能下降，需解决少样本场景下的特定发射机识别问题。
AI.method: 采用复值卷积神经网络提取判别性特征，并结合集成分类器实现特征嵌入与分类。
AI.result: 当每类样本数超过5时，平均准确率高于98%，特征可视化验证了方法的可区分性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了少样本场景下的特定发射机识别问题，具有高准确率和良好泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度度量集成学习的少样本特定发射机识别方法，用于飞机识别。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大量样本训练，在样本有限时性能下降，需解决少样本场景下的特定发射机识别问题。
ai_content.method: 采用复值卷积神经网络提取判别性特征，并结合集成分类器实现特征嵌入与分类。
ai_content.result: 当每类样本数超过5时，平均准确率高于98%，特征可视化验证了方法的可区分性和泛化能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了少样本场景下的特定发射机识别问题，具有高准确率和良好泛化能力。

search_text: Few-Shot Specific Emitter Identification via Deep Metric Ensemble Learning 通过深度度量集成学习进行少样本特定发射器识别 Specific emitter identification (SEI) is a highly potential technology for physical layer authentication that is one of the most critical supplement for the upper-layer authentication. SEI is based on radio frequency (RF) features from circuit difference, rather than cryptography. These features are inherent characteristic of hardware circuits, which difficult to counterfeit. Recently, various deep learning (DL)-based conventional SEI methods have been proposed, and achieved advanced performances. However, these methods are proposed for close-set scenarios with massive RF signal samples for training, and they generally have poor performance under the condition of limited training samples. Thus, we focus on few-shot SEI (FS-SEI) for aircraft identification via automatic dependent surveillance-broadcast (ADS-B) signals, and a novel FS-SEI method is proposed, based on deep metric ensemble learning (DMEL). Specifically, the proposed method consists of feature embedding and classification. The former is based on metric learning with complex-valued convolutional neural network (CVCNN) for extracting discriminative features with compact intra-category distance and separable inter-category distance, while the latter is realized by an ensemble classifier. Simulation results show that if the number of samples per category is more than 5, the average accuracy of our proposed method is higher than 98\%. Moreover, feature visualization demonstrates the advantages of our proposed method in both discriminability and generalization. The codes of this paper can be downloaded from GitHub(https://github.com/BeechburgPieStar/Few-Shot-Specific-Emitter-Identification-via-Deep-Metric-Ensemble-Learning) 特定发射器识别（SEI）是一种极具潜力的物理层认证技术，是对上层认证最关键的补充之一。 SEI 基于电路差异的射频 (RF) 特性，而不是密码学。这些特征是硬件电路固有的特性，难以仿冒。最近，人们提出了各种基于深度学习（DL）的传统SEI方法，并取得了先进的性能。然而，这些方法都是针对具有大量射频信号样本进行训练的近距离场景而提出的，在训练样本有限的情况下，它们通常表现不佳。因此，我们专注于通过自动相关监视广播（ADS-B）信号进行飞机识别的小样本SEI（FS-SEI），并提出了一种基于深度度量集成学习（DMEL）的新型FS-SEI方法。具体来说，所提出的方法包括特征嵌入和分类。前者基于复值卷积神经网络（CVCNN）的度量学习，用于提取具有紧凑的类内距离和可分离的类间距离的判别特征，而后者则通过集成分类器实现。仿真结果表明，如果每个类别的样本数量超过 5，我们提出的方法的平均准确率高于 98%。此外，特征可视化展示了我们提出的方法在可区分性和泛化性方面的优势。本文代码可以从GitHub下载(https://github.com/BeechburgPieStar/Few-Shot-Specific-Emitter-Identification-via-Deep-Metric-Ensemble-Learning) 本文提出一种基于深度度量集成学习的少样本特定发射机识别方法，用于飞机识别。 Yu Wang,Guan Gui,Yun Lin,Hsiao-Chun Wu,Chau Yuen,Fumiyuki Adachi eess.SP,cs.AI

authors_text: Laura Alonso Alemany,Luciana Benotti,Hernán Maina,Lucía González,Mariela Rajngewerc,Lautaro Martínez,Jorge Sánchez,Mauro Schilman,Guido Ivetta,Alexia Halvorsen,Amanda Mata Rojo,Matías Bordone,Beatriz Busaniche
title: A methodology to characterize bias and harmful stereotypes in natural language processing in Latin America
title_zh: 描述拉丁美洲自然语言处理中的偏见和有害刻板印象的方法
abstract: Automated decision-making systems, especially those based on natural language processing, are pervasive in our lives. They are not only behind the internet search engines we use daily, but also take more critical roles: selecting candidates for a job, determining suspects of a crime, diagnosing autism and more. Such automated systems make errors, which may be harmful in many ways, be it because of the severity of the consequences (as in health issues) or because of the sheer number of people they affect. When errors made by an automated system affect a population more than others, we call the system \textit{biased}. Most modern natural language technologies are based on artifacts obtained from enormous volumes of text using machine learning, namely language models and word embeddings. Since they are created by applying subsymbolic machine learning, mostly artificial neural networks, they are opaque and practically uninterpretable by direct inspection, thus making it very difficult to audit them. In this paper, we present a methodology that spells out how social scientists, domain experts, and machine learning experts can collaboratively explore biases and harmful stereotypes in word embeddings and large language models. Our methodology is based on the following principles: * focus on the linguistic manifestations of discrimination on word embeddings and language models, not on the mathematical properties of the models * reduce the technical barrier for discrimination experts%, be it social scientists, domain experts or other * characterize through a qualitative exploratory process in addition to a metric-based approach * address mitigation as part of the training process, not as an afterthought
summary: Automated decision-making systems, especially those based on natural language processing, are pervasive in our lives. They are not only behind the internet search engines we use daily, but also take more critical roles: selecting candidates for a job, determining suspects of a crime, diagnosing autism and more. Such automated systems make errors, which may be harmful in many ways, be it because of the severity of the consequences (as in health issues) or because of the sheer number of people they affect. When errors made by an automated system affect a population more than others, we call the system \textit{biased}. Most modern natural language technologies are based on artifacts obtained from enormous volumes of text using machine learning, namely language models and word embeddings. Since they are created by applying subsymbolic machine learning, mostly artificial neural networks, they are opaque and practically uninterpretable by direct inspection, thus making it very difficult to audit them. In this paper, we present a methodology that spells out how social scientists, domain experts, and machine learning experts can collaboratively explore biases and harmful stereotypes in word embeddings and large language models. Our methodology is based on the following principles: * focus on the linguistic manifestations of discrimination on word embeddings and language models, not on the mathematical properties of the models * reduce the technical barrier for discrimination experts%, be it social scientists, domain experts or other * characterize through a qualitative exploratory process in addition to a metric-based approach * address mitigation as part of the training process, not as an afterthought
abstract_zh: 自动化决策系统，尤其是基于自然语言处理的系统，在我们的生活中无处不在。它们不仅是我们日常使用的互联网搜索引擎的幕后黑手，而且还发挥着更关键的作用：选择工作候选人、确定犯罪嫌疑人、诊断自闭症等等。此类自动化系统会犯错误，这些错误可能在很多方面都是有害的，无论是因为后果的严重性（如健康问题）还是因为它们影响的人数众多。当自动化系统所犯的错误对某个群体的影响大于其他群体时，我们称该系统为\textit{有偏差}。大多数现代自然语言技术都基于使用机器学习从大量文本中获得的工件，即语言模型和词嵌入。由于它们是通过应用子符号机器学习（主要是人工神经网络）创建的，因此它们是不透明的，并且实际上无法通过直接检查来解释，因此很难对其进行审核。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，阐明了社会科学家、领域专家和机器学习专家如何协作探索词嵌入和大型语言模型中的偏见和有害刻板印象。我们的方法基于以下原则： * 关注词嵌入和语言模型歧视的语言表现，而不是模型的数学属性 * 减少歧视专家%的技术障碍，无论是社会科学家、领域专家还是其他 * 除了基于度量的方法之外，还通过定性探索过程来表征 * 将缓解措施作为训练过程的一部分，而不是事后的想法

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对拉丁美洲自然语言处理技术中偏见和有害刻板印象的协作分析方法。
AI.motivation: 自动化决策系统（如自然语言处理技术）在关键领域广泛应用，但其隐性偏见可能对特定群体造成伤害，且现有模型的不透明性使审计困难。
AI.method: 通过跨学科协作框架，结合语言学分析与量化指标，聚焦词向量和语言模型中的歧视性语言表现，并在训练阶段集成偏见缓解机制。
AI.result: 构建了包含多学科专家参与的偏见分析流程，降低了技术门槛并提供了可操作的检测与缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为拉丁美洲地区NLP系统的公平性评估提供了系统性工具，强调了技术开发中社会学视角的必要性。

authors_text: Sauradip Nag,Xiatian Zhu,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: Proposal-Free Temporal Action Detection via Global Segmentation Mask Learning
title_zh: 通过全局分割掩模学习进行无提案时间动作检测
abstract: Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on generating an overwhelmingly large number of proposals per video. This leads to complex model designs due to proposal generation and/or per-proposal action instance evaluation and the resultant high computational cost. In this work, for the first time, we propose a proposal-free Temporal Action detection model with Global Segmentation mask (TAGS). Our core idea is to learn a global segmentation mask of each action instance jointly at the full video length. The TAGS model differs significantly from the conventional proposal-based methods by focusing on global temporal representation learning to directly detect local start and end points of action instances without proposals. Further, by modeling TAD holistically rather than locally at the individual proposal level, TAGS needs a much simpler model architecture with lower computational cost. Extensive experiments show that despite its simpler design, TAGS outperforms existing TAD methods, achieving new state-of-the-art performance on two benchmarks. Importantly, it is ~ 20x faster to train and ~1.6x more efficient for inference. Our PyTorch implementation of TAGS is available at https://github.com/sauradip/TAGS .
summary: Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on generating an overwhelmingly large number of proposals per video. This leads to complex model designs due to proposal generation and/or per-proposal action instance evaluation and the resultant high computational cost. In this work, for the first time, we propose a proposal-free Temporal Action detection model with Global Segmentation mask (TAGS). Our core idea is to learn a global segmentation mask of each action instance jointly at the full video length. The TAGS model differs significantly from the conventional proposal-based methods by focusing on global temporal representation learning to directly detect local start and end points of action instances without proposals. Further, by modeling TAD holistically rather than locally at the individual proposal level, TAGS needs a much simpler model architecture with lower computational cost. Extensive experiments show that despite its simpler design, TAGS outperforms existing TAD methods, achieving new state-of-the-art performance on two benchmarks. Importantly, it is ~ 20x faster to train and ~1.6x more efficient for inference. Our PyTorch implementation of TAGS is available at https://github.com/sauradip/TAGS .
abstract_zh: 现有的时间动作检测（TAD）方法依赖于为每个视频生成大量的建议。由于提案生成和/或每个提案动作实例评估以及由此产生的高计算成本，这导致复杂的模型设计。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一种具有全局分割掩模（TAGS）的无提案时间动作检测模型。我们的核心思想是在整个视频长度上联合学习每个动作实例的全局分割掩码。 TAGS 模型与传统的基于提案的方法有很大不同，它专注于全局时间表示学习，无需提案即可直接检测动作实例的局部起点和终点。此外，通过对 TAD 进行整体建模，而不是在单个提案级别进行局部建模，TAGS 需要更简单的模型架构和更低的计算成本。大量实验表明，尽管设计更简单，但 TAGS 的性能优于现有的 TAD 方法，在两个基准测试中实现了新的最先进的性能。重要的是，训练速度提高了约 20 倍，推理效率提高了约 1.6 倍。我们的 TAGS 的 PyTorch 实现可在 https://github.com/sauradip/TAGS 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需生成候选框的时序动作检测方法TAGS，通过学习全局分割掩码直接检测动作起止点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量候选框生成导致模型复杂且计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: TAGS模型在完整视频长度上联合学习每个动作实例的全局分割掩码，直接定位动作起止点，无需候选框。
AI.result: 在两个基准测试中达到新SOTA，训练速度提升20倍，推理效率提高1.6倍。
AI.conclusion: TAGS通过全局时序表征学习简化模型结构，在保持性能的同时显著提升效率，验证了方法有效性。
