tldr: 本文提出一种无需生成候选框的时序动作检测方法TAGS，通过学习全局分割掩码直接检测动作起止点。
motivation: 现有方法依赖大量候选框生成导致模型复杂且计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
method: TAGS模型在完整视频长度上联合学习每个动作实例的全局分割掩码，直接定位动作起止点，无需候选框。
result: 在两个基准测试中达到新SOTA，训练速度提升20倍，推理效率提高1.6倍。
conclusion: TAGS通过全局时序表征学习简化模型结构，在保持性能的同时显著提升效率，验证了方法有效性。
search_text: Proposal-Free Temporal Action Detection via Global Segmentation Mask Learning 通过全局分割掩模学习进行无提案时间动作检测 Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on generating an overwhelmingly large number of proposals per video. This leads to complex model designs due to proposal generation and/or per-proposal action instance evaluation and the resultant high computational cost. In this work, for the first time, we propose a proposal-free Temporal Action detection model with Global Segmentation mask (TAGS). Our core idea is to learn a global segmentation mask of each action instance jointly at the full video length. The TAGS model differs significantly from the conventional proposal-based methods by focusing on global temporal representation learning to directly detect local start and end points of action instances without proposals. Further, by modeling TAD holistically rather than locally at the individual proposal level, TAGS needs a much simpler model architecture with lower computational cost. Extensive experiments show that despite its simpler design, TAGS outperforms existing TAD methods, achieving new state-of-the-art performance on two benchmarks. Importantly, it is ~ 20x faster to train and ~1.6x more efficient for inference. Our PyTorch implementation of TAGS is available at https://github.com/sauradip/TAGS . 现有的时间动作检测（TAD）方法依赖于为每个视频生成大量的建议。由于提案生成和/或每个提案动作实例评估以及由此产生的高计算成本，这导致复杂的模型设计。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一种具有全局分割掩模（TAGS）的无提案时间动作检测模型。我们的核心思想是在整个视频长度上联合学习每个动作实例的全局分割掩码。 TAGS 模型与传统的基于提案的方法有很大不同，它专注于全局时间表示学习，无需提案即可直接检测动作实例的局部起点和终点。此外，通过对 TAD 进行整体建模，而不是在单个提案级别进行局部建模，TAGS 需要更简单的模型架构和更低的计算成本。大量实验表明，尽管设计更简单，但 TAGS 的性能优于现有的 TAD 方法，在两个基准测试中实现了新的最先进的性能。重要的是，训练速度提高了约 20 倍，推理效率提高了约 1.6 倍。我们的 TAGS 的 PyTorch 实现可在 https://github.com/sauradip/TAGS 上找到。 本文提出一种无需生成候选框的时序动作检测方法TAGS，通过学习全局分割掩码直接检测动作起止点。 Sauradip Nag,Xiatian Zhu,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Xilin Yang,Bijie Bai,Yijie Zhang,Yuzhu Li,Kevin de Haan,Tairan Liu,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Virtual stain transfer in histology via cascaded deep neural networks
title_zh: 通过级联深度神经网络进行组织学中的虚拟染色转移
abstract: Pathological diagnosis relies on the visual inspection of histologically stained thin tissue specimens, where different types of stains are applied to bring contrast to and highlight various desired histological features. However, the destructive histochemical staining procedures are usually irreversible, making it very difficult to obtain multiple stains on the same tissue section. Here, we demonstrate a virtual stain transfer framework via a cascaded deep neural network (C-DNN) to digitally transform hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained tissue images into other types of histological stains. Unlike a single neural network structure which only takes one stain type as input to digitally output images of another stain type, C-DNN first uses virtual staining to transform autofluorescence microscopy images into H&E and then performs stain transfer from H&E to the domain of the other stain in a cascaded manner. This cascaded structure in the training phase allows the model to directly exploit histochemically stained image data on both H&E and the target special stain of interest. This advantage alleviates the challenge of paired data acquisition and improves the image quality and color accuracy of the virtual stain transfer from H&E to another stain. We validated the superior performance of this C-DNN approach using kidney needle core biopsy tissue sections and successfully transferred the H&E-stained tissue images into virtual PAS (periodic acid-Schiff) stain. This method provides high-quality virtual images of special stains using existing, histochemically stained slides and creates new opportunities in digital pathology by performing highly accurate stain-to-stain transformations.

However, the destructive histochemical staining procedures are usually irreversible, making it very difficult to obtain multiple stains on the same tissue section. Here, we demonstrate a virtual stain transfer framework via a cascaded deep neural network (C-DNN) to digitally transform hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained tissue images into other types of histological stains. Unlike a single neural network structure which only takes one stain type as input to digitally output images of another stain type, C-DNN first uses virtual staining to transform autofluorescence microscopy images into H&E and then performs stain transfer from H&E to the domain of the other stain in a cascaded manner. This cascaded structure in the training phase allows the model to directly exploit histochemically stained image data on both H&E and the target special stain of interest. This advantage alleviates the challenge of paired data acquisition and improves the image quality and color accuracy of the virtual stain transfer from H&E to another stain. We validated the superior performance of this C-DNN approach using kidney needle core biopsy tissue sections and successfully transferred the H&E-stained tissue images into virtual PAS (periodic acid-Schiff) stain. This method provides high-quality virtual images of special stains using existing, histochemically stained slides and creates new opportunities in digital pathology by performing highly accurate stain-to-stain transformations.
abstract_zh: 病理诊断依赖于对组织学染色的薄组织标本的目视检查，其中应用不同类型的染色来对比并突出各种所需的组织学特征。然而，破坏性的组织化学染色过程通常是不可逆的，因此很难在同一组织切片上获得多种染色。在这里，我们演示了通过级联深度神经网络（C-DNN）的虚拟染色转移框架，将苏木精和曙红（H＆E）染色的组织图像数字化转换为其他类型的组织学染色。与仅将一种染色类型作为输入以数字输出另一种染色类型图像的单个神经网络结构不同，C-DNN 首先使用虚拟染色将自发荧光显微镜图像转换为 H&E，然后以级联方式执行从 H&E 到另一种染色域的染色转移。训练阶段的这种级联结构允许模型直接利用 H&E 和感兴趣的目标特殊染色的组织化学染色图像数据。这一优势减轻了配对数据采集的挑战，并提高了虚拟染色从 H&E 转移到另一个染色的图像质量和颜色准确性。我们使用肾针核心活检组织切片验证了这种 C-DNN 方法的优越性能，并成功将 H&E 染色的组织图像转移到虚拟 PAS（高碘酸-希夫）染色中。该方法使用现有的组织化学染色载玻片提供特殊染色的高质量虚拟图像，并通过执行高度准确的染色到染色转换，为数字病理学创造新的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于级联深度神经网络（C-DNN）的虚拟染色转移框架，用于将苏木精-伊红（H&E）染色组织图像数字化转换为其他特殊染色类型。
AI.motivation: 传统组织化学染色过程具有破坏性且不可逆，难以在同一组织切片上获取多种染色结果，限制了病理诊断的灵活性和准确性。
AI.method: 通过级联深度神经网络（C-DNN）分两阶段实现染色转换：首先将自发荧光显微图像虚拟染色为H&E，再将H&E图像转换为目标特殊染色（如PAS），利用H&E与目标染色的配对数据提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在肾穿刺活检组织样本上验证了C-DNN方法，成功将H&E染色图像转换为高质量的虚拟PAS染色图像，显著优于单网络结构的染色效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过虚拟染色技术实现了高保真度的染色转换，为数字病理学提供了无需物理染色的替代方案，推动了病理图像分析的智能化发展。

authors_text: Saminda Abeyruwan,Laura Graesser,David B. D'Ambrosio,Avi Singh,Anish Shankar,Alex Bewley,Deepali Jain,Krzysztof Choromanski,Pannag R. Sanketi
title: i-Sim2Real: Reinforcement Learning of Robotic Policies in Tight Human-Robot Interaction Loops
title_zh: i-Sim2Real：紧密人机交互循环中机器人策略的强化学习
abstract: Sim-to-real transfer is a powerful paradigm for robotic reinforcement learning. The ability to train policies in simulation enables safe exploration and large-scale data collection quickly at low cost. However, prior works in sim-to-real transfer of robotic policies typically do not involve any human-robot interaction because accurately simulating human behavior is an open problem. In this work, our goal is to leverage the power of simulation to train robotic policies that are proficient at interacting with humans upon deployment. But there is a chicken and egg problem -- how to gather examples of a human interacting with a physical robot so as to model human behavior in simulation without already having a robot that is able to interact with a human? Our proposed method, Iterative-Sim-to-Real (i-S2R), attempts to address this. i-S2R bootstraps from a simple model of human behavior and alternates between training in simulation and deploying in the real world. In each iteration, both the human behavior model and the policy are refined. For all training we apply a new evolutionary search algorithm called Blackbox Gradient Sensing (BGS). We evaluate our method on a real world robotic table tennis setting, where the objective for the robot is to play cooperatively with a human player for as long as possible. Table tennis is a high-speed, dynamic task that requires the two players to react quickly to each other's moves, making for a challenging test bed for research on human-robot interaction. We present results on an industrial robotic arm that is able to cooperatively play table tennis with human players, achieving rallies of 22 successive hits on average and 150 at best. Further, for 80% of players, rally lengths are 70% to 175% longer compared to the sim-to-real plus fine-tuning (S2R+FT) baseline. For videos of our system in action, please see https://sites.google.com/view/is2r.
summary: Sim-to-real transfer is a powerful paradigm for robotic reinforcement learning. The ability to train policies in simulation enables safe exploration and large-scale data collection quickly at low cost. However, prior works in sim-to-real transfer of robotic policies typically do not involve any human-robot interaction because accurately simulating human behavior is an open problem. In this work, our goal is to leverage the power of simulation to train robotic policies that are proficient at interacting with humans upon deployment. But there is a chicken and egg problem -- how to gather examples of a human interacting with a physical robot so as to model human behavior in simulation without already having a robot that is able to interact with a human? Our proposed method, Iterative-Sim-to-Real (i-S2R), attempts to address this. i-S2R bootstraps from a simple model of human behavior and alternates between training in simulation and deploying in the real world. In each iteration, both the human behavior model and the policy are refined. For all training we apply a new evolutionary search algorithm called Blackbox Gradient Sensing (BGS). We evaluate our method on a real world robotic table tennis setting, where the objective for the robot is to play cooperatively with a human player for as long as possible. Table tennis is a high-speed, dynamic task that requires the two players to react quickly to each other's moves, making for a challenging test bed for research on human-robot interaction. We present results on an industrial robotic arm that is able to cooperatively play table tennis with human players, achieving rallies of 22 successive hits on average and 150 at best. Further, for 80% of players, rally lengths are 70% to 175% longer compared to the sim-to-real plus fine-tuning (S2R+FT) baseline. For videos of our system in action, please see https://sites.google.com/view/is2r.
abstract_zh: 模拟到真实的迁移是机器人强化学习的强大范例。在模拟中训练策略的能力能够以低成本快速安全探索和大规模数据收集。 However, prior works in sim-to-real transfer of robotic policies typically do not involve any human-robot interaction because accurately simulating human behavior is an open problem. In this work, our goal is to leverage the power of simulation to train robotic policies that are proficient at interacting with humans upon deployment. But there is a chicken and egg problem -- how to gather examples of a human interacting with a physical robot so as to model human behavior in simulation without already having a robot that is able to interact with a human?我们提出的方法，迭代模拟到真实（i-S2R），试图解决这个问题。 i-S2R 从人类行为的简单模型中引导，并在模拟训练和现实世界中的部署之间交替。在每次迭代中，人类行为模型和策略都会得到完善。对于所有训练，我们应用一种称为黑盒梯度感知（BGS）的新进化搜索算法。 We evaluate our method on a real world robotic table tennis setting, where the objective for the robot is to play cooperatively with a human player for as long as possible. Table tennis is a high-speed, dynamic task that requires the two players to react quickly to each other's moves, making for a challenging test bed for research on human-robot interaction. We present results on an industrial robotic arm that is able to cooperatively play table tennis with human players, achieving rallies of 22 successive hits on average and 150 at best.此外，对于 80% 的玩家来说，与模拟到真实加上微调 (S2R+FT) 基线相比，拉力赛长度要长 70% 到 175%。有关我们系统的实际操作视频，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/is2r。

AI.tldr: 本文提出i-S2R方法，通过模拟到现实的迁移学习，使机器人在与人类互动的闭环中训练出高效的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统模拟到现实的迁移方法缺乏人类行为建模，难以训练机器人与人类有效互动。需解决如何在无成熟机器人的情况下模拟人类行为的‘鸡生蛋’问题。
AI.method: 迭代模拟到现实（i-S2R）框架交替在模拟环境和现实世界中训练，结合黑盒梯度感知（BGS）算法，逐步优化人类行为模型与机器人策略。
AI.result: 在现实机器人乒乓球场景中，机器人平均实现22次连续击球，最高达150次；80%玩家的回合长度比基线方法延长70%-175%。
AI.conclusion: i-S2R通过迭代优化有效解决了人类-机器人交互中的模拟到现实迁移难题，为动态协作任务提供了可行方案。

search_text: i-Sim2Real: Reinforcement Learning of Robotic Policies in Tight Human-Robot Interaction Loops i-Sim2Real：紧密人机交互循环中机器人策略的强化学习 Sim-to-real transfer is a powerful paradigm for robotic reinforcement learning. The ability to train policies in simulation enables safe exploration and large-scale data collection quickly at low cost. However, prior works in sim-to-real transfer of robotic policies typically do not involve any human-robot interaction because accurately simulating human behavior is an open problem. In this work, our goal is to leverage the power of simulation to train robotic policies that are proficient at interacting with humans upon deployment. But there is a chicken and egg problem -- how to gather examples of a human interacting with a physical robot so as to model human behavior in simulation without already having a robot that is able to interact with a human? Our proposed method, Iterative-Sim-to-Real (i-S2R), attempts to address this. i-S2R bootstraps from a simple model of human behavior and alternates between training in simulation and deploying in the real world. In each iteration, both the human behavior model and the policy are refined. For all training we apply a new evolutionary search algorithm called Blackbox Gradient Sensing (BGS). We evaluate our method on a real world robotic table tennis setting, where the objective for the robot is to play cooperatively with a human player for as long as possible. Table tennis is a high-speed, dynamic task that requires the two players to react quickly to each other's moves, making for a challenging test bed for research on human-robot interaction. We present results on an industrial robotic arm that is able to cooperatively play table tennis with human players, achieving rallies of 22 successive hits on average and 150 at best. Further, for 80% of players, rally lengths are 70% to 175% longer compared to the sim-to-real plus fine-tuning (S2R+FT) baseline. For videos of our system in action, please see https://sites.google.com/view/is2r. 模拟到真实的迁移是机器人强化学习的强大范例。在模拟中训练策略的能力能够以低成本快速安全探索和大规模数据收集。 However, prior works in sim-to-real transfer of robotic policies typically do not involve any human-robot interaction because accurately simulating human behavior is an open problem. In this work, our goal is to leverage the power of simulation to train robotic policies that are proficient at interacting with humans upon deployment. But there is a chicken and egg problem -- how to gather examples of a human interacting with a physical robot so as to model human behavior in simulation without already having a robot that is able to interact with a human?我们提出的方法，迭代模拟到真实（i-S2R），试图解决这个问题。 i-S2R 从人类行为的简单模型中引导，并在模拟训练和现实世界中的部署之间交替。在每次迭代中，人类行为模型和策略都会得到完善。对于所有训练，我们应用一种称为黑盒梯度感知（BGS）的新进化搜索算法。 We evaluate our method on a real world robotic table tennis setting, where the objective for the robot is to play cooperatively with a human player for as long as possible. Table tennis is a high-speed, dynamic task that requires the two players to react quickly to each other's moves, making for a challenging test bed for research on human-robot interaction. We present results on an industrial robotic arm that is able to cooperatively play table tennis with human players, achieving rallies of 22 successive hits on average and 150 at best.此外，对于 80% 的玩家来说，与模拟到真实加上微调 (S2R+FT) 基线相比，拉力赛长度要长 70% 到 175%。有关我们系统的实际操作视频，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/is2r。 本文提出i-S2R方法，通过模拟到现实的迁移学习，使机器人在与人类互动的闭环中训练出高效的策略。 Saminda Abeyruwan,Laura Graesser,David B. authors_text: Neil Mallinar,James B. Simon,Amirhesam Abedsoltan,Parthe Pandit,Mikhail Belkin,Preetum Nakkiran
title: Benign, Tempered, or Catastrophic: A Taxonomy of Overfitting
title_zh: 良性、缓和或灾难性：过度拟合的分类
abstract: The practical success of overparameterized neural networks has motivated the recent scientific study of interpolating methods, which perfectly fit their training data. Certain interpolating methods, including neural networks, can fit noisy training data without catastrophically bad test performance, in defiance of standard intuitions from statistical learning theory. Aiming to explain this, a body of recent work has studied benign overfitting, a phenomenon where some interpolating methods approach Bayes optimality, even in the presence of noise. In this work we argue that while benign overfitting has been instructive and fruitful to study, many real interpolating methods like neural networks do not fit benignly: modest noise in the training set causes nonzero (but non-infinite) excess risk at test time, implying these models are neither benign nor catastrophic but rather fall in an intermediate regime. We call this intermediate regime tempered overfitting, and we initiate its systematic study. We first explore this phenomenon in the context of kernel (ridge) regression (KR) by obtaining conditions on the ridge parameter and kernel eigenspectrum under which KR exhibits each of the three behaviors. We find that kernels with powerlaw spectra, including Laplace kernels and ReLU neural tangent kernels, exhibit tempered overfitting. We then empirically study deep neural networks through the lens of our taxonomy, and find that those trained to interpolation are tempered, while those stopped early are benign. We hope our work leads to a more refined understanding of overfitting in modern learning.
summary: The practical success of overparameterized neural networks has motivated the recent scientific study of interpolating methods, which perfectly fit their training data. Certain interpolating methods, including neural networks, can fit noisy training data without catastrophically bad test performance, in defiance of standard intuitions from statistical learning theory. Aiming to explain this, a body of recent work has studied benign overfitting, a phenomenon where some interpolating methods approach Bayes optimality, even in the presence of noise. In this work we argue that while benign overfitting has been instructive and fruitful to study, many real interpolating methods like neural networks do not fit benignly: modest noise in the training set causes nonzero (but non-infinite) excess risk at test time, implying these models are neither benign nor catastrophic but rather fall in an intermediate regime. We call this intermediate regime tempered overfitting, and we initiate its systematic study. We first explore this phenomenon in the context of kernel (ridge) regression (KR) by obtaining conditions on the ridge parameter and kernel eigenspectrum under which KR exhibits each of the three behaviors. We find that kernels with powerlaw spectra, including Laplace kernels and ReLU neural tangent kernels, exhibit tempered overfitting. We then empirically study deep neural networks through the lens of our taxonomy, and find that those trained to interpolation are tempered, while those stopped early are benign. We hope our work leads to a more refined understanding of overfitting in modern learning.
abstract_zh: 超参数化神经网络的实际成功激发了最近对插值方法的科学研究，这些方法完全适合其训练数据。某些插值方法（包括神经网络）可以适应噪声训练数据，而不会出现灾难性的糟糕测试性能，这违背了统计学习理论的标准直觉。为了解释这一点，最近的一系列工作研究了良性过度拟合，这种现象是一些插值方法即使在存在噪声的情况下也能达到贝叶斯最优性。在这项工作中，我们认为，虽然良性过度拟合对研究具有启发性和富有成效，但许多真正的插值方法（如神经网络）并不良性地拟合：训练集中的适度噪声会导致测试时非零（但非无限）的过度风险，这意味着这些模型既不是良性的也不是灾难性的，而是处于中间状态。我们将这种中间机制称为“缓和过度拟合”，并开始对其进行系统研究。我们首先通过获得岭参数和核特征谱的条件，在核（岭）回归（KR）的背景下探索这种现象，在这些条件下，KR 表现出三种行为。我们发现具有幂律谱的核，包括拉普拉斯核和​​ ReLU 神经正切核，表现出缓和的过度拟合。然后，我们通过分类学的视角对深度神经网络进行实证研究，发现那些经过插值训练的神经网络是经过调节的，而那些早期停止的神经网络是良性的。我们希望我们的工作能让人们对现代学习中的过度拟合有更深入的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出过拟合的三种分类（良性、温和、灾难性），并系统研究神经网络等模型在实际中的温和过拟合现象。
AI.motivation: 传统统计学习理论认为过参数化模型会因噪声导致灾难性过拟合，但实际观察到神经网络等模型表现介于理论预期与实际之间，需重新分类理解过拟合现象。
AI.method: 通过核回归（KR）理论分析不同正则化参数和核谱条件下的过拟合行为，并结合深度神经网络实证研究验证分类有效性。
AI.result: 发现幂律谱核（如Laplace核、ReLU神经切线核）及训练至插值的深度网络呈现温和过拟合，而早停模型属于良性过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 现有理论框架需扩展以解释实际模型的中间态过拟合现象，温和过拟合的系统研究有助于深化对现代机器学习过拟合机制的理解。

authors_text: Jihye Baek,Avice M. O'Connell,Kevin J. Parker
title: Improving the diagnosis of breast cancer based on biophysical ultrasound features utilizing machine learning
title_zh: 利用机器学习根据生物物理超声特征改善乳腺癌的诊断
abstract: The improved diagnostic accuracy of ultrasound breast examinations remains an important goal. In this study, we propose a biophysical feature based machine learning method for breast cancer detection to improve the performance beyond a benchmark deep learning algorithm and to furthermore provide a color overlay visual map of the probability of malignancy within a lesion. This overall framework is termed disease specific imaging. Previously, 150 breast lesions were segmented and classified utilizing a modified fully convolutional network and a modified GoogLeNet, respectively. In this study multiparametric analysis was performed within the contoured lesions. Features were extracted from ultrasound radiofrequency, envelope, and log compressed data based on biophysical and morphological models. The support vector machine with a Gaussian kernel constructed a nonlinear hyperplane, and we calculated the distance between the hyperplane and data point of each feature in multiparametric space. The distance can quantitatively assess a lesion, and suggest the probability of malignancy that is color coded and overlaid onto B mode images. Training and evaluation were performed on in vivo patient data. The overall accuracy for the most common types and sizes of breast lesions in our study exceeded 98.0% for classification and 0.98 for an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve, which is more precise than the performance of radiologists and a deep learning system. Further, the correlation between the probability and BI RADS enables a quantitative guideline to predict breast cancer. Therefore, we anticipate that the proposed framework can help radiologists achieve more accurate and convenient breast cancer classification and detection.
summary: The improved diagnostic accuracy of ultrasound breast examinations remains an important goal. In this study, we propose a biophysical feature based machine learning method for breast cancer detection to improve the performance beyond a benchmark deep learning algorithm and to furthermore provide a color overlay visual map of the probability of malignancy within a lesion. This overall framework is termed disease specific imaging. Previously, 150 breast lesions were segmented and classified utilizing a modified fully convolutional network and a modified GoogLeNet, respectively. In this study multiparametric analysis was performed within the contoured lesions. Features were extracted from ultrasound radiofrequency, envelope, and log compressed data based on biophysical and morphological models. The support vector machine with a Gaussian kernel constructed a nonlinear hyperplane, and we calculated the distance between the hyperplane and data point of each feature in multiparametric space. The distance can quantitatively assess a lesion, and suggest the probability of malignancy that is color coded and overlaid onto B mode images. Training and evaluation were performed on in vivo patient data. The overall accuracy for the most common types and sizes of breast lesions in our study exceeded 98.0% for classification and 0.98 for an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve, which is more precise than the performance of radiologists and a deep learning system. Further, the correlation between the probability and BI RADS enables a quantitative guideline to predict breast cancer. Therefore, we anticipate that the proposed framework can help radiologists achieve more accurate and convenient breast cancer classification and detection.
abstract_zh: 提高超声乳腺检查的诊断准确性仍然是一个重要目标。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于生物物理特征的乳腺癌检测机器学习方法，以提高超越基准深度学习算法的性能，并进一步提供病变内恶性肿瘤概率的颜色叠加视觉图。这个整体框架被称为疾病特异性成像。此前，分别利用改进的全卷积网络和改进的 GoogLeNet 对 150 个乳腺病变进行了分割和分类。在这项研究中，在轮廓病变内进行了多参数分析。基于生物物理和形态学模型从超声射频、包络和日志压缩数据中提取特征。具有高斯核的支持向量机构造了一个非线性超平面，并计算了超平面与多参数空间中每个特征的数据点之间的距离。该距离可以定量评估病变，并建议采用颜色编码并叠加到 B 模式图像上的恶性肿瘤的概率。对体内患者数据进行训练和评估。在我们的研究中，最常见的乳腺病变类型和大小的总体准确率超过了 98.0%（分类准确率）和 0.98（接受者操作特征曲线下面积），这比放射科医生和深度学习系统的表现更精确。此外，概率与 BI RADS 之间的相关性为预测乳腺癌提供了定量指南。因此，我们预计所提出的框架可以帮助放射科医生实现更准确、更方便的乳腺癌分类和检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物物理超声特征的机器学习方法，用于改进乳腺癌的诊断性能，并生成病变恶性概率的彩色叠加可视化图。
AI.motivation: 提高超声检查乳腺病变的诊断准确性是重要目标，现有方法在性能和可视化辅助方面存在不足。
AI.method: 通过提取超声射频、包络和对数压缩数据的生物物理与形态学特征，利用高斯核支持向量机构建非线性超平面，计算特征在多参数空间中数据点与超平面的距离，生成恶性概率彩色叠加图。
AI.result: 在常见类型和尺寸的乳腺病变分类中达到98.0%的准确率和0.98的AUC值，优于放射科医生和深度学习系统，且与BI-RADS评分具有显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可为放射科医生提供更精准、便捷的乳腺癌分类与检测工具，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Improving the diagnosis of breast cancer based on biophysical ultrasound features utilizing machine learning 利用机器学习根据生物物理超声特征改善乳腺癌的诊断 The improved diagnostic accuracy of ultrasound breast examinations remains an important goal. In this study, we propose a biophysical feature based machine learning method for breast cancer detection to improve the performance beyond a benchmark deep learning algorithm and to furthermore provide a color overlay visual map of the probability of malignancy within a lesion. This overall framework is termed disease specific imaging. Previously, 150 breast lesions were segmented and classified utilizing a modified fully convolutional network and a modified GoogLeNet, respectively. In this study multiparametric analysis was performed within the contoured lesions. Features were extracted from ultrasound radiofrequency, envelope, and log compressed data based on biophysical and morphological models. The support vector machine with a Gaussian kernel constructed a nonlinear hyperplane, and we calculated the distance between the hyperplane and data point of each feature in multiparametric space. The distance can quantitatively assess a lesion, and suggest the probability of malignancy that is color coded and overlaid onto B mode images. Training and evaluation were performed on in vivo patient data. The overall accuracy for the most common types and sizes of breast lesions in our study exceeded 98.0% for classification and 0.98 for an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve, which is more precise than the performance of radiologists and a deep learning system. Further, the correlation between the probability and BI RADS enables a quantitative guideline to predict breast cancer. Therefore, we anticipate that the proposed framework can help radiologists achieve more accurate and convenient breast cancer classification and detection. 提高超声乳腺检查的诊断准确性仍然是一个重要目标。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于生物物理特征的乳腺癌检测机器学习方法，以提高超越基准深度学习算法的性能，并进一步提供病变内恶性肿瘤概率的颜色叠加视觉图。这个整体框架被称为疾病特异性成像。此前，分别利用改进的全卷积网络和改进的 GoogLeNet 对 150 个乳腺病变进行了分割和分类。在这项研究中，在轮廓病变内进行了多参数分析。基于生物物理和形态学模型从超声射频、包络和日志压缩数据中提取特征。具有高斯核的支持向量机构造了一个非线性超平面，并计算了超平面与多参数空间中每个特征的数据点之间的距离。该距离可以定量评估病变，并建议采用颜色编码并叠加到 B 模式图像上的恶性肿瘤的概率。对体内患者数据进行训练和评估。在我们的研究中，最常见的乳腺病变类型和大小的总体准确率超过了 98.0%（分类准确率）和 0.98（接受者操作特征曲线下面积），这比放射科医生和深度学习系统的表现更精确。此外，概率与 BI RADS 之间的相关性为预测乳腺癌提供了定量指南。因此，我们预计所提出的框架可以帮助放射科医生实现更准确、更方便的乳腺癌分类和检测。 本文提出一种基于生物物理超声特征的机器学习方法，用于改进乳腺癌的诊断性能，并生成病变恶性概率的彩色叠加可视化图。 Jihye Baek,Avice M. O'Connell,Kevin J. Parker eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Yali Du,Chengdong Ma,Yuchen Liu,Runji Lin,Hao Dong,Jun Wang,Yaodong Yang
title: Scalable Model-based Policy Optimization for Decentralized Networked Systems
title_zh: 适用于去中心化网络系统的基于可扩展模型的策略优化
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, accepted by The 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, accepted by The 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Reinforcement learning algorithms require a large amount of samples; this often limits their real-world applications on even simple tasks. Such a challenge is more outstanding in multi-agent tasks, as each step of operation is more costly requiring communications or shifting or resources. This work aims to improve data efficiency of multi-agent control by model-based learning. We consider networked systems where agents are cooperative and communicate only locally with their neighbors, and propose the decentralized model-based policy optimization framework (DMPO). In our method, each agent learns a dynamic model to predict future states and broadcast their predictions by communication, and then the policies are trained under the model rollouts. To alleviate the bias of model-generated data, we restrain the model usage for generating myopic rollouts, thus reducing the compounding error of model generation. To pertain the independence of policy update, we introduce extended value function and theoretically prove that the resulting policy gradient is a close approximation to true policy gradients. We evaluate our algorithm on several benchmarks for intelligent transportation systems, which are connected autonomous vehicle control tasks (Flow and CACC) and adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC). Empirically results show that our method achieves superior data efficiency and matches the performance of model-free methods using true models.
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms require a large amount of samples; this often limits their real-world applications on even simple tasks. Such a challenge is more outstanding in multi-agent tasks, as each step of operation is more costly requiring communications or shifting or resources. This work aims to improve data efficiency of multi-agent control by model-based learning. We consider networked systems where agents are cooperative and communicate only locally with their neighbors, and propose the decentralized model-based policy optimization framework (DMPO). In our method, each agent learns a dynamic model to predict future states and broadcast their predictions by communication, and then the policies are trained under the model rollouts. To alleviate the bias of model-generated data, we restrain the model usage for generating myopic rollouts, thus reducing the compounding error of model generation. To pertain the independence of policy update, we introduce extended value function and theoretically prove that the resulting policy gradient is a close approximation to true policy gradients. We evaluate our algorithm on several benchmarks for intelligent transportation systems, which are connected autonomous vehicle control tasks (Flow and CACC) and adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC). Empirically results show that our method achieves superior data efficiency and matches the performance of model-free methods using true models.
abstract_zh: 强化学习算法需要大量样本；这通常会限制他们在现实世界中的应用，即使是简单的任务。这种挑战在多智能体任务中更为突出，因为操作的每一步都需要通信或转移或资源的成本更高。这项工作旨在通过基于模型的学习来提高多智能体控制的数据效率。我们考虑网络系统，其中代理相互合作并仅与邻居进行本地通信，并提出了基于分散模型的策略优化框架（DMPO）。在我们的方法中，每个代理学习一个动态模型来预测未来状态并通过通信广播他们的预测，然后在模型推出下训练策略。为了减轻模型生成数据的偏差，我们限制了模型用于生成近视滚动的使用，从而减少了模型生成的复合误差。为了保证策略更新的独立性，我们引入了扩展价值函数，并从理论上证明了所得的策略梯度非常接近真实的策略梯度。我们在智能交通系统的几个基准上评估我们的算法，这些基准包括连接的自动车辆控制任务（Flow 和 CACC）和自适应交通信号控制（ATSC）。经验结果表明，我们的方法实现了卓越的数据效率，并且与使用真实模型的无模型方法的性能相匹配。

AI.tldr: 提出一种去中心化的基于模型的策略优化框架（DMPO），以提高多智能体网络系统的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习样本需求大，多智能体任务中操作成本高（如通信/资源消耗），导致实际应用受限。
AI.method: 每个智能体学习动态模型预测状态并广播预测，通过模型生成轨迹训练策略；采用短视轨迹生成减少误差累积，引入扩展价值函数保证策略更新独立性。
AI.result: 在智能交通系统基准（自动驾驶车辆控制、交通信号控制）中，DMPO数据效率优于基线方法，且性能接近真实模型的无模型方法。
AI.conclusion: DMPO通过模型预测与局部通信有效提升多智能体控制的数据效率，为实际网络系统应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Scalable Model-based Policy Optimization for Decentralized Networked Systems 适用于去中心化网络系统的基于可扩展模型的策略优化 Reinforcement learning algorithms require a large amount of samples; this often limits their real-world applications on even simple tasks. Such a challenge is more outstanding in multi-agent tasks, as each step of operation is more costly requiring communications or shifting or resources. This work aims to improve data efficiency of multi-agent control by model-based learning. We consider networked systems where agents are cooperative and communicate only locally with their neighbors, and propose the decentralized model-based policy optimization framework (DMPO). In our method, each agent learns a dynamic model to predict future states and broadcast their predictions by communication, and then the policies are trained under the model rollouts. To alleviate the bias of model-generated data, we restrain the model usage for generating myopic rollouts, thus reducing the compounding error of model generation. To pertain the independence of policy update, we introduce extended value function and theoretically prove that the resulting policy gradient is a close approximation to true policy gradients. We evaluate our algorithm on several benchmarks for intelligent transportation systems, which are connected autonomous vehicle control tasks (Flow and CACC) and adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC). Empirically results show that our method achieves superior data efficiency and matches the performance of model-free methods using true models. 强化学习算法需要大量样本；这通常会限制他们在现实世界中的应用，即使是简单的任务。这种挑战在多智能体任务中更为突出，因为操作的每一步都需要通信或转移或资源的成本更高。这项工作旨在通过基于模型的学习来提高多智能体控制的数据效率。我们考虑网络系统，其中代理相互合作并仅与邻居进行本地通信，并提出了基于分散模型的策略优化框架（DMPO）。在我们的方法中，每个代理学习一个动态模型来预测未来状态并通过通信广播他们的预测，然后在模型推出下训练策略。为了减轻模型生成数据的偏差，我们限制了模型用于生成近视滚动的使用，从而减少了模型生成的复合误差。为了保证策略更新的独立性，我们引入了扩展价值函数，并从理论上证明了所得的策略梯度非常接近真实的策略梯度。我们在智能交通系统的几个基准上评估我们的算法，这些基准包括连接的自动车辆控制任务（Flow 和 CACC）和自适应交通信号控制（ATSC）。经验结果表明，我们的方法实现了卓越的数据效率，并且与使用真实模型的无模型方法的性能相匹配。 提出一种去中心化的基于模型的策略优化框架（DMPO），以提高多智能体网络系统的数据效率。 Yali Du,Chengdong Ma,Yuchen Liu,Runji Lin,Hao Dong,Jun Wang,Yaodong Yang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Nannan Li,Bryan A. Plummer
title: Supervised Attribute Information Removal and Reconstruction for Image Manipulation
title_zh: 图像处理的有监督属性信息去除和重建
abstract: The goal of attribute manipulation is to control specified attribute(s) in given images. Prior work approaches this problem by learning disentangled representations for each attribute that enables it to manipulate the encoded source attributes to the target attributes. However, encoded attributes are often correlated with relevant image content. Thus, the source attribute information can often be hidden in the disentangled features, leading to unwanted image editing effects. In this paper, we propose an Attribute Information Removal and Reconstruction (AIRR) network that prevents such information hiding by learning how to remove the attribute information entirely, creating attribute excluded features, and then learns to directly inject the desired attributes in a reconstructed image. We evaluate our approach on four diverse datasets with a variety of attributes including DeepFashion Synthesis, DeepFashion Fine-grained Attribute, CelebA and CelebA-HQ, where our model improves attribute manipulation accuracy and top-k retrieval rate by 10% on average over prior work. A user study also reports that AIRR manipulated images are preferred over prior work in up to 76% of cases.
summary: The goal of attribute manipulation is to control specified attribute(s) in given images. Prior work approaches this problem by learning disentangled representations for each attribute that enables it to manipulate the encoded source attributes to the target attributes. However, encoded attributes are often correlated with relevant image content. Thus, the source attribute information can often be hidden in the disentangled features, leading to unwanted image editing effects. In this paper, we propose an Attribute Information Removal and Reconstruction (AIRR) network that prevents such information hiding by learning how to remove the attribute information entirely, creating attribute excluded features, and then learns to directly inject the desired attributes in a reconstructed image. We evaluate our approach on four diverse datasets with a variety of attributes including DeepFashion Synthesis, DeepFashion Fine-grained Attribute, CelebA and CelebA-HQ, where our model improves attribute manipulation accuracy and top-k retrieval rate by 10% on average over prior work. A user study also reports that AIRR manipulated images are preferred over prior work in up to 76% of cases.
abstract_zh: 属性操作的目标是控制给定图像中的指定属性。先前的工作通过学习每个属性的解缠结表示来解决这个问题，这使得它能够将编码的源属性操纵为目标属性。然而，编码属性通常与相关图像内容相关。因此，源属性信息通常会隐藏在解开的特征中，从而导致不需要的图像编辑效果。在本文中，我们提出了一种属性信息删除和重建（AIRR）网络，该网络通过学习如何完全删除属性信息、创建属性排除特征，然后学习直接在重建图像中注入所需属性来防止此类信息隐藏。我们在具有各种属性的四个不同数据集上评估我们的方法，包括 DeepFashion Synthesis、DeepFashion Fine-grained Attribute、CelebA 和 CelebA-HQ，其中我们的模型比之前的工作平均提高了属性操作准确性和 top-k 检索率 10%。一项用户研究还报告称，在高达 76% 的情况下，AIRR 处理过的图像比之前的工作更受青睐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种监督属性信息移除与重建网络（AIRR），用于改进图像属性编辑任务，通过消除属性信息隐藏问题提升编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解耦表示学习中难以完全分离属性信息，导致源属性信息隐藏在特征中，影响图像编辑效果。
AI.method: 设计AIRR网络分两阶段处理：首先移除属性信息生成属性无关特征，再直接注入目标属性进行图像重建。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion、CelebA等四个数据集上，属性编辑准确率和Top-K检索率平均提升10%，用户研究显示76%案例更偏好AIRR结果。
AI.conclusion: AIRR通过属性信息移除与重建机制有效解决了特征中属性信息隐藏问题，显著提升了图像属性编辑性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种监督属性信息移除与重建网络（AIRR），用于改进图像属性编辑任务，通过消除属性信息隐藏问题提升编辑效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在解耦表示学习中难以完全分离属性信息，导致源属性信息隐藏在特征中，影响图像编辑效果。

search_text: Supervised Attribute Information Removal and Reconstruction for Image Manipulation 图像处理的有监督属性信息去除和重建 The goal of attribute manipulation is to control specified attribute(s) in given images. Prior work approaches this problem by learning disentangled representations for each attribute that enables it to manipulate the encoded source attributes to the target attributes. However, encoded attributes are often correlated with relevant image content. Thus, the source attribute information can often be hidden in the disentangled features, leading to unwanted image editing effects. In this paper, we propose an Attribute Information Removal and Reconstruction (AIRR) network that prevents such information hiding by learning how to remove the attribute information entirely, creating attribute excluded features, and then learns to directly inject the desired attributes in a reconstructed image. We evaluate our approach on four diverse datasets with a variety of attributes including DeepFashion Synthesis, DeepFashion Fine-grained Attribute, CelebA and CelebA-HQ, where our model improves attribute manipulation accuracy and top-k retrieval rate by 10% on average over prior work. A user study also reports that AIRR manipulated images are preferred over prior work in up to 76% of cases. 属性操作的目标是控制给定图像中的指定属性。先前的工作通过学习每个属性的解缠结表示来解决这个问题，这使得它能够将编码的源属性操纵为目标属性。然而，编码属性通常与相关图像内容相关。因此，源属性信息通常会隐藏在解开的特征中，从而导致不需要的图像编辑效果。在本文中，我们提出了一种属性信息删除和重建（AIRR）网络，该网络通过学习如何完全删除属性信息、创建属性排除特征，然后学习直接在重建图像中注入所需属性来防止此类信息隐藏。我们在具有各种属性的四个不同数据集上评估我们的方法，包括 DeepFashion Synthesis、DeepFashion Fine-grained Attribute、CelebA 和 CelebA-HQ，其中我们的模型比之前的工作平均提高了属性操作准确性和 top-k 检索率 10%。一项用户研究还报告称，在高达 76% 的情况下，AIRR 处理过的图像比之前的工作更受青睐。 本文提出了一种监督属性信息移除与重建网络（AIRR），用于改进图像属性编辑任务，通过消除属性信息隐藏问题提升编辑效果。 Nannan Li,Bryan A. Plummer cs.CV

authors_text: Hannah Bako,Alisha Varma,Anuoluwapo Faboro,Mahreen Haider,Favour Nerrise,Bissaka Kenah,Leilani Battle
title: Streamlining Visualization Authoring in D3 Through User-Driven Templates
title_zh: 通过用户驱动模板简化 D3 中的可视化创作
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, VIS 2022 Short Paper. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.03179
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, VIS 2022 Short Paper. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.03179
abstract: D3 is arguably the most popular tool for implementing web based visualizations. Yet D3 has a steep learning curve that may hinder its adoption and continued use. To simplify the process of programming D3 visualizations, we must first understand the space of implementation practices that D3 users engage in. We present a qualitative analysis of 2500 D3 visualizations and their corresponding implementations. We find that 5 visualization types (Bar Charts, Geomaps, Line Charts, Scatterplots, and Force Directed Graphs) account for 80% of D3 visualizations found in our corpus. While implementation styles vary slightly across designs, the underlying code structure for all visualization types remains the same; presenting an opportunity for code reuse. Using our corpus of D3 examples, we synthesize reusable code templates for eight popular D3 visualization types and share them in our open source repository. Based on our results, we discuss design considerations for leveraging users' implementation patterns to reduce visualization design effort through design templates and auto-generated code recommendations.
summary: D3 is arguably the most popular tool for implementing web based visualizations. Yet D3 has a steep learning curve that may hinder its adoption and continued use. To simplify the process of programming D3 visualizations, we must first understand the space of implementation practices that D3 users engage in. We present a qualitative analysis of 2500 D3 visualizations and their corresponding implementations. We find that 5 visualization types (Bar Charts, Geomaps, Line Charts, Scatterplots, and Force Directed Graphs) account for 80% of D3 visualizations found in our corpus. While implementation styles vary slightly across designs, the underlying code structure for all visualization types remains the same; presenting an opportunity for code reuse. Using our corpus of D3 examples, we synthesize reusable code templates for eight popular D3 visualization types and share them in our open source repository. Based on our results, we discuss design considerations for leveraging users' implementation patterns to reduce visualization design effort through design templates and auto-generated code recommendations.
abstract_zh: D3 可以说是用于实现基于 Web 的可视化的最流行的工具。然而，D3 的学习曲线陡峭，可能会阻碍其采用和持续使用。为了简化 D3 可视化编程的过程，我们必须首先了解 D3 用户参与的实现实践空间。我们对 2500 个 D3 可视化及其相应的实现进行了定性分析。我们发现 5 种可视化类型（条形图、地理地图、折线图、散点图和力定向图）占我们语料库中 D3 可视化的 80%。虽然不同设计的实现风格略有不同，但所有可视化类型的底层代码结构保持不变；提供了代码重用的机会。使用我们的 D3 示例语料库，我们合成了八种流行的 D3 可视化类型的可重用代码模板，并在我们的开源存储库中共享它们。根据我们的结果，我们讨论了利用用户的实现模式通过设计模板和自动生成的代码建议减少可视化设计工作的设计注意事项。

AI.tldr: 通过分析用户实现模式，提出可重用的代码模板以简化D3可视化开发
AI.motivation: D3学习曲线陡峭，需简化开发流程以促进其采用和使用
AI.method: 分析2500个D3可视化，提取共性代码结构，合成八种常用类型的可重用模板
AI.result: 五种类型占80%，合成八种模板并开源，减少设计工作量
AI.conclusion: 利用用户实现模式设计模板和自动生成代码可有效降低可视化设计难度

authors_text: Tong Su,Xishun Wang,Xiaodong Yang
title: QML for Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Challenge
title_zh: Argoverse 2 运动预测挑战赛的 QML
abstract: To safely navigate in various complex traffic scenarios, autonomous driving systems are generally equipped with a motion forecasting module to provide vital information for the downstream planning module. For the real-world onboard applications, both accuracy and latency of a motion forecasting model are essential. In this report, we present an effective and efficient solution, which ranks the 3rd place in the Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Challenge 2022.
summary: To safely navigate in various complex traffic scenarios, autonomous driving systems are generally equipped with a motion forecasting module to provide vital information for the downstream planning module. For the real-world onboard applications, both accuracy and latency of a motion forecasting model are essential. In this report, we present an effective and efficient solution, which ranks the 3rd place in the Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Challenge 2022.
abstract_zh: 为了在各种复杂的交通场景中安全行驶，自动驾驶系统通常配备运动预测模块，为下游规划模块提供重要信息。对于现实世界的机载应用，运动预测模型的准确性和延迟都很重要。在本报告中，我们提出了一种有效且高效的解决方案，该解决方案在 2022 年 Argoverse 2 运动预测挑战赛中排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效且精确的运动预测方法，用于自动驾驶系统中的复杂交通场景导航。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要兼顾运动预测模型的准确性与实时性，以满足实际车载应用需求。
AI.method: 基于QML（量化机器学习）技术设计模型，在保证预测精度的同时降低计算延迟。
AI.result: 该方案在Argoverse 2运动预测挑战赛2022中获得第三名成绩。
AI.conclusion: QML方法有效平衡了预测精度与计算效率，为自动驾驶系统提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Kaiwen Xu,Thomas Li,Mirza S. Khan,Riqiang Gao,Sanja L. Antic,Yuankai Huo,Kim L. Sandler,Fabien Maldonado,Bennett A. Landman
title: Body Composition Assessment with Limited Field-of-view Computed Tomography: A Semantic Image Extension Perspective
title_zh: 有限视场计算机断层扫描的身体成分评估：语义图像扩展视角
comment: Updated with additional evaluation and clarification
comments: Updated with additional evaluation and clarification
abstract: Field-of-view (FOV) tissue truncation beyond the lungs is common in routine lung screening computed tomography (CT). This poses limitations for opportunistic CT- based body composition (BC) assessment as key anatomical structures are missing. Traditionally, extending the FOV of CT is considered as a CT reconstruction problem using limited data. However, this approach relies on the projection domain data which might not be available in application. In this work, we formulate the problem from the semantic image extension perspective which only requires image data as inputs. The proposed two-stage method identifies a new FOV border based on the estimated extent of the complete body and imputes missing tissues in the truncated region. The training samples are simulated using CT slices with complete body in FOV, making the model development self-supervised. We evaluate the validity of the proposed method in automatic BC assessment using lung screening CT with limited FOV. The proposed method effectively restores the missing tissues and reduces BC assessment error introduced by FOV tissue truncation. In the BC assessment for a large-scale lung screening CT dataset, this correction improves both the intra-subject consistency and the correlation with anthropometric approximations. The developed method is available at https://github.com/MASILab/S-EFOV.
summary: Field-of-view (FOV) tissue truncation beyond the lungs is common in routine lung screening computed tomography (CT). This poses limitations for opportunistic CT- based body composition (BC) assessment as key anatomical structures are missing. Traditionally, extending the FOV of CT is considered as a CT reconstruction problem using limited data. However, this approach relies on the projection domain data which might not be available in application. In this work, we formulate the problem from the semantic image extension perspective which only requires image data as inputs. The proposed two-stage method identifies a new FOV border based on the estimated extent of the complete body and imputes missing tissues in the truncated region. The training samples are simulated using CT slices with complete body in FOV, making the model development self-supervised. We evaluate the validity of the proposed method in automatic BC assessment using lung screening CT with limited FOV. The proposed method effectively restores the missing tissues and reduces BC assessment error introduced by FOV tissue truncation. In the BC assessment for a large-scale lung screening CT dataset, this correction improves both the intra-subject consistency and the correlation with anthropometric approximations. The developed method is available at https://github.com/MASILab/S-EFOV.
abstract_zh: 肺部以外的视场 (FOV) 组织截断在常规肺部筛查计算机断层扫描 (CT) 中很常见。由于关键解剖结构缺失，这对基于 CT 的机会性身体成分 (BC) 评估造成了限制。传统上，扩展CT的FOV被认为是使用有限数据的CT重建问题。然而，这种方法依赖于应用程序中可能不可用的投影域数据。在这项工作中，我们从语义图像扩展的角度来阐述问题，只需要图像数据作为输入。所提出的两阶段方法根据整个身体的估计范围来识别新的视场边界，并估算截断区域中缺失的组织。训练样本使用 FOV 中完整身体的 CT 切片进行模拟，使模型开发能够自我监督。我们使用有限视场的肺部筛查 CT 评估所提出的方法在自动 BC 评估中的有效性。该方法有效地恢复了缺失的组织并减少了FOV组织截断引入的BC评估误差。在大规模肺部筛查 CT 数据集的 BC 评估中，这种校正提高了受试者内的一致性以及与人体测量近似值的相关性。开发的方法可在 https://github.com/MASILab/S-EFOV 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义图像扩展的方法，用于解决有限视野CT扫描中因组织截断导致的身体成分评估问题。
AI.motivation: 常规肺部筛查CT扫描视野有限，导致关键解剖结构缺失，从而限制了基于CT的身体成分评估的准确性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法，首先根据估计的完整身体范围确定新的视野边界，然后在截断区域中补全缺失的组织。该方法仅需图像数据作为输入，且训练样本通过模拟完整视野的CT切片进行自监督学习。
AI.result: 该方法有效恢复了缺失的组织，减少了视野截断引起的身体成分评估误差，并在大规模肺部筛查CT数据集上提高了个体间一致性及与人体测量近似值的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决有限视野CT扫描中的身体成分评估问题提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义图像扩展的方法，用于解决有限视野CT扫描中因组织截断导致的身体成分评估问题。
ai_content.motivation: 常规肺部筛查CT扫描视野有限，导致关键解剖结构缺失，从而限制了基于CT的身体成分评估的准确性。
ai_content.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法，首先根据估计的完整身体范围确定新的视野边界，然后在截断区域中补全缺失的组织。该方法仅需图像数据作为输入，且训练样本通过模拟完整视野的CT切片进行自监督学习。
ai_content.result: 该方法有效恢复了缺失的组织，减少了视野截断引起的身体成分评估误差，并在大规模肺部筛查CT数据集上提高了个体间一致性及与人体测量近似值的相关性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为解决有限视野CT扫描中的身体成分评估问题提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案。

search_text: Body Composition Assessment with Limited Field-of-view Computed Tomography: A Semantic Image Extension Perspective 有限视场计算机断层扫描的身体成分评估：语义图像扩展视角 Field-of-view (FOV) tissue truncation beyond the lungs is common in routine lung screening computed tomography (CT). This poses limitations for opportunistic CT- based body composition (BC) assessment as key anatomical structures are missing. Traditionally, extending the FOV of CT is considered as a CT reconstruction problem using limited data. However, this approach relies on the projection domain data which might not be available in application. In this work, we formulate the problem from the semantic image extension perspective which only requires image data as inputs. The proposed two-stage method identifies a new FOV border based on the estimated extent of the complete body and imputes missing tissues in the truncated region. The training samples are simulated using CT slices with complete body in FOV, making the model development self-supervised. We evaluate the validity of the proposed method in automatic BC assessment using lung screening CT with limited FOV. The proposed method effectively restores the missing tissues and reduces BC assessment error introduced by FOV tissue truncation. In the BC assessment for a large-scale lung screening CT dataset, this correction improves both the intra-subject consistency and the correlation with anthropometric approximations. The developed method is available at https://github.com/MASILab/S-EFOV. 肺部以外的视场 (FOV) 组织截断在常规肺部筛查计算机断层扫描 (CT) 中很常见。由于关键解剖结构缺失，这对基于 CT 的机会性身体成分 (BC) 评估造成了限制。传统上，扩展CT的FOV被认为是使用有限数据的CT重建问题。然而，这种方法依赖于应用程序中可能不可用的投影域数据。在这项工作中，我们从语义图像扩展的角度来阐述问题，只需要图像数据作为输入。所提出的两阶段方法根据整个身体的估计范围来识别新的视场边界，并估算截断区域中缺失的组织。训练样本使用 FOV 中完整身体的 CT 切片进行模拟，使模型开发能够自我监督。我们使用有限视场的肺部筛查 CT 评估所提出的方法在自动 BC 评估中的有效性。该方法有效地恢复了缺失的组织并减少了FOV组织截断引入的BC评估误差。在大规模肺部筛查 CT 数据集的 BC 评估中，这种校正提高了受试者内的一致性以及与人体测量近似值的相关性。开发的方法可在 https://github.com/MASILab/S-EFOV 获取。 本文提出了一种基于语义图像扩展的方法，用于解决有限视野CT扫描中因组织截断导致的身体成分评估问题。 Kaiwen Xu,Thomas Li,Mirza S. Khan,Riqiang Gao,Sanja L. Antic,Yuankai Huo,Kim L. Sandler,Fabien Maldonado,Bennett A. Landman eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Liyuan Wang,Xingxing Zhang,Qian Li,Jun Zhu,Yi Zhong
title: CoSCL: Cooperation of Small Continual Learners is Stronger than a Big One
title_zh: CoSCL：小型持续学习者的合作比大型持续学习者的合作更强
abstract: Continual learning requires incremental compatibility with a sequence of tasks. However, the design of model architecture remains an open question: In general, learning all tasks with a shared set of parameters suffers from severe interference between tasks; while learning each task with a dedicated parameter subspace is limited by scalability. In this work, we theoretically analyze the generalization errors for learning plasticity and memory stability in continual learning, which can be uniformly upper-bounded by (1) discrepancy between task distributions, (2) flatness of loss landscape and (3) cover of parameter space. Then, inspired by the robust biological learning system that processes sequential experiences with multiple parallel compartments, we propose Cooperation of Small Continual Learners (CoSCL) as a general strategy for continual learning. Specifically, we present an architecture with a fixed number of narrower sub-networks to learn all incremental tasks in parallel, which can naturally reduce the two errors through improving the three components of the upper bound. To strengthen this advantage, we encourage to cooperate these sub-networks by penalizing the difference of predictions made by their feature representations. With a fixed parameter budget, CoSCL can improve a variety of representative continual learning approaches by a large margin (e.g., up to 10.64% on CIFAR-100-SC, 9.33% on CIFAR-100-RS, 11.45% on CUB-200-2011 and 6.72% on Tiny-ImageNet) and achieve the new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Continual learning requires incremental compatibility with a sequence of tasks. However, the design of model architecture remains an open question: In general, learning all tasks with a shared set of parameters suffers from severe interference between tasks; while learning each task with a dedicated parameter subspace is limited by scalability. In this work, we theoretically analyze the generalization errors for learning plasticity and memory stability in continual learning, which can be uniformly upper-bounded by (1) discrepancy between task distributions, (2) flatness of loss landscape and (3) cover of parameter space. Then, inspired by the robust biological learning system that processes sequential experiences with multiple parallel compartments, we propose Cooperation of Small Continual Learners (CoSCL) as a general strategy for continual learning. Specifically, we present an architecture with a fixed number of narrower sub-networks to learn all incremental tasks in parallel, which can naturally reduce the two errors through improving the three components of the upper bound. To strengthen this advantage, we encourage to cooperate these sub-networks by penalizing the difference of predictions made by their feature representations. With a fixed parameter budget, CoSCL can improve a variety of representative continual learning approaches by a large margin (e.g., up to 10.64% on CIFAR-100-SC, 9.33% on CIFAR-100-RS, 11.45% on CUB-200-2011 and 6.72% on Tiny-ImageNet) and achieve the new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 持续学习需要与一系列任务的增量兼容性。然而，模型架构的设计仍然是一个悬而未决的问题：一般来说，使用一组共享参数学习所有任务会受到任务之间严重干扰的影响；而使用专用参数子空间学习每个任务则受到可扩展性的限制。在这项工作中，我们从理论上分析了持续学习中学习可塑性和记忆稳定性的泛化误差，其上限统一为（1）任务分布之间的差异，（2）损失景观的平坦度和（3）参数空间的覆盖。然后，受到强大的生物学习系统的启发，该系统通过多个并行隔室处理顺序经验，我们提出小型持续学习者合作（CoSCL）作为持续学习的一般策略。具体来说，我们提出了一种具有固定数量的较窄子网络的架构来并行学习所有增量任务，这可以通过改进上限的三个组成部分自然地减少这两个错误。为了增强这一优势，我们鼓励通过惩罚其特征表示的预测差异来合作这些子网络。通过固定的参数预算，CoSCL 可以大幅改进各种代表性的持续学习方法（例如，CIFAR-100-SC 上高达 10.64%，CIFAR-100-RS 上高达 9.33%，CUB-200-2011 上高达 11.45%，Tiny-ImageNet 上高达 6.72%），并实现新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoSCL方法，通过多个小规模持续学习器的协作解决持续学习中的模型架构设计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统持续学习方法存在参数共享导致的任务干扰或专用参数扩展性差的局限性，需探索新型架构设计。
AI.method: 设计固定数量的窄子网络并行学习任务，通过惩罚特征表示预测差异促进子网络协作，优化泛化误差上界三要素。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100-SC等四个数据集上显著超越现有方法，提升幅度达6.72%-11.45%，达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: CoSCL通过理论分析与架构创新有效平衡了任务间干扰与扩展性，为持续学习提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Yuzhang Shang,Dan Xu,Bin Duan,Ziliang Zong,Liqiang Nie,Yan Yan
title: Lipschitz Continuity Retained Binary Neural Network
title_zh: Lipschitz 连续性保留二元神经网络
abstract: Relying on the premise that the performance of a binary neural network can be largely restored with eliminated quantization error between full-precision weight vectors and their corresponding binary vectors, existing works of network binarization frequently adopt the idea of model robustness to reach the aforementioned objective. However, robustness remains to be an ill-defined concept without solid theoretical support. In this work, we introduce the Lipschitz continuity, a well-defined functional property, as the rigorous criteria to define the model robustness for BNN. We then propose to retain the Lipschitz continuity as a regularization term to improve the model robustness. Particularly, while the popular Lipschitz-involved regularization methods often collapse in BNN due to its extreme sparsity, we design the Retention Matrices to approximate spectral norms of the targeted weight matrices, which can be deployed as the approximation for the Lipschitz constant of BNNs without the exact Lipschitz constant computation (NP-hard). Our experiments prove that our BNN-specific regularization method can effectively strengthen the robustness of BNN (testified on ImageNet-C), achieving state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR and ImageNet.
summary: Relying on the premise that the performance of a binary neural network can be largely restored with eliminated quantization error between full-precision weight vectors and their corresponding binary vectors, existing works of network binarization frequently adopt the idea of model robustness to reach the aforementioned objective. However, robustness remains to be an ill-defined concept without solid theoretical support. In this work, we introduce the Lipschitz continuity, a well-defined functional property, as the rigorous criteria to define the model robustness for BNN. We then propose to retain the Lipschitz continuity as a regularization term to improve the model robustness. Particularly, while the popular Lipschitz-involved regularization methods often collapse in BNN due to its extreme sparsity, we design the Retention Matrices to approximate spectral norms of the targeted weight matrices, which can be deployed as the approximation for the Lipschitz constant of BNNs without the exact Lipschitz constant computation (NP-hard). Our experiments prove that our BNN-specific regularization method can effectively strengthen the robustness of BNN (testified on ImageNet-C), achieving state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR and ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 现有的网络二值化工作以能够很大程度上恢复二值神经网络的性能并消除全精度权向量与其对应的二值向量之间的量化误差为前提，常常采用模型鲁棒性的思想来达到上述目的。然而，鲁棒性仍然是一个定义不明确的概念，没有坚实的理论支持。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Lipschitz 连续性（一种定义明确的函数属性）作为定义 BNN 模型鲁棒性的严格标准。然后，我们建议保留 Lipschitz 连续性作为正则化项，以提高模型的鲁棒性。特别是，虽然流行的 Lipschitz 涉及的正则化方法由于其极度稀疏性经常在 BNN 中崩溃，但我们设计了保留矩阵来近似目标权重矩阵的谱范数，它可以部署为 BNN 的 Lipschitz 常数的近似值，而无需精确的 Lipschitz 常数计算（NP-hard）。我们的实验证明，我们的 BNN 特定正则化方法可以有效增强 BNN 的鲁棒性（在 ImageNet-C 上得到验证），在 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Lipschitz连续性的二值神经网络（BNN）正则化方法，以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有BNN二值化方法依赖模型鲁棒性但缺乏理论支持，而Lipschitz连续性作为明确的数学性质可提供严谨的鲁棒性定义。
AI.method: 设计保留矩阵近似权重矩阵的谱范数，作为BNN的Lipschitz常数替代方案，并将其作为正则化项加入训练过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C上验证鲁棒性提升，在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过Lipschitz正则化有效增强BNN鲁棒性，且无需计算精确Lipschitz常数（NP难问题）。

result: 在ImageNet-C上验证鲁棒性提升，在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集上达到SOTA性能。
conclusion: 该方法通过Lipschitz正则化有效增强BNN鲁棒性，且无需计算精确Lipschitz常数（NP难问题）。
search_text: Lipschitz Continuity Retained Binary Neural Network Lipschitz 连续性保留二元神经网络 Relying on the premise that the performance of a binary neural network can be largely restored with eliminated quantization error between full-precision weight vectors and their corresponding binary vectors, existing works of network binarization frequently adopt the idea of model robustness to reach the aforementioned objective. However, robustness remains to be an ill-defined concept without solid theoretical support. In this work, we introduce the Lipschitz continuity, a well-defined functional property, as the rigorous criteria to define the model robustness for BNN. We then propose to retain the Lipschitz continuity as a regularization term to improve the model robustness. Particularly, while the popular Lipschitz-involved regularization methods often collapse in BNN due to its extreme sparsity, we design the Retention Matrices to approximate spectral norms of the targeted weight matrices, which can be deployed as the approximation for the Lipschitz constant of BNNs without the exact Lipschitz constant computation (NP-hard). Our experiments prove that our BNN-specific regularization method can effectively strengthen the robustness of BNN (testified on ImageNet-C), achieving state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR and ImageNet. 现有的网络二值化工作以能够很大程度上恢复二值神经网络的性能并消除全精度权向量与其对应的二值向量之间的量化误差为前提，常常采用模型鲁棒性的思想来达到上述目的。然而，鲁棒性仍然是一个定义不明确的概念，没有坚实的理论支持。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Lipschitz 连续性（一种定义明确的函数属性）作为定义 BNN 模型鲁棒性的严格标准。然后，我们建议保留 Lipschitz 连续性作为正则化项，以提高模型的鲁棒性。特别是，虽然流行的 Lipschitz 涉及的正则化方法由于其极度稀疏性经常在 BNN 中崩溃，但我们设计了保留矩阵来近似目标权重矩阵的谱范数，它可以部署为 BNN 的 Lipschitz 常数的近似值，而无需精确的 Lipschitz 常数计算（NP-hard）。我们的实验证明，我们的 BNN 特定正则化方法可以有效增强 BNN 的鲁棒性（在 ImageNet-C 上得到验证），在 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于Lipschitz连续性的二值神经网络（BNN）正则化方法，以增强模型鲁棒性。 Yuzhang Shang,Dan Xu,Bin Duan,Ziliang Zong,Liqiang Nie,Yan Yan cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Taylan Şahin,Ramin Khalili,Mate Boban,Adam Wolisz
title: Scheduling Out-of-Coverage Vehicular Communications Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习安排覆盖范围外的车辆通信
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology. This is the author's version
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology. This is the author's version
abstract: Performance of vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communications depends highly on the employed scheduling approach. While centralized network schedulers offer high V2V communication reliability, their operation is conventionally restricted to areas with full cellular network coverage. In contrast, in out-of-cellular-coverage areas, comparatively inefficient distributed radio resource management is used. To exploit the benefits of the centralized approach for enhancing the reliability of V2V communications on roads lacking cellular coverage, we propose VRLS (Vehicular Reinforcement Learning Scheduler), a centralized scheduler that proactively assigns resources for out-of-coverage V2V communications \textit{before} vehicles leave the cellular network coverage. By training in simulated vehicular environments, VRLS can learn a scheduling policy that is robust and adaptable to environmental changes, thus eliminating the need for targeted (re-)training in complex real-life environments. We evaluate the performance of VRLS under varying mobility, network load, wireless channel, and resource configurations. VRLS outperforms the state-of-the-art distributed scheduling algorithm in zones without cellular network coverage by reducing the packet error rate by half in highly loaded conditions and achieving near-maximum reliability in low-load scenarios.
summary: Performance of vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communications depends highly on the employed scheduling approach. While centralized network schedulers offer high V2V communication reliability, their operation is conventionally restricted to areas with full cellular network coverage. In contrast, in out-of-cellular-coverage areas, comparatively inefficient distributed radio resource management is used. To exploit the benefits of the centralized approach for enhancing the reliability of V2V communications on roads lacking cellular coverage, we propose VRLS (Vehicular Reinforcement Learning Scheduler), a centralized scheduler that proactively assigns resources for out-of-coverage V2V communications \textit{before} vehicles leave the cellular network coverage. By training in simulated vehicular environments, VRLS can learn a scheduling policy that is robust and adaptable to environmental changes, thus eliminating the need for targeted (re-)training in complex real-life environments. We evaluate the performance of VRLS under varying mobility, network load, wireless channel, and resource configurations. VRLS outperforms the state-of-the-art distributed scheduling algorithm in zones without cellular network coverage by reducing the packet error rate by half in highly loaded conditions and achieving near-maximum reliability in low-load scenarios.
abstract_zh: 车对车 (V2V) 通信的性能在很大程度上取决于所采用的调度方法。虽然集中式网络调度程序可提供较高的 V2V 通信可靠性，但其操作通常仅限于蜂窝网络完全覆盖的区域。相反，在蜂窝覆盖范围外的区域，使用效率相对较低的分布式无线电资源管理。为了利用集中式方法的优势来增强缺乏蜂窝网络覆盖的道路上 V2V 通信的可靠性，我们提出了 VRLS（车辆强化学习调度程序），这是一种集中式调度程序，可在车辆离开蜂窝网络覆盖范围之前主动为覆盖范围外的 V2V 通信分配资源。通过在模拟车辆环境中进行训练，VRLS 可以学习鲁棒且能适应环境变化的调度策略，从而无需在复杂的现实环境中进行有针对性的（重新）训练。我们评估了 VRLS 在不同移动性、网络负载、无线信道和资源配置下的性能。 VRLS 在没有蜂窝网络覆盖的区域中优于最先进的分布式调度算法，在高负载条件下将数据包错误率降低一半，并在低负载情况下实现接近最大的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的集中式调度器VRLS，用于解决车辆在无蜂窝网络覆盖区域的通信调度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式调度器受限于蜂窝网络覆盖范围，而无覆盖区域依赖效率较低的分布式资源管理，亟需提升无覆盖区域V2V通信可靠性。
AI.method: 设计VRLS调度器通过强化学习在车辆离开覆盖区前预分配资源，在仿真环境中训练适应环境变化的调度策略，避免真实场景中的针对性再训练。
AI.result: VRLS在高负载场景下将丢包率降低50%，低负载场景下接近最大可靠性，优于现有分布式调度算法。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的集中式调度方法能有效提升无蜂窝覆盖区域的V2V通信可靠性，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Colin Pollard,Jonathan Aston,Mark A. Minor
title: Estimation of Soft Robotic Bladder Compression for Smart Helmets using IR Range Finding and Hall Effect Magnetic Sensing
title_zh: 使用红外测距和霍尔效应磁传感估计智能头盔的软机器人膀胱压缩
abstract: This research focuses on soft robotic bladders that are used to monitor and control the interaction between a user's head and the shell of a Smart Helmet. Compression of these bladders determines impact dissipation; hence the focus of this paper is sensing and estimation of bladder compression. An IR rangefinder-based solution is evaluated using regression techniques as well as a Neural Network to estimate bladder compression. A Hall-Effect (HE) magnetic sensing system is also examined where HE sensors embedded in the base of the bladder sense the position of a magnet in the top of the bladder. The paper presents the HE sensor array, signal processing of HE voltage data, and then a Neural Network (NN) for predicting bladder compression. Efficacy of different training data sets on NN performance is studied. Different NN configurations are examined to determine a configuration that provides accurate estimates with as few nodes as possible. Different bladder compression profiles are evaluated to characterize IR range finding and HE based techniques in application scenarios.
summary: This research focuses on soft robotic bladders that are used to monitor and control the interaction between a user's head and the shell of a Smart Helmet. Compression of these bladders determines impact dissipation; hence the focus of this paper is sensing and estimation of bladder compression. An IR rangefinder-based solution is evaluated using regression techniques as well as a Neural Network to estimate bladder compression. A Hall-Effect (HE) magnetic sensing system is also examined where HE sensors embedded in the base of the bladder sense the position of a magnet in the top of the bladder. The paper presents the HE sensor array, signal processing of HE voltage data, and then a Neural Network (NN) for predicting bladder compression. Efficacy of different training data sets on NN performance is studied. Different NN configurations are examined to determine a configuration that provides accurate estimates with as few nodes as possible. Different bladder compression profiles are evaluated to characterize IR range finding and HE based techniques in application scenarios.
abstract_zh: 这项研究的重点是软机器人膀胱，用于监视和控制用户的头部和智能头盔外壳之间的交互。这些气囊的压缩决定了冲击力的消散；因此，本文的重点是膀胱压力的感测和估计。使用回归技术和神经网络来评估基于红外测距仪的解决方案，以估计膀胱压力。还检查了霍尔效应 (HE) 磁传感系统，其中嵌入膀胱底部的 HE 传感器感测膀胱顶部磁体的位置。本文介绍了 HE 传感器阵列、HE 电压数据的信号处理，以及用于预测膀胱压迫的神经网络 (NN)。研究了不同训练数据集对神经网络性能的影响。检查不同的神经网络配置以确定能够使用尽可能少的节点提供准确估计的配置。对不同的膀胱压缩曲线进行评估，以表征应用场景中的红外测距和基于 HE 的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用红外测距和霍尔效应磁感技术，通过回归分析和神经网络估计智能头盔中软体机器人气囊的压缩情况，以优化头盔的冲击缓冲性能。
AI.motivation: 智能头盔需精准监测用户头部与外壳的交互压力，以有效分散冲击力，保障安全。传统方法难以准确估计软体气囊压缩状态，需开发新型传感方案。
AI.method: 采用红外测距传感器结合回归模型和神经网络（NN）估算气囊压缩；同时设计嵌入霍尔效应传感器的磁感系统，通过磁铁位置变化检测压缩量，并优化NN结构与训练数据集。
AI.result: 验证了红外和磁感方法在不同压缩场景下的可行性，发现霍尔效应传感器结合神经网络在精度与节点数量上表现更优，且优化后的NN配置显著提升估算效率。
AI.conclusion: 霍尔效应磁感联合神经网络为软体气囊压缩监测提供了高精度、低复杂度的解决方案，可有效提升智能头盔的安全性能与响应效率。

Compression of these bladders determines impact dissipation; hence the focus of this paper is sensing and estimation of bladder compression. A Hall-Effect (HE) magnetic sensing system is also examined where HE sensors embedded in the base of the bladder sense the position of a magnet in the top of the bladder. The paper presents the HE sensor array, signal processing of HE voltage data, and then a Neural Network (NN) for predicting bladder compression. Efficacy of different training data sets on NN performance is studied. Different NN configurations are examined to determine a configuration that provides accurate estimates with as few nodes as possible. Different bladder compression profiles are evaluated to characterize IR range finding and HE based techniques in application scenarios. 这项研究的重点是软机器人膀胱，用于监视和控制用户的头部和智能头盔外壳之间的交互。这些气囊的压缩决定了冲击力的消散；因此，本文的重点是膀胱压力的感测和估计。使用回归技术和神经网络来评估基于红外测距仪的解决方案，以估计膀胱压力。还检查了霍尔效应 (HE) 磁传感系统，其中嵌入膀胱底部的 HE 传感器感测膀胱顶部磁体的位置。本文介绍了 HE 传感器阵列、HE 电压数据的信号处理，以及用于预测膀胱压迫的神经网络 (NN)。研究了不同训练数据集对神经网络性能的影响。检查不同的神经网络配置以确定能够使用尽可能少的节点提供准确估计的配置。对不同的膀胱压缩曲线进行评估，以表征应用场景中的红外测距和基于 HE 的技术。 本文研究利用红外测距和霍尔效应磁感技术，通过回归分析和神经网络估计智能头盔中软体机器人气囊的压缩情况，以优化头盔的冲击缓冲性能。 Colin Pollard,Jonathan Aston,Mark A. Minor cs.RO

authors_text: Marina Evers,Raphael Wittkowski,Lars Linsen
title: ASEVis: Visual Exploration of Active System Ensembles to Define Characteristic Measures
title_zh: ASEVis：对主动系统集成进行视觉探索以定义特征测量
abstract: Simulation ensembles are a common tool in physics for understanding how a model outcome depends on input parameters. We analyze an active particle system, where each particle can use energy from its surroundings to propel itself. A multi-dimensional feature vector containing all particles' motion information can describe the whole system at each time step. The system's behavior strongly depends on input parameters like the propulsion mechanism of the particles. To understand how the time-varying behavior depends on the input parameters, it is necessary to introduce new measures to quantify the difference of the dynamics of the ensemble members. We propose a tool that supports the interactive visual analysis of time-varying feature-vector ensembles. A core component of our tool allows for the interactive definition and refinement of new measures that can then be used to understand the system's behavior and compare the ensemble members. Different visualizations support the user in finding a characteristic measure for the system. By visualizing the user-defined measure, the user can then investigate the parameter dependencies and gain insights into the relationship between input parameters and simulation output.
summary: Simulation ensembles are a common tool in physics for understanding how a model outcome depends on input parameters. We analyze an active particle system, where each particle can use energy from its surroundings to propel itself. A multi-dimensional feature vector containing all particles' motion information can describe the whole system at each time step. The system's behavior strongly depends on input parameters like the propulsion mechanism of the particles. To understand how the time-varying behavior depends on the input parameters, it is necessary to introduce new measures to quantify the difference of the dynamics of the ensemble members. We propose a tool that supports the interactive visual analysis of time-varying feature-vector ensembles. A core component of our tool allows for the interactive definition and refinement of new measures that can then be used to understand the system's behavior and compare the ensemble members. Different visualizations support the user in finding a characteristic measure for the system. By visualizing the user-defined measure, the user can then investigate the parameter dependencies and gain insights into the relationship between input parameters and simulation output.
abstract_zh: 仿真系综是物理学中的常用工具，用于理解模型结果如何依赖于输入参数。我们分析了一个活跃的粒子系统，其中每个粒子都可以利用周围环境的能量来推动自身。包含所有粒子运动信息的多维特征向量可以在每个时间步描述整个系统。系统的行为很大程度上取决于输入参数，例如粒子的推进机制。为了理解时变行为如何取决于输入参数，有必要引入新的措施来量化集成成员动态的差异。我们提出了一种支持时变特征向量集合的交互式视觉分析的工具。我们工具的核心组件允许对新测量进行交互式定义和细化，然后可以使用这些新测量来理解系统的行为并比较集成成员。不同的可视化支持用户找到系统的特征度量。通过可视化用户定义的测量，用户可以研究参数依赖性并深入了解输入参数和仿真输出之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASEVis工具，通过交互式可视化分析主动系统集合，以定义特征度量标准，帮助理解系统行为与输入参数的关系。
AI.motivation: 模拟集合是研究模型输出对输入参数依赖性的常用工具，但现有方法难以量化动态差异。主动粒子系统的复杂行为需要新的度量标准来捕捉其时间演化特性。
AI.method: 开发交互式可视化工具ASEVis，支持用户定义和优化特征度量标准，并通过多维特征向量可视化辅助发现系统关键参数依赖关系。
AI.result: 实现了ASEVis工具，用户可通过可视化定义特征度量，分析参数变化对系统动态行为的影响，从而获得输入参数与模拟输出之间的关联洞察。
AI.conclusion: ASEVis通过交互式可视化有效支持了主动系统集合的特征度量定义，为理解复杂系统参数依赖性提供了直观分析手段。

authors_text: Onat Dalmaz,Usama Mirza,Gökberk Elmas,Muzaffer Özbey,Salman UH Dar,Emir Ceyani,Salman Avestimehr,Tolga Çukur
title: One Model to Unite Them All: Personalized Federated Learning of Multi-Contrast MRI Synthesis
title_zh: 一种将它们统一起来的模型：多对比 MRI 合成的个性化联合学习
abstract: Multi-institutional collaborations are key for learning generalizable MRI synthesis models that translate source- onto target-contrast images. To facilitate collaboration, federated learning (FL) adopts decentralized training and mitigates privacy concerns by avoiding sharing of imaging data. However, FL-trained synthesis models can be impaired by the inherent heterogeneity in the data distribution, with domain shifts evident when common or variable translation tasks are prescribed across sites. Here we introduce the first personalized FL method for MRI Synthesis (pFLSynth) to improve reliability against domain shifts. pFLSynth is based on an adversarial model that produces latents specific to individual sites and source-target contrasts, and leverages novel personalization blocks to adaptively tune the statistics and weighting of feature maps across the generator stages given latents. To further promote site specificity, partial model aggregation is employed over downstream layers of the generator while upstream layers are retained locally. As such, pFLSynth enables training of a unified synthesis model that can reliably generalize across multiple sites and translation tasks. Comprehensive experiments on multi-site datasets clearly demonstrate the enhanced performance of pFLSynth against prior federated methods in multi-contrast MRI synthesis.
summary: Multi-institutional collaborations are key for learning generalizable MRI synthesis models that translate source- onto target-contrast images. To facilitate collaboration, federated learning (FL) adopts decentralized training and mitigates privacy concerns by avoiding sharing of imaging data. However, FL-trained synthesis models can be impaired by the inherent heterogeneity in the data distribution, with domain shifts evident when common or variable translation tasks are prescribed across sites. Here we introduce the first personalized FL method for MRI Synthesis (pFLSynth) to improve reliability against domain shifts. pFLSynth is based on an adversarial model that produces latents specific to individual sites and source-target contrasts, and leverages novel personalization blocks to adaptively tune the statistics and weighting of feature maps across the generator stages given latents. To further promote site specificity, partial model aggregation is employed over downstream layers of the generator while upstream layers are retained locally. As such, pFLSynth enables training of a unified synthesis model that can reliably generalize across multiple sites and translation tasks. Comprehensive experiments on multi-site datasets clearly demonstrate the enhanced performance of pFLSynth against prior federated methods in multi-contrast MRI synthesis.
abstract_zh: 多机构合作是学习可将源对比图像转换为目标对比图像的通用 MRI 合成模型的关键。为了促进协作，联邦学习（FL）采用分散式训练，并通过避免共享成像数据来减轻隐私问题。然而，FL 训练的合成模型可能会受到数据分布中固有的异质性的影响，当跨站点指定常见或可变的翻译任务时，域转移会很明显。在这里，我们介绍了第一个用于 MRI 合成的个性化 FL 方法 (pFLSynth)，以提高针对域转移的可靠性。 pFLSynth 基于对抗模型，该模型产生特定于各个站点和源目标对比的潜在特征，并利用新颖的个性化块来自适应调整给定潜在特征的生成器阶段的特征图的统计数据和权重。为了进一步提高站点特异性，在生成器的下游层上采用部分模型聚合，而上游层则保留在本地。因此，pFLSynth 能够训练统一的合成模型，该模型可以跨多个站点和翻译任务可靠地进行泛化。对多站点数据集的综合实验清楚地证明了 pFLSynth 相对于多对比 MRI 合成中先前的联合方法的增强性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种个性化联邦学习方法pFLSynth，用于改进多对比MRI合成模型在跨站点数据分布异质性下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习训练的MRI合成模型因数据分布异质性和领域偏移问题导致性能下降，需开发个性化方法以提升跨站点任务的泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于对抗模型生成站点特异性潜在表示，结合个性化模块动态调整生成器特征图统计量与权重，并采用部分模型聚合策略保留局部上游层参数。
AI.result: 在多站点数据集上的实验表明，pFLSynth在多对比MRI合成任务中显著优于现有联邦学习方法。
AI.conclusion: pFLSynth通过站点个性化与分层模型聚合有效缓解了领域偏移问题，为跨机构医学影像合成提供了可靠联邦学习框架。

authors_text: Larkin Liu
title: Approximate Nash Equilibrium Learning for n-Player Markov Games in Dynamic Pricing
title_zh: 动态定价中n人马尔可夫博弈的近似纳什均衡学习
abstract: We investigate Nash equilibrium learning in a competitive Markov Game (MG) environment, where multiple agents compete, and multiple Nash equilibria can exist. In particular, for an oligopolistic dynamic pricing environment, exact Nash equilibria are difficult to obtain due to the curse-of-dimensionality. We develop a new model-free method to find approximate Nash equilibria. Gradient-free black box optimization is then applied to estimate $ε$, the maximum reward advantage of an agent unilaterally deviating from any joint policy, and to also estimate the $ε$-minimizing policy for any given state. The policy-$ε$ correspondence and the state to $ε$-minimizing policy are represented by neural networks, the latter being the Nash Policy Net. During batch update, we perform Nash Q learning on the system, by adjusting the action probabilities using the Nash Policy Net. We demonstrate that an approximate Nash equilibrium can be learned, particularly in the dynamic pricing domain where exact solutions are often intractable.
summary: We investigate Nash equilibrium learning in a competitive Markov Game (MG) environment, where multiple agents compete, and multiple Nash equilibria can exist. In particular, for an oligopolistic dynamic pricing environment, exact Nash equilibria are difficult to obtain due to the curse-of-dimensionality. We develop a new model-free method to find approximate Nash equilibria. Gradient-free black box optimization is then applied to estimate $ε$, the maximum reward advantage of an agent unilaterally deviating from any joint policy, and to also estimate the $ε$-minimizing policy for any given state. The policy-$ε$ correspondence and the state to $ε$-minimizing policy are represented by neural networks, the latter being the Nash Policy Net. During batch update, we perform Nash Q learning on the system, by adjusting the action probabilities using the Nash Policy Net. We demonstrate that an approximate Nash equilibrium can be learned, particularly in the dynamic pricing domain where exact solutions are often intractable.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了竞争性马尔可夫博弈（MG）环境中的纳什均衡学习，其中多个代理竞争，并且可以存在多个纳什均衡。特别是，对于寡头垄断的动态定价环境，由于维数灾难，很难获得精确的纳什均衡。我们开发了一种新的无模型方法来寻找近似纳什均衡。然后应用无梯度黑盒优化来估计 $ε$，即单方面偏离任何联合策略的代理的最大奖励优势，并估计任何给定状态的 $ε$ 最小化策略。策略-$ε$对应关系和状态到$ε$最小化策略由神经网络表示，后者是纳什策略网络。在批量更新期间，我们通过使用纳什策略网络调整动作概率，在系统上执行纳什 Q 学习。我们证明了可以学习近似的纳什均衡，特别是在动态定价领域，精确的解决方案通常很难处理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在动态定价场景下的多智能体马尔可夫博弈中学习近似纳什均衡的问题，提出了一种无模型方法以应对高维状态空间下的精确均衡难以计算的挑战。
AI.motivation: 在寡头竞争的动态定价环境中，由于状态空间维度爆炸（维度灾难），精确求解纳什均衡计算复杂度极高，亟需开发近似求解方法。
AI.method: 设计基于神经网络的纳什策略网络，结合无梯度黑盒优化估计策略偏差ε，并通过批量更新的纳什Q学习调整动作概率，实现对ε-近似纳什均衡的逼近。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在动态定价场景中能够有效学习到近似纳什均衡，且在高维状态空间下表现优于传统精确求解方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无模型近似纳什均衡学习框架成功克服了动态定价环境中维度灾难的限制，为多智能体强化学习提供了可行的均衡求解方案。
