search_text: Approximate Nash Equilibrium Learning for n-Player Markov Games in Dynamic Pricing 动态定价中n人马尔可夫博弈的近似纳什均衡学习 We investigate Nash equilibrium learning in a competitive Markov Game (MG) environment, where multiple agents compete, and multiple Nash equilibria can exist. In particular, for an oligopolistic dynamic pricing environment, exact Nash equilibria are difficult to obtain due to the curse-of-dimensionality. We develop a new model-free method to find approximate Nash equilibria. Gradient-free black box optimization is then applied to estimate $ε$, the maximum reward advantage of an agent unilaterally deviating from any joint policy, and to also estimate the $ε$-minimizing policy for any given state. The policy-$ε$ correspondence and the state to $ε$-minimizing policy are represented by neural networks, the latter being the Nash Policy Net. During batch update, we perform Nash Q learning on the system, by adjusting the action probabilities using the Nash Policy Net. We demonstrate that an approximate Nash equilibrium can be learned, particularly in the dynamic pricing domain where exact solutions are often intractable. 我们研究了竞争性马尔可夫博弈（MG）环境中的纳什均衡学习，其中多个代理竞争，并且可以存在多个纳什均衡。特别是，对于寡头垄断的动态定价环境，由于维数灾难，很难获得精确的纳什均衡。我们开发了一种新的无模型方法来寻找近似纳什均衡。然后应用无梯度黑盒优化来估计 $ε$，即单方面偏离任何联合策略的代理的最大奖励优势，并估计任何给定状态的 $ε$ 最小化策略。策略-$ε$对应关系和状态到$ε$最小化策略由神经网络表示，后者是纳什策略网络。在批量更新期间，我们通过使用纳什策略网络调整动作概率，在系统上执行纳什 Q 学习。我们证明了可以学习近似的纳什均衡，特别是在动态定价领域，精确的解决方案通常很难处理。 本文研究在动态定价场景下的多智能体马尔可夫博弈中学习近似纳什均衡的问题，提出了一种无模型方法以应对高维状态空间下的精确均衡难以计算的挑战。 Larkin Liu cs.GT,cs.AI

authors_text: Renhui Zhang,Youwei Zhang,Yao Yu
title: A Robustly Optimized Long Text to Math Models for Numerical Reasoning On FinQA
title_zh: 用于 FinQA 数值推理的稳健优化的长文本到数学模型
abstract: Numerical reasoning is required when solving most problems in our life, but it has been neglected in previous artificial intelligence researches. FinQA challenge has been organized to strengthen the study on numerical reasoning where the participants are asked to predict the numerical reasoning program to solve financial question. The result of FinQA will be evaluated by both execution accuracy and program accuracy. In this paper, we present our approach to tackle the task objective by developing models with different specialized capabilities and fusing their strength. Overall, our approach achieves the 1st place in FinQA challenge, with 71.93% execution accuracy and 67.03% program accuracy.
summary: Numerical reasoning is required when solving most problems in our life, but it has been neglected in previous artificial intelligence researches. FinQA challenge has been organized to strengthen the study on numerical reasoning where the participants are asked to predict the numerical reasoning program to solve financial question. The result of FinQA will be evaluated by both execution accuracy and program accuracy. In this paper, we present our approach to tackle the task objective by developing models with different specialized capabilities and fusing their strength. Overall, our approach achieves the 1st place in FinQA challenge, with 71.93% execution accuracy and 67.03% program accuracy.
abstract_zh: 解决我们生活中的大多数问题都需要数值推理，但在以往的人工智能研究中却被忽视了。 FinQA 挑战赛的目的是加强对数字推理的研究，要求参与者预测解决金融问题的数字推理程序。 FinQA的结果将通过执行准确性和程序准确性来评估。在本文中，我们提出了通过开发具有不同专业能力的模型并融合它们的优势来解决任务目标的方法。总体而言，我们的方法在 FinQA 挑战赛中获得了第一名，执行准确度为 71.93%，程序准确度为 67.03%。

AI.tldr: 开发一种优化的长文本到数学模型，用于FinQA挑战赛中的数值推理，解决财务问题。
AI.motivation: 数值推理在AI中被忽视，FinQA挑战赛旨在提升该领域研究，解决财务问题。
AI.method: 开发具有不同专门能力的模型，并融合其优势以提升数值推理性能。
AI.result: 在FinQA挑战赛中获得第一名，执行准确率71.93%，程序准确率67.03%。
AI.conclusion: 模型融合策略有效，提升了数值推理任务的性能。

authors_text: Pranav Singh,Jacopo Cirrone
title: A Data-Efficient Deep Learning Framework for Segmentation and Classification of Histopathology Images
title_zh: 用于组织病理学图像分割和分类的数据高效深度学习框架
comment: Originally published at the ECCV 2022 Medical Computer Vision Workshop (ECCV-MCV 2022)
comments: Originally published at the ECCV 2022 Medical Computer Vision Workshop (ECCV-MCV 2022)
abstract: The current study of cell architecture of inflammation in histopathology images commonly performed for diagnosis and research purposes excludes a lot of information available on the biopsy slide. In autoimmune diseases, major outstanding research questions remain regarding which cell types participate in inflammation at the tissue level, and how they interact with each other. While these questions can be partially answered using traditional methods, artificial intelligence approaches for segmentation and classification provide a much more efficient method to understand the architecture of inflammation in autoimmune disease, holding great promise for novel insights. In this paper, we empirically develop deep learning approaches that use dermatomyositis biopsies of human tissue to detect and identify inflammatory cells. Our approach improves classification performance by 26% and segmentation performance by 5%. We also propose a novel post-processing autoencoder architecture that improves segmentation performance by an additional 3%.
summary: The current study of cell architecture of inflammation in histopathology images commonly performed for diagnosis and research purposes excludes a lot of information available on the biopsy slide. In autoimmune diseases, major outstanding research questions remain regarding which cell types participate in inflammation at the tissue level, and how they interact with each other. While these questions can be partially answered using traditional methods, artificial intelligence approaches for segmentation and classification provide a much more efficient method to understand the architecture of inflammation in autoimmune disease, holding great promise for novel insights. In this paper, we empirically develop deep learning approaches that use dermatomyositis biopsies of human tissue to detect and identify inflammatory cells. Our approach improves classification performance by 26% and segmentation performance by 5%. We also propose a novel post-processing autoencoder architecture that improves segmentation performance by an additional 3%.
abstract_zh: 当前通常用于诊断和研究目的的组织病理学图像中炎症细胞结构的研究排除了活检载玻片上可用的大量信息。在自身免疫性疾病中，主要的悬而未决的研究问题仍然是哪些细胞类型参与组织水平的炎症，以及它们如何相互作用。虽然使用传统方法可以部分回答这些问题，但用于分割和分类的人工智能方法提供了一种更有效的方法来了解自身免疫性疾病中炎症的结构，为新的见解带来了巨大的希望。在本文中，我们凭经验开发了深度学习方法，使用人体组织的皮肌炎活检来检测和识别炎症细胞。我们的方法将分类性能提高了 26%，将分割性能提高了 5%。我们还提出了一种新颖的后处理自动编码器架构，可将分割性能额外提高 3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据高效的深度学习框架，用于分割和分类组织病理学图像中的炎症细胞。
AI.motivation: 目前对组织病理学图像中炎症细胞结构的研究在诊断和研究中忽略了大量信息，特别是在自身免疫疾病中，关于哪些细胞类型参与炎症以及它们如何相互作用的问题仍未解决。
AI.method: 本文开发了使用人类皮肤肌炎活检样本的深度学习方法，以检测和识别炎症细胞，并提出了一种新的后处理自编码器架构。
AI.result: 该方法将分类性能提高了26%，分割性能提高了5%，后处理自编码器架构进一步提高了3%的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了深度学习在理解自身免疫疾病中炎症结构方面的潜力，为相关研究提供了新的见解。

In this paper, we empirically develop deep learning approaches that use dermatomyositis biopsies of human tissue to detect and identify inflammatory cells. Our approach improves classification performance by 26% and segmentation performance by 5%. We also propose a novel post-processing autoencoder architecture that improves segmentation performance by an additional 3%. 当前通常用于诊断和研究目的的组织病理学图像中炎症细胞结构的研究排除了活检载玻片上可用的大量信息。在自身免疫性疾病中，主要的悬而未决的研究问题仍然是哪些细胞类型参与组织水平的炎症，以及它们如何相互作用。虽然使用传统方法可以部分回答这些问题，但用于分割和分类的人工智能方法提供了一种更有效的方法来了解自身免疫性疾病中炎症的结构，为新的见解带来了巨大的希望。在本文中，我们凭经验开发了深度学习方法，使用人体组织的皮肌炎活检来检测和识别炎症细胞。我们的方法将分类性能提高了 26%，将分割性能提高了 5%。我们还提出了一种新颖的后处理自动编码器架构，可将分割性能额外提高 3%。 本文提出了一种数据高效的深度学习框架，用于分割和分类组织病理学图像中的炎症细胞。 Pranav Singh,Jacopo Cirrone eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Bhishman Desai,Manish Paliwal,Kapil Kumar Nagwanshi
title: Study on Image Filtering -- Techniques, Algorithm and Applications
title_zh: 图像滤波研究——技术、算法与应用
abstract: Image processing is one of the most immerging and widely growing techniques making it a lively research field. Image processing is converting an image to a digital format and then doing different operations on it, such as improving the image or extracting various valuable data. Image filtering is one of the fascinating applications of image processing. Image filtering is a technique for altering the size, shape, color, depth, smoothness, and other image properties. It alters the pixels of the image to transform it into the desired form using different types of graphical editing methods through graphic design and editing software. This paper introduces various image filtering techniques and their wide applications.
summary: Image processing is one of the most immerging and widely growing techniques making it a lively research field. Image processing is converting an image to a digital format and then doing different operations on it, such as improving the image or extracting various valuable data. Image filtering is one of the fascinating applications of image processing. Image filtering is a technique for altering the size, shape, color, depth, smoothness, and other image properties. It alters the pixels of the image to transform it into the desired form using different types of graphical editing methods through graphic design and editing software. This paper introduces various image filtering techniques and their wide applications.
abstract_zh: 图像处理是最具沉浸性和广泛发展的技术之一，使其成为一个活跃的研究领域。图像处理是将图像转换为数字格式，然后对其进行不同的操作，例如改进图像或提取各种有价值的数据。图像过滤是图像处理的迷人应用之一。图像过滤是一种改变大小、形状、颜色、深度、平滑度和其他图像属性的技术。它通过图形设计和编辑软件使用不同类型的图形编辑方法来改变图像的像素，将其转换为所需的形式。本文介绍了各种图像过滤技术及其广泛应用。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究图像滤波技术及其应用，探讨不同滤波方法和算法在图像处理中的作用
AI.motivation: 图像处理技术快速发展，图像滤波作为关键应用，需探索其技术与算法以提升图像质量与数据提取效率
AI.method: 通过综述和分析现有图像滤波技术，介绍不同算法及图形编辑软件的应用方法
AI.result: 总结了多种图像滤波技术及算法，阐述了其在图像增强、数据提取等领域的应用效果
AI.conclusion: 图像滤波技术对图像处理至关重要，未来需进一步优化算法以适应更多应用场景

authors_text: Ožbej Golob
title: Analysis of face detection, face landmarking, and face recognition performance with masked face images
title_zh: 使用蒙版人脸图像分析人脸检测、人脸标记和人脸识别性能
abstract: Face recognition has become an essential task in our lives. However, the current COVID-19 pandemic has led to the widespread use of face masks. The effect of wearing face masks is currently an understudied issue. The aim of this paper is to analyze face detection, face landmarking, and face recognition performance with masked face images. HOG and CNN face detectors are used for face detection in combination with 5-point and 68-point face landmark predictors and VGG16 face recognition model is used for face recognition on masked and unmasked images. We found that the performance of face detection, face landmarking, and face recognition is negatively impacted by face masks
summary: Face recognition has become an essential task in our lives. However, the current COVID-19 pandemic has led to the widespread use of face masks. The effect of wearing face masks is currently an understudied issue. The aim of this paper is to analyze face detection, face landmarking, and face recognition performance with masked face images. HOG and CNN face detectors are used for face detection in combination with 5-point and 68-point face landmark predictors and VGG16 face recognition model is used for face recognition on masked and unmasked images. We found that the performance of face detection, face landmarking, and face recognition is negatively impacted by face masks
abstract_zh: 人脸识别已经成为我们生活中必不可少的任务。然而，当前的 COVID-19 大流行导致口罩的广泛使用。戴口罩的效果目前是一个尚未得到充分研究的问题。本文的目的是分析带有蒙版人脸图像的人脸检测、人脸标记和人脸识别性能。 HOG 和 CNN 人脸检测器结合 5 点和 68 点人脸特征点预测器进行人脸检测，VGG16 人脸识别模型用于在遮蔽和未遮蔽图像上进行人脸识别。我们发现人脸检测、人脸标记和人脸识别的性能受到口罩的负面影响

AI.tldr: 分析口罩对面部检测、面部标志定位及面部识别性能的影响
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致口罩普及，但现有研究缺乏对口罩影响面部识别技术的系统分析
AI.method: 采用HOG和CNN检测器结合5点/68点标志预测器，使用VGG16模型在带口罩和不带口罩图像上进行对比实验
AI.result: 实验发现口罩显著降低了面部检测、标志定位和识别的准确率
AI.conclusion: 需开发对部分遮挡更具鲁棒性的面部识别算法以适应疫情常态化需求

authors_text: Daniel Goldfarb,Paul Hand
title: Analysis of Catastrophic Forgetting for Random Orthogonal Transformation Tasks in the Overparameterized Regime
title_zh: 超参数化机制中随机正交变换任务的灾难性遗忘分析
abstract: Overparameterization is known to permit strong generalization performance in neural networks. In this work, we provide an initial theoretical analysis of its effect on catastrophic forgetting in a continual learning setup. We show experimentally that in permuted MNIST image classification tasks, the generalization performance of multilayer perceptrons trained by vanilla stochastic gradient descent can be improved by overparameterization, and the extent of the performance increase achieved by overparameterization is comparable to that of state-of-the-art continual learning algorithms. We provide a theoretical explanation of this effect by studying a qualitatively similar two-task linear regression problem, where each task is related by a random orthogonal transformation. We show that when a model is trained on the two tasks in sequence without any additional regularization, the risk gain on the first task is small if the model is sufficiently overparameterized.
summary: Overparameterization is known to permit strong generalization performance in neural networks. In this work, we provide an initial theoretical analysis of its effect on catastrophic forgetting in a continual learning setup. We show experimentally that in permuted MNIST image classification tasks, the generalization performance of multilayer perceptrons trained by vanilla stochastic gradient descent can be improved by overparameterization, and the extent of the performance increase achieved by overparameterization is comparable to that of state-of-the-art continual learning algorithms. We provide a theoretical explanation of this effect by studying a qualitatively similar two-task linear regression problem, where each task is related by a random orthogonal transformation. We show that when a model is trained on the two tasks in sequence without any additional regularization, the risk gain on the first task is small if the model is sufficiently overparameterized.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，过度参数化可以在神经网络中实现强大的泛化性能。在这项工作中，我们对其在持续学习设置中对灾难性遗忘的影响进行了初步的理论分析。我们通过实验证明，在排列 MNIST 图像分类任务中，通过普通随机梯度下降训练的多层感知器的泛化性能可以通过过参数化来提高，并且通过过参数化实现的性能提升程度与最先进的持续学习算法相当。我们通过研究定性相似的双任务线性回归问题提供了这种效应的理论解释，其中每个任务都通过随机正交变换相关。我们表明，当模型在没有任何额外正则化的情况下按顺序对两个任务进行训练时，如果模型充分过度参数化，则第一个任务的风险增益很小。

AI.tldr: 分析过参数化在持续学习场景下对随机正交变换任务中灾难性遗忘的影响。
AI.motivation: 过参数化虽能提升神经网络泛化能力，但其在持续学习中的灾难性遗忘机制尚未明确，需理论与实验结合探讨。
AI.method: 通过实验对比过参数化MLP与现有算法在permuted MNIST任务中的表现，并构建两任务线性回归模型进行理论分析。
AI.result: 过参数化显著提升模型泛化性能，效果接近SOTA算法；理论证明足够过参数化时，任务切换导致的初始任务风险增加较小。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化可有效缓解灾难性遗忘，无需额外正则化，为持续学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Xingguang Zhang,Zhiyuan Mao,Nicholas Chimitt,Stanley H. Chan
title: Imaging through the Atmosphere using Turbulence Mitigation Transformer
title_zh: 使用湍流缓解变压器对大气进行成像
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging; project page: https://xg416.github.io/TMT/
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging; project page: https://xg416.github.io/TMT/
abstract: Restoring images distorted by atmospheric turbulence is a ubiquitous problem in long-range imaging applications. While existing deep-learning-based methods have demonstrated promising results in specific testing conditions, they suffer from three limitations: (1) lack of generalization capability from synthetic training data to real turbulence data; (2) failure to scale, hence causing memory and speed challenges when extending the idea to a large number of frames; (3) lack of a fast and accurate simulator to generate data for training neural networks. In this paper, we introduce the turbulence mitigation transformer (TMT) that explicitly addresses these issues. TMT brings three contributions: Firstly, TMT explicitly uses turbulence physics by decoupling the turbulence degradation and introducing a multi-scale loss for removing distortion, thus improving effectiveness. Secondly, TMT presents a new attention module along the temporal axis to extract extra features efficiently, thus improving memory and speed. Thirdly, TMT introduces a new simulator based on the Fourier sampler, temporal correlation, and flexible kernel size, thus improving our capability to synthesize better training data. TMT outperforms state-of-the-art video restoration models, especially in generalizing from synthetic to real turbulence data. Code, videos, and datasets are available at \href{https://xg416.github.io/TMT}{https://xg416.github.io/TMT}.
summary: Restoring images distorted by atmospheric turbulence is a ubiquitous problem in long-range imaging applications. While existing deep-learning-based methods have demonstrated promising results in specific testing conditions, they suffer from three limitations: (1) lack of generalization capability from synthetic training data to real turbulence data; (2) failure to scale, hence causing memory and speed challenges when extending the idea to a large number of frames; (3) lack of a fast and accurate simulator to generate data for training neural networks. In this paper, we introduce the turbulence mitigation transformer (TMT) that explicitly addresses these issues. TMT brings three contributions: Firstly, TMT explicitly uses turbulence physics by decoupling the turbulence degradation and introducing a multi-scale loss for removing distortion, thus improving effectiveness. Secondly, TMT presents a new attention module along the temporal axis to extract extra features efficiently, thus improving memory and speed. Thirdly, TMT introduces a new simulator based on the Fourier sampler, temporal correlation, and flexible kernel size, thus improving our capability to synthesize better training data. TMT outperforms state-of-the-art video restoration models, especially in generalizing from synthetic to real turbulence data. Code, videos, and datasets are available at \href{https://xg416.github.io/TMT}{https://xg416.github.io/TMT}.
abstract_zh: 恢复因大气湍流而扭曲的图像是远程成像应用中普遍存在的问题。虽然现有的基于深度学习的方法在特定的测试条件下表现出了良好的结果，但它们存在三个局限性：（1）缺乏从合成训练数据到真实湍流数据的泛化能力； (2) 无法扩展，因此在将想法扩展到大量帧时会造成内存和速度挑战； (3)缺乏快速准确的模拟器来生成训练神经网络的数据。在本文中，我们介绍了明确解决这些问题的湍流缓解变压器（TMT）。 TMT带来了三个贡献：首先，TMT明确地使用湍流物理，通过解耦湍流退化并引入多尺度损失来消除失真，从而提高有效性。其次，TMT 沿着时间轴提出了一个新的注意力模块，可以有效地提取额外的特征，从而提高记忆力和速度。第三，TMT引入了基于傅里叶采样器、时间相关性和灵活的内核大小的新模拟器，从而提高了我们合成更好的训练数据的能力。 TMT 的性能优于最先进的视频恢复模型，特别是在从合成湍流数据到真实湍流数据的推广方面。代码、视频和数据集可在 \href{https://xg416.github.io/TMT}{https://xg416.github.io/TMT} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TMT的湍流抑制变换器，用于解决大气湍流导致的长距离成像图像失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在合成数据到真实湍流数据的泛化能力、大规模数据处理效率及训练数据生成仿真器方面存在不足。
AI.method: TMT通过解耦湍流退化过程、引入多尺度损失函数、设计时序注意力模块以及基于傅里叶采样器的新型仿真器来提升性能。
AI.result: TMT在视频修复任务中优于现有最先进模型，尤其在合成数据到真实湍流数据的泛化能力上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: TMT通过物理建模与架构创新有效解决了湍流图像恢复中的关键挑战，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Roberto Campos,Pablo A M Casares,M A Martin-Delgado
title: Quantum Metropolis Solver: A Quantum Walks Approach to Optimization Problems
title_zh: 量子大都市求解器：优化问题的量子行走方法
abstract: The efficient resolution of optimization problems is one of the key issues in today's industry. This task relies mainly on classical algorithms that present scalability problems and processing limitations. Quantum computing has emerged to challenge these types of problems. In this paper, we focus on the Metropolis-Hastings quantum algorithm that is based on quantum walks. We use this algorithm to build a quantum software tool called Quantum Metropolis Solver (QMS). We validate QMS with the N-Queen problem to show a potential quantum advantage in an example that can be easily extrapolated to an Artificial Intelligence domain. We carry out different simulations to validate the performance of QMS and its configuration.
summary: The efficient resolution of optimization problems is one of the key issues in today's industry. This task relies mainly on classical algorithms that present scalability problems and processing limitations. Quantum computing has emerged to challenge these types of problems. In this paper, we focus on the Metropolis-Hastings quantum algorithm that is based on quantum walks. We use this algorithm to build a quantum software tool called Quantum Metropolis Solver (QMS). We validate QMS with the N-Queen problem to show a potential quantum advantage in an example that can be easily extrapolated to an Artificial Intelligence domain. We carry out different simulations to validate the performance of QMS and its configuration.
abstract_zh: 有效解决优化问题是当今行业的关键问题之一。该任务主要依赖于存在可扩展性问题和处理限制的经典算法。量子计算的出现就是为了解决这些类型的问题。在本文中，我们重点关注基于量子行走的 Metropolis-Hastings 量子算法。我们使用该算法构建了一个名为量子大都市求解器（QMS）的量子软件工具。我们使用 N-Queen 问题验证 QMS，以在可以轻松外推到人工智能领域的示例中展示潜在的量子优势。我们进行不同的模拟来验证 QMS 的性能及其配置。

AI.tldr: 开发基于量子行走的Metropolis-Hastings算法的量子软件工具QMS，用于解决优化问题并验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 经典优化算法存在可扩展性和处理限制，量子计算有望提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于量子行走的Metropolis-Hastings算法构建量子软件工具QMS，并通过N皇后问题进行验证与模拟测试。
AI.result: 通过模拟验证了QMS的有效性，展示了在N皇后问题上的量子优势潜力。
AI.conclusion: QMS在解决优化问题中展现出量子优势，为人工智能等领域的应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Parnian Kassraie,Andreas Krause,Ilija Bogunovic
title: Graph Neural Network Bandits
title_zh: 图神经网络强盗
abstract: We consider the bandit optimization problem with the reward function defined over graph-structured data. This problem has important applications in molecule design and drug discovery, where the reward is naturally invariant to graph permutations. The key challenges in this setting are scaling to large domains, and to graphs with many nodes. We resolve these challenges by embedding the permutation invariance into our model. In particular, we show that graph neural networks (GNNs) can be used to estimate the reward function, assuming it resides in the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space of a permutation-invariant additive kernel. By establishing a novel connection between such kernels and the graph neural tangent kernel (GNTK), we introduce the first GNN confidence bound and use it to design a phased-elimination algorithm with sublinear regret. Our regret bound depends on the GNTK's maximum information gain, which we also provide a bound for. While the reward function depends on all $N$ node features, our guarantees are independent of the number of graph nodes $N$. Empirically, our approach exhibits competitive performance and scales well on graph-structured domains.
summary: We consider the bandit optimization problem with the reward function defined over graph-structured data. This problem has important applications in molecule design and drug discovery, where the reward is naturally invariant to graph permutations. The key challenges in this setting are scaling to large domains, and to graphs with many nodes. We resolve these challenges by embedding the permutation invariance into our model. In particular, we show that graph neural networks (GNNs) can be used to estimate the reward function, assuming it resides in the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space of a permutation-invariant additive kernel. By establishing a novel connection between such kernels and the graph neural tangent kernel (GNTK), we introduce the first GNN confidence bound and use it to design a phased-elimination algorithm with sublinear regret. Our regret bound depends on the GNTK's maximum information gain, which we also provide a bound for. While the reward function depends on all $N$ node features, our guarantees are independent of the number of graph nodes $N$. Empirically, our approach exhibits competitive performance and scales well on graph-structured domains.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用在图结构数据上定义的奖励函数的强盗优化问题。这个问题在分子设计和药物发现中具有重要的应用，其中奖励自然不随图排列而变化。此设置中的主要挑战是扩展到大域以及具有许多节点的图。我们通过将排列不变性嵌入到我们的模型中来解决这些挑战。特别是，我们证明了图神经网络（GNN）可用于估计奖励函数，假设它位于排列不变加性核的再现核希尔伯特空间中。通过在此类内核和图神经正切内核 (GNTK) 之间建立新颖的联系，我们引入了第一个 GNN 置信界，并用它来设计具有亚线性遗憾的分阶段消除算法。我们的遗憾界限取决于 GTK 的最大信息增益，我们也提供了一个界限。虽然奖励函数取决于所有 $N$ 节点特征，但我们的保证与图节点 $N$ 的数量无关。根据经验，我们的方法表现出有竞争力的性能，并且在图结构领域上具有良好的扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在图结构数据上的老虎机优化问题，提出利用图神经网络（GNN）嵌入排列不变性，设计具有次线性遗憾的分阶段消除算法。
AI.motivation: 图结构数据在分子设计和药物发现中广泛应用，但现有方法难以处理大规模图和排列不变性奖励函数，需开发新算法解决扩展性和效率问题。
AI.method: 通过将排列不变性嵌入GNN模型，结合图神经切线核（GNTK）建立理论联系，提出首个GNN置信界，并设计基于最大信息增益的分阶段消除算法。
AI.result: 理论分析显示算法遗憾与图节点数无关，实验验证方法在图结构领域表现优异且扩展性良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文为图结构老虎机问题提供理论保证和高效算法，其设计对大规模图应用具有重要意义。

The key challenges in this setting are scaling to large domains, and to graphs with many nodes. We resolve these challenges by embedding the permutation invariance into our model. In particular, we show that graph neural networks (GNNs) can be used to estimate the reward function, assuming it resides in the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space of a permutation-invariant additive kernel. By establishing a novel connection between such kernels and the graph neural tangent kernel (GNTK), we introduce the first GNN confidence bound and use it to design a phased-elimination algorithm with sublinear regret. Our regret bound depends on the GNTK's maximum information gain, which we also provide a bound for. While the reward function depends on all $N$ node features, our guarantees are independent of the number of graph nodes $N$. Empirically, our approach exhibits competitive performance and scales well on graph-structured domains. 我们考虑使用在图结构数据上定义的奖励函数的强盗优化问题。这个问题在分子设计和药物发现中具有重要的应用，其中奖励自然不随图排列而变化。此设置中的主要挑战是扩展到大域以及具有许多节点的图。我们通过将排列不变性嵌入到我们的模型中来解决这些挑战。特别是，我们证明了图神经网络（GNN）可用于估计奖励函数，假设它位于排列不变加性核的再现核希尔伯特空间中。通过在此类内核和图神经正切内核 (GNTK) 之间建立新颖的联系，我们引入了第一个 GNN 置信界，并用它来设计具有亚线性遗憾的分阶段消除算法。我们的遗憾界限取决于 GTK 的最大信息增益，我们也提供了一个界限。虽然奖励函数取决于所有 $N$ 节点特征，但我们的保证与图节点 $N$ 的数量无关。根据经验，我们的方法表现出有竞争力的性能，并且在图结构领域上具有良好的扩展性。 本文研究在图结构数据上的老虎机优化问题，提出利用图神经网络（GNN）嵌入排列不变性，设计具有次线性遗憾的分阶段消除算法。 Parnian Kassraie,Andreas Krause,Ilija Bogunovic cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Jhony H. Giraldo,Sajid Javed,Naoufel Werghi,Thierry Bouwmans
title: Graph CNN for Moving Object Detection in Complex Environments from Unseen Videos
title_zh: 图 CNN 用于从未见过的视频中检测复杂环境中的移动物体
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) Workshops, 2021, pp. 225-233
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) Workshops, 2021, pp. 225-233
abstract: Moving Object Detection (MOD) is a fundamental step for many computer vision applications. MOD becomes very challenging when a video sequence captured from a static or moving camera suffers from the challenges: camouflage, shadow, dynamic backgrounds, and lighting variations, to name a few. Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to address MOD with competitive performance. However, in order to handle the overfitting problem, deep learning methods require a large amount of labeled data which is a laborious task as exhaustive annotations are always not available. Moreover, some MOD deep learning methods show performance degradation in the presence of unseen video sequences because the testing and training splits of the same sequences are involved during the network learning process. In this work, we pose the problem of MOD as a node classification problem using Graph Convolutional Neural Networks (GCNNs). Our algorithm, dubbed as GraphMOD-Net, encompasses instance segmentation, background initialization, feature extraction, and graph construction. GraphMOD-Net is tested on unseen videos and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in unsupervised, semi-supervised, and supervised learning in several challenges of the Change Detection 2014 (CDNet2014) and UCSD background subtraction datasets.
summary: Moving Object Detection (MOD) is a fundamental step for many computer vision applications. MOD becomes very challenging when a video sequence captured from a static or moving camera suffers from the challenges: camouflage, shadow, dynamic backgrounds, and lighting variations, to name a few. Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to address MOD with competitive performance. However, in order to handle the overfitting problem, deep learning methods require a large amount of labeled data which is a laborious task as exhaustive annotations are always not available. Moreover, some MOD deep learning methods show performance degradation in the presence of unseen video sequences because the testing and training splits of the same sequences are involved during the network learning process. In this work, we pose the problem of MOD as a node classification problem using Graph Convolutional Neural Networks (GCNNs). Our algorithm, dubbed as GraphMOD-Net, encompasses instance segmentation, background initialization, feature extraction, and graph construction. GraphMOD-Net is tested on unseen videos and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in unsupervised, semi-supervised, and supervised learning in several challenges of the Change Detection 2014 (CDNet2014) and UCSD background subtraction datasets.
abstract_zh: 移动物体检测 (MOD) 是许多计算机视觉应用的基本步骤。当从静态或移动摄像机捕获的视频序列面临伪装、阴影、动态背景和光照变化等挑战时，MOD 就变得非常具有挑战性。深度学习方法已成功应用于解决 MOD，具有具有竞争力的性能。然而，为了处理过拟合问题，深度学习方法需要大量的标记数据，这是一项艰巨的任务，因为详尽的注释总是不可用。此外，一些 MOD 深度学习方法在出现未见过的视频序列时表现出性能下降，因为在网络学习过程中涉及相同序列的测试和训练分割。在这项工作中，我们使用图卷积神经网络 (GCNN) 将 MOD 问题提出为节点分类问题。我们的算法被称为 GraphMOD-Net，包含实例分割、背景初始化、特征提取和图构建。 GraphMOD-Net 在未见过的视频上进行了测试，在变化检测 2014 (CDNet2014) 和 UCSD 背景扣除数据集的多项挑战中，在无监督、半监督和监督学习方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图卷积神经网络（GCNN）的新型方法GraphMOD-Net，用于在复杂环境中从未见过的视频中检测移动物体。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在处理遮挡、阴影、动态背景等复杂场景时存在过拟合问题，且在未见过的视频序列中性能下降，同时需要大量标注数据。
AI.method: 将移动物体检测建模为图节点分类问题，包含实例分割、背景初始化、特征提取和图构建四个步骤，利用GCNN进行学习。
AI.result: 在CDNet2014和UCSD数据集上，GraphMOD-Net在无监督、半监督和监督学习场景下均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图结构建模有效解决了复杂环境和未见过视频的检测难题，降低了对标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: Sree Hari Krishnan Parthasarathi,Lu Zeng,Christin Jose,Joseph Wang
title: Wakeword Detection under Distribution Shifts
title_zh: 分布变化下的唤醒词检测
abstract: We propose a novel approach for semi-supervised learning (SSL) designed to overcome distribution shifts between training and real-world data arising in the keyword spotting (KWS) task. Shifts from training data distribution are a key challenge for real-world KWS tasks: when a new model is deployed on device, the gating of the accepted data undergoes a shift in distribution, making the problem of timely updates via subsequent deployments hard. Despite the shift, we assume that the marginal distributions on labels do not change. We utilize a modified teacher/student training framework, where labeled training data is augmented with unlabeled data. Note that the teacher does not have access to the new distribution as well. To train effectively with a mix of human and teacher labeled data, we develop a teacher labeling strategy based on confidence heuristics to reduce entropy on the label distribution from the teacher model; the data is then sampled to match the marginal distribution on the labels. Large scale experimental results show that a convolutional neural network (CNN) trained on far-field audio, and evaluated on far-field audio drawn from a different distribution, obtains a 14.3% relative improvement in false discovery rate (FDR) at equal false reject rate (FRR), while yielding a 5% improvement in FDR under no distribution shift. Under a more severe distribution shift from far-field to near-field audio with a smaller fully connected network (FCN) our approach achieves a 52% relative improvement in FDR at equal FRR, while yielding a 20% relative improvement in FDR on the original distribution.
summary: We propose a novel approach for semi-supervised learning (SSL) designed to overcome distribution shifts between training and real-world data arising in the keyword spotting (KWS) task. Shifts from training data distribution are a key challenge for real-world KWS tasks: when a new model is deployed on device, the gating of the accepted data undergoes a shift in distribution, making the problem of timely updates via subsequent deployments hard. Despite the shift, we assume that the marginal distributions on labels do not change. We utilize a modified teacher/student training framework, where labeled training data is augmented with unlabeled data. Note that the teacher does not have access to the new distribution as well. To train effectively with a mix of human and teacher labeled data, we develop a teacher labeling strategy based on confidence heuristics to reduce entropy on the label distribution from the teacher model; the data is then sampled to match the marginal distribution on the labels. Large scale experimental results show that a convolutional neural network (CNN) trained on far-field audio, and evaluated on far-field audio drawn from a different distribution, obtains a 14.3% relative improvement in false discovery rate (FDR) at equal false reject rate (FRR), while yielding a 5% improvement in FDR under no distribution shift. Under a more severe distribution shift from far-field to near-field audio with a smaller fully connected network (FCN) our approach achieves a 52% relative improvement in FDR at equal FRR, while yielding a 20% relative improvement in FDR on the original distribution.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种半监督学习（SSL）的新方法，旨在克服关键词识别（KWS）任务中出现的训练数据和现实数据之间的分布变化。训练数据分布的转变是现实世界 KWS 任务的一个关键挑战：当在设备上部署新模型时，接受数据的门控会发生分布变化，从而使得通过后续部署及时更新的问题变得困难。尽管发生了变化，我们假设标签上的边际分布不会改变。我们利用修改后的教师/学生培训框架，其中标记的训练数据用未标记的数据进行增强。请注意，教师也无权访问新发行版。为了有效地混合人类和教师标记数据进行训练，我们开发了一种基于置信启发式的教师标记策略，以减少教师模型标签分布的熵；然后对数据进行采样以匹配标签上的边际分布。大规模实验结果表明，在远场音频上训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 并对来自不同分布的远场音频进行评估，在相同的错误拒绝率 (FRR) 下，错误发现率 (FDR) 相对提高了 14.3%，而在无分布偏移的情况下，FDR 提高了 5%。在使用更小的全连接网络 (FCN) 从远场音频到近场音频的更严重的分布转变下，我们的方法在相同 FRR 的情况下实现了 52% 的 FDR 相对改进，同时在原始分布上实现了 20% 的 FDR 相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习方法，用于解决关键词检测任务中训练数据与实际应用数据分布差异导致的唤醒词检测问题。
AI.motivation: 实际部署中，设备接收的数据分布会发生变化，导致模型性能下降，但标签分布保持不变，需通过半监督学习应对分布偏移。
AI.method: 采用改进的教师-学生训练框架，结合带标签数据与未标签数据，利用置信度启发式策略降低教师模型标签分布熵，并采样匹配标签边际分布。
AI.result: 在远场音频分布偏移下，CNN模型FDR相对提升14.3%；在更严重的远场到近场偏移下，小规模FCN模型FDR相对提升52%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过半监督学习有效缓解分布偏移问题，在保持标签分布不变的前提下显著提升唤醒词检测性能。

Under a more severe distribution shift from far-field to near-field audio with a smaller fully connected network (FCN) our approach achieves a 52% relative improvement in FDR at equal FRR, while yielding a 20% relative improvement in FDR on the original distribution. 我们提出了一种半监督学习（SSL）的新方法，旨在克服关键词识别（KWS）任务中出现的训练数据和现实数据之间的分布变化。训练数据分布的转变是现实世界 KWS 任务的一个关键挑战：当在设备上部署新模型时，接受数据的门控会发生分布变化，从而使得通过后续部署及时更新的问题变得困难。尽管发生了变化，我们假设标签上的边际分布不会改变。我们利用修改后的教师/学生培训框架，其中标记的训练数据用未标记的数据进行增强。请注意，教师也无权访问新发行版。为了有效地混合人类和教师标记数据进行训练，我们开发了一种基于置信启发式的教师标记策略，以减少教师模型标签分布的熵；然后对数据进行采样以匹配标签上的边际分布。大规模实验结果表明，在远场音频上训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 并对来自不同分布的远场音频进行评估，在相同的错误拒绝率 (FRR) 下，错误发现率 (FDR) 相对提高了 14.3%，而在无分布偏移的情况下，FDR 提高了 5%。在使用更小的全连接网络 (FCN) 从远场音频到近场音频的更严重的分布转变下，我们的方法在相同 FRR 的情况下实现了 52% 的 FDR 相对改进，同时在原始分布上实现了 20% 的 FDR 相对改进。 本文提出一种半监督学习方法，用于解决关键词检测任务中训练数据与实际应用数据分布差异导致的唤醒词检测问题。 Sree Hari Krishnan Parthasarathi,Lu Zeng,Christin Jose,Joseph Wang cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Grant Duffy,Shoa L. Clarke,Matthew Christensen,Bryan He,Neal Yuan,Susan Cheng,David Ouyang
title: Deep Learning Discovery of Demographic Biomarkers in Echocardiography
title_zh: 超声心动图中人口生物标志物的深度学习发现
abstract: Deep learning has been shown to accurately assess 'hidden' phenotypes and predict biomarkers from medical imaging beyond traditional clinician interpretation of medical imaging. Given the black box nature of artificial intelligence (AI) models, caution should be exercised in applying models to healthcare as prediction tasks might be short-cut by differences in demographics across disease and patient populations. Using large echocardiography datasets from two healthcare systems, we test whether it is possible to predict age, race, and sex from cardiac ultrasound images using deep learning algorithms and assess the impact of varying confounding variables. We trained video-based convolutional neural networks to predict age, sex, and race. We found that deep learning models were able to identify age and sex, while unable to reliably predict race. Without considering confounding differences between categories, the AI model predicted sex with an AUC of 0.85 (95% CI 0.84 - 0.86), age with a mean absolute error of 9.12 years (95% CI 9.00 - 9.25), and race with AUCs ranging from 0.63 - 0.71. When predicting race, we show that tuning the proportion of a confounding variable (sex) in the training data significantly impacts model AUC (ranging from 0.57 to 0.84), while in training a sex prediction model, tuning a confounder (race) did not substantially change AUC (0.81 - 0.83). This suggests a significant proportion of the model's performance on predicting race could come from confounding features being detected by AI. Further work remains to identify the particular imaging features that associate with demographic information and to better understand the risks of demographic identification in medical AI as it pertains to potentially perpetuating bias and disparities.

We trained video-based convolutional neural networks to predict age, sex, and race. We found that deep learning models were able to identify age and sex, while unable to reliably predict race. Without considering confounding differences between categories, the AI model predicted sex with an AUC of 0.85 (95% CI 0.84 - 0.86), age with a mean absolute error of 9.12 years (95% CI 9.00 - 9.25), and race with AUCs ranging from 0.63 - 0.71. When predicting race, we show that tuning the proportion of a confounding variable (sex) in the training data significantly impacts model AUC (ranging from 0.57 to 0.84), while in training a sex prediction model, tuning a confounder (race) did not substantially change AUC (0.81 - 0.83). This suggests a significant proportion of the model's performance on predicting race could come from confounding features being detected by AI. Further work remains to identify the particular imaging features that associate with demographic information and to better understand the risks of demographic identification in medical AI as it pertains to potentially perpetuating bias and disparities.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已被证明可以准确评估“隐藏”表型并预测医学成像中的生物标志物，超出了传统临床医生对医学成像的解释。鉴于人工智能 (AI) 模型的黑匣子性质，将模型应用于医疗保健时应谨慎行事，因为预测任务可能会因疾病和患者群体的人口统计差异而缩短。使用来自两个医疗保健系统的大型超声心动图数据集，我们测试是否可以使用深度学习算法从心脏超声图像预测年龄、种族和性别，并评估不同混杂变量的影响。我们训练基于视频的卷积神经网络来预测年龄、性别和种族。我们发现深度学习模型能够识别年龄和性别，但无法可靠地预测种族。在不考虑类别之间混杂差异的情况下，AI 模型预测性别的 AUC 为 0.85 (95% CI 0.84 - 0.86)，预测年龄的平均绝对误差为 9.12 岁 (95% CI 9.00 - 9.25)，预测种族的 AUC 范围为 0.63 - 0.71。在预测种族时，我们发现调整训练数据中混杂变量（性别）的比例会显着影响模型 AUC（范围从 0.57 到 0.84），而在训练性别预测模型时，调整混杂变量（种族）并没有显着改变 AUC（0.81 - 0.83）。这表明该模型在预测种族方面的性能很大一部分可能来自人工智能检测到的混杂特征。进一步的工作仍然是确定与人口统计信息相关的特定成像特征，并更好地了解医疗人工智能中人口统计识别的风险，因为它涉及潜在的永久偏见和差异。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究深度学习模型是否能从超声心动图中预测年龄、性别和种族，并分析混杂变量对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: AI模型的黑箱特性可能导致预测结果受人口统计学差异影响，需评估其在医疗应用中是否存在偏差风险。
AI.method: 使用基于视频的卷积神经网络（CNN）训练模型预测年龄、性别和种族，并通过调整训练数据中混杂变量（如性别比例）测试模型性能变化。
AI.result: 模型可准确预测年龄（平均绝对误差9.12年）和性别（AUC 0.85），但种族预测效果差（AUC 0.63-0.71），且种族预测性能受训练数据性别比例显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 种族预测可能依赖混杂特征，需进一步研究影像特征与人口信息的关联，以避免医疗AI加剧偏见和不平等。

authors_text: Julien Cornebise,Ivan Oršolić,Freddie Kalaitzis
title: Open High-Resolution Satellite Imagery: The WorldStrat Dataset -- With Application to Super-Resolution
title_zh: 开放高分辨率卫星图像：WorldStrat 数据集 - 及其在超分辨率中的应用
comment: Published in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Published in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Analyzing the planet at scale with satellite imagery and machine learning is a dream that has been constantly hindered by the cost of difficult-to-access highly-representative high-resolution imagery. To remediate this, we introduce here the WorldStrat dataset. The largest and most varied such publicly available dataset, at Airbus SPOT 6/7 satellites' high resolution of up to 1.5 m/pixel, empowered by European Space Agency's Phi-Lab as part of the ESA-funded QueryPlanet project, we curate nearly 10,000 sqkm of unique locations to ensure stratified representation of all types of land-use across the world: from agriculture to ice caps, from forests to multiple urbanization densities. We also enrich those with locations typically under-represented in ML datasets: sites of humanitarian interest, illegal mining sites, and settlements of persons at risk. We temporally-match each high-resolution image with multiple low-resolution images from the freely accessible lower-resolution Sentinel-2 satellites at 10 m/pixel. We accompany this dataset with an open-source Python package to: rebuild or extend the WorldStrat dataset, train and infer baseline algorithms, and learn with abundant tutorials, all compatible with the popular EO-learn toolbox. We hereby hope to foster broad-spectrum applications of ML to satellite imagery, and possibly develop from free public low-resolution Sentinel2 imagery the same power of analysis allowed by costly private high-resolution imagery. We illustrate this specific point by training and releasing several highly compute-efficient baselines on the task of Multi-Frame Super-Resolution. High-resolution Airbus imagery is CC BY-NC, while the labels and Sentinel2 imagery are CC BY, and the source code and pre-trained models under BSD. The dataset is available at https://zenodo.org/record/6810791 and the software package at https://github.com/worldstrat/worldstrat .

abstract_zh: 利用卫星图像和机器学习大规模分析地球是一个梦想，但由于难以获取具有高度代表性的高分辨率图像的成本而不断受到阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里引入 WorldStrat 数据集。此类公开可用的数据集规模最大、种类最多，空中客车 SPOT 6/7 卫星的高分辨率高达 1.5 m/像素，在欧洲航天局 Phi-Lab 的支持下，作为 ESA 资助的 QueryPlanet 项目的一部分，我们整理了近 10,000 平方公里的独特位置，以确保分层代表世界各地所有类型的土地利用：从农业到冰盖，从森林到多种城市化密度。我们还丰富了机器学习数据集中通常代表性不足的地点：人道主义利益地点、非法采矿地点和面临风险的人的定居点。我们将每个高分辨率图像与来自可免费访问的低分辨率 Sentinel-2 卫星（10 m/像素）的多个低分辨率图像进行时间匹配。我们为该数据集提供了一个开源 Python 包，用于：重建或扩展 WorldStrat 数据集、训练和推断基线算法以及通过丰富的教程进行学习，所有这些都与流行的 EO-learn 工具箱兼容。我们特此希望促进机器学习在卫星图像中的广泛应用，并可能从免费的公共低分辨率 Sentinel2 图像中开发出与昂贵的私人高分辨率图像相同的分析能力。我们通过在多帧超分辨率任务上训练和发布几个高计算效率的基线来说明这一点。高分辨率空客图像是 CC BY-NC，而标签和 Sentinel2 图像是 CC BY，源代码和预训练模型是 BSD 下的。数据集可在 https://zenodo.org/record/6810791 获取，软件包可在 https://github.com/worldstrat/worldstrat 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了WorldStrat数据集，旨在通过高分辨率卫星影像与低分辨率影像的配对，推动机器学习在遥感领域的应用，特别是超分辨率重建任务。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率卫星影像获取成本高且难以访问，限制了大规模地球观测与机器学习的结合，亟需公开且多样化的高质量数据集支持研究。
AI.method: 通过欧洲航天局支持，整合Airbus SPOT 6/7的1.5米/像素高分辨率影像与Sentinel-2的10米/像素低分辨率影像，构建覆盖全球多种地表类型的10,000平方公里数据集，并开发开源工具包支持数据重建与模型训练。
AI.result: 发布包含高分辨率影像、低分辨率配对数据及开源工具包的WorldStrat数据集，提供多种高效超分辨率基线模型，促进低成本遥感分析技术的发展。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集通过结合免费低分辨率影像与高分辨率数据，降低了高精度遥感分析门槛，为机器学习在卫星影像领域的广泛应用提供了基础支持。

search_text: Open High-Resolution Satellite Imagery: The WorldStrat Dataset -- With Application to Super-Resolution 开放高分辨率卫星图像：WorldStrat 数据集 - 及其在超分辨率中的应用 Analyzing the planet at scale with satellite imagery and machine learning is a dream that has been constantly hindered by the cost of difficult-to-access highly-representative high-resolution imagery. To remediate this, we introduce here the WorldStrat dataset. The largest and most varied such publicly available dataset, at Airbus SPOT 6/7 satellites' high resolution of up to 1.5 m/pixel, empowered by European Space Agency's Phi-Lab as part of the ESA-funded QueryPlanet project, we curate nearly 10,000 sqkm of unique locations to ensure stratified representation of all types of land-use across the world: from agriculture to ice caps, from forests to multiple urbanization densities. We also enrich those with locations typically under-represented in ML datasets: sites of humanitarian interest, illegal mining sites, and settlements of persons at risk. We temporally-match each high-resolution image with multiple low-resolution images from the freely accessible lower-resolution Sentinel-2 satellites at 10 m/pixel. We accompany this dataset with an open-source Python package to: rebuild or extend the WorldStrat dataset, train and infer baseline algorithms, and learn with abundant tutorials, all compatible with the popular EO-learn toolbox. We hereby hope to foster broad-spectrum applications of ML to satellite imagery, and possibly develop from free public low-resolution Sentinel2 imagery the same power of analysis allowed by costly private high-resolution imagery. We illustrate this specific point by training and releasing several highly compute-efficient baselines on the task of Multi-Frame Super-Resolution. High-resolution Airbus imagery is CC BY-NC, while the labels and Sentinel2 imagery are CC BY, and the source code and pre-trained models under BSD. The dataset is available at https://zenodo.org/record/6810791 and the software package at https://github.com/worldstrat/worldstrat . 利用卫星图像和机器学习大规模分析地球是一个梦想，但由于难以获取具有高度代表性的高分辨率图像的成本而不断受到阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里引入 WorldStrat 数据集。此类公开可用的数据集规模最大、种类最多，空中客车 SPOT 6/7 卫星的高分辨率高达 1.5 m/像素，在欧洲航天局 Phi-Lab 的支持下，作为 ESA 资助的 QueryPlanet 项目的一部分，我们整理了近 10,000 平方公里的独特位置，以确保分层代表世界各地所有类型的土地利用：从农业到冰盖，从森林到多种城市化密度。我们还丰富了机器学习数据集中通常代表性不足的地点：人道主义利益地点、非法采矿地点和面临风险的人的定居点。我们将每个高分辨率图像与来自可免费访问的低分辨率 Sentinel-2 卫星（10 m/像素）的多个低分辨率图像进行时间匹配。我们为该数据集提供了一个开源 Python 包，用于：重建或扩展 WorldStrat 数据集、训练和推断基线算法以及通过丰富的教程进行学习，所有这些都与流行的 EO-learn 工具箱兼容。我们特此希望促进机器学习在卫星图像中的广泛应用，并可能从免费的公共低分辨率 Sentinel2 图像中开发出与昂贵的私人高分辨率图像相同的分析能力。我们通过在多帧超分辨率任务上训练和发布几个高计算效率的基线来说明这一点。高分辨率空客图像是 CC BY-NC，而标签和 Sentinel2 图像是 CC BY，源代码和预训练模型是 BSD 下的。数据集可在 https://zenodo.org/record/6810791 获取，软件包可在 https://github.com/worldstrat/worldstrat 获取。 本文介绍了WorldStrat数据集，旨在通过高分辨率卫星影像与低分辨率影像的配对，推动机器学习在遥感领域的应用，特别是超分辨率重建任务。 Julien Cornebise,Ivan Oršolić,Freddie Kalaitzis eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.AP

authors_text: Pietro Mazzaglia,Tim Verbelen,Ozan Çatal,Bart Dhoedt
title: The Free Energy Principle for Perception and Action: A Deep Learning Perspective
title_zh: 感知和行动的自由能原理：深度学习的视角
abstract: The free energy principle, and its corollary active inference, constitute a bio-inspired theory that assumes biological agents act to remain in a restricted set of preferred states of the world, i.e., they minimize their free energy. Under this principle, biological agents learn a generative model of the world and plan actions in the future that will maintain the agent in an homeostatic state that satisfies its preferences. This framework lends itself to being realized in silico, as it comprehends important aspects that make it computationally affordable, such as variational inference and amortized planning. In this work, we investigate the tool of deep learning to design and realize artificial agents based on active inference, presenting a deep-learning oriented presentation of the free energy principle, surveying works that are relevant in both machine learning and active inference areas, and discussing the design choices that are involved in the implementation process. This manuscript probes newer perspectives for the active inference framework, grounding its theoretical aspects into more pragmatic affairs, offering a practical guide to active inference newcomers and a starting point for deep learning practitioners that would like to investigate implementations of the free energy principle.
summary: The free energy principle, and its corollary active inference, constitute a bio-inspired theory that assumes biological agents act to remain in a restricted set of preferred states of the world, i.e., they minimize their free energy. Under this principle, biological agents learn a generative model of the world and plan actions in the future that will maintain the agent in an homeostatic state that satisfies its preferences. This framework lends itself to being realized in silico, as it comprehends important aspects that make it computationally affordable, such as variational inference and amortized planning. In this work, we investigate the tool of deep learning to design and realize artificial agents based on active inference, presenting a deep-learning oriented presentation of the free energy principle, surveying works that are relevant in both machine learning and active inference areas, and discussing the design choices that are involved in the implementation process. This manuscript probes newer perspectives for the active inference framework, grounding its theoretical aspects into more pragmatic affairs, offering a practical guide to active inference newcomers and a starting point for deep learning practitioners that would like to investigate implementations of the free energy principle.
abstract_zh: 自由能原理及其推论的主动推论构成了一种受生物启发的理论，该理论假设生物体的作用是保持在一组有限的首选状态中，即它们最大限度地减少其自由能。根据这一原则，生物代理学习世界的生成模型并计划未来的行动，以将代理维持在满足其偏好的稳态状态。该框架适合在计算机中实现，因为它包含使其计算负担得起的重要方面，例如变分推理和摊销规划。在这项工作中，我们研究了深度学习工具来设计和实现基于主动推理的人工智能体，提出了自由能原理的面向深度学习的演示，调查了机器学习和主动推理领域相关的工作，并讨论了实施过程中涉及的设计选择。本手稿探讨了主动推理框架的新视角，将其理论方面扎根于更务实的事务中，为主动推理新手提供了实用指南，并为想要研究自由能原理实现的深度学习从业者提供了起点。

AI.tldr: 本文从深度学习视角探讨自由能原理在感知与行动中的应用，提出基于主动推理的人工智能代理设计框架，并分析其理论与实践结合的关键设计选择。
AI.motivation: 自由能原理作为生物启发理论，需通过计算模型实现，而深度学习技术可提供可行路径，但现有研究缺乏系统性指导与实践框架。
AI.method: 通过文献综述构建深度学习导向的自由能原理框架，分析变分推断与 amortized planning 等核心方法，探讨主动推理在人工代理中的实现设计。
AI.result: 提出自由能原理的深度学习实现路径，系统梳理理论与实践结合的关键技术，为新手提供入门指南，为研究者提供框架起点。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为自由能原理的工程化落地提供可能，需进一步探索其在复杂任务中的可扩展性与计算效率优化。

authors_text: Péter Bándi,Maschenka Balkenhol,Marcory van Dijk,Bram van Ginneken,Jeroen van der Laak,Geert Litjens
title: Domain adaptation strategies for cancer-independent detection of lymph node metastases
title_zh: 与癌症无关的淋巴结转移检测的领域适应策略
abstract: Recently, large, high-quality public datasets have led to the development of convolutional neural networks that can detect lymph node metastases of breast cancer at the level of expert pathologists. Many cancers, regardless of the site of origin, can metastasize to lymph nodes. However, collecting and annotating high-volume, high-quality datasets for every cancer type is challenging. In this paper we investigate how to leverage existing high-quality datasets most efficiently in multi-task settings for closely related tasks. Specifically, we will explore different training and domain adaptation strategies, including prevention of catastrophic forgetting, for colon and head-and-neck cancer metastasis detection in lymph nodes. Our results show state-of-the-art performance on both cancer metastasis detection tasks. Furthermore, we show the effectiveness of repeated adaptation of networks from one cancer type to another to obtain multi-task metastasis detection networks. Last, we show that leveraging existing high-quality datasets can significantly boost performance on new target tasks and that catastrophic forgetting can be effectively mitigated using regularization.
summary: Recently, large, high-quality public datasets have led to the development of convolutional neural networks that can detect lymph node metastases of breast cancer at the level of expert pathologists. Many cancers, regardless of the site of origin, can metastasize to lymph nodes. However, collecting and annotating high-volume, high-quality datasets for every cancer type is challenging. In this paper we investigate how to leverage existing high-quality datasets most efficiently in multi-task settings for closely related tasks. Specifically, we will explore different training and domain adaptation strategies, including prevention of catastrophic forgetting, for colon and head-and-neck cancer metastasis detection in lymph nodes. Our results show state-of-the-art performance on both cancer metastasis detection tasks. Furthermore, we show the effectiveness of repeated adaptation of networks from one cancer type to another to obtain multi-task metastasis detection networks. Last, we show that leveraging existing high-quality datasets can significantly boost performance on new target tasks and that catastrophic forgetting can be effectively mitigated using regularization.
abstract_zh: 最近，大型、高质量的公共数据集促进了卷积神经网络的发展，可以在专家病理学家的水平上检测乳腺癌的淋巴结转移。许多癌症，无论起源于何处，都可以转移至淋巴结。然而，收集和注释每种癌症类型的大量、高质量数据集具有挑战性。在本文中，我们研究如何在多任务设置中最有效地利用现有的高质量数据集来执行密切相关的任务。具体来说，我们将探索不同的训练和领域适应策略，包括预防灾难性遗忘，用于结肠癌和头颈癌淋巴结转移检测。我们的结果显示了在两项癌症转移检测任务上的最先进的性能。此外，我们展示了从一种癌症类型到另一种癌症类型的网络重复适应以获得多任务转移检测网络的有效性。最后，我们表明，利用现有的高质量数据集可以显着提高新目标任务的性能，并且可以使用正则化有效减轻灾难性遗忘。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用现有高质量数据集，通过领域自适应策略在多种癌症的淋巴结转移检测任务中实现多任务学习。
AI.motivation: 收集和标注每种癌症类型的高精度数据集成本高昂，而现有高质量数据集可被高效复用以提升新任务性能。
AI.method: 探索防止灾难性遗忘的训练策略与领域自适应方法，包括在结直肠癌和头颈癌转移检测任务间的网络重复适配及正则化技术。
AI.result: 在两种癌症转移检测任务中达到最先进性能，证明跨癌症适配的有效性，并显示利用现有数据集可显著提升新任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域自适应复用高质量数据集可有效提升多任务检测性能，且正则化方法能缓解灾难性遗忘问题。

method: 探索防止灾难性遗忘的训练策略与领域自适应方法，包括在结直肠癌和头颈癌转移检测任务间的网络重复适配及正则化技术。
result: 在两种癌症转移检测任务中达到最先进性能，证明跨癌症适配的有效性，并显示利用现有数据集可显著提升新任务表现。
conclusion: 通过领域自适应复用高质量数据集可有效提升多任务检测性能，且正则化方法能缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
search_text: Domain adaptation strategies for cancer-independent detection of lymph node metastases 与癌症无关的淋巴结转移检测的领域适应策略 Recently, large, high-quality public datasets have led to the development of convolutional neural networks that can detect lymph node metastases of breast cancer at the level of expert pathologists. Many cancers, regardless of the site of origin, can metastasize to lymph nodes. However, collecting and annotating high-volume, high-quality datasets for every cancer type is challenging. In this paper we investigate how to leverage existing high-quality datasets most efficiently in multi-task settings for closely related tasks. Specifically, we will explore different training and domain adaptation strategies, including prevention of catastrophic forgetting, for colon and head-and-neck cancer metastasis detection in lymph nodes. Our results show state-of-the-art performance on both cancer metastasis detection tasks. Furthermore, we show the effectiveness of repeated adaptation of networks from one cancer type to another to obtain multi-task metastasis detection networks. Last, we show that leveraging existing high-quality datasets can significantly boost performance on new target tasks and that catastrophic forgetting can be effectively mitigated using regularization. 最近，大型、高质量的公共数据集促进了卷积神经网络的发展，可以在专家病理学家的水平上检测乳腺癌的淋巴结转移。许多癌症，无论起源于何处，都可以转移至淋巴结。然而，收集和注释每种癌症类型的大量、高质量数据集具有挑战性。在本文中，我们研究如何在多任务设置中最有效地利用现有的高质量数据集来执行密切相关的任务。具体来说，我们将探索不同的训练和领域适应策略，包括预防灾难性遗忘，用于结肠癌和头颈癌淋巴结转移检测。我们的结果显示了在两项癌症转移检测任务上的最先进的性能。此外，我们展示了从一种癌症类型到另一种癌症类型的网络重复适应以获得多任务转移检测网络的有效性。最后，我们表明，利用现有的高质量数据集可以显着提高新目标任务的性能，并且可以使用正则化有效减轻灾难性遗忘。 本文研究如何利用现有高质量数据集，通过领域自适应策略在多种癌症的淋巴结转移检测任务中实现多任务学习。 Péter Bándi,Maschenka Balkenhol,Marcory van Dijk,Bram van Ginneken,Jeroen van der Laak,Geert Litjens eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinho Choo,Yeong-Dae Kwon,Jihoon Kim,Jeongwoo Jae,André Hottung,Kevin Tierney,Youngjune Gwon
title: Simulation-guided Beam Search for Neural Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 用于神经组合优化的仿真引导波束搜索
abstract: Neural approaches for combinatorial optimization (CO) equip a learning mechanism to discover powerful heuristics for solving complex real-world problems. While neural approaches capable of high-quality solutions in a single shot are emerging, state-of-the-art approaches are often unable to take full advantage of the solving time available to them. In contrast, hand-crafted heuristics perform highly effective search well and exploit the computation time given to them, but contain heuristics that are difficult to adapt to a dataset being solved. With the goal of providing a powerful search procedure to neural CO approaches, we propose simulation-guided beam search (SGBS), which examines candidate solutions within a fixed-width tree search that both a neural net-learned policy and a simulation (rollout) identify as promising. We further hybridize SGBS with efficient active search (EAS), where SGBS enhances the quality of solutions backpropagated in EAS, and EAS improves the quality of the policy used in SGBS. We evaluate our methods on well-known CO benchmarks and show that SGBS significantly improves the quality of the solutions found under reasonable runtime assumptions.
summary: Neural approaches for combinatorial optimization (CO) equip a learning mechanism to discover powerful heuristics for solving complex real-world problems. While neural approaches capable of high-quality solutions in a single shot are emerging, state-of-the-art approaches are often unable to take full advantage of the solving time available to them. In contrast, hand-crafted heuristics perform highly effective search well and exploit the computation time given to them, but contain heuristics that are difficult to adapt to a dataset being solved. With the goal of providing a powerful search procedure to neural CO approaches, we propose simulation-guided beam search (SGBS), which examines candidate solutions within a fixed-width tree search that both a neural net-learned policy and a simulation (rollout) identify as promising. We further hybridize SGBS with efficient active search (EAS), where SGBS enhances the quality of solutions backpropagated in EAS, and EAS improves the quality of the policy used in SGBS. We evaluate our methods on well-known CO benchmarks and show that SGBS significantly improves the quality of the solutions found under reasonable runtime assumptions.
abstract_zh: 组合优化 (CO) 的神经方法配备了一种学习机制，可以发现解决复杂现实问题的强大启发式方法。虽然能够一次性提供高质量解决方案的神经方法正在出现，但最先进的方法通常无法充分利用可用的解决时间。相比之下，手工设计的启发式方法可以很好地执行高效的搜索，并利用给予它们的计算时间，但包含难以适应正在解决的数据集的启发式方法。为了向神经 CO 方法提供强大的搜索过程，我们提出了模拟引导波束搜索 (SGBS)，它检查固定宽度树搜索中的候选解决方案，神经网络学习策略和模拟（推出）都认为该解决方案有前途。我们进一步将 SGBS 与高效主动搜索 (EAS) 混合，其中 SGBS 提高了 EAS 中反向传播的解决方案的质量，而 EAS 提高了 SGBS 中使用的策略的质量。我们在著名的 CO 基准上评估了我们的方法，结果表明 SGBS 显着提高了在合理的运行时间假设下找到的解决方案的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合神经网络策略与模拟引导的束搜索方法（SGBS），以改进神经组合优化问题的求解效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经组合优化方法难以充分利用计算时间，而传统启发式方法虽能有效利用时间却难以适应数据集变化，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 提出模拟引导束搜索（SGBS），通过神经网络策略与模拟rollout共同筛选候选解，并与高效主动搜索（EAS）结合，双向提升解质量与策略性能。
AI.result: 在经典组合优化基准测试中，SGBS在合理运行时间内显著提升了解的质量，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SGBS通过融合神经策略与模拟搜索，为神经组合优化提供了更高效的求解框架，平衡了求解质量与计算资源利用。

authors_text: Ziyi Shen,Qianye Yang,Yuming Shen,Francesco Giganti,Vasilis Stavrinides,Richard Fan,Caroline Moore,Mirabela Rusu,Geoffrey Sonn,Philip Torr,Dean Barratt,Yipeng Hu
title: Collaborative Quantization Embeddings for Intra-Subject Prostate MR Image Registration
title_zh: 用于受试者内前列腺 MR 图像配准的协作量化嵌入
comment: preprint version, accepted for MICCAI 2022 (25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention)
comments: preprint version, accepted for MICCAI 2022 (25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention)
abstract: Image registration is useful for quantifying morphological changes in longitudinal MR images from prostate cancer patients. This paper describes a development in improving the learning-based registration algorithms, for this challenging clinical application often with highly variable yet limited training data. First, we report that the latent space can be clustered into a much lower dimensional space than that commonly found as bottleneck features at the deep layer of a trained registration network. Based on this observation, we propose a hierarchical quantization method, discretizing the learned feature vectors using a jointly-trained dictionary with a constrained size, in order to improve the generalisation of the registration networks. Furthermore, a novel collaborative dictionary is independently optimised to incorporate additional prior information, such as the segmentation of the gland or other regions of interest, in the latent quantized space. Based on 216 real clinical images from 86 prostate cancer patients, we show the efficacy of both the designed components. Improved registration accuracy was obtained with statistical significance, in terms of both Dice on gland and target registration error on corresponding landmarks, the latter of which achieved 5.46 mm, an improvement of 28.7\% from the baseline without quantization. Experimental results also show that the difference in performance was indeed minimised between training and testing data.
summary: Image registration is useful for quantifying morphological changes in longitudinal MR images from prostate cancer patients. This paper describes a development in improving the learning-based registration algorithms, for this challenging clinical application often with highly variable yet limited training data. First, we report that the latent space can be clustered into a much lower dimensional space than that commonly found as bottleneck features at the deep layer of a trained registration network. Based on this observation, we propose a hierarchical quantization method, discretizing the learned feature vectors using a jointly-trained dictionary with a constrained size, in order to improve the generalisation of the registration networks. Furthermore, a novel collaborative dictionary is independently optimised to incorporate additional prior information, such as the segmentation of the gland or other regions of interest, in the latent quantized space. Based on 216 real clinical images from 86 prostate cancer patients, we show the efficacy of both the designed components. Improved registration accuracy was obtained with statistical significance, in terms of both Dice on gland and target registration error on corresponding landmarks, the latter of which achieved 5.46 mm, an improvement of 28.7\% from the baseline without quantization. Experimental results also show that the difference in performance was indeed minimised between training and testing data.
abstract_zh: 图像配准对于量化前列腺癌患者纵向 MR 图像的形态变化非常有用。本文描述了改进基于学习的配准算法的进展，用于这种具有高度可变性但有限的训练数据的具有挑战性的临床应用。首先，我们报告潜在空间可以聚集到比训练的注册网络深层通常作为瓶颈特征的空间低得多的维度空间中。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种分层量化方法，使用大小受限的联合训练字典对学习到的特征向量进行离散化，以提高配准网络的泛化能力。此外，一种新颖的协作字典被独立优化，以在潜在量化空间中纳入额外的先验信息，例如腺体或其他感兴趣区域的分割。基于 86 名前列腺癌患者的 216 张真实临床图像，我们展示了两种设计组件的功效。就腺体上的骰子和相应地标上的目标配准误差而言，配准精度得到了显着的提高，后者达到了 5.46 毫米，比未量化的基线提高了 28.7%。实验结果还表明，训练数据和测试数据之间的性能差异确实最小化了。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于协作量化嵌入的前列腺MRI图像配准方法，旨在提升有限训练数据下的配准精度。
AI.motivation: 临床前列腺MRI图像配准面临数据量有限且形态变化大的挑战，传统方法难以有效提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过分层量化方法将潜在空间特征向量离散化，并引入协作字典融合腺体分割等先验信息进行优化。
AI.result: 在86例患者216张图像实验中，目标注册误差降低至5.46mm（提升28.7%），Dice系数显著提高且训练测试性能差异缩小。
AI.conclusion: 协作量化嵌入方法有效提升了配准精度，尤其在有限数据场景下表现出良好的临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Mark Quinlan,Jun Zhao,Andrew Simpson
title: Connected Vehicles: A Privacy Analysis
title_zh: 联网车辆：隐私分析
comment: ef:International Conference on Security, Privacy and Anonymity in Computation, Communication and Storage. Springer, Cham, 2019
comments: ef:International Conference on Security, Privacy and Anonymity in Computation, Communication and Storage. Springer, Cham, 2019
abstract: Just as the world of consumer devices was forever changed by the introduction of computer controlled solutions, the introduction of the engine control unit (ECU) gave rise to the automobile's transformation from a transportation product to a technology platform. A modern car is capable of processing, analysing and transmitting data in ways that could not have been foreseen only a few years ago. These cars often incorporate telematics systems, which are used to provide navigation and internet connectivity over cellular networks, as well as data-recording devices for insurance and product development purposes. We examine the telematics system of a production vehicle, and aim to ascertain some of the associated privacy-related threats. We also consider how this analysis might underpin further research.
summary: Just as the world of consumer devices was forever changed by the introduction of computer controlled solutions, the introduction of the engine control unit (ECU) gave rise to the automobile's transformation from a transportation product to a technology platform. A modern car is capable of processing, analysing and transmitting data in ways that could not have been foreseen only a few years ago. These cars often incorporate telematics systems, which are used to provide navigation and internet connectivity over cellular networks, as well as data-recording devices for insurance and product development purposes. We examine the telematics system of a production vehicle, and aim to ascertain some of the associated privacy-related threats. We also consider how this analysis might underpin further research.
abstract_zh: 正如计算机控制解决方案的引入永远改变了消费设备的世界一样，发动机控制单元 (ECU) 的引入引发了汽车从运输产品向技术平台的转变。现代汽车能够以几年前无法预见的方式处理、分析和传输数据。这些汽车通常配备远程信息处理系统，用于通过蜂窝网络提供导航和互联网连接，以及用于保险和产品开发目的的数据记录设备。我们检查了生产车辆的远程信息处理系统，旨在确定一些相关的隐私相关威胁。我们还考虑了这种分析如何支持进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了联网汽车的隐私威胁，重点研究生产车辆的车载信息娱乐系统（telematics）可能带来的隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 随着汽车从传统交通工具转变为技术平台，其数据处理和传输能力显著增强，但由此产生的隐私风险尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 通过分析生产车辆的车载信息娱乐系统，研究其数据收集、传输及存储机制，识别潜在隐私威胁。
AI.result: 发现了车载系统在导航、联网功能及数据记录过程中可能暴露用户隐私的多个风险点。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为后续研究提供了基础，需进一步探索隐私保护技术以应对联网汽车的数据安全挑战。

authors_text: Ping-Cheng Wei,Kunyu Peng,Alina Roitberg,Kailun Yang,Jiaming Zhang,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: Multi-modal Depression Estimation based on Sub-attentional Fusion
title_zh: 基于次注意融合的多模态抑郁估计
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022 ACVR Workshop. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/PingCheng-Wei/DepressionEstimation
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022 ACVR Workshop. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/PingCheng-Wei/DepressionEstimation
abstract: Failure to timely diagnose and effectively treat depression leads to over 280 million people suffering from this psychological disorder worldwide. The information cues of depression can be harvested from diverse heterogeneous resources, e.g., audio, visual, and textual data, raising demand for new effective multi-modal fusion approaches for automatic estimation. In this work, we tackle the task of automatically identifying depression from multi-modal data and introduce a sub-attention mechanism for linking heterogeneous information while leveraging Convolutional Bidirectional LSTM as our backbone. To validate this idea, we conduct extensive experiments on the public DAIC-WOZ benchmark for depression assessment featuring different evaluation modes and taking gender-specific biases into account. The proposed model yields effective results with 0.89 precision and 0.70 F1-score in detecting major depression and 4.92 MAE in estimating the severity. Our attention-based fusion module consistently outperforms conventional late fusion approaches and achieves competitive performance compared to the previously published depression estimation frameworks, while learning to diagnose the disorder end-to-end and relying on far fewer preprocessing steps.
summary: Failure to timely diagnose and effectively treat depression leads to over 280 million people suffering from this psychological disorder worldwide. The information cues of depression can be harvested from diverse heterogeneous resources, e.g., audio, visual, and textual data, raising demand for new effective multi-modal fusion approaches for automatic estimation. In this work, we tackle the task of automatically identifying depression from multi-modal data and introduce a sub-attention mechanism for linking heterogeneous information while leveraging Convolutional Bidirectional LSTM as our backbone. To validate this idea, we conduct extensive experiments on the public DAIC-WOZ benchmark for depression assessment featuring different evaluation modes and taking gender-specific biases into account. The proposed model yields effective results with 0.89 precision and 0.70 F1-score in detecting major depression and 4.92 MAE in estimating the severity. Our attention-based fusion module consistently outperforms conventional late fusion approaches and achieves competitive performance compared to the previously published depression estimation frameworks, while learning to diagnose the disorder end-to-end and relying on far fewer preprocessing steps.
abstract_zh: 未能及时诊断和有效治疗抑郁症导致全球超过 2.8 亿人患有这种心理障碍。抑郁症的信息线索可以从不同的异构资源中获取，例如音频、视觉和文本数据，这提高了对新的有效的多模态融合自动估计方法的需求。在这项工作中，我们解决了从多模态数据中自动识别抑郁症的任务，并引入了一种子注意力机制来链接异构信息，同时利用卷积双向 LSTM 作为我们的骨干。为了验证这一想法，我们对公共 DAIC-WOZ 抑郁症评估基准进行了广泛的实验，该基准具有不同的评估模式并考虑了特定性别的偏见。所提出的模型在检测重性抑郁方面产生了有效的结果，精度为 0.89，F1 得分为 0.70，在估计严重程度方面的 MAE 为 4.92。我们基于注意力的融合模块始终优于传统的后期融合方法，并与之前发布的抑郁症估计框架相比实现了具有竞争力的性能，同时学习端到端地诊断疾病并依赖更少的预处理步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子注意力融合的多模态方法，用于自动识别和评估抑郁症的严重程度。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症全球患病率高且诊断困难，传统方法依赖单一模态或复杂预处理，需更高效的多模态融合技术以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 设计子注意力机制融合音频、视觉和文本多模态数据，结合卷积双向LSTM网络，并在DAIC-WOZ数据集上验证模型性能。
AI.result: 检测抑郁症精度达0.89，F1分数0.70，严重程度估计MAE为4.92，优于传统晚期融合方法且预处理步骤更少。
AI.conclusion: 子注意力融合模块有效提升多模态抑郁症诊断性能，为端到端自动评估提供了简洁高效的解决方案。

The information cues of depression can be harvested from diverse heterogeneous resources, e.g., audio, visual, and textual data, raising demand for new effective multi-modal fusion approaches for automatic estimation. In this work, we tackle the task of automatically identifying depression from multi-modal data and introduce a sub-attention mechanism for linking heterogeneous information while leveraging Convolutional Bidirectional LSTM as our backbone. To validate this idea, we conduct extensive experiments on the public DAIC-WOZ benchmark for depression assessment featuring different evaluation modes and taking gender-specific biases into account. The proposed model yields effective results with 0.89 precision and 0.70 F1-score in detecting major depression and 4.92 MAE in estimating the severity. authors_text: Yiting Lu,Jun Fu,Xin Li,Wei Zhou,Sen Liu,Xinxin Zhang,Congfu Jia,Ying Liu,Zhibo Chen
title: RTN: Reinforced Transformer Network for Coronary CT Angiography Vessel-level Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: RTN：用于冠状动脉 CT 血管造影血管级图像质量评估的强化变压器网络
abstract: Coronary CT Angiography (CCTA) is susceptible to various distortions (e.g., artifacts and noise), which severely compromise the exact diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. The appropriate CCTA Vessel-level Image Quality Assessment (CCTA VIQA) algorithm can be used to reduce the risk of error diagnosis. The primary challenges of CCTA VIQA are that the local part of coronary that determines final quality is hard to locate. To tackle the challenge, we formulate CCTA VIQA as a multiple-instance learning (MIL) problem, and exploit Transformer-based MIL backbone (termed as T-MIL) to aggregate the multiple instances along the coronary centerline into the final quality. However, not all instances are informative for final quality. There are some quality-irrelevant/negative instances intervening the exact quality assessment(e.g., instances covering only background or the coronary in instances is not identifiable). Therefore, we propose a Progressive Reinforcement learning based Instance Discarding module (termed as PRID) to progressively remove quality-irrelevant/negative instances for CCTA VIQA. Based on the above two modules, we propose a Reinforced Transformer Network (RTN) for automatic CCTA VIQA based on end-to-end optimization. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the real-world CCTA dataset, exceeding previous MIL methods by a large margin.
summary: Coronary CT Angiography (CCTA) is susceptible to various distortions (e.g., artifacts and noise), which severely compromise the exact diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. The appropriate CCTA Vessel-level Image Quality Assessment (CCTA VIQA) algorithm can be used to reduce the risk of error diagnosis. The primary challenges of CCTA VIQA are that the local part of coronary that determines final quality is hard to locate. To tackle the challenge, we formulate CCTA VIQA as a multiple-instance learning (MIL) problem, and exploit Transformer-based MIL backbone (termed as T-MIL) to aggregate the multiple instances along the coronary centerline into the final quality. However, not all instances are informative for final quality. There are some quality-irrelevant/negative instances intervening the exact quality assessment(e.g., instances covering only background or the coronary in instances is not identifiable). Therefore, we propose a Progressive Reinforcement learning based Instance Discarding module (termed as PRID) to progressively remove quality-irrelevant/negative instances for CCTA VIQA. Based on the above two modules, we propose a Reinforced Transformer Network (RTN) for automatic CCTA VIQA based on end-to-end optimization. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the real-world CCTA dataset, exceeding previous MIL methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 冠状动脉 CT 血管造影 (CCTA) 容易受到各种失真（例如伪影和噪声）的影响，这严重影响了心血管疾病的准确诊断。适当的 CCTA 血管级图像质量评估 (CCTA VIQA) 算法可用于降低错误诊断的风险。 CCTA VIQA 的主要挑战是难以定位决定最终质量的冠状动脉局部部分。为了应对这一挑战，我们将 CCTA VIQA 制定为多实例学习 (MIL) 问题，并利用基于 Transformer 的 MIL 主干（称为 T-MIL）将沿冠状动脉中心线的多个实例聚合为最终质量。然而，并非所有实例都能提供最终质量信息。有一些与质量无关/负面的实例干扰了精确的质量评估（例如，仅覆盖背景的实例或无法识别实例中的冠状动脉）。因此，我们提出了一种基于渐进强化学习的实例丢弃模块（称为 PRID），以逐步删除 CCTA VIQA 的质量不相关/负面实例。基于上述两个模块，我们提出了一种基于端到端优化的自动 CCTA VIQA 的强化变压器网络（RTN）。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在现实世界的 CCTA 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，大大超过了以前的 MIL 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的Transformer网络（RTN），用于冠状动脉CT血管造影（CCTA）的血管级图像质量评估。
AI.motivation: CCTA图像易受伪影和噪声影响，传统方法难以精确定位决定图像质量的关键局部区域，导致诊断误差风险增加。
AI.method: 将CCTA图像质量评估建模为多实例学习问题，设计Transformer-based MIL框架（T-MIL）聚合冠状动脉中心线实例，并引入基于渐进强化学习的实例筛选模块（PRID）剔除无关实例。
AI.result: 在真实CCTA数据集上，RTN方法显著优于现有MIL方法，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合多实例学习与强化学习实例筛选，RTN有效提升了CCTA血管级图像质量评估的准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的Transformer网络（RTN），用于冠状动脉CT血管造影（CCTA）的血管级图像质量评估。
ai_content.motivation: CCTA图像易受伪影和噪声影响，传统方法难以精确定位决定图像质量的关键局部区域，导致诊断误差风险增加。
ai_content.method: 将CCTA图像质量评估建模为多实例学习问题，设计Transformer-based MIL框架（T-MIL）聚合冠状动脉中心线实例，并引入基于渐进强化学习的实例筛选模块（PRID）剔除无关实例。
ai_content.result: 在真实CCTA数据集上，RTN方法显著优于现有MIL方法，达到当前最优性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过结合多实例学习与强化学习实例筛选，RTN有效提升了CCTA血管级图像质量评估的准确性。

search_text: RTN: Reinforced Transformer Network for Coronary CT Angiography Vessel-level Image Quality Assessment RTN：用于冠状动脉 CT 血管造影血管级图像质量评估的强化变压器网络 Coronary CT Angiography (CCTA) is susceptible to various distortions (e.g., artifacts and noise), which severely compromise the exact diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. The appropriate CCTA Vessel-level Image Quality Assessment (CCTA VIQA) algorithm can be used to reduce the risk of error diagnosis. The primary challenges of CCTA VIQA are that the local part of coronary that determines final quality is hard to locate. To tackle the challenge, we formulate CCTA VIQA as a multiple-instance learning (MIL) problem, and exploit Transformer-based MIL backbone (termed as T-MIL) to aggregate the multiple instances along the coronary centerline into the final quality. However, not all instances are informative for final quality. There are some quality-irrelevant/negative instances intervening the exact quality assessment(e.g., instances covering only background or the coronary in instances is not identifiable). Therefore, we propose a Progressive Reinforcement learning based Instance Discarding module (termed as PRID) to progressively remove quality-irrelevant/negative instances for CCTA VIQA. Based on the above two modules, we propose a Reinforced Transformer Network (RTN) for automatic CCTA VIQA based on end-to-end optimization. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the real-world CCTA dataset, exceeding previous MIL methods by a large margin. 冠状动脉 CT 血管造影 (CCTA) 容易受到各种失真（例如伪影和噪声）的影响，这严重影响了心血管疾病的准确诊断。适当的 CCTA 血管级图像质量评估 (CCTA VIQA) 算法可用于降低错误诊断的风险。 CCTA VIQA 的主要挑战是难以定位决定最终质量的冠状动脉局部部分。为了应对这一挑战，我们将 CCTA VIQA 制定为多实例学习 (MIL) 问题，并利用基于 Transformer 的 MIL 主干（称为 T-MIL）将沿冠状动脉中心线的多个实例聚合为最终质量。然而，并非所有实例都能提供最终质量信息。有一些与质量无关/负面的实例干扰了精确的质量评估（例如，仅覆盖背景的实例或无法识别实例中的冠状动脉）。因此，我们提出了一种基于渐进强化学习的实例丢弃模块（称为 PRID），以逐步删除 CCTA VIQA 的质量不相关/负面实例。基于上述两个模块，我们提出了一种基于端到端优化的自动 CCTA VIQA 的强化变压器网络（RTN）。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在现实世界的 CCTA 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，大大超过了以前的 MIL 方法。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的Transformer网络（RTN），用于冠状动脉CT血管造影（CCTA）的血管级图像质量评估。 Yiting Lu,Jun Fu,Xin Li,Wei Zhou,Sen Liu,Xinxin Zhang,Congfu Jia,Ying Liu,Zhibo Chen cs.MM,cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Zhou,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: Automatic Parameter Adaptation for Quadrotor Trajectory Planning
title_zh: 四旋翼飞行器轨迹规划的自动参数自适应
abstract: Online trajectory planners enable quadrotors to safely and smoothly navigate in unknown cluttered environments. However, tuning parameters is challenging since modern planners have become too complex to mathematically model and predict their interaction with unstructured environments. This work takes humans out of the loop by proposing a planner parameter adaptation framework that formulates objectives into two complementary categories and optimizes them asynchronously. Objectives evaluated with and without trajectory execution are optimized using Bayesian Optimization (BayesOpt) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), respectively. By combining two kinds of objectives, the total convergence rate of the black-box optimization is accelerated while the dimension of optimized parameters can be increased. Benchmark comparisons demonstrate its superior performance over other strategies. Tests with changing obstacle densities validate its real-time environment adaption, which is difficult for prior manual tuning. Real-world flights with different drone platforms, environments, and planners show the proposed framework's scalability and effectiveness.
summary: Online trajectory planners enable quadrotors to safely and smoothly navigate in unknown cluttered environments. However, tuning parameters is challenging since modern planners have become too complex to mathematically model and predict their interaction with unstructured environments. This work takes humans out of the loop by proposing a planner parameter adaptation framework that formulates objectives into two complementary categories and optimizes them asynchronously. Objectives evaluated with and without trajectory execution are optimized using Bayesian Optimization (BayesOpt) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), respectively. By combining two kinds of objectives, the total convergence rate of the black-box optimization is accelerated while the dimension of optimized parameters can be increased. Benchmark comparisons demonstrate its superior performance over other strategies. Tests with changing obstacle densities validate its real-time environment adaption, which is difficult for prior manual tuning. Real-world flights with different drone platforms, environments, and planners show the proposed framework's scalability and effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 在线轨迹规划器使四旋翼飞行器能够在未知的杂乱环境中安全、平稳地导航。然而，调整参数具有挑战性，因为现代规划器已经变得过于复杂，无法对其与非结构化环境的交互进行数学建模和预测。这项工作通过提出一个规划器参数适应框架将人类从循环中解放出来，该框架将目标制定为两个互补的类别并异步优化它们。 Objectives evaluated with and without trajectory execution are optimized using Bayesian Optimization (BayesOpt) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), respectively.通过结合两种目标，可以加快黑盒优化的总收敛速度，同时可以增加优化参数的维数。基准比较表明其优于其他策略的性能。改变障碍物密度的测试验证了其实时环境适应能力，这对于以前的手动调整来说是困难的。不同无人机平台、环境和规划者的真实飞行显示了所提出的框架的可扩展性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动参数适应框架，用于四旋翼飞行器轨迹规划，以解决复杂环境中参数调整困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代轨迹规划器过于复杂，难以手动调参且无法有效适应动态环境，需自动优化方法提升效率和适应性。
AI.method: 框架将目标分为两类，分别使用贝叶斯优化（BayesOpt）和粒子群优化（PSO）异步优化，结合两类目标以加速收敛并增加参数维度。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在基准测试和实际飞行中均优于现有方法，具备实时环境适应能力和跨平台有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自动参数适应框架有效提升了轨迹规划的实时适应性与跨平台性能，展示了无需人工干预的优化方法的潜力。
