authors_text: Zifu Wang,Matthew B. Blaschko
title: MRF-UNets: Searching UNet with Markov Random Fields
title_zh: MRF-UNet：使用马尔可夫随机场搜索 UNet
abstract: UNet [27] is widely used in semantic segmentation due to its simplicity and effectiveness. However, its manually-designed architecture is applied to a large number of problem settings, either with no architecture optimizations, or with manual tuning, which is time consuming and can be sub-optimal. In this work, firstly, we propose Markov Random Field Neural Architecture Search (MRF-NAS) that extends and improves the recent Adaptive and Optimal Network Width Search (AOWS) method [4] with (i) a more general MRF framework (ii) diverse M-best loopy inference (iii) differentiable parameter learning. This provides the necessary NAS framework to efficiently explore network architectures that induce loopy inference graphs, including loops that arise from skip connections. With UNet as the backbone, we find an architecture, MRF-UNet, that shows several interesting characteristics. Secondly, through the lens of these characteristics, we identify the sub-optimality of the original UNet architecture and further improve our results with MRF-UNetV2. Experiments show that our MRF-UNets significantly outperform several benchmarks on three aerial image datasets and two medical image datasets while maintaining low computational costs. The code is available at: https://github.com/zifuwanggg/MRF-UNets.
summary: UNet [27] is widely used in semantic segmentation due to its simplicity and effectiveness. However, its manually-designed architecture is applied to a large number of problem settings, either with no architecture optimizations, or with manual tuning, which is time consuming and can be sub-optimal. In this work, firstly, we propose Markov Random Field Neural Architecture Search (MRF-NAS) that extends and improves the recent Adaptive and Optimal Network Width Search (AOWS) method [4] with (i) a more general MRF framework (ii) diverse M-best loopy inference (iii) differentiable parameter learning. This provides the necessary NAS framework to efficiently explore network architectures that induce loopy inference graphs, including loops that arise from skip connections. With UNet as the backbone, we find an architecture, MRF-UNet, that shows several interesting characteristics. Secondly, through the lens of these characteristics, we identify the sub-optimality of the original UNet architecture and further improve our results with MRF-UNetV2. Experiments show that our MRF-UNets significantly outperform several benchmarks on three aerial image datasets and two medical image datasets while maintaining low computational costs. The code is available at: https://github.com/zifuwanggg/MRF-UNets.
abstract_zh: UNet[27]由于其简单性和有效性而被广泛应用于语义分割。然而，其手动设计的架构应用于大量问题设置，要么没有架构优化，要么需要手动调优，这既耗时又可能不是最优的。在这项工作中，首先，我们提出了马尔可夫随机场神经架构搜索（MRF-NAS），它扩展和改进了最近的自适应和最优网络宽度搜索（AOWS）方法[4]，具有（i）更通用的 MRF 框架（ii）多样化的 M-best 循环推理（iii）可微参数学习。这提供了必要的 NAS 框架，以有效地探索引发循环推理图的网络架构，包括由跳过连接引起的循环。以 UNet 作为骨干，我们发现了一种架构 MRF-UNet，它显示了几个有趣的特征。其次，通过这些特征，我们确定了原始 UNet 架构的次优性，并利用 MRF-UNetV2 进一步改进我们的结果。实验表明，我们的 MRF-UNet 在三个航空图像数据集和两个医学图像数据集上显着优于多个基准，同时保持较低的计算成本。代码位于：https://github.com/zifuwanggg/MRF-Unets。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MRF-UNets，通过引入马尔可夫随机场框架改进UNet架构，实现更高效的语义分割。
AI.motivation: 传统UNet架构依赖手动设计，难以适应不同场景且优化成本高，需自动化架构搜索方法提升性能。
AI.method: 提出MRF-NAS方法，结合通用MRF框架、多样的M-best循环推理和可微参数学习，探索包含跳接循环的网络结构。
AI.result: MRF-UNets在三个遥感图像和两个医学图像数据集上显著优于基准模型，同时保持低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: MRF-UNets通过架构优化有效提升了分割性能，验证了结合循环推理的NAS方法在多场景下的优势。

Experiments show that our MRF-UNets significantly outperform several benchmarks on three aerial image datasets and two medical image datasets while maintaining low computational costs. The code is available at: https://github.com/zifuwanggg/MRF-UNets. UNet[27]由于其简单性和有效性而被广泛应用于语义分割。然而，其手动设计的架构应用于大量问题设置，要么没有架构优化，要么需要手动调优，这既耗时又可能不是最优的。在这项工作中，首先，我们提出了马尔可夫随机场神经架构搜索（MRF-NAS），它扩展和改进了最近的自适应和最优网络宽度搜索（AOWS）方法[4]，具有（i）更通用的 MRF 框架（ii）多样化的 M-best 循环推理（iii）可微参数学习。这提供了必要的 NAS 框架，以有效地探索引发循环推理图的网络架构，包括由跳过连接引起的循环。以 UNet 作为骨干，我们发现了一种架构 MRF-UNet，它显示了几个有趣的特征。其次，通过这些特征，我们确定了原始 UNet 架构的次优性，并利用 MRF-UNetV2 进一步改进我们的结果。实验表明，我们的 MRF-UNet 在三个航空图像数据集和两个医学图像数据集上显着优于多个基准，同时保持较低的计算成本。代码位于：https://github.com/zifuwanggg/MRF-Unets。 本文提出MRF-UNets，通过引入马尔可夫随机场框架改进UNet架构，实现更高效的语义分割。 Zifu Wang,Matthew B. Blaschko cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Pang,Yifan Zhang,Yaoyi Li,Jia Cai,Cewu Lu
title: Unsupervised Visual Representation Learning by Synchronous Momentum Grouping
title_zh: 通过同步动量分组进行无监督视觉表示学习
abstract: In this paper, we propose a genuine group-level contrastive visual representation learning method whose linear evaluation performance on ImageNet surpasses the vanilla supervised learning. Two mainstream unsupervised learning schemes are the instance-level contrastive framework and clustering-based schemes. The former adopts the extremely fine-grained instance-level discrimination whose supervisory signal is not efficient due to the false negatives. Though the latter solves this, they commonly come with some restrictions affecting the performance. To integrate their advantages, we design the SMoG method. SMoG follows the framework of contrastive learning but replaces the contrastive unit from instance to group, mimicking clustering-based methods. To achieve this, we propose the momentum grouping scheme which synchronously conducts feature grouping with representation learning. In this way, SMoG solves the problem of supervisory signal hysteresis which the clustering-based method usually faces, and reduces the false negatives of instance contrastive methods. We conduct exhaustive experiments to show that SMoG works well on both CNN and Transformer backbones. Results prove that SMoG has surpassed the current SOTA unsupervised representation learning methods. Moreover, its linear evaluation results surpass the performances obtained by vanilla supervised learning and the representation can be well transferred to downstream tasks.
summary: In this paper, we propose a genuine group-level contrastive visual representation learning method whose linear evaluation performance on ImageNet surpasses the vanilla supervised learning. Two mainstream unsupervised learning schemes are the instance-level contrastive framework and clustering-based schemes. The former adopts the extremely fine-grained instance-level discrimination whose supervisory signal is not efficient due to the false negatives. Though the latter solves this, they commonly come with some restrictions affecting the performance. To integrate their advantages, we design the SMoG method. SMoG follows the framework of contrastive learning but replaces the contrastive unit from instance to group, mimicking clustering-based methods. To achieve this, we propose the momentum grouping scheme which synchronously conducts feature grouping with representation learning. In this way, SMoG solves the problem of supervisory signal hysteresis which the clustering-based method usually faces, and reduces the false negatives of instance contrastive methods. We conduct exhaustive experiments to show that SMoG works well on both CNN and Transformer backbones. Results prove that SMoG has surpassed the current SOTA unsupervised representation learning methods. Moreover, its linear evaluation results surpass the performances obtained by vanilla supervised learning and the representation can be well transferred to downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种真正的群体级对比视觉表示学习方法，其在 ImageNet 上的线性评估性能超越了普通的监督学习。两种主流的无监督学习方案是实例级对比框架和基于聚类的方案。前者采用极其细粒度的实例级判别，其监督信号由于漏报而效率不高。尽管后者解决了这个问题，但它们通常会带来一些影响性能的限制。为了综合它们的优点，我们设计了SMoG方法。 SMoG 遵循对比学习的框架，但将对比单元从实例替换为组，模仿基于聚类的方法。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了动量分组方案，该方案与表示学​​习同步进行特征分组。这样，SMoG解决了基于聚类的方法通常面临的监督信号滞后问题，并减少了实例对比方法的漏报。我们进行了详尽的实验，证明 SMoG 在 CNN 和 Transformer 主干上都能很好地工作。结果证明SMoG已经超越了当前的SOTA无监督表示学习方法。此外，其线性评估结果超越了普通监督学习所获得的性能，并且表示可以很好地转移到下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SMoG的无监督视觉表征学习方法，通过同步动量分组策略，在ImageNet数据集上的线性评估性能超越了传统监督学习。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督学习方法存在实例级对比学习虚假负样本多、聚类方法性能受限等问题，需整合两者优势以提升表征学习效果。
AI.method: 设计SMoG方法，将对比单元从实例升级为群体，通过同步动量分组机制实现特征分组与表征学习的协同优化，解决聚类方法的监督信号滞后问题。
AI.result: SMoG在CNN和Transformer主干网络上均表现优异，无监督表征学习性能超越当前SOTA方法，且线性评估结果优于传统监督学习。
AI.conclusion: SMoG有效融合了实例对比与聚类方法的优势，解决了监督信号滞后和虚假负样本问题，具有良好的迁移能力。

authors_text: Ángel F. García-Fernández,Yuxuan Xia,Lennart Svensson
title: A comparison between PMBM Bayesian track initiation and labelled RFS adaptive birth
title_zh: PMBM 贝叶斯轨迹启动与标记 RFS 自适应出生之间的比较
comment: Matlab implementations of PMBM filters can be found at https://github.com/Agarciafernandez/MTT and https://github.com/yuhsuansia
comments: Matlab implementations of PMBM filters can be found at https://github.com/Agarciafernandez/MTT and https://github.com/yuhsuansia
abstract: This paper provides a comparative analysis between the adaptive birth model used in the labelled random finite set literature and the track initiation in the Poisson multi-Bernoulli mixture (PMBM) filter, with point-target models. The PMBM track initiation is obtained via Bayes' rule applied on the predicted PMBM density, and creates one Bernoulli component for each received measurement, representing that this measurement may be clutter or a detection from a new target. Adaptive birth mimics this procedure by creating a Bernoulli component for each measurement using a different rule to determine the probability of existence and a user-defined single-target density. This paper first provides an analysis of the differences that arise in track initiation based on isolated measurements. Then, it shows that adaptive birth underestimates the number of objects present in the surveillance area under common modelling assumptions. Finally, we provide numerical simulations to further illustrate the differences.
summary: This paper provides a comparative analysis between the adaptive birth model used in the labelled random finite set literature and the track initiation in the Poisson multi-Bernoulli mixture (PMBM) filter, with point-target models. The PMBM track initiation is obtained via Bayes' rule applied on the predicted PMBM density, and creates one Bernoulli component for each received measurement, representing that this measurement may be clutter or a detection from a new target. Adaptive birth mimics this procedure by creating a Bernoulli component for each measurement using a different rule to determine the probability of existence and a user-defined single-target density. This paper first provides an analysis of the differences that arise in track initiation based on isolated measurements. Then, it shows that adaptive birth underestimates the number of objects present in the surveillance area under common modelling assumptions. Finally, we provide numerical simulations to further illustrate the differences.
abstract_zh: 本文通过点目标模型对标记随机有限集文献中使用的自适应诞生模型与泊松多伯努利混合 (PMBM) 滤波器中的轨迹启动进行了比较分析。 PMBM 轨迹启动是通过应用于预测 PMBM 密度的贝叶斯规则获得的，并为每个接收到的测量创建一个伯努利分量，表示该测量可能是杂波或来自新目标的检测。适应性出生通过使用不同的规则为每次测量创建伯努利分量来模仿此过程，以确定存在的概率和用户定义的单目标密度。本文首先对基于孤立测量的轨道启动中出现的差异进行了分析。然后，它表明，在常见的建模假设下，适应性出生低估了监视区域中存在的物体数量。最后，我们提供数值模拟来进一步说明差异。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了标签随机有限集（labelled RFS）的自适应出生模型与泊松多伯努利混合（PMBM）滤波器的跟踪初始化方法，分析其在目标跟踪中的差异。
AI.motivation: 两种方法在处理新目标出现时采用不同机制，需明确其性能差异及适用场景。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯规则分析孤立测量下的跟踪初始化差异，并利用数值模拟验证自适应出生模型在目标数量估计上的偏差。
AI.result: 自适应出生模型在常见建模假设下低估了监控区域内的目标数量，而PMBM方法更准确。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法在跟踪初始化机制上存在本质差异，需根据具体场景选择合适模型。

authors_text: Tiziana Calamoneri,Federico Corò,Simona Mancini
title: Multi-Depot Multi-Trip Vehicle Routing with Total Completion Time Minimization
title_zh: 多站点多行程车辆路线，总完成时间最小化
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are aircraft whose flights can be fully autonomous without any provision for human intervention. One of the most useful and promising domains where UAVs can be employed is natural disaster management. In this paper, we focus on an emergency scenario and propose the use of a fleet of UAVs that help rescue teams to individuate people needing help inside an affected area. We model this situation as an original graph theoretical problem called Multi-Depot Multi-Trip Vehicle Routing Problem with Total Completion Times minimization (MDMT-VRP-TCT); we go through some problems already studied in the literature that appear somehow similar to it and highlight the differences, propose a mathematical formulation for our problem as a MILP, design a matheuristic framework to quickly solve large instances, and experimentally test its performance. Beyond the proposed application, our solution works in any case in which a multi-depot multi-trip vehicle routing problem must be solved.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are aircraft whose flights can be fully autonomous without any provision for human intervention. One of the most useful and promising domains where UAVs can be employed is natural disaster management. In this paper, we focus on an emergency scenario and propose the use of a fleet of UAVs that help rescue teams to individuate people needing help inside an affected area. We model this situation as an original graph theoretical problem called Multi-Depot Multi-Trip Vehicle Routing Problem with Total Completion Times minimization (MDMT-VRP-TCT); we go through some problems already studied in the literature that appear somehow similar to it and highlight the differences, propose a mathematical formulation for our problem as a MILP, design a matheuristic framework to quickly solve large instances, and experimentally test its performance. Beyond the proposed application, our solution works in any case in which a multi-depot multi-trip vehicle routing problem must be solved.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 是一种可以完全自主飞行、无需任何人为干预的飞机。无人机最有用和最有前途的领域之一是自然灾害管理。在本文中，我们重点关注紧急情况，并建议使用无人机机队帮助救援队区分受影响地区内需要帮助的人员。我们将这种情况建模为原始图论问题，称为具有总完成时间最小化的多站点多行程车辆路径问题（MDMT-VRP-TCT）；我们回顾了文献中已经研究过的一些与它相似的问题，并强调了它们之间的差异，为我们的问题提出了一个数学公式作为 MILP，设计了一个数学框架来快速解决大型实例，并通过实验测试了它的性能。除了所提出的应用之外，我们的解决方案在必须解决多站点多行程车辆路径问题的任何情况下都有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多仓库多趟次车辆路径问题模型（MDMT-VRP-TCT），通过数学规划和混合启发式算法解决无人机在灾难救援中的路径优化问题，以最小化总完成时间。
AI.motivation: 自然灾害救援场景需要快速定位受困人员，现有车辆路径问题模型难以满足多仓库部署、多趟次任务及时间效率要求，亟需针对性优化方案。
AI.method: 建立混合整数线性规划（MILP）数学模型，设计结合数学规划与启发式算法的混合框架（matheuristic），通过实验验证算法在大规模实例中的求解效率。
AI.result: 提出的混合启发式框架能有效解决大规模MDMT-VRP-TCT问题，实验表明其在计算速度和解的质量上优于传统方法，且适用于其他多仓库多趟次物流场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无人机灾难救援提供了高效的路径规划方案，同时可扩展至其他需要多仓库多趟次调度的复杂物流问题中。

search_text: Multi-Depot Multi-Trip Vehicle Routing with Total Completion Time Minimization 多站点多行程车辆路线，总完成时间最小化 Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are aircraft whose flights can be fully autonomous without any provision for human intervention. One of the most useful and promising domains where UAVs can be employed is natural disaster management. In this paper, we focus on an emergency scenario and propose the use of a fleet of UAVs that help rescue teams to individuate people needing help inside an affected area. We model this situation as an original graph theoretical problem called Multi-Depot Multi-Trip Vehicle Routing Problem with Total Completion Times minimization (MDMT-VRP-TCT); we go through some problems already studied in the literature that appear somehow similar to it and highlight the differences, propose a mathematical formulation for our problem as a MILP, design a matheuristic framework to quickly solve large instances, and experimentally test its performance. Beyond the proposed application, our solution works in any case in which a multi-depot multi-trip vehicle routing problem must be solved. 无人机 (UAV) 是一种可以完全自主飞行、无需任何人为干预的飞机。无人机最有用和最有前途的领域之一是自然灾害管理。在本文中，我们重点关注紧急情况，并建议使用无人机机队帮助救援队区分受影响地区内需要帮助的人员。我们将这种情况建模为原始图论问题，称为具有总完成时间最小化的多站点多行程车辆路径问题（MDMT-VRP-TCT）；我们回顾了文献中已经研究过的一些与它相似的问题，并强调了它们之间的差异，为我们的问题提出了一个数学公式作为 MILP，设计了一个数学框架来快速解决大型实例，并通过实验测试了它的性能。除了所提出的应用之外，我们的解决方案在必须解决多站点多行程车辆路径问题的任何情况下都有效。 本文提出一种多仓库多趟次车辆路径问题模型（MDMT-VRP-TCT），通过数学规划和混合启发式算法解决无人机在灾难救援中的路径优化问题，以最小化总完成时间。 Tiziana Calamoneri,Federico Corò,Simona Mancini math.OC,cs.RO

authors_text: Luca Bortolussi,Ginevra Carbone,Luca Laurenti,Andrea Patane,Guido Sanguinetti,Matthew Wicker
title: On the Robustness of Bayesian Neural Networks to Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.04359
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.04359
abstract: Vulnerability to adversarial attacks is one of the principal hurdles to the adoption of deep learning in safety-critical applications. Despite significant efforts, both practical and theoretical, training deep learning models robust to adversarial attacks is still an open problem. In this paper, we analyse the geometry of adversarial attacks in the large-data, overparameterized limit for Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs). We show that, in the limit, vulnerability to gradient-based attacks arises as a result of degeneracy in the data distribution, i.e., when the data lies on a lower-dimensional submanifold of the ambient space. As a direct consequence, we demonstrate that in this limit BNN posteriors are robust to gradient-based adversarial attacks. Crucially, we prove that the expected gradient of the loss with respect to the BNN posterior distribution is vanishing, even when each neural network sampled from the posterior is vulnerable to gradient-based attacks. Experimental results on the MNIST, Fashion MNIST, and half moons datasets, representing the finite data regime, with BNNs trained with Hamiltonian Monte Carlo and Variational Inference, support this line of arguments, showing that BNNs can display both high accuracy on clean data and robustness to both gradient-based and gradient-free based adversarial attacks.
summary: Vulnerability to adversarial attacks is one of the principal hurdles to the adoption of deep learning in safety-critical applications. Despite significant efforts, both practical and theoretical, training deep learning models robust to adversarial attacks is still an open problem. In this paper, we analyse the geometry of adversarial attacks in the large-data, overparameterized limit for Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs). We show that, in the limit, vulnerability to gradient-based attacks arises as a result of degeneracy in the data distribution, i.e., when the data lies on a lower-dimensional submanifold of the ambient space. As a direct consequence, we demonstrate that in this limit BNN posteriors are robust to gradient-based adversarial attacks. Crucially, we prove that the expected gradient of the loss with respect to the BNN posterior distribution is vanishing, even when each neural network sampled from the posterior is vulnerable to gradient-based attacks. Experimental results on the MNIST, Fashion MNIST, and half moons datasets, representing the finite data regime, with BNNs trained with Hamiltonian Monte Carlo and Variational Inference, support this line of arguments, showing that BNNs can display both high accuracy on clean data and robustness to both gradient-based and gradient-free based adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击的脆弱性是在安全关键型应用中采用深度学习的主要障碍之一。尽管在实践和理论上都做出了巨大的努力，但训练对对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性的深度学习模型仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们分析了贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）在大数据、过度参数化限制下的对抗性攻击的几何结构。我们表明，在极限情况下，基于梯度的攻击的脆弱性是由于数据分布的简并性而产生的，即当数据位于环境空间的较低维子流形时。作为直接结果，我们证明了在这个限制下，BNN 后验对于基于梯度的对抗攻击具有鲁棒性。至关重要的是，我们证明了相对于 BNN 后验分布的损失的预期梯度正在消失，即使从后验采样的每个神经网络都容易受到基于梯度的攻击。 MNIST、时尚 MNIST 和半月数据集（代表有限数据体系）以及使用哈密顿蒙特卡罗和变分推理训练的 BNN 的实验结果支持了这一论点，表明 BNN 可以在干净数据上表现出高精度，并且对基于梯度和无梯度的对抗攻击具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，特别是在大数据和过参数化极限下的几何特性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击是深度学习在安全关键应用中面临的主要挑战，而训练鲁棒模型仍是未解难题。贝叶斯方法可能提供新的视角，但其对抗鲁棒性缺乏理论支持。
AI.method: 通过理论分析大数据和过参数化极限下对抗攻击的几何特性，证明数据分布退化导致梯度攻击脆弱性，并展示BNN后验分布的梯度期望趋于零。实验使用HMC和变分推断训练BNN，在MNIST等数据集验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 理论证明BNN后验在极限下对梯度攻击鲁棒，实验显示BNN在干净数据上表现良好，且对梯度和无梯度攻击均具抗性。
AI.conclusion: BNN在大数据极限下因梯度期望消失而具备对抗鲁棒性，实验验证了其在有限数据场景下的有效性，为安全关键应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Pedro Machado,Ivica Matic,Francisco de Lemos,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle,David Ada Adama
title: Estimating the Power Consumption of Heterogeneous Devices when performing AI Inference
title_zh: 估算异构设备执行 AI 推理时的功耗
abstract: Modern-day life is driven by electronic devices connected to the internet. The emerging research field of the Internet-of-Things (IoT) has become popular, just as there has been a steady increase in the number of connected devices. Since many of these devices are utilised to perform CV tasks, it is essential to understand their power consumption against performance. We report the power consumption profile and analysis of the NVIDIA Jetson Nano board while performing object classification. The authors present an extensive analysis regarding power consumption per frame and the output in frames per second using YOLOv5 models. The results show that the YOLOv5n outperforms other YOLOV5 variants in terms of throughput (i.e. 12.34 fps) and low power consumption (i.e. 0.154 mWh/frame).
summary: Modern-day life is driven by electronic devices connected to the internet. The emerging research field of the Internet-of-Things (IoT) has become popular, just as there has been a steady increase in the number of connected devices. Since many of these devices are utilised to perform CV tasks, it is essential to understand their power consumption against performance. We report the power consumption profile and analysis of the NVIDIA Jetson Nano board while performing object classification. The authors present an extensive analysis regarding power consumption per frame and the output in frames per second using YOLOv5 models. The results show that the YOLOv5n outperforms other YOLOV5 variants in terms of throughput (i.e. 12.34 fps) and low power consumption (i.e. 0.154 mWh/frame).
abstract_zh: 现代生活是由连接到互联网的电子设备驱动的。随着连接设备数量的稳步增长，物联网（IoT）这个新兴研究领域已经变得流行起来。由于许多这些设备用于执行 CV 任务，因此了解它们的功耗与性能非常重要。我们报告了 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 板在执行对象分类时的功耗概况和分析。作者使用 YOLOv5 模型对每帧功耗和每秒帧数的输出进行了广泛的分析。结果表明，YOLOv5n 在吞吐量（即 12.34 fps）和低功耗（即 0.154 mWh/帧）方面优于其他 YOLOV5 变体。

AI.tldr: 本文主要分析了在执行AI推理任务时，异构设备（以NVIDIA Jetson Nano为例）的功耗表现，重点研究了YOLOv5模型在目标分类任务中的功耗与性能关系。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网设备数量激增及计算机视觉任务的普及，理解设备在执行AI推理时的功耗与性能平衡对优化能效和可持续性至关重要。
AI.method: 通过在NVIDIA Jetson Nano上运行YOLOv5系列模型，测量并分析每帧功耗及帧率（FPS），对比不同模型变体的能效表现。
AI.result: YOLOv5n模型在吞吐量（12.34 FPS）和单帧功耗（0.154 mWh/frame）方面优于其他YOLOv5变体，展现出更高的能效比。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv5n在边缘设备的AI推理任务中提供了功耗与性能的最佳平衡，适用于资源受限的物联网场景。

search_text: Estimating the Power Consumption of Heterogeneous Devices when performing AI Inference 估算异构设备执行 AI 推理时的功耗 Modern-day life is driven by electronic devices connected to the internet. The emerging research field of the Internet-of-Things (IoT) has become popular, just as there has been a steady increase in the number of connected devices. Since many of these devices are utilised to perform CV tasks, it is essential to understand their power consumption against performance. We report the power consumption profile and analysis of the NVIDIA Jetson Nano board while performing object classification. The authors present an extensive analysis regarding power consumption per frame and the output in frames per second using YOLOv5 models. The results show that the YOLOv5n outperforms other YOLOV5 variants in terms of throughput (i.e. 12.34 fps) and low power consumption (i.e. 0.154 mWh/frame). 现代生活是由连接到互联网的电子设备驱动的。随着连接设备数量的稳步增长，物联网（IoT）这个新兴研究领域已经变得流行起来。由于许多这些设备用于执行 CV 任务，因此了解它们的功耗与性能非常重要。我们报告了 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 板在执行对象分类时的功耗概况和分析。作者使用 YOLOv5 模型对每帧功耗和每秒帧数的输出进行了广泛的分析。结果表明，YOLOv5n 在吞吐量（即 12.34 fps）和低功耗（即 0.154 mWh/帧）方面优于其他 YOLOV5 变体。 本文主要分析了在执行AI推理任务时，异构设备（以NVIDIA Jetson Nano为例）的功耗表现，重点研究了YOLOv5模型在目标分类任务中的功耗与性能关系。 Pedro Machado,Ivica Matic,Francisco de Lemos,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle,David Ada Adama cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Fan Chen,Junyu Zhang,Zaiwen Wen
title: A Near-Optimal Primal-Dual Method for Off-Policy Learning in CMDP
title_zh: CMDP 中离策略学习的近最优原对偶方法
abstract: As an important framework for safe Reinforcement Learning, the Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP) has been extensively studied in the recent literature. However, despite the rich results under various on-policy learning settings, there still lacks some essential understanding of the offline CMDP problems, in terms of both the algorithm design and the information theoretic sample complexity lower bound. In this paper, we focus on solving the CMDP problems where only offline data are available. By adopting the concept of the single-policy concentrability coefficient $C^*$, we establish an $Ω\left(\frac{\min\left\{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|,|\mathcal{S}|+I\right\} C^*}{(1-γ)^3ε^2}\right)$ sample complexity lower bound for the offline CMDP problem, where $I$ stands for the number of constraints. By introducing a simple but novel deviation control mechanism, we propose a near-optimal primal-dual learning algorithm called DPDL. This algorithm provably guarantees zero constraint violation and its sample complexity matches the above lower bound except for an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}((1-γ)^{-1})$ factor. Comprehensive discussion on how to deal with the unknown constant $C^*$ and the potential asynchronous structure on the offline dataset are also included.
summary: As an important framework for safe Reinforcement Learning, the Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP) has been extensively studied in the recent literature. However, despite the rich results under various on-policy learning settings, there still lacks some essential understanding of the offline CMDP problems, in terms of both the algorithm design and the information theoretic sample complexity lower bound. In this paper, we focus on solving the CMDP problems where only offline data are available. By adopting the concept of the single-policy concentrability coefficient $C^*$, we establish an $Ω\left(\frac{\min\left\{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|,|\mathcal{S}|+I\right\} C^*}{(1-γ)^3ε^2}\right)$ sample complexity lower bound for the offline CMDP problem, where $I$ stands for the number of constraints. By introducing a simple but novel deviation control mechanism, we propose a near-optimal primal-dual learning algorithm called DPDL. This algorithm provably guarantees zero constraint violation and its sample complexity matches the above lower bound except for an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}((1-γ)^{-1})$ factor. Comprehensive discussion on how to deal with the unknown constant $C^*$ and the potential asynchronous structure on the offline dataset are also included.
abstract_zh: 作为安全强化学习的重要框架，约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）在最近的文献中得到了广泛的研究。然而，尽管在各种在策略学习设置下取得了丰富的成果，但在算法设计和信息论样本复杂度下界方面，仍然缺乏对离线 CMDP 问题的一些本质理解。在本文中，我们重点解决只有离线数据可用的 CMDP 问题。采用单策略集中性系数$C^*$的概念，我们建立了离线CMDP问题的$Ω\left(\frac{\min\left\{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|,|\mathcal{S}|+I\right\} C^*}{(1-γ)^3ε^2}\right)$样本复杂度下界，其中$I$代表约束数量。通过引入一种简单但新颖的偏差控制机制，我们提出了一种近乎最优的原始对偶学习算法，称为 DPDL。该算法可证明保证零约束违规，并且其样本复杂度与上述下限匹配，除了 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}((1-γ)^{-1})$ 因子之外。还包括对如何处理未知常数 $C^*$ 以及离线数据集上潜在的异步结构的全面讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似最优的 primal-dual 方法（DPDL），用于解决仅依赖离线数据的约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管 CMDP 在策略学习中已有丰富研究，但针对离线数据的算法设计和信息论样本复杂度下界仍缺乏系统性理解。
AI.method: 通过引入单策略集中系数 $C^*$ 和偏差控制机制，设计了 DPDL 算法，确保零约束违反并匹配样本复杂度下界。
AI.result: 建立了离线 CMDP 的样本复杂度下界，并证明 DPDL 的样本复杂度与下界仅相差 $\tilde{\\mathcal{O}}((1-γ)^{-1})$ 因子。
AI.conclusion: DPDL 算法在理论保证和实践可行性上为离线 CMDP 问题提供了近似最优解决方案，同时讨论了应对未知常数和异步数据集的策略。

authors_text: Guangyao Xu,Junfeng Fan,En Li,Xiaoyu Long,Rui Guo
title: Robust and accurate depth estimation by fusing LiDAR and Stereo
title_zh: 通过融合 LiDAR 和 Stereo 进行稳健且准确的深度估计
abstract: Depth estimation is one of the key technologies in some fields such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. However, the traditional method of using a single sensor is inevitably limited by the performance of the sensor. Therefore, a precision and robust method for fusing the LiDAR and stereo cameras is proposed. This method fully combines the advantages of the LiDAR and stereo camera, which can retain the advantages of the high precision of the LiDAR and the high resolution of images respectively. Compared with the traditional stereo matching method, the texture of the object and lighting conditions have less influence on the algorithm. Firstly, the depth of the LiDAR data is converted to the disparity of the stereo camera. Because the density of the LiDAR data is relatively sparse on the y-axis, the converted disparity map is up-sampled using the interpolation method. Secondly, in order to make full use of the precise disparity map, the disparity map and stereo matching are fused to propagate the accurate disparity. Finally, the disparity map is converted to the depth map. Moreover, the converted disparity map can also increase the speed of the algorithm. We evaluate the proposed pipeline on the KITTI benchmark. The experiment demonstrates that our algorithm has higher accuracy than several classic methods.
summary: Depth estimation is one of the key technologies in some fields such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. However, the traditional method of using a single sensor is inevitably limited by the performance of the sensor. Therefore, a precision and robust method for fusing the LiDAR and stereo cameras is proposed. This method fully combines the advantages of the LiDAR and stereo camera, which can retain the advantages of the high precision of the LiDAR and the high resolution of images respectively. Compared with the traditional stereo matching method, the texture of the object and lighting conditions have less influence on the algorithm. Firstly, the depth of the LiDAR data is converted to the disparity of the stereo camera. Because the density of the LiDAR data is relatively sparse on the y-axis, the converted disparity map is up-sampled using the interpolation method. Secondly, in order to make full use of the precise disparity map, the disparity map and stereo matching are fused to propagate the accurate disparity. Finally, the disparity map is converted to the depth map. Moreover, the converted disparity map can also increase the speed of the algorithm. We evaluate the proposed pipeline on the KITTI benchmark. The experiment demonstrates that our algorithm has higher accuracy than several classic methods.
abstract_zh: 深度估计是自动驾驶、机器人导航等领域的关键技术之一。然而，使用单一传感器的传统方法不可避免地受到传感器性能的限制。因此，提出了一种精确且鲁棒的融合激光雷达和立体相机的方法。该方法充分结合了激光雷达和立体相机的优点，能够分别保留激光雷达高精度和图像高分辨率的优点。与传统的立体匹配方法相比，物体的纹理和光照条件对算法的影响较小。首先，将LiDAR数据的深度转换为立体相机的视差。由于LiDAR数据在y轴上的密度相对稀疏，因此使用插值方法对转换后的视差图进行上采样。其次，为了充分利用精确视差图，融合视差图和立体匹配来传播精确视差。最后，将视差图转换为深度图。而且，转换后的视差图还可以提高算法的速度。我们在 KITTI 基准上评估拟议的管道。实验表明，我们的算法比几种经典方法具有更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合LiDAR和立体视觉的鲁棒且精确的深度估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统单传感器深度估计方法受限于传感器性能，需融合LiDAR的高精度与立体相机的高分辨率优势以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将LiDAR深度转换为立体视差图并插值上采样，再与立体匹配结果融合传播精确视差，最终转换为深度图。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，该算法精度优于多种经典方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合方法有效提升了深度估计的精度与鲁棒性，适用于自动驾驶等场景。

Secondly, in order to make full use of the precise disparity map, the disparity map and stereo matching are fused to propagate the accurate disparity. Finally, the disparity map is converted to the depth map. Moreover, the converted disparity map can also increase the speed of the algorithm. We evaluate the proposed pipeline on the KITTI benchmark. The experiment demonstrates that our algorithm has higher accuracy than several classic methods. 深度估计是自动驾驶、机器人导航等领域的关键技术之一。然而，使用单一传感器的传统方法不可避免地受到传感器性能的限制。因此，提出了一种精确且鲁棒的融合激光雷达和立体相机的方法。该方法充分结合了激光雷达和立体相机的优点，能够分别保留激光雷达高精度和图像高分辨率的优点。与传统的立体匹配方法相比，物体的纹理和光照条件对算法的影响较小。首先，将LiDAR数据的深度转换为立体相机的视差。由于LiDAR数据在y轴上的密度相对稀疏，因此使用插值方法对转换后的视差图进行上采样。其次，为了充分利用精确视差图，融合视差图和立体匹配来传播精确视差。最后，将视差图转换为深度图。而且，转换后的视差图还可以提高算法的速度。我们在 KITTI 基准上评估拟议的管道。实验表明，我们的算法比几种经典方法具有更高的准确性。 本文提出了一种融合LiDAR和立体视觉的鲁棒且精确的深度估计方法。 Guangyao Xu,Junfeng Fan,En Li,Xiaoyu Long,Rui Guo cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Joanna Sliwa,Shubhangi Ghosh,Vincent Stimper,Luigi Gresele,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Probing the Robustness of Independent Mechanism Analysis for Representation Learning
title_zh: 表征学习独立机制分析的鲁棒性探讨
comment: 10 pages, 14 figures, UAI CRL 2022 final camera-ready version
comments: 10 pages, 14 figures, UAI CRL 2022 final camera-ready version
abstract: One aim of representation learning is to recover the original latent code that generated the data, a task which requires additional information or inductive biases. A recently proposed approach termed Independent Mechanism Analysis (IMA) postulates that each latent source should influence the observed mixtures independently, complementing standard nonlinear independent component analysis, and taking inspiration from the principle of independent causal mechanisms. While it was shown in theory and experiments that IMA helps recovering the true latents, the method's performance was so far only characterized when the modeling assumptions are exactly satisfied. Here, we test the method's robustness to violations of the underlying assumptions. We find that the benefits of IMA-based regularization for recovering the true sources extend to mixing functions with various degrees of violation of the IMA principle, while standard regularizers do not provide the same merits. Moreover, we show that unregularized maximum likelihood recovers mixing functions which systematically deviate from the IMA principle, and provide an argument elucidating the benefits of IMA-based regularization.
summary: One aim of representation learning is to recover the original latent code that generated the data, a task which requires additional information or inductive biases. A recently proposed approach termed Independent Mechanism Analysis (IMA) postulates that each latent source should influence the observed mixtures independently, complementing standard nonlinear independent component analysis, and taking inspiration from the principle of independent causal mechanisms. While it was shown in theory and experiments that IMA helps recovering the true latents, the method's performance was so far only characterized when the modeling assumptions are exactly satisfied. Here, we test the method's robustness to violations of the underlying assumptions. We find that the benefits of IMA-based regularization for recovering the true sources extend to mixing functions with various degrees of violation of the IMA principle, while standard regularizers do not provide the same merits. Moreover, we show that unregularized maximum likelihood recovers mixing functions which systematically deviate from the IMA principle, and provide an argument elucidating the benefits of IMA-based regularization.
abstract_zh: 表示学习的一个目标是恢复生成数据的原始潜在代码，这是一项需要额外信息或归纳偏差的任务。最近提出的一种称为独立机制分析（IMA）的方法假设每个潜在源应独立影响观察到的混合物，补充标准非线性独立成分分析，并从独立因果机制原理中汲取灵感。虽然理论和实验表明 IMA 有助于恢复真实的潜在特征，但迄今为止该方法的性能仅在完全满足建模假设的情况下进行表征。在这里，我们测试该方法对违反基本假设的稳健性。我们发现基于 IMA 的正则化在恢复真实源方面的优势扩展到了不同程度违反 IMA 原理的混合函数，而标准正则化器则没有提供相同的优点。此外，我们表明，非正则化最大似然恢复了系统地偏离 IMA 原理的混合函数，并提供了一个论据来阐明基于 IMA 正则化的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究独立机制分析（IMA）在表示学习中对潜在变量恢复的鲁棒性，特别是在模型假设被违反时的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管IMA在理想条件下能有效恢复潜在变量，但其在实际数据中面对假设偏离时的性能尚不明确，需验证其鲁棒性并对比传统方法。
AI.method: 通过设计不同违反IMA原则的混合函数实验，对比IMA正则化与标准正则化方法的性能，并分析无正则化最大似然估计的偏差。
AI.result: IMA正则化在混合函数不同程度违反假设时仍能有效恢复潜在变量，而标准方法效果不佳；无正则化方法则系统偏离IMA原则。
AI.conclusion: IMA正则化能提升潜在变量恢复的鲁棒性，即使在假设偏离情况下仍优于传统方法，其优势源于对独立因果机制的显式建模。

authors_text: Xiangming Gu,Longshen Ou,Danielle Ong,Ye Wang
title: MM-ALT: A Multimodal Automatic Lyric Transcription System
title_zh: MM-ALT：多模式自动歌词转录系统
comment: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022. Camera ready version and appendix
comments: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022. Camera ready version and appendix
abstract: Automatic lyric transcription (ALT) is a nascent field of study attracting increasing interest from both the speech and music information retrieval communities, given its significant application potential. However, ALT with audio data alone is a notoriously difficult task due to instrumental accompaniment and musical constraints resulting in degradation of both the phonetic cues and the intelligibility of sung lyrics. To tackle this challenge, we propose the MultiModal Automatic Lyric Transcription system (MM-ALT), together with a new dataset, N20EM, which consists of audio recordings, videos of lip movements, and inertial measurement unit (IMU) data of an earbud worn by the performing singer. We first adapt the wav2vec 2.0 framework from automatic speech recognition (ASR) to the ALT task. We then propose a video-based ALT method and an IMU-based voice activity detection (VAD) method. In addition, we put forward the Residual Cross Attention (RCA) mechanism to fuse data from the three modalities (i.e., audio, video, and IMU). Experiments show the effectiveness of our proposed MM-ALT system, especially in terms of noise robustness. Project page is at https://n20em.github.io.
summary: Automatic lyric transcription (ALT) is a nascent field of study attracting increasing interest from both the speech and music information retrieval communities, given its significant application potential. However, ALT with audio data alone is a notoriously difficult task due to instrumental accompaniment and musical constraints resulting in degradation of both the phonetic cues and the intelligibility of sung lyrics. To tackle this challenge, we propose the MultiModal Automatic Lyric Transcription system (MM-ALT), together with a new dataset, N20EM, which consists of audio recordings, videos of lip movements, and inertial measurement unit (IMU) data of an earbud worn by the performing singer. We first adapt the wav2vec 2.0 framework from automatic speech recognition (ASR) to the ALT task. We then propose a video-based ALT method and an IMU-based voice activity detection (VAD) method. In addition, we put forward the Residual Cross Attention (RCA) mechanism to fuse data from the three modalities (i.e., audio, video, and IMU). Experiments show the effectiveness of our proposed MM-ALT system, especially in terms of noise robustness. Project page is at https://n20em.github.io.
abstract_zh: 自动歌词转录（ALT）是一个新兴的研究领域，由于其巨大的应用潜力，吸引了语音和音乐信息检索社区越来越多的兴趣。然而，由于乐器伴奏和音乐限制，单独使用音频数据进行 ALT 是一项非常困难的任务，导致语音提示和所唱歌词的清晰度下降。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了多模态自动歌词转录系统（MM-ALT）以及新的数据集 N20EM，其中包含录音、嘴唇运动视频以及表演歌手佩戴的耳塞的惯性测量单元（IMU）数据。我们首先将 wav2vec 2.0 框架从自动语音识别 (ASR) 调整到 ALT 任务。然后，我们提出了基于视频的 ALT 方法和基于 IMU 的语音活动检测（VAD）方法。此外，我们提出了残差交叉注意力（RCA）机制来融合来自三种模式（即音频、视频和 IMU）的数据。实验证明了我们提出的 MM-ALT 系统的有效性，特别是在噪声鲁棒性方面。项目页面位于 https://n20em.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-ALT系统，通过融合音频、视频和IMU数据实现更鲁棒的歌词自动转录。
AI.motivation: 传统基于音频的歌词转录因乐器干扰和音乐特性导致音素线索模糊，难以准确识别演唱歌词。
AI.method: 1) 改进wav2vec 2.0框架用于ALT任务；2) 提出基于视频的ALT方法和基于IMU的语音活动检测方法；3) 设计残差交叉注意力机制融合多模态数据。
AI.result: 实验表明MM-ALT在噪声环境下表现优异，验证了多模态融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合显著提升歌词转录性能，新数据集N20EM为后续研究提供重要资源。

authors_text: Songhua Liu,Jingwen Ye,Sucheng Ren,Xinchao Wang
title: DynaST: Dynamic Sparse Transformer for Exemplar-Guided Image Generation
title_zh: DynaST：用于示例引导图像生成的动态稀疏变压器
abstract: One key challenge of exemplar-guided image generation lies in establishing fine-grained correspondences between input and guided images. Prior approaches, despite the promising results, have relied on either estimating dense attention to compute per-point matching, which is limited to only coarse scales due to the quadratic memory cost, or fixing the number of correspondences to achieve linear complexity, which lacks flexibility. In this paper, we propose a dynamic sparse attention based Transformer model, termed Dynamic Sparse Transformer (DynaST), to achieve fine-level matching with favorable efficiency. The heart of our approach is a novel dynamic-attention unit, dedicated to covering the variation on the optimal number of tokens one position should focus on. Specifically, DynaST leverages the multi-layer nature of Transformer structure, and performs the dynamic attention scheme in a cascaded manner to refine matching results and synthesize visually-pleasing outputs. In addition, we introduce a unified training objective for DynaST, making it a versatile reference-based image translation framework for both supervised and unsupervised scenarios. Extensive experiments on three applications, pose-guided person image generation, edge-based face synthesis, and undistorted image style transfer, demonstrate that DynaST achieves superior performance in local details, outperforming the state of the art while reducing the computational cost significantly. Our code is available at https://github.com/Huage001/DynaST

Extensive experiments on three applications, pose-guided person image generation, edge-based face synthesis, and undistorted image style transfer, demonstrate that DynaST achieves superior performance in local details, outperforming the state of the art while reducing the computational cost significantly. Our code is available at https://github.com/Huage001/DynaST
abstract_zh: 样本引导图像生成的一项关键挑战在于在输入图像和引导图像之间建立细粒度的对应关系。先前的方法尽管取得了有希望的结果，但仍然依赖于估计密集注意力来计算每点匹配，由于二次内存成本，这仅限于粗尺度，或者固定对应的数量以实现线性复杂度，这缺乏灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于动态稀疏注意力的 Transformer 模型，称为动态稀疏变换器（DynaST），以实现高效的精细匹配。我们方法的核心是一种新颖的动态注意力单元，致力于覆盖一个位置应该关注的最佳令牌数量的变化。具体来说，DynaST 利用 Transformer 结构的多层特性，以级联方式执行动态注意力方案，以细化匹配结果并合成视觉上令人愉悦的输出。此外，我们为 DynaST 引入了统一的训练目标，使其成为适用于监督和无监督场景的多功能基于参考的图像翻译框架。对姿态引导人物图像生成、基于边缘的人脸合成和不失真图像风格转换这三个应用的广泛实验表明，DynaST 在局部细节方面实现了卓越的性能，超越了现有技术，同时显着降低了计算成本。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Huage001/DynaST 获取

AI.method: 动态稀疏注意力机制结合多层Transformer级联处理，动态调整注意力数量，统一训练目标
AI.result: 三个应用场景下细节表现优于SOTA，计算成本显著降低
AI.conclusion: DynaST有效平衡效率与效果，适用于多种图像生成任务

search_text: DynaST: Dynamic Sparse Transformer for Exemplar-Guided Image Generation DynaST：用于示例引导图像生成的动态稀疏变压器 One key challenge of exemplar-guided image generation lies in establishing fine-grained correspondences between input and guided images. Prior approaches, despite the promising results, have relied on either estimating dense attention to compute per-point matching, which is limited to only coarse scales due to the quadratic memory cost, or fixing the number of correspondences to achieve linear complexity, which lacks flexibility. In this paper, we propose a dynamic sparse attention based Transformer model, termed Dynamic Sparse Transformer (DynaST), to achieve fine-level matching with favorable efficiency. The heart of our approach is a novel dynamic-attention unit, dedicated to covering the variation on the optimal number of tokens one position should focus on. Specifically, DynaST leverages the multi-layer nature of Transformer structure, and performs the dynamic attention scheme in a cascaded manner to refine matching results and synthesize visually-pleasing outputs. In addition, we introduce a unified training objective for DynaST, making it a versatile reference-based image translation framework for both supervised and unsupervised scenarios. Extensive experiments on three applications, pose-guided person image generation, edge-based face synthesis, and undistorted image style transfer, demonstrate that DynaST achieves superior performance in local details, outperforming the state of the art while reducing the computational cost significantly. Our code is available at https://github.com/Huage001/DynaST 样本引导图像生成的一项关键挑战在于在输入图像和引导图像之间建立细粒度的对应关系。先前的方法尽管取得了有希望的结果，但仍然依赖于估计密集注意力来计算每点匹配，由于二次内存成本，这仅限于粗尺度，或者固定对应的数量以实现线性复杂度，这缺乏灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于动态稀疏注意力的 Transformer 模型，称为动态稀疏变换器（DynaST），以实现高效的精细匹配。我们方法的核心是一种新颖的动态注意力单元，致力于覆盖一个位置应该关注的最佳令牌数量的变化。具体来说，DynaST 利用 Transformer 结构的多层特性，以级联方式执行动态注意力方案，以细化匹配结果并合成视觉上令人愉悦的输出。此外，我们为 DynaST 引入了统一的训练目标，使其成为适用于监督和无监督场景的多功能基于参考的图像翻译框架。对姿态引导人物图像生成、基于边缘的人脸合成和不失真图像风格转换这三个应用的广泛实验表明，DynaST 在局部细节方面实现了卓越的性能，超越了现有技术，同时显着降低了计算成本。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Huage001/DynaST 获取 提出DynaST模型解决示例引导图像生成中的细粒度对应问题 Songhua Liu,Jingwen Ye,Sucheng Ren,Xinchao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Shaojie Bai,Dongxia Wang,Tim Muller,Peng Cheng,Jiming Chen
title: Stability of Weighted Majority Voting under Estimated Weights
title_zh: 估计权重下加权多数投票的稳定性
abstract: Weighted Majority Voting (WMV) is a well-known optimal decision rule for collective decision making, given the probability of sources to provide accurate information (trustworthiness). However, in reality, the trustworthiness is not a known quantity to the decision maker - they have to rely on an estimate called trust. A (machine learning) algorithm that computes trust is called unbiased when it has the property that it does not systematically overestimate or underestimate the trustworthiness. To formally analyse the uncertainty to the decision process, we introduce and analyse two important properties of such unbiased trust values: stability of correctness and stability of optimality. Stability of correctness means that the decision accuracy that the decision maker believes they achieved is equal to the actual accuracy. We prove stability of correctness holds. Stability of optimality means that the decisions made based on trust, are equally good as they would have been if they were based on trustworthiness. Stability of optimality does not hold. We analyse the difference between the two, and bounds thereon. We also present an overview of how sensitive decision correctness is to changes in trust and trustworthiness.
summary: Weighted Majority Voting (WMV) is a well-known optimal decision rule for collective decision making, given the probability of sources to provide accurate information (trustworthiness). However, in reality, the trustworthiness is not a known quantity to the decision maker - they have to rely on an estimate called trust. A (machine learning) algorithm that computes trust is called unbiased when it has the property that it does not systematically overestimate or underestimate the trustworthiness. To formally analyse the uncertainty to the decision process, we introduce and analyse two important properties of such unbiased trust values: stability of correctness and stability of optimality. Stability of correctness means that the decision accuracy that the decision maker believes they achieved is equal to the actual accuracy. We prove stability of correctness holds. Stability of optimality means that the decisions made based on trust, are equally good as they would have been if they were based on trustworthiness. Stability of optimality does not hold. We analyse the difference between the two, and bounds thereon. We also present an overview of how sensitive decision correctness is to changes in trust and trustworthiness.
abstract_zh: 加权多数投票 (WMV) 是一种众所周知的集体决策最优决策规则，考虑到消息来源提供准确信息（可信度）的概率。然而，实际上，可信度对于决策者来说并不是一个已知的量——他们必须依赖于一种称为信任的估计。当计算信任的（机器学习）算法具有不会系统地高估或低估可信度的属性时，该算法被称为无偏。为了正式分析决策过程的不确定性，我们引入并分析了这种无偏信任值的两个重要属性：正确性稳定性和最优性稳定性。正确性的稳定性是指决策者认为自己所达到的决策准确度与实际准确度相等。我们证明正确性的稳定性成立。最优稳定性意味着基于信任做出的决策与基于可信度做出的决策同样良好。最优稳定性不成立。我们分析两者之间的差异及其界限。我们还概述了决策正确性对信任和可信度变化的敏感程度。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在使用估计权重而非真实可信度的情况下，加权多数投票（WMV）决策规则的稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中决策者无法获取真实的可信度信息，只能依赖估计值（信任度），需明确这种估计对集体决策准确性与最优性的潜在影响。
AI.method: 通过形式化分析，引入并研究了无偏信任值的两个关键性质：正确性稳定性与最优性稳定性，并推导其差异与边界条件。
AI.result: 证明正确性稳定性成立，但最优性稳定性不成立；分析了信任度与真实可信度变化对决策正确性的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 估计权重下的WMV决策在正确性上具有稳定性，但无法保证与真实可信度下的最优性一致，需警惕信任估计误差的影响。

authors_text: Mario Lezcano-Casado
title: Automatic Differentiation: Theory and Practice
title_zh: 自动微分：理论与实践
abstract: We present the classical coordinate-free formalism for forward and backward mode ad in the real and complex setting. We show how to formally derive the forward and backward formulae for a number of matrix functions starting from basic principles.
summary: We present the classical coordinate-free formalism for forward and backward mode ad in the real and complex setting. We show how to formally derive the forward and backward formulae for a number of matrix functions starting from basic principles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了真实复杂环境中前向和后向模式广告的经典无坐标形式主义。我们展示了如何从基本原理开始正式推导多个矩阵函数的前向和后向公式。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了实数和复数环境下前向和反向模式自动微分的经典无坐标形式理论框架，并从基本原理推导出矩阵函数的前向和反向公式。
AI.motivation: 为自动微分提供统一的数学理论基础，解决传统方法在复数域和矩阵函数处理中的局限性，提升计算效率与适用性。
AI.method: 基于无坐标形式的微分理论，结合线性代数与微积分原理，从基本运算规则出发推导矩阵函数的自动微分公式。
AI.result: 成功建立适用于实数和复数域的自动微分通用框架，并推导出多种矩阵函数的前向/反向传播公式。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为自动微分提供了严谨的数学证明和通用计算方法，可广泛应用于科学计算与机器学习领域。

authors_text: Mattia Fumagalli,Marco Boffo,Daqian Shi,Mayukh Bagchi,Fausto Giunchiglia
title: LiveSchema: A Gateway Towards Learning on Knowledge Graph Schemas
title_zh: LiveSchema：知识图模式学习的门户
abstract: One of the major barriers to the training of algorithms on knowledge graph schemas, such as vocabularies or ontologies, is the difficulty that scientists have in finding the best input resource to address the target prediction tasks. In addition to this, a key challenge is to determine how to manipulate (and embed) these data, which are often in the form of particular triples (i.e., subject, predicate, object), to enable the learning process. In this paper, we describe the LiveSchema initiative, namely a gateway that offers a family of services to easily access, analyze, transform and exploit knowledge graph schemas, with the main goal of facilitating the reuse of these resources in machine learning use cases. As an early implementation of the initiative, we also advance an online catalog, which relies on more than 800 resources, with the first set of example services.
summary: One of the major barriers to the training of algorithms on knowledge graph schemas, such as vocabularies or ontologies, is the difficulty that scientists have in finding the best input resource to address the target prediction tasks. In addition to this, a key challenge is to determine how to manipulate (and embed) these data, which are often in the form of particular triples (i.e., subject, predicate, object), to enable the learning process. In this paper, we describe the LiveSchema initiative, namely a gateway that offers a family of services to easily access, analyze, transform and exploit knowledge graph schemas, with the main goal of facilitating the reuse of these resources in machine learning use cases. As an early implementation of the initiative, we also advance an online catalog, which relies on more than 800 resources, with the first set of example services.
abstract_zh: 在知识图谱（例如词汇或本体）上训练算法的主要障碍之一是科学家很难找到最佳输入资源来解决目标预测任务。除此之外，一个关键的挑战是确定如何操纵（和嵌入）这些数据，这些数据通常采用特定三元组（即主语、谓语、宾语）的形式，以实现学习过程。在本文中，我们描述了 LiveSchema 计划，即提供一系列服务以轻松访问、分析、转换和利用知识图模式的网关，其主要目标是促进这些资源在机器学习用例中的重用。作为该计划的早期实施，我们还推出了一个在线目录，该目录依赖于 800 多个资源，并提供第一组示例服务。

AI.tldr: 提出LiveSchema网关，旨在解决知识图谱模式在机器学习中的应用难题，提供资源访问与处理服务
AI.motivation: 科学家在利用知识图谱模式进行算法训练时面临资源选择与数据处理的双重挑战，亟需高效工具支持
AI.method: 构建LiveSchema平台，包含在线资源目录及转换服务，支持知识图谱模式的分析与机器学习应用
AI.result: 成功搭建包含800+资源的在线目录，验证了平台在知识图谱模式复用中的可行性
AI.conclusion: LiveSchema为知识图谱模式的机器学习应用提供了系统化解决方案，未来将扩展更多服务以提升复用效率

authors_text: Christopher Bamford,Minqi Jiang,Mikayel Samvelyan,Tim Rocktäschel
title: GriddlyJS: A Web IDE for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: GriddlyJS：用于强化学习的 Web IDE
abstract: Progress in reinforcement learning (RL) research is often driven by the design of new, challenging environments -- a costly undertaking requiring skills orthogonal to that of a typical machine learning researcher. The complexity of environment development has only increased with the rise of procedural-content generation (PCG) as the prevailing paradigm for producing varied environments capable of testing the robustness and generalization of RL agents. Moreover, existing environments often require complex build processes, making reproducing results difficult. To address these issues, we introduce GriddlyJS, a web-based Integrated Development Environment (IDE) based on the Griddly engine. GriddlyJS allows researchers to visually design and debug arbitrary, complex PCG grid-world environments using a convenient graphical interface, as well as visualize, evaluate, and record the performance of trained agent models. By connecting the RL workflow to the advanced functionality enabled by modern web standards, GriddlyJS allows publishing interactive agent-environment demos that reproduce experimental results directly to the web. To demonstrate the versatility of GriddlyJS, we use it to quickly develop a complex compositional puzzle-solving environment alongside arbitrary human-designed environment configurations and their solutions for use in automatic curriculum learning and offline RL. The GriddlyJS IDE is open source and freely available at https://griddly.ai.
summary: Progress in reinforcement learning (RL) research is often driven by the design of new, challenging environments -- a costly undertaking requiring skills orthogonal to that of a typical machine learning researcher. The complexity of environment development has only increased with the rise of procedural-content generation (PCG) as the prevailing paradigm for producing varied environments capable of testing the robustness and generalization of RL agents. Moreover, existing environments often require complex build processes, making reproducing results difficult. To address these issues, we introduce GriddlyJS, a web-based Integrated Development Environment (IDE) based on the Griddly engine. GriddlyJS allows researchers to visually design and debug arbitrary, complex PCG grid-world environments using a convenient graphical interface, as well as visualize, evaluate, and record the performance of trained agent models. By connecting the RL workflow to the advanced functionality enabled by modern web standards, GriddlyJS allows publishing interactive agent-environment demos that reproduce experimental results directly to the web. To demonstrate the versatility of GriddlyJS, we use it to quickly develop a complex compositional puzzle-solving environment alongside arbitrary human-designed environment configurations and their solutions for use in automatic curriculum learning and offline RL. The GriddlyJS IDE is open source and freely available at https://griddly.ai.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）研究的进展通常是由新的、具有挑战性的环境的设计驱动的——这是一项成本高昂的工作，需要与典型机器学习研究人员正交的技能。随着程序内容生成（PCG）作为生成能够测试 RL 代理的鲁棒性和泛化性的各种环境的流行范例的兴起，环境开发的复杂性只会增加。此外，现有环境通常需要复杂的构建过程，使得重现结果变得困难。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 GriddlyJS，这是一个基于 Griddly 引擎的基于 Web 的集成开发环境 (IDE)。 GriddlyJS 允许研究人员使用方便的图形界面直观地设计和调试任意复杂的 PCG 网格世界环境，以及可视化、评估和记录经过训练的代理模型的性能。通过将 RL 工作流程连接到现代 Web 标准启用的高级功能，GriddlyJS 允许发布交互式代理环境演示，将实验结果直接复制到 Web。为了展示 GriddlyJS 的多功能性，我们使用它快速开发一个复杂的组合解谜环境以及任意人工设计的环境配置及其解决方案，用于自动课程学习和离线强化学习。 GriddlyJS IDE 是开源的，可以从 https://griddly.ai 免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于网络的集成开发环境GriddlyJS，用于强化学习中的环境设计与调试。
AI.motivation: 强化学习研究需要设计复杂环境以测试智能体性能，但现有环境开发成本高、复现困难，且需复杂构建流程。
AI.method: 基于Griddly引擎开发网页IDE，提供图形化界面实现环境可视化设计、调试及智能体性能评估，并通过现代网页标准实现交互式演示。
AI.result: 成功开发出复杂组合谜题环境及自动课程学习配置，工具开源并可直接在网页发布实验结果演示。
AI.conclusion: GriddlyJS通过简化环境开发流程并提升复现性，为强化学习研究提供了高效工具支持。

authors_text: Matthias Rottmann,Marco Reese
title: Automated Detection of Label Errors in Semantic Segmentation Datasets via Deep Learning and Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: 通过深度学习和不确定性量化自动检测语义分割数据集中的标签错误
abstract: In this work, we for the first time present a method for detecting label errors in image datasets with semantic segmentation, i.e., pixel-wise class labels. Annotation acquisition for semantic segmentation datasets is time-consuming and requires plenty of human labor. In particular, review processes are time consuming and label errors can easily be overlooked by humans. The consequences are biased benchmarks and in extreme cases also performance degradation of deep neural networks (DNNs) trained on such datasets. DNNs for semantic segmentation yield pixel-wise predictions, which makes detection of label errors via uncertainty quantification a complex task. Uncertainty is particularly pronounced at the transitions between connected components of the prediction. By lifting the consideration of uncertainty to the level of predicted components, we enable the usage of DNNs together with component-level uncertainty quantification for the detection of label errors. We present a principled approach to benchmarking the task of label error detection by dropping labels from the Cityscapes dataset as well from a dataset extracted from the CARLA driving simulator, where in the latter case we have the labels under control. Our experiments show that our approach is able to detect the vast majority of label errors while controlling the number of false label error detections. Furthermore, we apply our method to semantic segmentation datasets frequently used by the computer vision community and present a collection of label errors along with sample statistics.
summary: In this work, we for the first time present a method for detecting label errors in image datasets with semantic segmentation, i.e., pixel-wise class labels. Annotation acquisition for semantic segmentation datasets is time-consuming and requires plenty of human labor. In particular, review processes are time consuming and label errors can easily be overlooked by humans. The consequences are biased benchmarks and in extreme cases also performance degradation of deep neural networks (DNNs) trained on such datasets. DNNs for semantic segmentation yield pixel-wise predictions, which makes detection of label errors via uncertainty quantification a complex task. Uncertainty is particularly pronounced at the transitions between connected components of the prediction. By lifting the consideration of uncertainty to the level of predicted components, we enable the usage of DNNs together with component-level uncertainty quantification for the detection of label errors. We present a principled approach to benchmarking the task of label error detection by dropping labels from the Cityscapes dataset as well from a dataset extracted from the CARLA driving simulator, where in the latter case we have the labels under control. Our experiments show that our approach is able to detect the vast majority of label errors while controlling the number of false label error detections. Furthermore, we apply our method to semantic segmentation datasets frequently used by the computer vision community and present a collection of label errors along with sample statistics.
abstract_zh: In this work, we for the first time present a method for detecting label errors in image datasets with semantic segmentation, i.e., pixel-wise class labels.语义分割数据集的注释获取非常耗时并且需要大量的人力。特别是，审查过程非常耗时，而且标签错误很容易被人类忽视。 The consequences are biased benchmarks and in extreme cases also performance degradation of deep neural networks (DNNs) trained on such datasets. DNNs for semantic segmentation yield pixel-wise predictions, which makes detection of label errors via uncertainty quantification a complex task.不确定性在预测的连接组件之间的转换处尤其明显。通过将不确定性的考虑提升到预测组件的级别，我们可以将 DNN 与组件级不确定性量化一起使用来检测标签错误。我们提出了一种原则性方法来对标签错误检测任务进行基准测试，方法是从 Cityscapes 数据集以及从 CARLA 驾驶模拟器提取的数据集中删除标签，在后一种情况下，我们可以控制标签。我们的实验表明，我们的方法能够检测绝大多数标签错误，同时控制错误标签错误检测的数量。 Furthermore, we apply our method to semantic segmentation datasets frequently used by the computer vision community and present a collection of label errors along with sample statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习和不确定性量化的自动检测语义分割数据集标签错误的方法。
AI.motivation: 语义分割数据集的标注耗时且易出错，人工审核难以发现所有错误，导致基准偏差和深度学习模型性能下降。
AI.method: 通过分析深度学习模型预测结果中连通组件间的不确定性，结合组件级不确定性量化技术检测标签错误，并在Cityscapes和CARLA数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 方法能检测出大部分标签错误且控制误报率，在常用数据集上发现并统计了多组标签错误样本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为语义分割数据集的标签质量评估提供了有效工具，有助于提升模型训练的可靠性和基准公平性。

motivation: 语义分割数据集的标注耗时且易出错，人工审核难以发现所有错误，导致基准偏差和深度学习模型性能下降。
method: 通过分析深度学习模型预测结果中连通组件间的不确定性，结合组件级不确定性量化技术检测标签错误，并在Cityscapes和CARLA数据集上验证方法有效性。
result: 方法能检测出大部分标签错误且控制误报率，在常用数据集上发现并统计了多组标签错误样本。
conclusion: 该方法为语义分割数据集的标签质量评估提供了有效工具，有助于提升模型训练的可靠性和基准公平性。
search_text: Automated Detection of Label Errors in Semantic Segmentation Datasets via Deep Learning and Uncertainty Quantification 通过深度学习和不确定性量化自动检测语义分割数据集中的标签错误 In this work, we for the first time present a method for detecting label errors in image datasets with semantic segmentation, i.e., pixel-wise class labels. Annotation acquisition for semantic segmentation datasets is time-consuming and requires plenty of human labor. In particular, review processes are time consuming and label errors can easily be overlooked by humans. The consequences are biased benchmarks and in extreme cases also performance degradation of deep neural networks (DNNs) trained on such datasets. DNNs for semantic segmentation yield pixel-wise predictions, which makes detection of label errors via uncertainty quantification a complex task. Uncertainty is particularly pronounced at the transitions between connected components of the prediction. By lifting the consideration of uncertainty to the level of predicted components, we enable the usage of DNNs together with component-level uncertainty quantification for the detection of label errors. We present a principled approach to benchmarking the task of label error detection by dropping labels from the Cityscapes dataset as well from a dataset extracted from the CARLA driving simulator, where in the latter case we have the labels under control. Our experiments show that our approach is able to detect the vast majority of label errors while controlling the number of false label error detections. Furthermore, we apply our method to semantic segmentation datasets frequently used by the computer vision community and present a collection of label errors along with sample statistics. In this work, we for the first time present a method for detecting label errors in image datasets with semantic segmentation, i.e., pixel-wise class labels.语义分割数据集的注释获取非常耗时并且需要大量的人力。特别是，审查过程非常耗时，而且标签错误很容易被人类忽视。 The consequences are biased benchmarks and in extreme cases also performance degradation of deep neural networks (DNNs) trained on such datasets. DNNs for semantic segmentation yield pixel-wise predictions, which makes detection of label errors via uncertainty quantification a complex task.不确定性在预测的连接组件之间的转换处尤其明显。通过将不确定性的考虑提升到预测组件的级别，我们可以将 DNN 与组件级不确定性量化一起使用来检测标签错误。我们提出了一种原则性方法来对标签错误检测任务进行基准测试，方法是从 Cityscapes 数据集以及从 CARLA 驾驶模拟器提取的数据集中删除标签，在后一种情况下，我们可以控制标签。我们的实验表明，我们的方法能够检测绝大多数标签错误，同时控制错误标签错误检测的数量。 Furthermore, we apply our method to semantic segmentation datasets frequently used by the computer vision community and present a collection of label errors along with sample statistics. 本文提出一种基于深度学习和不确定性量化的自动检测语义分割数据集标签错误的方法。 Matthias Rottmann,Marco Reese cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hansen Feng,Lizhi Wang,Yuzhi Wang,Hua Huang
title: Learnability Enhancement for Low-light Raw Denoising: Where Paired Real Data Meets Noise Modeling
title_zh: 低光原始降噪的可学习性增强：配对真实数据与噪声建模的结合
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, to be published in ACMMM 2022
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, to be published in ACMMM 2022
abstract: Low-light raw denoising is an important and valuable task in computational photography where learning-based methods trained with paired real data are mainstream. However, the limited data volume and complicated noise distribution have constituted a learnability bottleneck for paired real data, which limits the denoising performance of learning-based methods. To address this issue, we present a learnability enhancement strategy to reform paired real data according to noise modeling. Our strategy consists of two efficient techniques: shot noise augmentation (SNA) and dark shading correction (DSC). Through noise model decoupling, SNA improves the precision of data mapping by increasing the data volume and DSC reduces the complexity of data mapping by reducing the noise complexity. Extensive results on the public datasets and real imaging scenarios collectively demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/megvii-research/PMN.
summary: Low-light raw denoising is an important and valuable task in computational photography where learning-based methods trained with paired real data are mainstream. However, the limited data volume and complicated noise distribution have constituted a learnability bottleneck for paired real data, which limits the denoising performance of learning-based methods. To address this issue, we present a learnability enhancement strategy to reform paired real data according to noise modeling. Our strategy consists of two efficient techniques: shot noise augmentation (SNA) and dark shading correction (DSC). Through noise model decoupling, SNA improves the precision of data mapping by increasing the data volume and DSC reduces the complexity of data mapping by reducing the noise complexity. Extensive results on the public datasets and real imaging scenarios collectively demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method. Our code is available at: https://github.com/megvii-research/PMN.
abstract_zh: 低光原始降噪是计算摄影中一项重要且有价值的任务，其中使用配对真实数据训练的基于学习的方法是主流。然而，有限的数据量和复杂的噪声分布构成了配对真实数据的可学习性瓶颈，限制了基于学习的方法的去噪性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种可学习性增强策略，根据噪声建模来改革配对的真实数据。我们的策略由两种有效的技术组成：散粒噪声增强（SNA）和暗阴影校正（DSC）。通过噪声模型解耦，SNA通过增加数据量来提高数据映射的精度，DSC通过降低噪声复杂度来降低数据映射的复杂度。公共数据集和真实成像场景的广泛结果共同证明了我们方法的最先进性能。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/megvii-research/PMN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过噪声建模增强低光原始图像去噪方法的学习能力的策略，结合配对真实数据与噪声建模技术。
AI.motivation: 现有基于配对真实数据的学习方法在低光去噪任务中因数据量有限和噪声分布复杂而面临学习能力瓶颈，限制了去噪性能。
AI.method: 提出两种高效技术：通过噪声模型解耦的射击噪声增强（SNA）和暗区阴影校正（DSC），分别通过增加数据量提升映射精度、降低噪声复杂度简化数据映射。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和实际成像场景中的大量实验结果表明，该方法达到 state-of-the-art 性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合配对真实数据与噪声建模，所提策略有效提升了低光原始图像去噪任务的学习能力与性能。

authors_text: Boeun Kim,Hyung Jin Chang,Jungho Kim,Jin Young Choi
title: Global-local Motion Transformer for Unsupervised Skeleton-based Action Learning
title_zh: 用于无监督骨架动作学习的全局局部运动变换器
abstract: We propose a new transformer model for the task of unsupervised learning of skeleton motion sequences. The existing transformer model utilized for unsupervised skeleton-based action learning is learned the instantaneous velocity of each joint from adjacent frames without global motion information. Thus, the model has difficulties in learning the attention globally over whole-body motions and temporally distant joints. In addition, person-to-person interactions have not been considered in the model. To tackle the learning of whole-body motion, long-range temporal dynamics, and person-to-person interactions, we design a global and local attention mechanism, where, global body motions and local joint motions pay attention to each other. In addition, we propose a novel pretraining strategy, multi-interval pose displacement prediction, to learn both global and local attention in diverse time ranges. The proposed model successfully learns local dynamics of the joints and captures global context from the motion sequences. Our model outperforms state-of-the-art models by notable margins in the representative benchmarks. Codes are available at https://github.com/Boeun-Kim/GL-Transformer.
summary: We propose a new transformer model for the task of unsupervised learning of skeleton motion sequences. The existing transformer model utilized for unsupervised skeleton-based action learning is learned the instantaneous velocity of each joint from adjacent frames without global motion information. Thus, the model has difficulties in learning the attention globally over whole-body motions and temporally distant joints. In addition, person-to-person interactions have not been considered in the model. To tackle the learning of whole-body motion, long-range temporal dynamics, and person-to-person interactions, we design a global and local attention mechanism, where, global body motions and local joint motions pay attention to each other. In addition, we propose a novel pretraining strategy, multi-interval pose displacement prediction, to learn both global and local attention in diverse time ranges. The proposed model successfully learns local dynamics of the joints and captures global context from the motion sequences. Our model outperforms state-of-the-art models by notable margins in the representative benchmarks. Codes are available at https://github.com/Boeun-Kim/GL-Transformer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的 Transformer 模型，用于骨骼运动序列的无监督学习任务。用于无监督基于骨架的动作学习的现有变压器模型是从相邻帧中学习每个关节的瞬时速度，而没有全局运动信息。因此，该模型很难学习全局对全身运动和时间上遥远的关节的注意力。此外，模型中还没有考虑人与人之间的互动。为了解决全身运动、远程时间动态和人与人交互的学习，我们设计了一种全局和局部注意力机制，其中全局身体运动和局部关节运动相互关注。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的预训练策略，即多间隔姿势位移预测，以学习不同时间范围内的全局和局部注意力。所提出的模型成功地学习了关节的局部动力学并从运动序列中捕获全局上下文。我们的模型在代表性基准测试中明显优于最先进的模型。代码可在 https://github.com/Boeun-Kim/GL-Transformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局-局部注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于无监督骨骼动作学习任务。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无法有效捕捉全身运动的全局信息和跨时间关节的长期动态，且未考虑人与人之间的交互。
AI.method: 设计全局-局部注意力机制，使全身运动与局部关节运动相互关注，并提出多区间姿态位移预测预训练策略以学习不同时间范围的全局与局部注意力。
AI.result: 在代表性基准测试中，该模型显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过融合全局与局部运动信息，有效提升了无监督骨骼动作学习的性能。

authors_text: Zekun Li,Zhengyang Geng,Zhao Kang,Wenyu Chen,Yibo Yang
title: Eliminating Gradient Conflict in Reference-based Line-Art Colorization
title_zh: 消除基于参考的线条艺术着色中的渐变冲突
abstract: Reference-based line-art colorization is a challenging task in computer vision. The color, texture, and shading are rendered based on an abstract sketch, which heavily relies on the precise long-range dependency modeling between the sketch and reference. Popular techniques to bridge the cross-modal information and model the long-range dependency employ the attention mechanism. However, in the context of reference-based line-art colorization, several techniques would intensify the existing training difficulty of attention, for instance, self-supervised training protocol and GAN-based losses. To understand the instability in training, we detect the gradient flow of attention and observe gradient conflict among attention branches. This phenomenon motivates us to alleviate the gradient issue by preserving the dominant gradient branch while removing the conflict ones. We propose a novel attention mechanism using this training strategy, Stop-Gradient Attention (SGA), outperforming the attention baseline by a large margin with better training stability. Compared with state-of-the-art modules in line-art colorization, our approach demonstrates significant improvements in Fréchet Inception Distance (FID, up to 27.21%) and structural similarity index measure (SSIM, up to 25.67%) on several benchmarks. The code of SGA is available at https://github.com/kunkun0w0/SGA .
summary: Reference-based line-art colorization is a challenging task in computer vision. The color, texture, and shading are rendered based on an abstract sketch, which heavily relies on the precise long-range dependency modeling between the sketch and reference. Popular techniques to bridge the cross-modal information and model the long-range dependency employ the attention mechanism. However, in the context of reference-based line-art colorization, several techniques would intensify the existing training difficulty of attention, for instance, self-supervised training protocol and GAN-based losses. To understand the instability in training, we detect the gradient flow of attention and observe gradient conflict among attention branches. This phenomenon motivates us to alleviate the gradient issue by preserving the dominant gradient branch while removing the conflict ones. We propose a novel attention mechanism using this training strategy, Stop-Gradient Attention (SGA), outperforming the attention baseline by a large margin with better training stability. Compared with state-of-the-art modules in line-art colorization, our approach demonstrates significant improvements in Fréchet Inception Distance (FID, up to 27.21%) and structural similarity index measure (SSIM, up to 25.67%) on several benchmarks. The code of SGA is available at https://github.com/kunkun0w0/SGA .
abstract_zh: 基于参考的线条艺术着色是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务。颜色、纹理和阴影是基于抽象草图渲染的，这在很大程度上依赖于草图和参考之间精确的远程依赖关系建模。桥接跨模式信息和建模远程依赖性的流行技术采用了注意力机制。然而，在基于参考的线条艺术着色的背景下，一些技术会加剧现有的注意力训练难度，例如自监督训练协议和基于 GAN 的损失。为了理解训练中的不稳定性，我们检测注意力的梯度流并观察注意力分支之间的梯度冲突。这种现象促使我们通过保留主导梯度分支同时消除冲突分支来缓解梯度问题。我们使用这种训练策略提出了一种新颖的注意力机制，即停止梯度注意力（SGA），其性能大大优于注意力基线，并且具有更好的训练稳定性。与最先进的线条着色模块相比，我们的方法在多个基准测试中显示了 Fréchet 起始距离（FID，高达 27.21%）和结构相似性指数测量（SSIM，高达 25.67%）的显着改进。 SGA的代码可以在https://github.com/kunkun0w0/SGA获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考的线稿着色方法，通过消除注意力机制中的梯度冲突来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力机制的线稿着色方法在训练过程中存在梯度冲突问题，导致训练不稳定且效果受限。
AI.method: 提出Stop-Gradient Attention (SGA)机制，通过保留主导梯度分支并消除冲突分支来优化注意力梯度流。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，SGA在FID指标上提升最高达27.21%，SSIM指标提升最高达25.67%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SGA通过解决注意力梯度冲突有效提升了线稿着色的训练稳定性与生成质量，为相关任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Eliminating Gradient Conflict in Reference-based Line-Art Colorization 消除基于参考的线条艺术着色中的渐变冲突 Reference-based line-art colorization is a challenging task in computer vision. The color, texture, and shading are rendered based on an abstract sketch, which heavily relies on the precise long-range dependency modeling between the sketch and reference. Popular techniques to bridge the cross-modal information and model the long-range dependency employ the attention mechanism. However, in the context of reference-based line-art colorization, several techniques would intensify the existing training difficulty of attention, for instance, self-supervised training protocol and GAN-based losses. To understand the instability in training, we detect the gradient flow of attention and observe gradient conflict among attention branches. This phenomenon motivates us to alleviate the gradient issue by preserving the dominant gradient branch while removing the conflict ones. We propose a novel attention mechanism using this training strategy, Stop-Gradient Attention (SGA), outperforming the attention baseline by a large margin with better training stability. Compared with state-of-the-art modules in line-art colorization, our approach demonstrates significant improvements in Fréchet Inception Distance (FID, up to 27.21%) and structural similarity index measure (SSIM, up to 25.67%) on several benchmarks. The code of SGA is available at https://github.com/kunkun0w0/SGA . 基于参考的线条艺术着色是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务。颜色、纹理和阴影是基于抽象草图渲染的，这在很大程度上依赖于草图和参考之间精确的远程依赖关系建模。桥接跨模式信息和建模远程依赖性的流行技术采用了注意力机制。然而，在基于参考的线条艺术着色的背景下，一些技术会加剧现有的注意力训练难度，例如自监督训练协议和基于 GAN 的损失。为了理解训练中的不稳定性，我们检测注意力的梯度流并观察注意力分支之间的梯度冲突。这种现象促使我们通过保留主导梯度分支同时消除冲突分支来缓解梯度问题。我们使用这种训练策略提出了一种新颖的注意力机制，即停止梯度注意力（SGA），其性能大大优于注意力基线，并且具有更好的训练稳定性。与最先进的线条着色模块相比，我们的方法在多个基准测试中显示了 Fréchet 起始距离（FID，高达 27.21%）和结构相似性指数测量（SSIM，高达 25.67%）的显着改进。 SGA的代码可以在https://github.com/kunkun0w0/SGA获取。 本文提出了一种基于参考的线稿着色方法，通过消除注意力机制中的梯度冲突来提升模型性能。 Zekun Li,Zhengyang Geng,Zhao Kang,Wenyu Chen,Yibo Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Benjamin Merlin Bumpus,Zoltan A. Kocsis,Jade Edenstar Master,Emilio Minichiello
title: Structured Decompositions: Structural and Algorithmic Compositionality
title_zh: 结构化分解：结构和算法组合性
comment: This version is a major rewrite. 35 pages and an appendix. Comments and suggestions welcome!
comments: This version is a major rewrite. 35 pages and an appendix. Comments and suggestions welcome!
abstract: We introduce structured decompositions, category-theoretic structures which simultaneously generalize notions from graph theory (including treewidth, layered treewidth, co-treewidth, graph decomposition width, tree independence number, hypergraph treewidth and H-treewidth), geometric group theory (specifically Bass-Serre theory), and dynamical systems (e.g. hybrid dynamical systems). We define width functors, which provide a compositional way to analyze and relate different structural complexity measures, and establish a general duality between decompositions and completions of objects.
summary: We introduce structured decompositions, category-theoretic structures which simultaneously generalize notions from graph theory (including treewidth, layered treewidth, co-treewidth, graph decomposition width, tree independence number, hypergraph treewidth and H-treewidth), geometric group theory (specifically Bass-Serre theory), and dynamical systems (e.g. hybrid dynamical systems). We define width functors, which provide a compositional way to analyze and relate different structural complexity measures, and establish a general duality between decompositions and completions of objects.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了结构化分解、范畴理论结构，同时概括了图论（包括树宽、分层树宽、共树宽、图分解宽度、树独立数、超图树宽和H树宽）、几何群论（特别是Bass-Serre理论）和动力系统（例如混合动力系统）的概念。我们定义了宽度函子，它提供了一种组合方式来分析和关联不同的结构复杂性度量，并在对象的分解和完成之间建立一般的对偶性。

AI.tldr: 本文引入结构分解，统一不同领域的结构复杂度度量，并建立分解与补全的对偶关系。
AI.motivation: 现有不同领域（图论、几何群论、动力系统）的结构复杂度度量缺乏统一框架，需建立通用分析方法。
AI.method: 通过定义范畴论中的width functors，建立分解与补全的对偶性，实现结构复杂度的组合分析。
AI.result: 提出结构分解的范畴论框架，统一多种复杂度度量，并建立分解与补全的数学对偶关系。
AI.conclusion: 结构分解为跨领域结构复杂度分析提供统一框架，推动算法设计与理论研究的融合应用。

authors_text: Zhengxi Liu,Qiao Tian,Chenxu Hu,Xudong Liu,Menglin Wu,Yuping Wang,Hang Zhao,Yuxuan Wang
title: Controllable and Lossless Non-Autoregressive End-to-End Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 可控且无损的非自回归端到端文本转语音
abstract: Some recent studies have demonstrated the feasibility of single-stage neural text-to-speech, which does not need to generate mel-spectrograms but generates the raw waveforms directly from the text. Single-stage text-to-speech often faces two problems: a) the one-to-many mapping problem due to multiple speech variations and b) insufficiency of high frequency reconstruction due to the lack of supervision of ground-truth acoustic features during training. To solve the a) problem and generate more expressive speech, we propose a novel phoneme-level prosody modeling method based on a variational autoencoder with normalizing flows to model underlying prosodic information in speech. We also use the prosody predictor to support end-to-end expressive speech synthesis. Furthermore, we propose the dual parallel autoencoder to introduce supervision of the ground-truth acoustic features during training to solve the b) problem enabling our model to generate high-quality speech. We compare the synthesis quality with state-of-the-art text-to-speech systems on an internal expressive English dataset. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the superiority and robustness of our method for lossless speech generation while also showing a strong capability in prosody modeling.
summary: Some recent studies have demonstrated the feasibility of single-stage neural text-to-speech, which does not need to generate mel-spectrograms but generates the raw waveforms directly from the text. Single-stage text-to-speech often faces two problems: a) the one-to-many mapping problem due to multiple speech variations and b) insufficiency of high frequency reconstruction due to the lack of supervision of ground-truth acoustic features during training. To solve the a) problem and generate more expressive speech, we propose a novel phoneme-level prosody modeling method based on a variational autoencoder with normalizing flows to model underlying prosodic information in speech. We also use the prosody predictor to support end-to-end expressive speech synthesis. Furthermore, we propose the dual parallel autoencoder to introduce supervision of the ground-truth acoustic features during training to solve the b) problem enabling our model to generate high-quality speech. We compare the synthesis quality with state-of-the-art text-to-speech systems on an internal expressive English dataset. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the superiority and robustness of our method for lossless speech generation while also showing a strong capability in prosody modeling.
abstract_zh: 最近的一些研究证明了单阶段神经文本转语音的可行性，它不需要生成梅尔频谱图，而是直接从文本生成原始波形。单阶段文本到语音通常面临两个问题：a）由于多种语音变化而导致的一对多映射问题；b）由于训练期间缺乏对真实声学特征的监督而导致高频重建不足。为了解决a）问题并生成更具表现力的语音，我们提出了一种基于变分自动编码器的新型音素级韵律建模方法，该方法具有归一化流来对语音中的底层韵律信息进行建模。我们还使用韵律预测器来支持端到端的表达性语音合成。此外，我们提出了双并行自动编码器，在训练过程中引入对真实声学特征的监督，以解决 b）问题，使我们的模型能够生成高质量的语音。我们在内部表达英语数据集上将合成质量与最先进的文本转语音系统进行比较。定性和定量评估都证明了我们的无损语音生成方法的优越性和鲁棒性，同时也显示了强大的韵律建模能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控且无损的非自回归端到端文本到语音合成方法，直接从文本生成高质量语音波形。
AI.motivation: 现有单阶段文本到语音合成面临两个问题：多语音变体导致的映射问题及高频重建不足，需提升语音表达力和音质。
AI.method: 提出基于变分自编码器与归一化流的音素级韵律建模方法，并设计双并行自编码器引入真实声学特征监督。
AI.result: 在内部英文数据集上实验显示，该方法在语音合成质量及韵律建模能力上优于现有先进系统，且具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了单阶段合成的映射与高频重建问题，实现了高质量、可控的端到端语音生成。
