Furthermore, we propose the dual parallel autoencoder to introduce supervision of the ground-truth acoustic features during training to solve the b) problem enabling our model to generate high-quality speech. We compare the synthesis quality with state-of-the-art text-to-speech systems on an internal expressive English dataset. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the superiority and robustness of our method for lossless speech generation while also showing a strong capability in prosody modeling. 最近的一些研究证明了单阶段神经文本转语音的可行性，它不需要生成梅尔频谱图，而是直接从文本生成原始波形。单阶段文本到语音通常面临两个问题：a）由于多种语音变化而导致的一对多映射问题；b）由于训练期间缺乏对真实声学特征的监督而导致高频重建不足。为了解决a）问题并生成更具表现力的语音，我们提出了一种基于变分自动编码器的新型音素级韵律建模方法，该方法具有归一化流来对语音中的底层韵律信息进行建模。我们还使用韵律预测器来支持端到端的表达性语音合成。此外，我们提出了双并行自动编码器，在训练过程中引入对真实声学特征的监督，以解决 b）问题，使我们的模型能够生成高质量的语音。我们在内部表达英语数据集上将合成质量与最先进的文本转语音系统进行比较。定性和定量评估都证明了我们的无损语音生成方法的优越性和鲁棒性，同时也显示了强大的韵律建模能力。 本文提出一种可控且无损的非自回归端到端文本到语音合成方法，直接从文本生成高质量语音波形。 Zhengxi Liu,Qiao Tian,Chenxu Hu,Xudong Liu,Menglin Wu,Yuping Wang,Hang Zhao,Yuxuan Wang cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Qiang Li,Zhaoliang Yao,Jingjing Wang,Ye Tian,Pengju Yang,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu
title: Semi-supervised Ranking for Object Image Blur Assessment
title_zh: 对象图像模糊评估的半监督排序
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Dataset is available at https://github.com/yzliangHIK2022/SSRanking-for-Object-BA. Accepted to ICIP 2022
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Dataset is available at https://github.com/yzliangHIK2022/SSRanking-for-Object-BA. Accepted to ICIP 2022
abstract: Assessing the blurriness of an object image is fundamentally important to improve the performance for object recognition and retrieval. The main challenge lies in the lack of abundant images with reliable labels and effective learning strategies. Current datasets are labeled with limited and confused quality levels. To overcome this limitation, we propose to label the rank relationships between pairwise images rather their quality levels, since it is much easier for humans to label, and establish a large-scale realistic face image blur assessment dataset with reliable labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a method to obtain the blur scores only with the pairwise rank labels as supervision. Moreover, to further improve the performance, we propose a self-supervised method based on quadruplet ranking consistency to leverage the unlabeled data more effectively. The supervised and self-supervised methods constitute a final semi-supervised learning framework, which can be trained end-to-end. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Assessing the blurriness of an object image is fundamentally important to improve the performance for object recognition and retrieval. The main challenge lies in the lack of abundant images with reliable labels and effective learning strategies. Current datasets are labeled with limited and confused quality levels. To overcome this limitation, we propose to label the rank relationships between pairwise images rather their quality levels, since it is much easier for humans to label, and establish a large-scale realistic face image blur assessment dataset with reliable labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a method to obtain the blur scores only with the pairwise rank labels as supervision. Moreover, to further improve the performance, we propose a self-supervised method based on quadruplet ranking consistency to leverage the unlabeled data more effectively. The supervised and self-supervised methods constitute a final semi-supervised learning framework, which can be trained end-to-end. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 评估对象图像的模糊度对于提高对象识别和检索的性能至关重要。主要挑战在于缺乏具有可靠标签和有效学习策略的丰富图像。当前数据集的质量水平有限且混乱。为了克服这个限制，我们建议标记成对图像之间的等级关系而不是它们的质量水平，因为人类标记更容易，并建立具有可靠标签的大规模真实人脸图像模糊评估数据集。基于该数据集，我们提出了一种仅使用成对排名标签作为监督来获得模糊分数的方法。此外，为了进一步提高性能，我们提出了一种基于四元组排序一致性的自监督方法，以更有效地利用未标记数据。监督和自监督方法构成了最终的半监督学习框架，可以进行端到端的训练。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习框架，通过成对图像排名标签和自监督方法实现物体图像模糊度评估。
AI.motivation: 现有图像模糊评估数据集标签有限且质量不一，直接标注质量等级困难，而人类更易判断图像对的模糊程度排名。
AI.method: 构建大规模人脸模糊评估数据集，采用成对排名标签监督学习，并引入基于四元组排序一致性的自监督方法提升未标记数据利用效率。
AI.result: 实验验证了该半监督框架在模糊评估任务中的有效性，优于传统监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合成对排名监督与自监督学习，提出的端到端半监督框架能有效提升图像模糊度评估性能。

ai_content.result: 实验验证了该半监督框架在模糊评估任务中的有效性，优于传统监督方法。

authors_text: Awet Haileslassie Gebrehiwot,Patrik Vacek,David Hurych,Karel Zimmermann,Patrick Perez,Tomáš Svoboda
title: Teachers in concordance for pseudo-labeling of 3D sequential data
title_zh: 教师对 3D 序列数据进行伪标记的一致性
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for publication
abstract: Automatic pseudo-labeling is a powerful tool to tap into large amounts of sequential unlabeled data. It is specially appealing in safety-critical applications of autonomous driving, where performance requirements are extreme, datasets are large, and manual labeling is very challenging. We propose to leverage sequences of point clouds to boost the pseudolabeling technique in a teacher-student setup via training multiple teachers, each with access to different temporal information. This set of teachers, dubbed Concordance, provides higher quality pseudo-labels for student training than standard methods. The output of multiple teachers is combined via a novel pseudo label confidence-guided criterion. Our experimental evaluation focuses on the 3D point cloud domain and urban driving scenarios. We show the performance of our method applied to 3D semantic segmentation and 3D object detection on three benchmark datasets. Our approach, which uses only 20% manual labels, outperforms some fully supervised methods. A notable performance boost is achieved for classes rarely appearing in training data.
summary: Automatic pseudo-labeling is a powerful tool to tap into large amounts of sequential unlabeled data. It is specially appealing in safety-critical applications of autonomous driving, where performance requirements are extreme, datasets are large, and manual labeling is very challenging. We propose to leverage sequences of point clouds to boost the pseudolabeling technique in a teacher-student setup via training multiple teachers, each with access to different temporal information. This set of teachers, dubbed Concordance, provides higher quality pseudo-labels for student training than standard methods. The output of multiple teachers is combined via a novel pseudo label confidence-guided criterion. Our experimental evaluation focuses on the 3D point cloud domain and urban driving scenarios. We show the performance of our method applied to 3D semantic segmentation and 3D object detection on three benchmark datasets. Our approach, which uses only 20% manual labels, outperforms some fully supervised methods. A notable performance boost is achieved for classes rarely appearing in training data.
abstract_zh: 自动伪标记是挖掘大量连续未标记数据的强大工具。它在自动驾驶的安全关键应用中特别有吸引力，这些应用对性能要求极高，数据集很大，并且手动标记非常具有挑战性。我们建议通过培训多名教师，利用点云序列来增强师生设置中的伪标记技术，每个教师都可以访问不同的时间信息。这组教师被称为“一致性”，为学生培训提供比标准方法更高质量的伪标签。多个教师的输出通过新颖的伪标签置信引导标准进行组合。我们的实验评估侧重于3D点云域和城市驾驶场景。我们展示了我们的方法在三个基准数据集上应用于 3D 语义分割和 3D 对象检测的性能。我们的方法仅使用 20% 的手动标签，优于一些完全监督的方法。对于很少出现在训练数据中的类，性能得到显着提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多教师协同的伪标签方法，用于提升3D时序数据（如自动驾驶中的点云序列）的伪标签质量。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶等安全关键场景中，手动标注大规模3D时序数据成本高且困难，而现有伪标签方法生成的标签质量不足，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计多教师（Concordance）框架，每个教师模型利用不同的时序信息进行训练，通过新颖的置信度引导准则融合多教师输出，生成高质量伪标签用于学生模型训练。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，仅使用20%手动标注数据时，方法在3D语义分割和目标检测任务中超越部分全监督方法，尤其对训练数据中罕见类别表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多教师协同伪标签方法能有效提升3D时序数据的标注效率与模型性能，为数据稀缺场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Jinwei Lin
title: MultiStream: A Simple and Fast Multiple Cameras Visual Monitor and Directly Streaming
title_zh: MultiStream：简单快速的多摄像头视觉监控和直接流式传输
abstract: Monitoring and streaming is one of the most important applications for the real time cameras. The research of this has provided a novel design idea that uses the FFmpeg and Tkinter, combining with the libraries: OpenCV and PIL to develop a simple but fast streaming toolkit MultiSteam that can achieve the function of visible monitoring streaming for multiple simultaneously. MultiStream is able to automatically arrange the layout of the displays of multiple camera windows and intelligently analyze the input streaming URL to select the correct corresponding streaming communication protocol. Multiple cameras can be streamed with different communication protocols or the same protocol. Besides, the paper has tested the different streaming speeds for different protocols in camera streaming. MultiStream is able to gain the information of media equipment on the computer. The configuration information for media-id selection and multiple cameras streaming can be saved as json files.
summary: Monitoring and streaming is one of the most important applications for the real time cameras. The research of this has provided a novel design idea that uses the FFmpeg and Tkinter, combining with the libraries: OpenCV and PIL to develop a simple but fast streaming toolkit MultiSteam that can achieve the function of visible monitoring streaming for multiple simultaneously. MultiStream is able to automatically arrange the layout of the displays of multiple camera windows and intelligently analyze the input streaming URL to select the correct corresponding streaming communication protocol. Multiple cameras can be streamed with different communication protocols or the same protocol. Besides, the paper has tested the different streaming speeds for different protocols in camera streaming. MultiStream is able to gain the information of media equipment on the computer. The configuration information for media-id selection and multiple cameras streaming can be saved as json files.
abstract_zh: 监控和流媒体是实时摄像机最重要的应用之一。本研究提供了一种新颖的设计思路，利用FFmpeg和Tkinter，结合OpenCV和PIL库，开发了一个简单而快速的流媒体工具包MultiSteam，可以实现多路同时可视化监控流媒体的功能。 MultiStream能够自动排列多个摄像机窗口的显示布局，并智能分析输入的流媒体URL，以选择正确的相应流媒体通信协议。可以使用不同的通信协议或相同的协议对多个摄像机进行流传输。此外，本文还测试了摄像头流媒体中不同协议的不同流媒体速度。 MultiStream能够获取计算机上媒体设备的信息。 media-id 选择和多摄像机流的配置信息可以保存为 json 文件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiStream工具，利用FFmpeg、Tkinter、OpenCV和PIL库，实现多摄像头实时监控与流媒体传输功能。
AI.motivation: 现有摄像头监控系统在多协议兼容性、界面布局自动化及流速优化方面存在不足，需开发简单高效的多摄像头流媒体工具。
AI.method: 结合FFmpeg与Tkinter构建框架，集成OpenCV和PIL处理视频流；通过解析URL智能匹配流协议，自动排列多窗口布局，并支持配置信息JSON存储。
AI.result: 实现多摄像头异协议/同协议流媒体传输，完成媒体设备信息获取与配置保存，测试验证了不同协议的流速表现。
AI.conclusion: MultiStream提供了一种简单高效的多摄像头监控方案，具备协议自适应、布局自动化及配置灵活化特点，满足实时视频流处理需求。

search_text: MultiStream: A Simple and Fast Multiple Cameras Visual Monitor and Directly Streaming MultiStream：简单快速的多摄像头视觉监控和直接流式传输 Monitoring and streaming is one of the most important applications for the real time cameras. The research of this has provided a novel design idea that uses the FFmpeg and Tkinter, combining with the libraries: OpenCV and PIL to develop a simple but fast streaming toolkit MultiSteam that can achieve the function of visible monitoring streaming for multiple simultaneously. MultiStream is able to automatically arrange the layout of the displays of multiple camera windows and intelligently analyze the input streaming URL to select the correct corresponding streaming communication protocol. Multiple cameras can be streamed with different communication protocols or the same protocol. Besides, the paper has tested the different streaming speeds for different protocols in camera streaming. MultiStream is able to gain the information of media equipment on the computer. The configuration information for media-id selection and multiple cameras streaming can be saved as json files. 监控和流媒体是实时摄像机最重要的应用之一。本研究提供了一种新颖的设计思路，利用FFmpeg和Tkinter，结合OpenCV和PIL库，开发了一个简单而快速的流媒体工具包MultiSteam，可以实现多路同时可视化监控流媒体的功能。 MultiStream能够自动排列多个摄像机窗口的显示布局，并智能分析输入的流媒体URL，以选择正确的相应流媒体通信协议。可以使用不同的通信协议或相同的协议对多个摄像机进行流传输。此外，本文还测试了摄像头流媒体中不同协议的不同流媒体速度。 MultiStream能够获取计算机上媒体设备的信息。 media-id 选择和多摄像机流的配置信息可以保存为 json 文件。 本文提出MultiStream工具，利用FFmpeg、Tkinter、OpenCV和PIL库，实现多摄像头实时监控与流媒体传输功能。 Jinwei Lin cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Shaoru Wang,Zeming Li,Jin Gao,Liang Li,Weiming Hu
title: DSPNet: Towards Slimmable Pretrained Networks based on Discriminative Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: DSPNet：基于判别式自监督学习的可精简预训练网络
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved promising downstream performance. However, when facing various resource budgets in real-world applications, it costs a huge computation burden to pretrain multiple networks of various sizes one by one. In this paper, we propose Discriminative-SSL-based Slimmable Pretrained Networks (DSPNet), which can be trained at once and then slimmed to multiple sub-networks of various sizes, each of which faithfully learns good representation and can serve as good initialization for downstream tasks with various resource budgets. Specifically, we extend the idea of slimmable networks to a discriminative SSL paradigm, by integrating SSL and knowledge distillation gracefully. We show comparable or improved performance of DSPNet on ImageNet to the networks individually pretrained one by one under the linear evaluation and semi-supervised evaluation protocols, while reducing large training cost. The pretrained models also generalize well on downstream detection and segmentation tasks. Code will be made public.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved promising downstream performance. However, when facing various resource budgets in real-world applications, it costs a huge computation burden to pretrain multiple networks of various sizes one by one. In this paper, we propose Discriminative-SSL-based Slimmable Pretrained Networks (DSPNet), which can be trained at once and then slimmed to multiple sub-networks of various sizes, each of which faithfully learns good representation and can serve as good initialization for downstream tasks with various resource budgets. Specifically, we extend the idea of slimmable networks to a discriminative SSL paradigm, by integrating SSL and knowledge distillation gracefully. We show comparable or improved performance of DSPNet on ImageNet to the networks individually pretrained one by one under the linear evaluation and semi-supervised evaluation protocols, while reducing large training cost. The pretrained models also generalize well on downstream detection and segmentation tasks. Code will be made public.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）已经取得了令人鼓舞的下游性能。 However, when facing various resource budgets in real-world applications, it costs a huge computation burden to pretrain multiple networks of various sizes one by one. In this paper, we propose Discriminative-SSL-based Slimmable Pretrained Networks (DSPNet), which can be trained at once and then slimmed to multiple sub-networks of various sizes, each of which faithfully learns good representation and can serve as good initialization for downstream tasks with various resource budgets. Specifically, we extend the idea of slimmable networks to a discriminative SSL paradigm, by integrating SSL and knowledge distillation gracefully. We show comparable or improved performance of DSPNet on ImageNet to the networks individually pretrained one by one under the linear evaluation and semi-supervised evaluation protocols, while reducing large training cost.预训练模型也可以很好地推广下游检测和分割任务。 Code will be made public.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSPNet，一种基于判别性自监督学习的可瘦身预训练网络，能够一次性训练后生成多种规模的子网络以适应不同资源预算。
AI.motivation: 传统预训练网络需为不同资源预算单独训练多个模型，计算成本高昂，而现有方法难以兼顾性能与效率。
AI.method: 将可瘦身网络理念扩展至判别性自监督学习框架，结合自监督学习与知识蒸馏技术，实现一次性训练并生成多规模子网络。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，DSPNet在线性评估和半监督评估中表现与单独预训练模型相当或更优，且在检测与分割任务中泛化能力良好。
AI.conclusion: DSPNet通过统一训练流程显著降低计算成本，同时保持模型性能，为实际应用中动态资源分配提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Omid Nejati Manzari,Amin Boudesh,Shahriar B. Shokouhi
title: Pyramid Transformer for Traffic Sign Detection
title_zh: 用于交通标志检测的金字塔变压器
abstract: Traffic sign detection is a vital task in the visual system of self-driving cars and the automated driving system. Recently, novel Transformer-based models have achieved encouraging results for various computer vision tasks. We still observed that vanilla ViT could not yield satisfactory results in traffic sign detection because the overall size of the datasets is very small and the class distribution of traffic signs is extremely unbalanced. To overcome this problem, a novel Pyramid Transformer with locality mechanisms is proposed in this paper. Specifically, Pyramid Transformer has several spatial pyramid reduction layers to shrink and embed the input image into tokens with rich multi-scale context by using atrous convolutions. Moreover, it inherits an intrinsic scale invariance inductive bias and is able to learn local feature representation for objects at various scales, thereby enhancing the network robustness against the size discrepancy of traffic signs. The experiments are conducted on the German Traffic Sign Detection Benchmark (GTSDB). The results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model in the traffic sign detection tasks. More specifically, Pyramid Transformer achieves 77.8% mAP on GTSDB when applied to the Cascade RCNN as the backbone, which surpasses most well-known and widely-used state-of-the-art models.
summary: Traffic sign detection is a vital task in the visual system of self-driving cars and the automated driving system. Recently, novel Transformer-based models have achieved encouraging results for various computer vision tasks. We still observed that vanilla ViT could not yield satisfactory results in traffic sign detection because the overall size of the datasets is very small and the class distribution of traffic signs is extremely unbalanced. To overcome this problem, a novel Pyramid Transformer with locality mechanisms is proposed in this paper. Specifically, Pyramid Transformer has several spatial pyramid reduction layers to shrink and embed the input image into tokens with rich multi-scale context by using atrous convolutions. Moreover, it inherits an intrinsic scale invariance inductive bias and is able to learn local feature representation for objects at various scales, thereby enhancing the network robustness against the size discrepancy of traffic signs. The experiments are conducted on the German Traffic Sign Detection Benchmark (GTSDB). The results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model in the traffic sign detection tasks. More specifically, Pyramid Transformer achieves 77.8% mAP on GTSDB when applied to the Cascade RCNN as the backbone, which surpasses most well-known and widely-used state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 交通标志检测是自动驾驶汽车视觉系统和自动驾驶系统中的一项重要任务。最近，基于 Transformer 的新颖模型在各种计算机视觉任务中取得了令人鼓舞的结果。我们仍然观察到，普通 ViT 在交通标志检测方面无法产生令人满意的结果，因为数据集的总体规模非常小，并且交通标志的类别分布极其不平衡。为了克服这个问题，本文提出了一种具有局部机制的新型金字塔变压器。具体来说，Pyramid Transformer 有几个空间金字塔缩减层，通过使用空洞卷积来缩小输入图像并将其嵌入到具有丰富的多尺度上下文的标记中。此外，它继承了固有的尺度不变性归纳偏差，并且能够学习不同尺度的对象的局部特征表示，从而增强网络针对交通标志尺寸差异的鲁棒性。实验是在德国交通标志检测基准（GTSDB）上进行的。结果证明了该模型在交通标志检测任务中的优越性。更具体地说，当应用于 Cascade RCNN 作为主干时，Pyramid Transformer 在 GTSDB 上实现了 77.8% 的 mAP，这超过了大多数知名和广泛使用的最先进模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Pyramid Transformer的新模型，用于改进交通标志检测任务，通过引入局部性机制解决数据集小和类别不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer（ViT）在交通标志检测中表现不佳，主要由于数据集规模小且类别分布极不平衡，亟需一种更鲁棒的模型设计。
AI.method: 设计包含空间金字塔缩减层的Pyramid Transformer，利用空洞卷积将输入图像嵌入多尺度上下文token，并继承尺度不变性归纳偏置以学习多尺度局部特征。
AI.result: 在GTSDB数据集上，以Cascade RCNN为骨干网络时，Pyramid Transformer达到77.8%的mAP，优于多数现有先进模型。
AI.conclusion: Pyramid Transformer通过多尺度上下文建模和局部特征学习，有效提升了小数据集下交通标志检测的性能，验证了其方法的有效性。

Moreover, it inherits an intrinsic scale invariance inductive bias and is able to learn local feature representation for objects at various scales, thereby enhancing the network robustness against the size discrepancy of traffic signs. The experiments are conducted on the German Traffic Sign Detection Benchmark (GTSDB). The results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model in the traffic sign detection tasks. More specifically, Pyramid Transformer achieves 77.8% mAP on GTSDB when applied to the Cascade RCNN as the backbone, which surpasses most well-known and widely-used state-of-the-art models. 交通标志检测是自动驾驶汽车视觉系统和自动驾驶系统中的一项重要任务。最近，基于 Transformer 的新颖模型在各种计算机视觉任务中取得了令人鼓舞的结果。我们仍然观察到，普通 ViT 在交通标志检测方面无法产生令人满意的结果，因为数据集的总体规模非常小，并且交通标志的类别分布极其不平衡。为了克服这个问题，本文提出了一种具有局部机制的新型金字塔变压器。具体来说，Pyramid Transformer 有几个空间金字塔缩减层，通过使用空洞卷积来缩小输入图像并将其嵌入到具有丰富的多尺度上下文的标记中。此外，它继承了固有的尺度不变性归纳偏差，并且能够学习不同尺度的对象的局部特征表示，从而增强网络针对交通标志尺寸差异的鲁棒性。实验是在德国交通标志检测基准（GTSDB）上进行的。结果证明了该模型在交通标志检测任务中的优越性。更具体地说，当应用于 Cascade RCNN 作为主干时，Pyramid Transformer 在 GTSDB 上实现了 77.8% 的 mAP，这超过了大多数知名和广泛使用的最先进模型。 本文提出一种名为Pyramid Transformer的新模型，用于改进交通标志检测任务，通过引入局部性机制解决数据集小和类别不平衡的问题。 Omid Nejati Manzari,Amin Boudesh,Shahriar B. Shokouhi cs.CV

authors_text: Suneghyeon Cho,Sanghyun Hong,Kookjin Lee,Noseong Park
title: AdamNODEs: When Neural ODE Meets Adaptive Moment Estimation
title_zh: AdamNODEs：当神经常微分方程遇到自适应矩估计时
abstract: Recent work by Xia et al. leveraged the continuous-limit of the classical momentum accelerated gradient descent and proposed heavy-ball neural ODEs. While this model offers computational efficiency and high utility over vanilla neural ODEs, this approach often causes the overshooting of internal dynamics, leading to unstable training of a model. Prior work addresses this issue by using ad-hoc approaches, e.g., bounding the internal dynamics using specific activation functions, but the resulting models do not satisfy the exact heavy-ball ODE. In this work, we propose adaptive momentum estimation neural ODEs (AdamNODEs) that adaptively control the acceleration of the classical momentum-based approach. We find that its adjoint states also satisfy AdamODE and do not require ad-hoc solutions that the prior work employs. In evaluation, we show that AdamNODEs achieve the lowest training loss and efficacy over existing neural ODEs. We also show that AdamNODEs have better training stability than classical momentum-based neural ODEs. This result sheds some light on adapting the techniques proposed in the optimization community to improving the training and inference of neural ODEs further. Our code is available at https://github.com/pmcsh04/AdamNODE.
summary: Recent work by Xia et al. leveraged the continuous-limit of the classical momentum accelerated gradient descent and proposed heavy-ball neural ODEs. While this model offers computational efficiency and high utility over vanilla neural ODEs, this approach often causes the overshooting of internal dynamics, leading to unstable training of a model. Prior work addresses this issue by using ad-hoc approaches, e.g., bounding the internal dynamics using specific activation functions, but the resulting models do not satisfy the exact heavy-ball ODE. In this work, we propose adaptive momentum estimation neural ODEs (AdamNODEs) that adaptively control the acceleration of the classical momentum-based approach. We find that its adjoint states also satisfy AdamODE and do not require ad-hoc solutions that the prior work employs. In evaluation, we show that AdamNODEs achieve the lowest training loss and efficacy over existing neural ODEs. We also show that AdamNODEs have better training stability than classical momentum-based neural ODEs. This result sheds some light on adapting the techniques proposed in the optimization community to improving the training and inference of neural ODEs further. Our code is available at https://github.com/pmcsh04/AdamNODE.
abstract_zh: Xia 等人的最新工作。利用经典动量加速梯度下降的连续极限并提出了重球神经常微分方程。虽然该模型比普通神经常微分方程提供了计算效率和高实用性，但这种方法通常会导致内部动力学的过度调节，从而导致模型的训练不稳定。先前的工作通过使用临时方法解决了这个问题，例如，使用特定的激活函数限制内部动力学，但所得模型不满足精确的重球常微分方程。在这项工作中，我们提出了自适应动量估计神经常微分方程（AdamNODE），它可以自适应地控制经典的基于动量的方法的加速度。我们发现它的伴随状态也满足 AdamODE，并且不需要先前工作采用的临时解决方案。在评估中，我们表明 AdamNODE 比现有神经 ODE 实现了最低的训练损失和效率。我们还表明，AdamNODE 比经典的基于动量的神经 ODE 具有更好的训练稳定性。这一结果为采用优化社区提出的技术进一步改进神经常微分方程的训练和推理提供了一些启示。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/pmcsh04/AdamNODE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdamNODEs，将自适应动量估计与神经ODE结合，解决传统动量神经ODE训练不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动量神经ODE在训练中易出现动力学过冲，依赖人工设计的激活函数限制，但无法满足精确的重球ODE形式。
AI.method: 通过自适应调整经典动量方法的加速参数，使伴随状态满足AdamODE，无需人工设计的限制方案。
AI.result: 实验显示AdamNODEs在训练损失、模型效能及训练稳定性上均优于现有神经ODE方法。
AI.conclusion: 优化社区的技术可有效提升神经ODE的训练与推理性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Daniel Bogdoll,Jonas Rauch,J. Marius Zöllner
title: DLCSS: Dynamic Longest Common Subsequences
title_zh: DLCSS：动态最长公共子序列
abstract: Autonomous driving is a key technology towards a brighter, more sustainable future. To enable such a future, it is necessary to utilize autonomous vehicles in shared mobility models. However, to evaluate, whether two or more route requests have the potential for a shared ride, is a compute-intensive task, if done by rerouting. In this work, we propose the Dynamic Longest Common Subsequences algorithm for fast and cost-efficient comparison of two routes for their compatibility, dynamically only incorporating parts of the routes which are suited for a shared trip. Based on this, one can also estimate, how many autonomous vehicles might be necessary to fulfill the local mobility demands. This can help providers to estimate the necessary fleet sizes, policymakers to better understand mobility patterns and cities to scale necessary infrastructure.
summary: Autonomous driving is a key technology towards a brighter, more sustainable future. To enable such a future, it is necessary to utilize autonomous vehicles in shared mobility models. However, to evaluate, whether two or more route requests have the potential for a shared ride, is a compute-intensive task, if done by rerouting. In this work, we propose the Dynamic Longest Common Subsequences algorithm for fast and cost-efficient comparison of two routes for their compatibility, dynamically only incorporating parts of the routes which are suited for a shared trip. Based on this, one can also estimate, how many autonomous vehicles might be necessary to fulfill the local mobility demands. This can help providers to estimate the necessary fleet sizes, policymakers to better understand mobility patterns and cities to scale necessary infrastructure.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶是迈向更光明、更可持续的未来的关键技术。为了实现这样的未来，有必要在共享移动模型中使用自动驾驶汽车。然而，如果通过重新路由来完成，评估两个或多个路线请求是否具有共享乘车的潜力是一项计算密集型任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了动态最长公共子序列算法，用于快速且经济高效地比较两条路线的兼容性，动态地仅合并适合共享行程的部分路线。在此基础上，人们还可以估计需要多少辆自动驾驶汽车才能满足当地的出行需求。这可以帮助提供商估计必要的车队规模，帮助政策制定者更好地了解出行模式，帮助城市扩展必要的基础设施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DLCSS的动态最长公共子序列算法，用于快速比较两条路线的兼容性，以判断是否适合共享出行。
AI.motivation: 评估多条路线是否适合共享出行的传统方法计算成本高，需通过重规划路线实现，而本文旨在开发一种高效且低成本的解决方案，以支持自动驾驶共享出行模式。
AI.method: 基于动态最长公共子序列（LCS）算法，动态整合适合共享的路线部分，通过子序列匹配分析路线兼容性。
AI.result: 该算法可高效判断路线兼容性，并据此估算满足局部出行需求所需的自动驾驶车辆数量，为运营商、政策制定者和城市规划提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: DLCSS算法解决了共享出行路线评估的计算瓶颈，为自动驾驶共享模式的规模化应用提供了关键技术支撑。

authors_text: Fangwen Shu,Jiaxuan Wang,Alain Pagani,Didier Stricker
title: Structure PLP-SLAM: Efficient Sparse Mapping and Localization using Point, Line and Plane for Monocular, RGB-D and Stereo Cameras
title_zh: 结构 PLP-SLAM：使用单目、RGB-D 和立体相机的点、线和平面进行高效稀疏映射和定位
comment: Accepted to ICRA 2023, supplementary materials attached, code open-source: https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM
comments: Accepted to ICRA 2023, supplementary materials attached, code open-source: https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM
abstract: This paper presents a visual SLAM system that uses both points and lines for robust camera localization, and simultaneously performs a piece-wise planar reconstruction (PPR) of the environment to provide a structural map in real-time. One of the biggest challenges in parallel tracking and mapping with a monocular camera is to keep the scale consistent when reconstructing the geometric primitives. This further introduces difficulties in graph optimization of the bundle adjustment (BA) step. We solve these problems by proposing several run-time optimizations on the reconstructed lines and planes. Our system is able to run with depth and stereo sensors in addition to the monocular setting. Our proposed SLAM tightly incorporates the semantic and geometric features to boost both frontend pose tracking and backend map optimization. We evaluate our system exhaustively on various datasets, and show that we outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of trajectory precision. The code of PLP-SLAM has been made available in open-source for the research community (https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM).
summary: This paper presents a visual SLAM system that uses both points and lines for robust camera localization, and simultaneously performs a piece-wise planar reconstruction (PPR) of the environment to provide a structural map in real-time. One of the biggest challenges in parallel tracking and mapping with a monocular camera is to keep the scale consistent when reconstructing the geometric primitives. This further introduces difficulties in graph optimization of the bundle adjustment (BA) step. We solve these problems by proposing several run-time optimizations on the reconstructed lines and planes. Our system is able to run with depth and stereo sensors in addition to the monocular setting. Our proposed SLAM tightly incorporates the semantic and geometric features to boost both frontend pose tracking and backend map optimization. We evaluate our system exhaustively on various datasets, and show that we outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of trajectory precision. The code of PLP-SLAM has been made available in open-source for the research community (https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种视觉 SLAM 系统，该系统使用点和线进行稳健的相机定位，并同时执行环境的分段平面重建 (PPR)，以实时提供结构图。使用单目相机进行并行跟踪和绘图的最大挑战之一是在重建几何图元时保持比例一致。这进一步给捆绑调整（BA）步骤的图形优化带来了困难。我们通过对重建的线和平面提出几种运行时优化来解决这些问题。除了单目设置之外，我们的系统还能够使用深度和立体传感器运行。我们提出的 SLAM 紧密结合了语义和几何特征，以促进前端姿态跟踪和后端地图优化。我们在各种数据集上详尽地评估了我们的系统，并表明我们在轨迹精度方面优于最先进的方法。 PLP-SLAM 的代码已开源供研究社区使用 (​​https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合点、线、面特征的视觉SLAM系统PLP-SLAM，支持单目、RGB-D和立体相机，实现实时稀疏地图构建与定位。
AI.motivation: 单目相机在重建几何原语时存在尺度一致性难题，且传统方法在图优化中难以兼顾语义与几何特征，影响定位精度与地图结构化。
AI.method: 通过运行时优化线面重建结果，结合语义与几何特征提升前端跟踪与后端优化，并支持多传感器融合实现高效稀疏建图。
AI.result: 在多个数据集测试中，PLP-SLAM轨迹精度优于现有方法，且代码已开源供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了单目SLAM尺度问题，通过多特征融合与优化策略提升了定位与建图性能，为结构化环境感知提供新思路。

search_text: Structure PLP-SLAM: Efficient Sparse Mapping and Localization using Point, Line and Plane for Monocular, RGB-D and Stereo Cameras 结构 PLP-SLAM：使用单目、RGB-D 和立体相机的点、线和平面进行高效稀疏映射和定位 This paper presents a visual SLAM system that uses both points and lines for robust camera localization, and simultaneously performs a piece-wise planar reconstruction (PPR) of the environment to provide a structural map in real-time. One of the biggest challenges in parallel tracking and mapping with a monocular camera is to keep the scale consistent when reconstructing the geometric primitives. This further introduces difficulties in graph optimization of the bundle adjustment (BA) step. We solve these problems by proposing several run-time optimizations on the reconstructed lines and planes. Our system is able to run with depth and stereo sensors in addition to the monocular setting. Our proposed SLAM tightly incorporates the semantic and geometric features to boost both frontend pose tracking and backend map optimization. We evaluate our system exhaustively on various datasets, and show that we outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of trajectory precision. The code of PLP-SLAM has been made available in open-source for the research community (https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM). 本文提出了一种视觉 SLAM 系统，该系统使用点和线进行稳健的相机定位，并同时执行环境的分段平面重建 (PPR)，以实时提供结构图。使用单目相机进行并行跟踪和绘图的最大挑战之一是在重建几何图元时保持比例一致。这进一步给捆绑调整（BA）步骤的图形优化带来了困难。我们通过对重建的线和平面提出几种运行时优化来解决这些问题。除了单目设置之外，我们的系统还能够使用深度和立体传感器运行。我们提出的 SLAM 紧密结合了语义和几何特征，以促进前端姿态跟踪和后端地图优化。我们在各种数据集上详尽地评估了我们的系统，并表明我们在轨迹精度方面优于最先进的方法。 PLP-SLAM 的代码已开源供研究社区使用 (​​https://github.com/PeterFWS/Structure-PLP-SLAM)。 本文提出一种结合点、线、面特征的视觉SLAM系统PLP-SLAM，支持单目、RGB-D和立体相机，实现实时稀疏地图构建与定位。 Fangwen Shu,Jiaxuan Wang,Alain Pagani,Didier Stricker cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jian Ma,Zhedong Zheng,Hao Fei,Feng Zheng,Tat-seng Chua,Yi Yang
title: Subband-based Generative Adversarial Network for Non-parallel Many-to-many Voice Conversion
title_zh: 用于非并行多对多语音转换的基于子带的生成对抗网络
abstract: Voice conversion is to generate a new speech with the source content and a target voice style. In this paper, we focus on one general setting, i.e., non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion, which is close to the real-world scenario. As the name implies, non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion does not require the paired source and reference speeches and can be applied to arbitrary voice transfer. In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and other techniques such as Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAEs) have made considerable progress in this field. However, due to the sophistication of voice conversion, the style similarity of the converted speech is still unsatisfactory. Inspired by the inherent structure of mel-spectrogram, we propose a new voice conversion framework, i.e., Subband-based Generative Adversarial Network for Voice Conversion (SGAN-VC). SGAN-VC converts each subband content of the source speech separately by explicitly utilizing the spatial characteristics between different subbands. SGAN-VC contains one style encoder, one content encoder, and one decoder. In particular, the style encoder network is designed to learn style codes for different subbands of the target speaker. The content encoder network can capture the content information on the source speech. Finally, the decoder generates particular subband content. In addition, we propose a pitch-shift module to fine-tune the pitch of the source speaker, making the converted tone more accurate and explainable. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on VCTK Corpus and AISHELL3 datasets both qualitatively and quantitatively, whether on seen or unseen data. Furthermore, the content intelligibility of SGAN-VC on unseen data even exceeds that of StarGANv2-VC with ASR network assistance.

In this paper, we focus on one general setting, i.e., non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion, which is close to the real-world scenario. As the name implies, non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion does not require the paired source and reference speeches and can be applied to arbitrary voice transfer. In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and other techniques such as Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAEs) have made considerable progress in this field. However, due to the sophistication of voice conversion, the style similarity of the converted speech is still unsatisfactory. Inspired by the inherent structure of mel-spectrogram, we propose a new voice conversion framework, i.e., Subband-based Generative Adversarial Network for Voice Conversion (SGAN-VC). SGAN-VC converts each subband content of the source speech separately by explicitly utilizing the spatial characteristics between different subbands. SGAN-VC contains one style encoder, one content encoder, and one decoder. In particular, the style encoder network is designed to learn style codes for different subbands of the target speaker. The content encoder network can capture the content information on the source speech. Finally, the decoder generates particular subband content. In addition, we propose a pitch-shift module to fine-tune the pitch of the source speaker, making the converted tone more accurate and explainable. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on VCTK Corpus and AISHELL3 datasets both qualitatively and quantitatively, whether on seen or unseen data. Furthermore, the content intelligibility of SGAN-VC on unseen data even exceeds that of StarGANv2-VC with ASR network assistance.
abstract_zh: Voice conversion is to generate a new speech with the source content and a target voice style.在本文中，我们关注一种通用设置，即非并行多对多语音转换，它接近现实世界的场景。 As the name implies, non-parallel many-to-many voice conversion does not require the paired source and reference speeches and can be applied to arbitrary voice transfer. In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and other techniques such as Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAEs) have made considerable progress in this field. However, due to the sophistication of voice conversion, the style similarity of the converted speech is still unsatisfactory. Inspired by the inherent structure of mel-spectrogram, we propose a new voice conversion framework, i.e., Subband-based Generative Adversarial Network for Voice Conversion (SGAN-VC). SGAN-VC converts each subband content of the source speech separately by explicitly utilizing the spatial characteristics between different subbands. SGAN-VC包含一种风格编码器、一种内容编码器和一种解码器。 In particular, the style encoder network is designed to learn style codes for different subbands of the target speaker.内容编码器网络可以捕获源语音的内容信息。最后，解码器生成特定的子带内容。 In addition, we propose a pitch-shift module to fine-tune the pitch of the source speaker, making the converted tone more accurate and explainable. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on VCTK Corpus and AISHELL3 datasets both qualitatively and quantitatively, whether on seen or unseen data.此外，SGAN-VC 对未见数据的内容清晰度甚至超过了具有 ASR 网络辅助的 StarGANv2-VC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子带的生成对抗网络（SGAN-VC），用于解决非平行多对多语音转换问题，无需配对数据即可实现任意语音风格转换。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在语音转换中仍存在风格相似度不足的问题，且难以处理非平行数据场景。受梅尔频谱图结构启发，需设计更有效的子带处理机制以提升转换质量。
AI.method: 构建包含风格编码器、内容编码器和解码器的框架，通过子带分离处理源语音内容，利用不同子带间的空间特性。新增音高调整模块优化音调准确性，并采用生成对抗网络训练策略。
AI.result: 在VCTK和AISHELL3数据集上均达到最优性能，无论在已见数据还是未见数据中，语音内容可懂度均超越StarGANv2-VC（甚至无需ASR辅助）。
AI.conclusion: 子带分解与音高调整模块有效提升了语音风格转换质量，证明了该方法在非平行多对多场景下的优越性，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniel Bogdoll,Meng Zhang,Maximilian Nitsche,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Experiments on Anomaly Detection in Autonomous Driving by Forward-Backward Style Transfers
title_zh: 通过前向-后向风格转移进行自动驾驶异常检测的实验
comment: Daniel Bogdoll and Meng Zhang contributed equally. Accepted for publication at ICECCME 2022
comments: Daniel Bogdoll and Meng Zhang contributed equally. Accepted for publication at ICECCME 2022
abstract: Great progress has been achieved in the community of autonomous driving in the past few years. As a safety-critical problem, however, anomaly detection is a huge hurdle towards a large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles in the real world. While many approaches, such as uncertainty estimation or segmentation-based image resynthesis, are extremely promising, there is more to be explored. Especially inspired by works on anomaly detection based on image resynthesis, we propose a novel approach for anomaly detection through style transfer. We leverage generative models to map an image from its original style domain of road traffic to an arbitrary one and back to generate pixelwise anomaly scores. However, our experiments have proven our hypothesis wrong, and we were unable to produce significant results. Nevertheless, we want to share our findings, so that others can learn from our experiments.
summary: Great progress has been achieved in the community of autonomous driving in the past few years. As a safety-critical problem, however, anomaly detection is a huge hurdle towards a large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles in the real world. While many approaches, such as uncertainty estimation or segmentation-based image resynthesis, are extremely promising, there is more to be explored. Especially inspired by works on anomaly detection based on image resynthesis, we propose a novel approach for anomaly detection through style transfer. We leverage generative models to map an image from its original style domain of road traffic to an arbitrary one and back to generate pixelwise anomaly scores. However, our experiments have proven our hypothesis wrong, and we were unable to produce significant results. Nevertheless, we want to share our findings, so that others can learn from our experiments.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，自动驾驶领域取得了巨大进展。然而，作为一个安全关键问题，异常检测是自动驾驶汽车在现实世界中大规模部署的巨大障碍。虽然许多方法（例如不确定性估计或基于分割的图像重新合成）非常有前途，但还有更多方法有待探索。特别受到基于图像重新合成的异常检测工作的启发，我们提出了一种通过风格迁移进行异常检测的新方法。我们利用生成模型将图像从其原始的道路交通风格域映射到任意图像域，然后返回以生成像素异常分数。然而，我们的实验证明我们的假设是错误的，我们无法得出有意义的结果。尽管如此，我们还是想分享我们的发现，以便其他人可以从我们的实验中学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于前向-后向风格迁移的自动驾驶异常检测方法，但实验未取得显著结果。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的异常检测仍是安全关键问题，现有方法如不确定性估计和图像重合成存在局限，需探索新思路。
AI.method: 利用生成模型将道路图像从原始风格域映射至任意风格域再反向映射，通过像素级差异生成异常分数。
AI.result: 实验验证假设失败，未能产生具有统计学意义的异常检测结果。

search_text: Experiments on Anomaly Detection in Autonomous Driving by Forward-Backward Style Transfers 通过前向-后向风格转移进行自动驾驶异常检测的实验 Great progress has been achieved in the community of autonomous driving in the past few years. As a safety-critical problem, however, anomaly detection is a huge hurdle towards a large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles in the real world. While many approaches, such as uncertainty estimation or segmentation-based image resynthesis, are extremely promising, there is more to be explored. Especially inspired by works on anomaly detection based on image resynthesis, we propose a novel approach for anomaly detection through style transfer. We leverage generative models to map an image from its original style domain of road traffic to an arbitrary one and back to generate pixelwise anomaly scores. However, our experiments have proven our hypothesis wrong, and we were unable to produce significant results. Nevertheless, we want to share our findings, so that others can learn from our experiments. 过去几年，自动驾驶领域取得了巨大进展。然而，作为一个安全关键问题，异常检测是自动驾驶汽车在现实世界中大规模部署的巨大障碍。虽然许多方法（例如不确定性估计或基于分割的图像重新合成）非常有前途，但还有更多方法有待探索。特别受到基于图像重新合成的异常检测工作的启发，我们提出了一种通过风格迁移进行异常检测的新方法。我们利用生成模型将图像从其原始的道路交通风格域映射到任意图像域，然后返回以生成像素异常分数。然而，我们的实验证明我们的假设是错误的，我们无法得出有意义的结果。尽管如此，我们还是想分享我们的发现，以便其他人可以从我们的实验中学习。 本文提出一种基于前向-后向风格迁移的自动驾驶异常检测方法，但实验未取得显著结果。 Daniel Bogdoll,Meng Zhang,Maximilian Nitsche,J. Marius Zöllner cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gerald Woo,Chenghao Liu,Doyen Sahoo,Akshat Kumar,Steven Hoi
title: Learning Deep Time-index Models for Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 学习用于时间序列预测的深度时间索引模型
abstract: Deep learning has been actively applied to time series forecasting, leading to a deluge of new methods, belonging to the class of historical-value models. Yet, despite the attractive properties of time-index models, such as being able to model the continuous nature of underlying time series dynamics, little attention has been given to them. Indeed, while naive deep time-index models are far more expressive than the manually predefined function representations of classical time-index models, they are inadequate for forecasting, being unable to generalize to unseen time steps due to the lack of inductive bias. In this paper, we propose DeepTime, a meta-optimization framework to learn deep time-index models which overcome these limitations, yielding an efficient and accurate forecasting model. Extensive experiments on real world datasets in the long sequence time-series forecasting setting demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods, and is highly efficient. Code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/DeepTime.
summary: Deep learning has been actively applied to time series forecasting, leading to a deluge of new methods, belonging to the class of historical-value models. Yet, despite the attractive properties of time-index models, such as being able to model the continuous nature of underlying time series dynamics, little attention has been given to them. Indeed, while naive deep time-index models are far more expressive than the manually predefined function representations of classical time-index models, they are inadequate for forecasting, being unable to generalize to unseen time steps due to the lack of inductive bias. In this paper, we propose DeepTime, a meta-optimization framework to learn deep time-index models which overcome these limitations, yielding an efficient and accurate forecasting model. Extensive experiments on real world datasets in the long sequence time-series forecasting setting demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods, and is highly efficient. Code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/DeepTime.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已被积极应用于时间序列预测，从而催生了大量属于历史价值模型类别的新方法。然而，尽管时间指数模型具有吸引人的特性，例如能够对基础时间序列动态的连续性进行建模，但人们却很少关注它们。事实上，虽然朴素的深度时间指数模型比经典时间指数模型的手动预定义函数表示更具表现力，但它们不足以进行预测，由于缺乏归纳偏差，无法泛化到看不见的时间步长。在本文中，我们提出了 DeepTime，这是一种元优化框架，用于学习深度时间索引模型，克服了这些限制，从而产生了高效且准确的预测模型。在长序列时间序列预测设置中对现实世界数据集进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法通过最先进的方法取得了有竞争力的结果，并且非常高效。代码可在 https://github.com/salesforce/DeepTime 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepTime框架，通过学习深度时间索引模型来改进时间序列预测任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在时间序列预测中广泛应用，但现有深度时间索引模型因缺乏归纳偏置而难以泛化到未见过的时间步，限制了其实际效果。
AI.method: 设计了一种元优化框架DeepTime，通过引入归纳偏置增强模型的泛化能力，优化深度时间索引模型的表达能力。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界长序列时间序列数据集上的实验表明，DeepTime在准确性和效率上均达到与最先进方法相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: DeepTime有效解决了深度时间索引模型的泛化问题，为时间序列预测提供了高效且精确的解决方案。

authors_text: Junpu Zhang,Liang Li,Siwei Wang,Jiyuan Liu,Yue Liu,Xinwang Liu,En Zhu
title: Multiple Kernel Clustering with Dual Noise Minimization
title_zh: 具有双噪声最小化的多内核集群
abstract: Clustering is a representative unsupervised method widely applied in multi-modal and multi-view scenarios. Multiple kernel clustering (MKC) aims to group data by integrating complementary information from base kernels. As a representative, late fusion MKC first decomposes the kernels into orthogonal partition matrices, then learns a consensus one from them, achieving promising performance recently. However, these methods fail to consider the noise inside the partition matrix, preventing further improvement of clustering performance. We discover that the noise can be disassembled into separable dual parts, i.e. N-noise and C-noise (Null space noise and Column space noise). In this paper, we rigorously define dual noise and propose a novel parameter-free MKC algorithm by minimizing them. To solve the resultant optimization problem, we design an efficient two-step iterative strategy. To our best knowledge, it is the first time to investigate dual noise within the partition in the kernel space. We observe that dual noise will pollute the block diagonal structures and incur the degeneration of clustering performance, and C-noise exhibits stronger destruction than N-noise. Owing to our efficient mechanism to minimize dual noise, the proposed algorithm surpasses the recent methods by large margins.
summary: Clustering is a representative unsupervised method widely applied in multi-modal and multi-view scenarios. Multiple kernel clustering (MKC) aims to group data by integrating complementary information from base kernels. As a representative, late fusion MKC first decomposes the kernels into orthogonal partition matrices, then learns a consensus one from them, achieving promising performance recently. However, these methods fail to consider the noise inside the partition matrix, preventing further improvement of clustering performance. We discover that the noise can be disassembled into separable dual parts, i.e. N-noise and C-noise (Null space noise and Column space noise). In this paper, we rigorously define dual noise and propose a novel parameter-free MKC algorithm by minimizing them. To solve the resultant optimization problem, we design an efficient two-step iterative strategy. To our best knowledge, it is the first time to investigate dual noise within the partition in the kernel space. We observe that dual noise will pollute the block diagonal structures and incur the degeneration of clustering performance, and C-noise exhibits stronger destruction than N-noise. Owing to our efficient mechanism to minimize dual noise, the proposed algorithm surpasses the recent methods by large margins.
abstract_zh: 聚类是一种代表性的无监督方法，广泛应用于多模态、多视图场景。多核聚类（MKC）旨在通过集成来自基础内核的补充信息来对数据进行分组。作为代表，后期融合 MKC 首先将内核分解为正交划分矩阵，然后从中学习共识矩阵，最近取得了可喜的性能。然而，这些方法未能考虑划分矩阵内部的噪声，阻碍了聚类性能的进一步提高。我们发现噪声可以分解为可分离的两部分，即 N 噪声和 C 噪声（零空间噪声和列空间噪声）。在本文中，我们严格定义对偶噪声，并通过最小化它们提出了一种新颖的无参数 MKC 算法。为了解决由此产生的优化问题，我们设计了一种有效的两步迭代策略。据我们所知，这是第一次研究内核空间分区内的双噪声。我们观察到双噪声会污染块对角线结构并导致聚类性能退化，并且C噪声比N噪声表现出更强的破坏性。由于我们有效的机制来最小化对偶噪声，所提出的算法大大超越了最近的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双噪声最小化的多核聚类算法，通过消除划分矩阵中的N噪声和C噪声提升聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MKC方法未考虑划分矩阵中的噪声污染，导致聚类性能受限，尤其C噪声对块对角结构的破坏性更强。
AI.method: 定义N噪声与C噪声，设计参数免费的双噪声最小化算法，采用两步迭代策略解决优化问题。
AI.result: 算法在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在抑制C噪声方面效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 首次在核空间中系统研究双噪声机制，通过有效噪声抑制实现聚类性能的突破性提升。

authors_text: Min Ren,Yuhao Zhu,Yunlong Wang,Zhenan Sun
title: Perturbation Inactivation Based Adversarial Defense for Face Recognition
title_zh: 基于扰动失活的人脸识别对抗防御
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security (T-IFS)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security (T-IFS)
abstract: Deep learning-based face recognition models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. To curb these attacks, most defense methods aim to improve the robustness of recognition models against adversarial perturbations. However, the generalization capacities of these methods are quite limited. In practice, they are still vulnerable to unseen adversarial attacks. Deep learning models are fairly robust to general perturbations, such as Gaussian noises. A straightforward approach is to inactivate the adversarial perturbations so that they can be easily handled as general perturbations. In this paper, a plug-and-play adversarial defense method, named perturbation inactivation (PIN), is proposed to inactivate adversarial perturbations for adversarial defense. We discover that the perturbations in different subspaces have different influences on the recognition model. There should be a subspace, called the immune space, in which the perturbations have fewer adverse impacts on the recognition model than in other subspaces. Hence, our method estimates the immune space and inactivates the adversarial perturbations by restricting them to this subspace. The proposed method can be generalized to unseen adversarial perturbations since it does not rely on a specific kind of adversarial attack method. This approach not only outperforms several state-of-the-art adversarial defense methods but also demonstrates a superior generalization capacity through exhaustive experiments. Moreover, the proposed method can be successfully applied to four commercial APIs without additional training, indicating that it can be easily generalized to existing face recognition systems. The source code is available at https://github.com/RenMin1991/Perturbation-Inactivate
summary: Deep learning-based face recognition models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. To curb these attacks, most defense methods aim to improve the robustness of recognition models against adversarial perturbations. However, the generalization capacities of these methods are quite limited. In practice, they are still vulnerable to unseen adversarial attacks. Deep learning models are fairly robust to general perturbations, such as Gaussian noises. A straightforward approach is to inactivate the adversarial perturbations so that they can be easily handled as general perturbations. In this paper, a plug-and-play adversarial defense method, named perturbation inactivation (PIN), is proposed to inactivate adversarial perturbations for adversarial defense. We discover that the perturbations in different subspaces have different influences on the recognition model. There should be a subspace, called the immune space, in which the perturbations have fewer adverse impacts on the recognition model than in other subspaces. Hence, our method estimates the immune space and inactivates the adversarial perturbations by restricting them to this subspace. The proposed method can be generalized to unseen adversarial perturbations since it does not rely on a specific kind of adversarial attack method. This approach not only outperforms several state-of-the-art adversarial defense methods but also demonstrates a superior generalization capacity through exhaustive experiments. Moreover, the proposed method can be successfully applied to four commercial APIs without additional training, indicating that it can be easily generalized to existing face recognition systems. The source code is available at https://github.com/RenMin1991/Perturbation-Inactivate
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的人脸识别模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。为了遏制这些攻击，大多数防御方法旨在提高识别模型对抗对抗性扰动的鲁棒性。然而，这些方法的泛化能力非常有限。实际上，它们仍然容易受到看不见的对抗性攻击。深度学习模型对于一般扰动（例如高斯噪声）相当稳健。一种直接的方法是使对抗性扰动失活，以便可以将它们作为一般扰动轻松处理。本文提出了一种即插即用的对抗性防御方法，称为扰动失活（PIN），用于失活对抗性扰动以进行对抗性防御。我们发现不同子空间中的扰动对识别模型有不同的影响。应该存在一个称为免疫空间的子空间，其中的扰动对识别模型的不利影响比其他子空间要少。因此，我们的方法估计免疫空间，并通过将对抗性扰动限制在该子空间来使其失活。所提出的方法可以推广到看不见的对抗性扰动，因为它不依赖于特定类型的对抗性攻击方法。这种方法不仅优于几种最先进的对抗性防御方法，而且通过详尽的实验证明了卓越的泛化能力。此外，所提出的方法可以成功应用于四个商业 API，无需额外训练，这表明它可以轻松推广到现有的人脸识别系统。源代码位于 https://github.com/RenMin1991/Perturbation-Inactivate

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扰动失活的对抗防御方法（PIN），用于增强人脸识别模型对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法对未知对抗攻击的泛化能力有限，而深度学习模型对高斯噪声等常规扰动具有较强鲁棒性，因此需探索一种无需依赖特定攻击方式的通用防御策略。
AI.method: 通过识别对模型影响较小的'免疫子空间'，将对抗扰动限制在该子空间内实现失活，从而将其转化为常规扰动处理。该方法无需特定攻击先验知识，具有即插即用特性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有先进防御方法，对未知攻击具有更强泛化能力，并成功应用于四个商业API而无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PIN方法通过子空间扰动失活机制有效提升了人脸识别系统的安全性，为实际部署提供了通用且高效的对抗防御解决方案。

authors_text: Xuefeng Liu,Fangfang Xia,Rick L. Stevens,Yuxin Chen
title: Contextual Active Model Selection
title_zh: 上下文主动模型选择
abstract: While training models and labeling data are resource-intensive, a wealth of pre-trained models and unlabeled data exists. To effectively utilize these resources, we present an approach to actively select pre-trained models while minimizing labeling costs. We frame this as an online contextual active model selection problem: At each round, the learner receives an unlabeled data point as a context. The objective is to adaptively select the best model to make a prediction while limiting label requests. To tackle this problem, we propose CAMS, a contextual active model selection algorithm that relies on two novel components: (1) a contextual model selection mechanism, which leverages context information to make informed decisions about which model is likely to perform best for a given context, and (2) an active query component, which strategically chooses when to request labels for data points, minimizing the overall labeling cost. We provide rigorous theoretical analysis for the regret and query complexity under both adversarial and stochastic settings. Furthermore, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm on a diverse collection of benchmark classification tasks. Notably, CAMS requires substantially less labeling effort (less than 10%) compared to existing methods on CIFAR10 and DRIFT benchmarks, while achieving similar or better accuracy. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/xuefeng-cs/Contextual-Active-Model-Selection.
summary: While training models and labeling data are resource-intensive, a wealth of pre-trained models and unlabeled data exists. To effectively utilize these resources, we present an approach to actively select pre-trained models while minimizing labeling costs. We frame this as an online contextual active model selection problem: At each round, the learner receives an unlabeled data point as a context. The objective is to adaptively select the best model to make a prediction while limiting label requests. To tackle this problem, we propose CAMS, a contextual active model selection algorithm that relies on two novel components: (1) a contextual model selection mechanism, which leverages context information to make informed decisions about which model is likely to perform best for a given context, and (2) an active query component, which strategically chooses when to request labels for data points, minimizing the overall labeling cost. We provide rigorous theoretical analysis for the regret and query complexity under both adversarial and stochastic settings. Furthermore, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm on a diverse collection of benchmark classification tasks. Notably, CAMS requires substantially less labeling effort (less than 10%) compared to existing methods on CIFAR10 and DRIFT benchmarks, while achieving similar or better accuracy. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/xuefeng-cs/Contextual-Active-Model-Selection.
abstract_zh: 虽然训练模型和标记数据是资源密集型的，但存在大量的预训练模型和未标记数据。为了有效利用这些资源，我们提出了一种主动选择预训练模型的方法，同时最大限度地降低标签成本。我们将其视为在线上下文主动模型选择问题：在每一轮中，学习器都会收到一个未标记的数据点作为上下文。目标是自适应地选择最佳模型来进行预测，同时限制标签请求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CAMS，一种依赖于两个新颖组件的上下文主动模型选择算法：(1) 上下文模型选择机制，它利用上下文信息来做出明智的决策，确定哪个模型可能在给定上下文中表现最佳；(2) 主动查询组件，它策略性地选择何时请求数据点标签，从而最小化总体标记成本。我们为对抗性和随机设置下的遗憾和查询复杂性提供了严格的理论分析。此外，我们还证明了我们的算法在各种基准分类任务上的有效性。值得注意的是，与 CIFAR10 和 DRIFT 基准上的现有方法相比，CAMS 所需的标记工作量大大减少（低于 10%），同时实现了相似或更好的准确性。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/xuefeng-cs/Contextual-Active-Model-Selection。

AI.tldr: 提出一种上下文主动模型选择算法CAMS，在减少标注成本的同时选择最佳预训练模型进行预测。
AI.motivation: 训练模型和标注数据成本高，而预训练模型和未标注数据丰富，需有效利用这些资源以减少标注成本。
AI.method: 提出CAMS算法，包含上下文模型选择机制（利用上下文信息选择最佳模型）和主动查询组件（策略性请求标注以减少成本）。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和DRIFT基准上，CAMS标注工作量减少不足10%，同时保持相似或更高准确率。
AI.conclusion: CAMS有效平衡标注成本与准确性，在资源受限场景下表现优异。

authors_text: Joanna Hong,Minsu Kim,Daehun Yoo,Yong Man Ro
title: Visual Context-driven Audio Feature Enhancement for Robust End-to-End Audio-Visual Speech Recognition
title_zh: 视觉上下文驱动的音频功能增强，实现强大的端到端视听语音识别
abstract: This paper focuses on designing a noise-robust end-to-end Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR) system. To this end, we propose Visual Context-driven Audio Feature Enhancement module (V-CAFE) to enhance the input noisy audio speech with a help of audio-visual correspondence. The proposed V-CAFE is designed to capture the transition of lip movements, namely visual context and to generate a noise reduction mask by considering the obtained visual context. Through context-dependent modeling, the ambiguity in viseme-to-phoneme mapping can be refined for mask generation. The noisy representations are masked out with the noise reduction mask resulting in enhanced audio features. The enhanced audio features are fused with the visual features and taken to an encoder-decoder model composed of Conformer and Transformer for speech recognition. We show the proposed end-to-end AVSR with the V-CAFE can further improve the noise-robustness of AVSR. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated in noisy speech recognition and overlapped speech recognition experiments using the two largest audio-visual datasets, LRS2 and LRS3.
summary: This paper focuses on designing a noise-robust end-to-end Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR) system. To this end, we propose Visual Context-driven Audio Feature Enhancement module (V-CAFE) to enhance the input noisy audio speech with a help of audio-visual correspondence. The proposed V-CAFE is designed to capture the transition of lip movements, namely visual context and to generate a noise reduction mask by considering the obtained visual context. Through context-dependent modeling, the ambiguity in viseme-to-phoneme mapping can be refined for mask generation. The noisy representations are masked out with the noise reduction mask resulting in enhanced audio features. The enhanced audio features are fused with the visual features and taken to an encoder-decoder model composed of Conformer and Transformer for speech recognition. We show the proposed end-to-end AVSR with the V-CAFE can further improve the noise-robustness of AVSR. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated in noisy speech recognition and overlapped speech recognition experiments using the two largest audio-visual datasets, LRS2 and LRS3.
abstract_zh: 本文重点设计一种抗噪声的端到端视听语音识别（AVSR）系统。为此，我们提出了视觉上下文驱动的音频特征增强模块（V-CAFE），以借助视听对应来增强输入的噪声音频语音。所提出的 V-CAFE 旨在捕获嘴唇运动的转变，即视觉上下文，并通过考虑获得的视觉上下文来生成降噪掩模。通过上下文相关建模，可以细化视位到音位映射中的歧义以生成掩码。噪声表示被降噪掩模屏蔽掉，从而增强了音频特征。增强的音频特征与视觉特征融合，并引入由 Conformer 和 Transformer 组成的编码器-解码器模型进行语音识别。我们证明了所提出的带有 V-CAFE 的端到端 AVSR 可以进一步提高 AVSR 的噪声鲁棒性。使用两个最大的视听数据集 LRS2 和 LRS3 在噪声语音识别和重叠语音识别实验中评估了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于视觉上下文的音频特征增强模块（V-CAFE），以提升端到端音频-视觉语音识别（AVSR）在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统AVSR系统在噪声环境下性能下降，而视觉信息（如唇部运动）可提供辅助线索，但如何有效融合视觉上下文与音频特征仍需改进。
AI.method: 提出V-CAFE模块，通过捕捉唇部运动的视觉上下文生成降噪掩码，增强音频特征后与视觉特征融合，输入Conformer-Transformer编码器-解码器模型进行语音识别。
AI.result: 在LRS2和LRS3数据集的噪声和重叠语音识别实验中，V-CAFE显著提升了AVSR系统的鲁棒性与识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: V-CAFE通过视觉上下文驱动的音频增强有效提升了AVSR性能，验证了视听特征联合建模在噪声环境中的有效性。

search_text: Visual Context-driven Audio Feature Enhancement for Robust End-to-End Audio-Visual Speech Recognition 视觉上下文驱动的音频功能增强，实现强大的端到端视听语音识别 This paper focuses on designing a noise-robust end-to-end Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR) system. To this end, we propose Visual Context-driven Audio Feature Enhancement module (V-CAFE) to enhance the input noisy audio speech with a help of audio-visual correspondence. The proposed V-CAFE is designed to capture the transition of lip movements, namely visual context and to generate a noise reduction mask by considering the obtained visual context. Through context-dependent modeling, the ambiguity in viseme-to-phoneme mapping can be refined for mask generation. The noisy representations are masked out with the noise reduction mask resulting in enhanced audio features. The enhanced audio features are fused with the visual features and taken to an encoder-decoder model composed of Conformer and Transformer for speech recognition. We show the proposed end-to-end AVSR with the V-CAFE can further improve the noise-robustness of AVSR. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated in noisy speech recognition and overlapped speech recognition experiments using the two largest audio-visual datasets, LRS2 and LRS3. 本文重点设计一种抗噪声的端到端视听语音识别（AVSR）系统。为此，我们提出了视觉上下文驱动的音频特征增强模块（V-CAFE），以借助视听对应来增强输入的噪声音频语音。所提出的 V-CAFE 旨在捕获嘴唇运动的转变，即视觉上下文，并通过考虑获得的视觉上下文来生成降噪掩模。通过上下文相关建模，可以细化视位到音位映射中的歧义以生成掩码。噪声表示被降噪掩模屏蔽掉，从而增强了音频特征。增强的音频特征与视觉特征融合，并引入由 Conformer 和 Transformer 组成的编码器-解码器模型进行语音识别。我们证明了所提出的带有 V-CAFE 的端到端 AVSR 可以进一步提高 AVSR 的噪声鲁棒性。使用两个最大的视听数据集 LRS2 和 LRS3 在噪声语音识别和重叠语音识别实验中评估了所提出方法的有效性。 本文设计了一个基于视觉上下文的音频特征增强模块（V-CAFE），以提升端到端音频-视觉语音识别（AVSR）在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。 Joanna Hong,Minsu Kim,Daehun Yoo,Yong Man Ro cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.MM,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Ahmet M. Elbir,Wei Shi,Kumar Vijay Mishra,Symeon Chatzinotas
title: Federated Multi-Task Learning for THz Wideband Channel and DoA Estimation
title_zh: 太赫兹宽带信道和 DoA 估计的联合多任务学习
abstract: This paper addresses two major challenges in terahertz (THz) channel estimation: the beam-split phenomenon, i.e., beam misalignment because of frequency-independent analog beamformers, and computational complexity because of the usage of ultra-massive number of antennas to compensate propagation losses. Data-driven techniques are known to mitigate the complexity of this problem but usually require the transmission of the datasets from the users to a central server entailing huge communication overhead. In this work, we introduce a federated multi-task learning (FMTL), wherein the users transmit only the model parameters instead of the whole dataset, for THz channel and user direction-of-arrival (DoA) estimation to improve the communications-efficiency. We first propose a novel beamspace support alignment technique for channel estimation with beam-split correction. Then, the channel and DoA information are used as labels to train an FMTL model. By exploiting the sparsity of the THz channel, the proposed approach is implemented with fewer pilot signals than the traditional techniques. Compared to the previous works, our FMTL approach provides higher channel estimation accuracy as well as approximately 25 (32) times lower model (channel) training overhead, respectively.
summary: This paper addresses two major challenges in terahertz (THz) channel estimation: the beam-split phenomenon, i.e., beam misalignment because of frequency-independent analog beamformers, and computational complexity because of the usage of ultra-massive number of antennas to compensate propagation losses. Data-driven techniques are known to mitigate the complexity of this problem but usually require the transmission of the datasets from the users to a central server entailing huge communication overhead. In this work, we introduce a federated multi-task learning (FMTL), wherein the users transmit only the model parameters instead of the whole dataset, for THz channel and user direction-of-arrival (DoA) estimation to improve the communications-efficiency. We first propose a novel beamspace support alignment technique for channel estimation with beam-split correction. Then, the channel and DoA information are used as labels to train an FMTL model. By exploiting the sparsity of the THz channel, the proposed approach is implemented with fewer pilot signals than the traditional techniques. Compared to the previous works, our FMTL approach provides higher channel estimation accuracy as well as approximately 25 (32) times lower model (channel) training overhead, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了太赫兹（THz）信道估计中的两个主要挑战：波束分裂现象，即由于频率无关的模拟波束形成器而导致的波束失准，以及由于使用大量天线来补偿传播损耗而导致的计算复杂性。众所周知，数据驱动技术可以减轻这个问题的复杂性，但通常需要将数据集从用户传输到中央服务器，从而带来巨大的通信开销。在这项工作中，我们引入了联合多任务学习（FMTL），其中用户仅传输模型参数而不是整个数据集，用于太赫兹信道和用户到达方向（DoA）估计，以提高通信效率。我们首先提出了一种新颖的波束空间支持对准技术，用于具有波束分裂校正的信道估计。然后，将信道和DoA信息用作标签来训练FMTL模型。通过利用太赫兹信道的稀疏性，所提出的方法使用比传统技术更少的导频信号来实现。与之前的工作相比，我们的 FMTL 方法提供了更高的信道估计精度，并且模型（信道）训练开销分别降低了约 25 (32) 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦多任务学习（FMTL）方法，解决太赫兹（THz）信道估计与到达方向（DoA）估计中的波束分裂现象及计算复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统THz信道估计需传输完整数据集导致通信开销大，且超大规模天线阵列带来高计算复杂性，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计FMTL框架，通过传输模型参数而非数据集降低通信开销；结合波束空间支持对齐技术修正波束分裂，并利用THz信道稀疏性减少导频信号数量。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，FMTL提升信道估计精度，模型训练开销降低约25倍，信道训练开销降低约32倍。
AI.conclusion: FMTL有效平衡THz通信中的精度与效率，为未来高维无线通信系统提供可行优化方向。

authors_text: Jan Portisch,Heiko Paulheim
title: The DLCC Node Classification Benchmark for Analyzing Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: 用于分析知识图嵌入的 DLCC 节点分类基准
comment: Accepted at International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC) 2022
comments: Accepted at International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC) 2022
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding is a representation learning technique that projects entities and relations in a knowledge graph to continuous vector spaces. Embeddings have gained a lot of uptake and have been heavily used in link prediction and other downstream prediction tasks. Most approaches are evaluated on a single task or a single group of tasks to determine their overall performance. The evaluation is then assessed in terms of how well the embedding approach performs on the task at hand. Still, it is hardly evaluated (and often not even deeply understood) what information the embedding approaches are actually learning to represent. To fill this gap, we present the DLCC (Description Logic Class Constructors) benchmark, a resource to analyze embedding approaches in terms of which kinds of classes they can represent. Two gold standards are presented, one based on the real-world knowledge graph DBpedia and one synthetic gold standard. In addition, an evaluation framework is provided that implements an experiment protocol so that researchers can directly use the gold standard. To demonstrate the use of DLCC, we compare multiple embedding approaches using the gold standards. We find that many DL constructors on DBpedia are actually learned by recognizing different correlated patterns than those defined in the gold standard and that specific DL constructors, such as cardinality constraints, are particularly hard to be learned for most embedding approaches.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding is a representation learning technique that projects entities and relations in a knowledge graph to continuous vector spaces. Embeddings have gained a lot of uptake and have been heavily used in link prediction and other downstream prediction tasks. Most approaches are evaluated on a single task or a single group of tasks to determine their overall performance. The evaluation is then assessed in terms of how well the embedding approach performs on the task at hand. Still, it is hardly evaluated (and often not even deeply understood) what information the embedding approaches are actually learning to represent. To fill this gap, we present the DLCC (Description Logic Class Constructors) benchmark, a resource to analyze embedding approaches in terms of which kinds of classes they can represent. Two gold standards are presented, one based on the real-world knowledge graph DBpedia and one synthetic gold standard. In addition, an evaluation framework is provided that implements an experiment protocol so that researchers can directly use the gold standard. To demonstrate the use of DLCC, we compare multiple embedding approaches using the gold standards. We find that many DL constructors on DBpedia are actually learned by recognizing different correlated patterns than those defined in the gold standard and that specific DL constructors, such as cardinality constraints, are particularly hard to be learned for most embedding approaches.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入是一种表示学习技术，它将知识图中的实体和关系投影到连续向量空间。嵌入已获得大量采用，并已大量用于链路预测和其他下游预测任务。大多数方法都是针对单个任务或一组任务进行评估，以确定其整体性能。然后根据嵌入方法在当前任务上的执行情况来评估评估。尽管如此，人们仍然很难评估（通常甚至没有深入理解）嵌入方法实际上正在学习表示什么信息。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 DLCC（描述逻辑类构造函数）基准，这是一种根据嵌入方法可以表示的类类型来分析嵌入方法的资源。提出了两种黄金标准，一种基于现实世界的知识图 DBpedia，另一种是合成黄金标准。此外，还提供了一个实施实验协议的评估框架，以便研究人员可以直接使用金标准。为了演示 DLCC 的使用，我们使用黄金标准比较了多种嵌入方法。我们发现 DBpedia 上的许多深度学习构造函数实际上是通过识别与黄金标准中定义的相关模式不同的相关模式来学习的，并且对于大多数嵌入方法来说，特定的深度学习构造函数（例如基数约束）特别难以学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DLCC基准，用于分析知识图谱嵌入方法在表示不同逻辑类别的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入评估仅关注任务表现，缺乏对模型实际学习内容的深入理解。
AI.method: 构建包含DBpedia真实数据和合成数据的黄金标准，设计评估框架比较多种嵌入方法。
AI.result: 发现多数嵌入方法通过不同相关模式学习DL构造符，而基数约束等特定构造难以被学习。
AI.conclusion: DLCC基准为分析嵌入方法提供了新视角，揭示了当前模型在逻辑构造表示上的局限性。

search_text: The DLCC Node Classification Benchmark for Analyzing Knowledge Graph Embeddings 用于分析知识图嵌入的 DLCC 节点分类基准 Knowledge graph embedding is a representation learning technique that projects entities and relations in a knowledge graph to continuous vector spaces. Embeddings have gained a lot of uptake and have been heavily used in link prediction and other downstream prediction tasks. Most approaches are evaluated on a single task or a single group of tasks to determine their overall performance. The evaluation is then assessed in terms of how well the embedding approach performs on the task at hand. Still, it is hardly evaluated (and often not even deeply understood) what information the embedding approaches are actually learning to represent. To fill this gap, we present the DLCC (Description Logic Class Constructors) benchmark, a resource to analyze embedding approaches in terms of which kinds of classes they can represent. Two gold standards are presented, one based on the real-world knowledge graph DBpedia and one synthetic gold standard. In addition, an evaluation framework is provided that implements an experiment protocol so that researchers can directly use the gold standard. To demonstrate the use of DLCC, we compare multiple embedding approaches using the gold standards. We find that many DL constructors on DBpedia are actually learned by recognizing different correlated patterns than those defined in the gold standard and that specific DL constructors, such as cardinality constraints, are particularly hard to be learned for most embedding approaches. 知识图嵌入是一种表示学习技术，它将知识图中的实体和关系投影到连续向量空间。嵌入已获得大量采用，并已大量用于链路预测和其他下游预测任务。大多数方法都是针对单个任务或一组任务进行评估，以确定其整体性能。然后根据嵌入方法在当前任务上的执行情况来评估评估。尽管如此，人们仍然很难评估（通常甚至没有深入理解）嵌入方法实际上正在学习表示什么信息。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 DLCC（描述逻辑类构造函数）基准，这是一种根据嵌入方法可以表示的类类型来分析嵌入方法的资源。提出了两种黄金标准，一种基于现实世界的知识图 DBpedia，另一种是合成黄金标准。此外，还提供了一个实施实验协议的评估框架，以便研究人员可以直接使用金标准。为了演示 DLCC 的使用，我们使用黄金标准比较了多种嵌入方法。我们发现 DBpedia 上的许多深度学习构造函数实际上是通过识别与黄金标准中定义的相关模式不同的相关模式来学习的，并且对于大多数嵌入方法来说，特定的深度学习构造函数（例如基数约束）特别难以学习。 本文提出DLCC基准，用于分析知识图谱嵌入方法在表示不同逻辑类别的能力。 Jan Portisch,Heiko Paulheim cs.AI

authors_text: Nabarun Goswami,Tatsuya Harada
title: SATTS: Speaker Attractor Text to Speech, Learning to Speak by Learning to Separate
title_zh: SATTS：说话者吸引器文本到语音，通过学习分离来学习说话
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2022. Visit https://naba89.github.io/SATTS-demo/ for a demo
comments: Accepted to Interspeech 2022. Visit https://naba89.github.io/SATTS-demo/ for a demo
abstract: The mapping of text to speech (TTS) is non-deterministic, letters may be pronounced differently based on context, or phonemes can vary depending on various physiological and stylistic factors like gender, age, accent, emotions, etc. Neural speaker embeddings, trained to identify or verify speakers are typically used to represent and transfer such characteristics from reference speech to synthesized speech. Speech separation on the other hand is the challenging task of separating individual speakers from an overlapping mixed signal of various speakers. Speaker attractors are high-dimensional embedding vectors that pull the time-frequency bins of each speaker's speech towards themselves while repelling those belonging to other speakers. In this work, we explore the possibility of using these powerful speaker attractors for zero-shot speaker adaptation in multi-speaker TTS synthesis and propose speaker attractor text to speech (SATTS). Through various experiments, we show that SATTS can synthesize natural speech from text from an unseen target speaker's reference signal which might have less than ideal recording conditions, i.e. reverberations or mixed with other speakers.
summary: The mapping of text to speech (TTS) is non-deterministic, letters may be pronounced differently based on context, or phonemes can vary depending on various physiological and stylistic factors like gender, age, accent, emotions, etc. Neural speaker embeddings, trained to identify or verify speakers are typically used to represent and transfer such characteristics from reference speech to synthesized speech. Speech separation on the other hand is the challenging task of separating individual speakers from an overlapping mixed signal of various speakers. Speaker attractors are high-dimensional embedding vectors that pull the time-frequency bins of each speaker's speech towards themselves while repelling those belonging to other speakers. In this work, we explore the possibility of using these powerful speaker attractors for zero-shot speaker adaptation in multi-speaker TTS synthesis and propose speaker attractor text to speech (SATTS). Through various experiments, we show that SATTS can synthesize natural speech from text from an unseen target speaker's reference signal which might have less than ideal recording conditions, i.e. reverberations or mixed with other speakers.
abstract_zh: 文本到语音 (TTS) 的映射是不确定的，字母的发音可能会根据上下文而有所不同，或者音素可能会根据各种生理和风格因素（如性别、年龄、口音、情绪等）而变化。经过训练以识别或验证说话人的神经说话人嵌入通常用于表示这些特征并将其从参考语音转移到合成语音。另一方面，语音分离是将各个说话者从多个说话者的重叠混合信号中分离出来的具有挑战性的任务。说话者吸引子是高维嵌入向量，它将每个说话者语音的时频区间拉向自己，同时排斥属于其他说话者的语音。在这项工作中，我们探索了在多说话人 TTS 合成中使用这些强大的说话人吸引器进行零样本说话人自适应的可能性，并提出了说话人吸引器文本转语音 (SATTS)。通过各种实验，我们表明 SATTS 可以从看不见的目标说话者的参考信号中的文本合成自然语音，该参考信号可能具有不太理想的录音条件，即混响或与其他说话者混合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于说话人吸引子的文本到语音合成方法（SATTS），通过利用语音分离中的说话人吸引子实现对未见过的目标说话人的零样本语音合成。
AI.motivation: 传统文本到语音合成在处理不同说话人特征（如性别、口音等）时面临挑战，且需要大量目标说话人数据。语音分离中的说话人吸引子能够有效表征说话人特征，为跨说话人语音合成提供了新思路。
AI.method: 通过引入语音分离任务中学习到的说话人吸引子，将高维嵌入向量用于引导语音合成模型，使模型能够根据参考语音信号（即使包含混响或多人重叠语音）生成目标说话人的语音。
AI.result: 实验表明，SATTS能够在仅提供少量或质量较低的参考语音信号情况下，生成自然流畅的目标说话人语音，验证了该方法在零样本适应场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了语音分离中的说话人吸引子可作为跨说话人语音合成的有效工具，为数据稀缺场景下的语音合成提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Yookyung Shin,Younggun Lee,Suhee Jo,Yeongtae Hwang,Taesu Kim
title: Text-driven Emotional Style Control and Cross-speaker Style Transfer in Neural TTS
title_zh: 神经 TTS 中文本驱动的情感风格控制和跨说话者风格迁移
abstract: Expressive text-to-speech has shown improved performance in recent years. However, the style control of synthetic speech is often restricted to discrete emotion categories and requires training data recorded by the target speaker in the target style. In many practical situations, users may not have reference speech recorded in target emotion but still be interested in controlling speech style just by typing text description of desired emotional style. In this paper, we propose a text-based interface for emotional style control and cross-speaker style transfer in multi-speaker TTS. We propose the bi-modal style encoder which models the semantic relationship between text description embedding and speech style embedding with a pretrained language model. To further improve cross-speaker style transfer on disjoint, multi-style datasets, we propose the novel style loss. The experimental results show that our model can generate high-quality expressive speech even in unseen style.
summary: Expressive text-to-speech has shown improved performance in recent years. However, the style control of synthetic speech is often restricted to discrete emotion categories and requires training data recorded by the target speaker in the target style. In many practical situations, users may not have reference speech recorded in target emotion but still be interested in controlling speech style just by typing text description of desired emotional style. In this paper, we propose a text-based interface for emotional style control and cross-speaker style transfer in multi-speaker TTS. We propose the bi-modal style encoder which models the semantic relationship between text description embedding and speech style embedding with a pretrained language model. To further improve cross-speaker style transfer on disjoint, multi-style datasets, we propose the novel style loss. The experimental results show that our model can generate high-quality expressive speech even in unseen style.
abstract_zh: 近年来，富有表现力的文本转语音的性能有所提高。然而，合成语音的风格控制往往局限于离散的情感类别，并且需要目标说话者以目标风格记录的训练数据。在许多实际情况下，用户可能没有目标情感中记录的参考语音，但仍然有兴趣仅通过键入所需情感风格的文本描述来控制语音风格。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于文本的界面，用于多说话者 TTS 中的情感风格控制和跨说话者风格迁移。我们提出了双模态编码器，它使用预训练的语言模型对文本描述嵌入和语音样式嵌入之间的语义关系进行建模。为了进一步改进不相交的多风格数据集上的跨说话者风格迁移，我们提出了新颖的风格损失。实验结果表明，我们的模型即使是看不见的风格也可以生成高质量的表达性语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本的情感风格控制和跨说话人风格迁移方法，无需目标说话人数据即可生成高质量表达性语音。
AI.motivation: 现有神经语音合成系统的情感风格控制受限于离散情绪类别且依赖目标说话人数据，难以满足用户仅通过文本描述控制语音风格的实际需求。
AI.method: 设计双模态风格编码器建模文本描述嵌入与语音风格嵌入的语义关系，并引入新型风格损失函数优化跨说话人风格迁移效果。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能生成高质量表达性语音，即使在未见过的情感风格下也保持良好表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过文本接口实现了灵活的情感风格控制和跨说话人迁移，为实用化语音合成提供了新解决方案。
