result: 实验表明模型能生成高质量表达性语音，即使在未见过的情感风格下也保持良好表现。
conclusion: 该方法通过文本接口实现了灵活的情感风格控制和跨说话人迁移，为实用化语音合成提供了新解决方案。
search_text: Text-driven Emotional Style Control and Cross-speaker Style Transfer in Neural TTS 神经 TTS 中文本驱动的情感风格控制和跨说话者风格迁移 Expressive text-to-speech has shown improved performance in recent years. However, the style control of synthetic speech is often restricted to discrete emotion categories and requires training data recorded by the target speaker in the target style. In many practical situations, users may not have reference speech recorded in target emotion but still be interested in controlling speech style just by typing text description of desired emotional style. In this paper, we propose a text-based interface for emotional style control and cross-speaker style transfer in multi-speaker TTS. We propose the bi-modal style encoder which models the semantic relationship between text description embedding and speech style embedding with a pretrained language model. To further improve cross-speaker style transfer on disjoint, multi-style datasets, we propose the novel style loss. The experimental results show that our model can generate high-quality expressive speech even in unseen style. 近年来，富有表现力的文本转语音的性能有所提高。然而，合成语音的风格控制往往局限于离散的情感类别，并且需要目标说话者以目标风格记录的训练数据。在许多实际情况下，用户可能没有目标情感中记录的参考语音，但仍然有兴趣仅通过键入所需情感风格的文本描述来控制语音风格。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于文本的界面，用于多说话者 TTS 中的情感风格控制和跨说话者风格迁移。我们提出了双模态编码器，它使用预训练的语言模型对文本描述嵌入和语音样式嵌入之间的语义关系进行建模。为了进一步改进不相交的多风格数据集上的跨说话者风格迁移，我们提出了新颖的风格损失。实验结果表明，我们的模型即使是看不见的风格也可以生成高质量的表达性语音。 本文提出一种基于文本的情感风格控制和跨说话人风格迁移方法，无需目标说话人数据即可生成高质量表达性语音。 Yookyung Shin,Younggun Lee,Suhee Jo,Yeongtae Hwang,Taesu Kim cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xiaoyu Yuan,Zhibo Zhang,Yabo Sun,Zekai Xue,Xiuyan Shao,Xiaohua Huang
title: A new database of Houma Alliance Book ancient handwritten characters and classifier fusion approach
title_zh: 一种新的侯马联书古手写文字数据库与分类器融合方法
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, accepted by 14th International Conference on Graphics and Image Processing (ICGIP 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, accepted by 14th International Conference on Graphics and Image Processing (ICGIP 2022)
abstract: The Houma Alliance Book is one of the national treasures of the Museum in Shanxi Museum Town in China. It has great historical significance in researching ancient history. To date, the research on the Houma Alliance Book has been staying in the identification of paper documents, which is inefficient to identify and difficult to display, study and publicize. Therefore, the digitization of the recognized ancient characters of Houma League can effectively improve the efficiency of recognizing ancient characters and provide more reliable technical support and text data. This paper proposes a new database of Houma Alliance Book ancient handwritten characters and a multi-modal fusion method to recognize ancient handwritten characters. In the database, 297 classes and 3,547 samples of Houma Alliance ancient handwritten characters are collected from the original book collection and by human imitative writing. Furthermore, the decision-level classifier fusion strategy is applied to fuse three well-known deep neural network architectures for ancient handwritten character recognition. Experiments are performed on our new database. The experimental results first provide the baseline result of the new database to the research community and then demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed method.
summary: The Houma Alliance Book is one of the national treasures of the Museum in Shanxi Museum Town in China. It has great historical significance in researching ancient history. To date, the research on the Houma Alliance Book has been staying in the identification of paper documents, which is inefficient to identify and difficult to display, study and publicize. Therefore, the digitization of the recognized ancient characters of Houma League can effectively improve the efficiency of recognizing ancient characters and provide more reliable technical support and text data. This paper proposes a new database of Houma Alliance Book ancient handwritten characters and a multi-modal fusion method to recognize ancient handwritten characters. In the database, 297 classes and 3,547 samples of Houma Alliance ancient handwritten characters are collected from the original book collection and by human imitative writing. Furthermore, the decision-level classifier fusion strategy is applied to fuse three well-known deep neural network architectures for ancient handwritten character recognition. Experiments are performed on our new database. The experimental results first provide the baseline result of the new database to the research community and then demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 《侯马联盟书》是中国山西博物馆镇博物馆的国宝之一。对于研究古代历史具有重大的历史意义。迄今为止，对侯马联书的研究还停留在纸质文献的识别上，识别效率低，难以展示、研究和宣传。因此，对侯马盟已识别古文字进行数字化处理，可以有效提高古文字识别效率，提供更可靠的技术支撑和文本数据。本文提出了一种新的侯马联书古手写文字数据库和多模态融合的古手写文字识别方法。数据库中通过原书库和人工仿写方式收集了侯马联盟古手写文字297类、3547个样本。此外，应用决策级分类器融合策略来融合三种著名的深度神经网络架构，以进行古代手写字符识别。在我们的新数据库上进行了实验。实验结果首先向研究界提供新数据库的基线结果，然后证明我们提出的方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 构建侯马盟书古文字新数据库并提出分类器融合方法以提高古文字识别效率
AI.motivation: 现有侯马盟书研究依赖纸质文件识别效率低，需数字化手段提升识别效率与数据可靠性
AI.method: 收集297类3547个样本构建新数据库，采用决策级分类器融合策略结合三种深度神经网络架构
AI.result: 提供新数据库基准结果，验证了多模态融合方法在古文字识别中的有效性
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升古文字识别效率，为相关研究提供可靠技术支撑与数据基础

authors_text: John Tan Chong Min,Mehul Motani
title: Brick Tic-Tac-Toe: Exploring the Generalizability of AlphaZero to Novel Test Environments
title_zh: 井字游戏：探索 AlphaZero 在新型测试环境中的通用性
abstract: Traditional reinforcement learning (RL) environments typically are the same for both the training and testing phases. Hence, current RL methods are largely not generalizable to a test environment which is conceptually similar but different from what the method has been trained on, which we term the novel test environment. As an effort to push RL research towards algorithms which can generalize to novel test environments, we introduce the Brick Tic-Tac-Toe (BTTT) test bed, where the brick position in the test environment is different from that in the training environment. Using a round-robin tournament on the BTTT environment, we show that traditional RL state-search approaches such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and Minimax are more generalizable to novel test environments than AlphaZero is. This is surprising because AlphaZero has been shown to achieve superhuman performance in environments such as Go, Chess and Shogi, which may lead one to think that it performs well in novel test environments. Our results show that BTTT, though simple, is rich enough to explore the generalizability of AlphaZero. We find that merely increasing MCTS lookahead iterations was insufficient for AlphaZero to generalize to some novel test environments. Rather, increasing the variety of training environments helps to progressively improve generalizability across all possible starting brick configurations.
summary: Traditional reinforcement learning (RL) environments typically are the same for both the training and testing phases. Hence, current RL methods are largely not generalizable to a test environment which is conceptually similar but different from what the method has been trained on, which we term the novel test environment. As an effort to push RL research towards algorithms which can generalize to novel test environments, we introduce the Brick Tic-Tac-Toe (BTTT) test bed, where the brick position in the test environment is different from that in the training environment. Using a round-robin tournament on the BTTT environment, we show that traditional RL state-search approaches such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and Minimax are more generalizable to novel test environments than AlphaZero is. This is surprising because AlphaZero has been shown to achieve superhuman performance in environments such as Go, Chess and Shogi, which may lead one to think that it performs well in novel test environments. Our results show that BTTT, though simple, is rich enough to explore the generalizability of AlphaZero. We find that merely increasing MCTS lookahead iterations was insufficient for AlphaZero to generalize to some novel test environments. Rather, increasing the variety of training environments helps to progressively improve generalizability across all possible starting brick configurations.
abstract_zh: 传统的强化学习 (RL) 环境通常在训练和测试阶段都是相同的。因此，当前的强化学习方法在很大程度上不能推广到测试环境，该测试环境在概念上相似，但与该方法所训练的环境不同，我们将其称为新颖的测试环境。为了将强化学习研究推向可以推广到新测试环境的算法，我们引入了 Brick Tic-Tac-Toe (BTTT) 测试床，其中测试环境中的砖块位置与训练环境中的不同。在 BTTT 环境上使用循环赛，我们表明传统的 RL 状态搜索方法（例如蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 和 Minimax）比 AlphaZero 更能推广到新的测试环境。这是令人惊讶的，因为 AlphaZero 已被证明可以在围棋、国际象棋和将棋等环境中实现超人的性能，这可能会让人认为它在新颖的测试环境中表现良好。我们的结果表明，BTTT 虽然简单，但足以探索 AlphaZero 的通用性。我们发现仅仅增加 MCTS 前瞻迭代不足以让 AlphaZero 泛化到一些新的测试环境。相反，增加训练环境的多样性有助于逐步提高所有可能的起始砖配置的通用性。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过提出Brick Tic-Tac-Toe（BTTT）测试环境，研究AlphaZero在概念相似但不同的新测试环境中的泛化能力，并与传统RL方法（如MCTS、Minimax）进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在训练和测试环境相同的情况下表现良好，但难以泛化到新环境中。尽管AlphaZero在围棋等复杂游戏中表现优异，但其在新测试环境中的泛化能力尚未被充分验证。
AI.method: 设计BTTT测试床，训练环境与测试环境的砖块位置不同；通过循环赛对比AlphaZero与传统方法（MCTS、Minimax）的泛化性能，并分析训练环境多样性对泛化能力的影响。
AI.result: 传统方法（MCTS、Minimax）比AlphaZero更易泛化到新环境；单纯增加AlphaZero的MCTS搜索迭代次数效果有限，而增加训练环境多样性可逐步提升其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BTTT测试床有效揭示了AlphaZero的泛化局限性，表明算法泛化能力不仅依赖于自身设计，还需通过多样化训练环境来增强适应性。

Our results show that BTTT, though simple, is rich enough to explore the generalizability of AlphaZero. We find that merely increasing MCTS lookahead iterations was insufficient for AlphaZero to generalize to some novel test environments. Rather, increasing the variety of training environments helps to progressively improve generalizability across all possible starting brick configurations. 传统的强化学习 (RL) 环境通常在训练和测试阶段都是相同的。因此，当前的强化学习方法在很大程度上不能推广到测试环境，该测试环境在概念上相似，但与该方法所训练的环境不同，我们将其称为新颖的测试环境。为了将强化学习研究推向可以推广到新测试环境的算法，我们引入了 Brick Tic-Tac-Toe (BTTT) 测试床，其中测试环境中的砖块位置与训练环境中的不同。在 BTTT 环境上使用循环赛，我们表明传统的 RL 状态搜索方法（例如蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 和 Minimax）比 AlphaZero 更能推广到新的测试环境。这是令人惊讶的，因为 AlphaZero 已被证明可以在围棋、国际象棋和将棋等环境中实现超人的性能，这可能会让人认为它在新颖的测试环境中表现良好。我们的结果表明，BTTT 虽然简单，但足以探索 AlphaZero 的通用性。我们发现仅仅增加 MCTS 前瞻迭代不足以让 AlphaZero 泛化到一些新的测试环境。相反，增加训练环境的多样性有助于逐步提高所有可能的起始砖配置的通用性。 该论文通过提出Brick Tic-Tac-Toe（BTTT）测试环境，研究AlphaZero在概念相似但不同的新测试环境中的泛化能力，并与传统RL方法（如MCTS、Minimax）进行对比。 John Tan Chong Min,Mehul Motani cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuyan Zhou,Uri Alon,Frank F. Xu,Zhiruo Wang,Zhengbao Jiang,Graham Neubig
title: DocPrompting: Generating Code by Retrieving the Docs
title_zh: DocPrompting：通过检索文档生成代码
comment: ICLR 2023 (notable-top-25%); code and data are available at https://github.com/shuyanzhou/docprompting
comments: ICLR 2023 (notable-top-25%); code and data are available at https://github.com/shuyanzhou/docprompting
abstract: Publicly available source-code libraries are continuously growing and changing. This makes it impossible for models of code to keep current with all available APIs by simply training these models on existing code repositories. Thus, existing models inherently cannot generalize to using unseen functions and libraries, because these would never appear in the training data. In contrast, when human programmers use functions and libraries for the first time, they frequently refer to textual resources such as code manuals and documentation, to explore and understand the available functionality. Inspired by this observation, we introduce DocPrompting: a natural-language-to-code generation approach that explicitly leverages documentation by (1) retrieving the relevant documentation pieces given an NL intent, and (2) generating code based on the NL intent and the retrieved documentation. DocPrompting is general: it can be applied to any programming language and is agnostic to the underlying neural model. We demonstrate that DocPrompting consistently improves NL-to-code models: DocPrompting improves strong base models such as CodeT5 by 2.85% in pass@1 (52% relative gain) and 4.39% in pass@10 (30% relative gain) in execution-based evaluation on the popular Python CoNaLa benchmark; on a new Bash dataset tldr, DocPrompting improves CodeT5 and GPT-Neo1.3B by up to absolute 6.9% exact match.
summary: Publicly available source-code libraries are continuously growing and changing. This makes it impossible for models of code to keep current with all available APIs by simply training these models on existing code repositories. Thus, existing models inherently cannot generalize to using unseen functions and libraries, because these would never appear in the training data. In contrast, when human programmers use functions and libraries for the first time, they frequently refer to textual resources such as code manuals and documentation, to explore and understand the available functionality. Inspired by this observation, we introduce DocPrompting: a natural-language-to-code generation approach that explicitly leverages documentation by (1) retrieving the relevant documentation pieces given an NL intent, and (2) generating code based on the NL intent and the retrieved documentation. DocPrompting is general: it can be applied to any programming language and is agnostic to the underlying neural model. We demonstrate that DocPrompting consistently improves NL-to-code models: DocPrompting improves strong base models such as CodeT5 by 2.85% in pass@1 (52% relative gain) and 4.39% in pass@10 (30% relative gain) in execution-based evaluation on the popular Python CoNaLa benchmark; on a new Bash dataset tldr, DocPrompting improves CodeT5 and GPT-Neo1.3B by up to absolute 6.9% exact match.
abstract_zh: 公开可用的源代码库正在不断增长和变化。这使得代码模型不可能通过简单地在现有代码存储库上训练这些模型来与所有可用的 API 保持同步。因此，现有模型本质上不能推广到使用看不见的函数和库，因为这些永远不会出现在训练数据中。相比之下，当人类程序员第一次使用函数和库时，他们经常参考代码手册和文档等文本资源，以探索和理解可用的功能。受这一观察的启发，我们引入了 DocPrompting：一种自然语言到代码生成方法，它通过以下方式显式利用文档：(1) 检索给定 NL 意图的相关文档片段，以及 (2) 基于 NL 意图和检索到的文档生成代码。 DocPrompting 是通用的：它可以应用于任何编程语言，并且与底层神经模型无关。我们证明 DocPrompting 持续改进了 NL 到代码模型：在流行的 Python CoNaLa 基准测试中基于执行的评估中，DocPrompting 将诸如 CodeT5 之类的强基础模型在 pass@1 中提高了 2.85%（相对增益 52%），在 pass@10 中提高了 4.39%（相对增益 30%）；在新的 Bash 数据集 tldr 上，DocPrompting 将 CodeT5 和 GPT-Neo1.3B 的绝对匹配率提高了 6.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocPrompting方法，通过检索文档并结合自然语言意图生成代码，解决模型无法适应新API的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有代码模型因训练数据限制无法泛化到未见过的函数和库，而人类程序员首次使用新API时会查阅文档，受此启发提出基于文档的代码生成方法。
AI.method: DocPrompting包含两步：1）根据自然语言意图检索相关文档；2）结合意图和文档生成代码，方法适用于任意编程语言和神经模型。
AI.result: 在Python CoNaLa基准测试中，DocPrompting使CodeT5的pass@1提升2.85%（相对增益52%），pass@10提升4.39%（30%相对增益）；在Bash数据集上使CodeT5和GPT-Neo1.3B的精确匹配率提升最高达6.9%。
AI.conclusion: DocPrompting通过显式利用文档信息，有效提升了自然语言到代码生成模型的性能，验证了文档检索在代码生成中的关键作用。

authors_text: Simon Weber,Joel Widmer
title: Realizability Makes a Difference: A Complexity Gap for Sink-Finding in USOs
title_zh: 可实现性产生影响：USO 中汇发现的复杂性差距
abstract: Algorithms for finding the sink in Unique Sink Orientations (USOs) of the hypercube can be used to solve many algebraic and geometric problems, most importantly including the P-Matrix Linear Complementarity Problem and Linear Programming. The realizable USOs are those that arise from the reductions of these problems to the USO sink-finding problem. Finding the sink of realizable USOs is thus highly practically relevant, yet it is unknown whether realizability can be exploited algorithmically to find the sink more quickly. However, all (non-trivial) known unconditional lower bounds for sink-finding make use of USOs that are provably not realizable. This indicates that the sink-finding problem might indeed be strictly easier on realizable USOs. In this paper we show that this is true for a subclass of all USOs. We consider the class of Matoušek-type USOs, which are a translation of Matoušek's LP-type problems into the language of USOs. We show a query complexity gap between sink-finding in all, and sink-finding in only the realizable $n$-dimensional Matoušek-type USOs. We provide concrete deterministic algorithms and lower bounds for both cases, and show that in the realizable case $O(log^2 n)$ vertex evaluation queries suffice, while in general exactly $n$ queries are needed. The Matoušek-type USOs are the first USO class found to admit such a gap.
summary: Algorithms for finding the sink in Unique Sink Orientations (USOs) of the hypercube can be used to solve many algebraic and geometric problems, most importantly including the P-Matrix Linear Complementarity Problem and Linear Programming. The realizable USOs are those that arise from the reductions of these problems to the USO sink-finding problem. Finding the sink of realizable USOs is thus highly practically relevant, yet it is unknown whether realizability can be exploited algorithmically to find the sink more quickly. However, all (non-trivial) known unconditional lower bounds for sink-finding make use of USOs that are provably not realizable. This indicates that the sink-finding problem might indeed be strictly easier on realizable USOs. In this paper we show that this is true for a subclass of all USOs. We consider the class of Matoušek-type USOs, which are a translation of Matoušek's LP-type problems into the language of USOs. We show a query complexity gap between sink-finding in all, and sink-finding in only the realizable $n$-dimensional Matoušek-type USOs. We provide concrete deterministic algorithms and lower bounds for both cases, and show that in the realizable case $O(log^2 n)$ vertex evaluation queries suffice, while in general exactly $n$ queries are needed. The Matoušek-type USOs are the first USO class found to admit such a gap.
abstract_zh: 在超立方体的唯一汇方向 (USO) 中查找汇的算法可用于解决许多代数和几何问题，最重要的是包括 P 矩阵线性互补问题和线性规划。可实现的 USO 是将这些问题简化为 USO 汇发现问题而产生的。因此，寻找可实现的 USO 的汇点具有高度的实际相关性，但尚不清楚是否可以通过算法利用可实现性来更快地找到汇点。然而，所有（非平凡的）已知的汇发现无条件下限都利用了已证明无法实现的 USO。这表明在可实现的 USO 上，寻找汇的问题确实可能更容易。在本文中，我们证明这对于所有 USO 的子类都是正确的。我们考虑 Matoušek 型 USO 类，它是将 Matoušek 的 LP 型问题翻译成 USO 语言。我们展示了所有的汇查找和仅在可实现的 $n$ 维 Matoušek 型 USO 中的汇查找之间的查询复杂性差距。我们为这两种情况提供了具体的确定性算法和下界，并表明在可实现的情况下 $O(log^2 n)$ 顶点评估查询就足够了，而通常需要 $n$ 查询。 Matoušek 型 USO 是第一个承认这种差距的 USO 类别。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在可实现的唯一单向图（USO）中寻找sink点的复杂度差距，特别是在Matoušek类型的USO子类中，证明了可实现性可显著降低查询复杂度。
AI.motivation: 尽管可实现的USO在解决实际问题（如线性规划）中至关重要，但此前未明确是否能利用其可实现性设计更高效的算法，而现有下界均基于不可实现的USO，暗示可能存在复杂度差异。
AI.method: 分析Matoušek类型的USO（源于LP-type问题），对比所有USO与仅可实现USO的查询复杂度，设计具体算法并证明上下界。
AI.result: 对n维Matoušek类型USO，可实现情况下仅需O(log²n)次顶点查询即可找到sink，而一般情况需n次查询，首次揭示此类USO的复杂度差距。
AI.conclusion: 可实现性确实能显著优化sink寻找算法，尤其在Matoušek类型USO中，为相关问题提供了新的理论依据和算法设计方向。

We provide concrete deterministic algorithms and lower bounds for both cases, and show that in the realizable case $O(log^2 n)$ vertex evaluation queries suffice, while in general exactly $n$ queries are needed. The Matoušek-type USOs are the first USO class found to admit such a gap. 在超立方体的唯一汇方向 (USO) 中查找汇的算法可用于解决许多代数和几何问题，最重要的是包括 P 矩阵线性互补问题和线性规划。可实现的 USO 是将这些问题简化为 USO 汇发现问题而产生的。因此，寻找可实现的 USO 的汇点具有高度的实际相关性，但尚不清楚是否可以通过算法利用可实现性来更快地找到汇点。然而，所有（非平凡的）已知的汇发现无条件下限都利用了已证明无法实现的 USO。这表明在可实现的 USO 上，寻找汇的问题确实可能更容易。在本文中，我们证明这对于所有 USO 的子类都是正确的。我们考虑 Matoušek 型 USO 类，它是将 Matoušek 的 LP 型问题翻译成 USO 语言。我们展示了所有的汇查找和仅在可实现的 $n$ 维 Matoušek 型 USO 中的汇查找之间的查询复杂性差距。我们为这两种情况提供了具体的确定性算法和下界，并表明在可实现的情况下 $O(log^2 n)$ 顶点评估查询就足够了，而通常需要 $n$ 查询。 Matoušek 型 USO 是第一个承认这种差距的 USO 类别。 本文研究了在可实现的唯一单向图（USO）中寻找sink点的复杂度差距，特别是在Matoušek类型的USO子类中，证明了可实现性可显著降低查询复杂度。 Simon Weber,Joel Widmer cs.DS,cs.CC,math.CO,math.OC

authors_text: Sharat Ibrahimpur,Manish Purohit,Zoya Svitkina,Erik Vee,Joshua Wang
title: Caching with Reserves
title_zh: 预留缓存
abstract: Caching is a crucial component of many computer systems, so naturally it is a well-studied topic in algorithm design. Much of traditional caching research studies cache management for a single-user or single-processor environment. In this paper, we propose two related generalizations of the classical caching problem that capture issues that arise in a multi-user or multi-processor environment. In the caching with reserves problem, a caching algorithm is required to maintain at least $k_i$ pages belonging to user $i$ in the cache at any time, for some given reserve capacities $k_i$. In the public-private caching problem, the cache of total size $k$ is partitioned into subcaches, a private cache of size $k_i$ for each user $i$ and a shared public cache usable by any user. In both of these models, as in the classical caching framework, the objective of the algorithm is to dynamically maintain the cache so as to minimize the total number of cache misses. We show that caching with reserves and public-private caching models are equivalent up to constant factors, and thus focus on the former. Unlike classical caching, both of these models turn out to be NP-hard even in the offline setting, where the page sequence is known in advance. For the offline setting, we design a 2-approximation algorithm, whose analysis carefully keeps track of a potential function to bound the cost. In the online setting, we first design an $O(\ln k)$-competitive fractional algorithm using the primal-dual framework, and then show how to convert it online to a randomized integral algorithm with the same guarantee.
summary: Caching is a crucial component of many computer systems, so naturally it is a well-studied topic in algorithm design. Much of traditional caching research studies cache management for a single-user or single-processor environment. In this paper, we propose two related generalizations of the classical caching problem that capture issues that arise in a multi-user or multi-processor environment. In the caching with reserves problem, a caching algorithm is required to maintain at least $k_i$ pages belonging to user $i$ in the cache at any time, for some given reserve capacities $k_i$. In the public-private caching problem, the cache of total size $k$ is partitioned into subcaches, a private cache of size $k_i$ for each user $i$ and a shared public cache usable by any user. In both of these models, as in the classical caching framework, the objective of the algorithm is to dynamically maintain the cache so as to minimize the total number of cache misses. We show that caching with reserves and public-private caching models are equivalent up to constant factors, and thus focus on the former. Unlike classical caching, both of these models turn out to be NP-hard even in the offline setting, where the page sequence is known in advance. For the offline setting, we design a 2-approximation algorithm, whose analysis carefully keeps track of a potential function to bound the cost. In the online setting, we first design an $O(\ln k)$-competitive fractional algorithm using the primal-dual framework, and then show how to convert it online to a randomized integral algorithm with the same guarantee.
abstract_zh: 缓存是许多计算机系统的重要组成部分，因此它自然是算法设计中深入研究的主题。许多传统的缓存研究研究单用户或单处理器环境的缓存管理。在本文中，我们提出了经典缓存问题的两个相关概括，捕获多用户或多处理器环境中出现的问题。在预留缓存问题中，对于给定的预留容量$k_i$，需要一个缓存算法在任意时间在缓存中维护至少$k_i$属于用户$i$的页面。在公私缓存问题中，总大小为 $k$ 的缓存被划分为子缓存，每个用户 $i$ 的大小为 $k_i$ 的私有缓存以及可供任何用户使用的共享公共缓存。在这两种模型中，与经典缓存框架一样，算法的目标是动态维护缓存，以最大限度地减少缓存未命中的总数。我们证明，保留缓存和公共-私有缓存模型在常数因子下是等效的，因此重点关注前者。与经典缓存不同，即使在页面顺序预先已知的离线环境中，这两种模型都被证明是 NP 困难的。对于离线设置，我们设计了一种 2 近似算法，其分析仔细跟踪限制成本的潜在函数。在在线设置中，我们首先使用原对偶框架设计一个 $O(\ln k)$ 竞争分数算法，然后展示如何将其在线转换为具有相同保证的随机积分算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种缓存模型（带保留缓存和公共-私有缓存），研究多用户或多处理器环境下的缓存管理问题，目标是通过算法最小化缓存未命中次数。
AI.motivation: 传统缓存研究主要针对单用户或单处理器环境，而实际场景中多用户或多处理器环境需要满足用户保留页数或分区缓存的需求，现有研究未充分覆盖此类问题。
AI.method: 通过证明两种模型等价性，聚焦带保留缓存模型；设计离线2-近似算法（基于势函数分析）和在线O(ln k)-竞争比算法（基于对偶框架及随机化转换）。
AI.result: 证明两类模型NP难；提出离线2-近似算法和在线O(ln k)-竞争算法，为多用户缓存管理提供理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 带保留缓存模型与公共-私有缓存模型等价，且可通过近似算法有效解决其NP难问题，为多用户环境下的缓存优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiayin Sun,Qiulei Dong
title: Orthogonal-Coding-Based Feature Generation for Transductive Open-Set Recognition via Dual-Space Consistent Sampling
title_zh: 基于正交编码的特征生成，通过双空间一致采样进行传导开集识别
abstract: Open-set recognition (OSR) aims to simultaneously detect unknown-class samples and classify known-class samples. Most of the existing OSR methods are inductive methods, which generally suffer from the domain shift problem that the learned model from the known-class domain might be unsuitable for the unknown-class domain. Addressing this problem, inspired by the success of transductive learning for alleviating the domain shift problem in many other visual tasks, we propose an Iterative Transductive OSR framework, called IT-OSR, which implements three explored modules iteratively, including a reliability sampling module, a feature generation module, and a baseline update module. Specifically, at each iteration, a dual-space consistent sampling approach is presented in the explored reliability sampling module for selecting some relatively more reliable ones from the test samples according to their pseudo labels assigned by a baseline method, which could be an arbitrary inductive OSR method. Then, a conditional dual-adversarial generative network under an orthogonal coding condition is designed in the feature generation module to generate discriminative sample features of both known and unknown classes according to the selected test samples with their pseudo labels. Finally, the baseline method is updated for sample re-prediction in the baseline update module by jointly utilizing the generated features, the selected test samples with pseudo labels, and the training samples. Extensive experimental results on both the standard-dataset and the cross-dataset settings demonstrate that the derived transductive methods, by introducing two typical inductive OSR methods into the proposed IT-OSR framework, achieve better performances than 15 state-of-the-art methods in most cases.
summary: Open-set recognition (OSR) aims to simultaneously detect unknown-class samples and classify known-class samples. Most of the existing OSR methods are inductive methods, which generally suffer from the domain shift problem that the learned model from the known-class domain might be unsuitable for the unknown-class domain. Addressing this problem, inspired by the success of transductive learning for alleviating the domain shift problem in many other visual tasks, we propose an Iterative Transductive OSR framework, called IT-OSR, which implements three explored modules iteratively, including a reliability sampling module, a feature generation module, and a baseline update module. Specifically, at each iteration, a dual-space consistent sampling approach is presented in the explored reliability sampling module for selecting some relatively more reliable ones from the test samples according to their pseudo labels assigned by a baseline method, which could be an arbitrary inductive OSR method. Then, a conditional dual-adversarial generative network under an orthogonal coding condition is designed in the feature generation module to generate discriminative sample features of both known and unknown classes according to the selected test samples with their pseudo labels. Finally, the baseline method is updated for sample re-prediction in the baseline update module by jointly utilizing the generated features, the selected test samples with pseudo labels, and the training samples. Extensive experimental results on both the standard-dataset and the cross-dataset settings demonstrate that the derived transductive methods, by introducing two typical inductive OSR methods into the proposed IT-OSR framework, achieve better performances than 15 state-of-the-art methods in most cases.
abstract_zh: 开放集识别（OSR）旨在同时检测未知类样本并对已知类样本进行分类。大多数现有的OSR方法都是归纳方法，通常会遇到域转移问题，即从已知类域学习到的模型可能不适合未知类域。为了解决这个问题，受到转导学习成功缓解许多其他视觉任务中域转移问题的启发，我们提出了一个迭代转导 OSR 框架，称为 IT-OSR，它迭代地实现了三个探索模块，包括可靠性采样模块、特征生成模块和基线更新模块。具体来说，在每次迭代中，所探索的可靠性采样模块中提出了一种双空间一致采样方法，用于根据基线方法分配的伪标签从测试样本中选择一些相对更可靠的样本，该基线方法可以是任意归纳OSR方法。然后，在特征生成模块中设计正交编码条件下的条件双对抗生成网络，根据选定的测试样本及其伪标签生成已知类和未知类的判别性样本特征。最后，联合利用生成的特征、选择的带有伪标签的测试样本和训练样本，在基线更新模块中更新基线方法以进行样本重新预测。标准数据集和跨数据集设置上的大量实验结果表明，通过将两种典型的归纳 OSR 方法引入到所提出的 IT-OSR 框架中，所导出的转导方法在大多数情况下比 15 种最先进的方法获得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正交编码的特征生成方法，用于通过双空间一致采样的迭代归纳式开放集识别框架（IT-OSR），以解决开放集识别中的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集识别方法多为归纳式，易受领域偏移影响。受跨任务归纳学习缓解领域偏移的启发，本文旨在通过迭代归纳框架提升开放集识别的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出IT-OSR框架，包含可靠性采样模块（双空间一致采样）、特征生成模块（正交编码条件下的双对抗生成网络）和基线更新模块，通过迭代优化伪标签与生成特征的联合利用。
AI.result: 在标准数据集和跨数据集实验中，引入两种归纳式OSR方法后，IT-OSR在多数情况下优于15种最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双空间采样与正交编码生成的特征增强，迭代归纳框架有效提升了开放集识别性能，验证了跨领域适应性的优势。

search_text: Orthogonal-Coding-Based Feature Generation for Transductive Open-Set Recognition via Dual-Space Consistent Sampling 基于正交编码的特征生成，通过双空间一致采样进行传导开集识别 Open-set recognition (OSR) aims to simultaneously detect unknown-class samples and classify known-class samples. Most of the existing OSR methods are inductive methods, which generally suffer from the domain shift problem that the learned model from the known-class domain might be unsuitable for the unknown-class domain. Addressing this problem, inspired by the success of transductive learning for alleviating the domain shift problem in many other visual tasks, we propose an Iterative Transductive OSR framework, called IT-OSR, which implements three explored modules iteratively, including a reliability sampling module, a feature generation module, and a baseline update module. Specifically, at each iteration, a dual-space consistent sampling approach is presented in the explored reliability sampling module for selecting some relatively more reliable ones from the test samples according to their pseudo labels assigned by a baseline method, which could be an arbitrary inductive OSR method. Then, a conditional dual-adversarial generative network under an orthogonal coding condition is designed in the feature generation module to generate discriminative sample features of both known and unknown classes according to the selected test samples with their pseudo labels. Finally, the baseline method is updated for sample re-prediction in the baseline update module by jointly utilizing the generated features, the selected test samples with pseudo labels, and the training samples. Extensive experimental results on both the standard-dataset and the cross-dataset settings demonstrate that the derived transductive methods, by introducing two typical inductive OSR methods into the proposed IT-OSR framework, achieve better performances than 15 state-of-the-art methods in most cases. 开放集识别（OSR）旨在同时检测未知类样本并对已知类样本进行分类。大多数现有的OSR方法都是归纳方法，通常会遇到域转移问题，即从已知类域学习到的模型可能不适合未知类域。为了解决这个问题，受到转导学习成功缓解许多其他视觉任务中域转移问题的启发，我们提出了一个迭代转导 OSR 框架，称为 IT-OSR，它迭代地实现了三个探索模块，包括可靠性采样模块、特征生成模块和基线更新模块。具体来说，在每次迭代中，所探索的可靠性采样模块中提出了一种双空间一致采样方法，用于根据基线方法分配的伪标签从测试样本中选择一些相对更可靠的样本，该基线方法可以是任意归纳OSR方法。然后，在特征生成模块中设计正交编码条件下的条件双对抗生成网络，根据选定的测试样本及其伪标签生成已知类和未知类的判别性样本特征。最后，联合利用生成的特征、选择的带有伪标签的测试样本和训练样本，在基线更新模块中更新基线方法以进行样本重新预测。标准数据集和跨数据集设置上的大量实验结果表明，通过将两种典型的归纳 OSR 方法引入到所提出的 IT-OSR 框架中，所导出的转导方法在大多数情况下比 15 种最先进的方法获得了更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于正交编码的特征生成方法，用于通过双空间一致采样的迭代归纳式开放集识别框架（IT-OSR），以解决开放集识别中的领域偏移问题。 Jiayin Sun,Qiulei Dong cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Michel Pohl,Mitsuru Uesaka,Kazuyuki Demachi,Ritu Bhusal Chhatkuli
title: Prediction of the motion of chest internal points using a recurrent neural network trained with real-time recurrent learning for latency compensation in lung cancer radiotherapy
title_zh: 使用经过实时循环学习训练的循环神经网络预测胸部内部点的运动，以实现肺癌放射治疗中的延迟补偿
abstract: During the radiotherapy treatment of patients with lung cancer, the radiation delivered to healthy tissue around the tumor needs to be minimized, which is difficult because of respiratory motion and the latency of linear accelerator systems. In the proposed study, we first use the Lucas-Kanade pyramidal optical flow algorithm to perform deformable image registration of chest computed tomography scan images of four patients with lung cancer. We then track three internal points close to the lung tumor based on the previously computed deformation field and predict their position with a recurrent neural network (RNN) trained using real-time recurrent learning (RTRL) and gradient clipping. The breathing data is quite regular, sampled at approximately 2.5Hz, and includes artificial drift in the spine direction. The amplitude of the motion of the tracked points ranged from 12.0mm to 22.7mm. Finally, we propose a simple method for recovering and predicting 3D tumor images from the tracked points and the initial tumor image based on a linear correspondence model and Nadaraya-Watson non-linear regression. The root-mean-square error, maximum error, and jitter corresponding to the RNN prediction on the test set were smaller than the same performance measures obtained with linear prediction and least mean squares (LMS). In particular, the maximum prediction error associated with the RNN, equal to 1.51mm, is respectively 16.1% and 5.0% lower than the maximum error associated with linear prediction and LMS. The average prediction time per time step with RTRL is equal to 119ms, which is less than the 400ms marker position sampling time. The tumor position in the predicted images appears visually correct, which is confirmed by the high mean cross-correlation between the original and predicted images, equal to 0.955.

In the proposed study, we first use the Lucas-Kanade pyramidal optical flow algorithm to perform deformable image registration of chest computed tomography scan images of four patients with lung cancer. We then track three internal points close to the lung tumor based on the previously computed deformation field and predict their position with a recurrent neural network (RNN) trained using real-time recurrent learning (RTRL) and gradient clipping. The breathing data is quite regular, sampled at approximately 2.5Hz, and includes artificial drift in the spine direction. The amplitude of the motion of the tracked points ranged from 12.0mm to 22.7mm. Finally, we propose a simple method for recovering and predicting 3D tumor images from the tracked points and the initial tumor image based on a linear correspondence model and Nadaraya-Watson non-linear regression. The root-mean-square error, maximum error, and jitter corresponding to the RNN prediction on the test set were smaller than the same performance measures obtained with linear prediction and least mean squares (LMS). In particular, the maximum prediction error associated with the RNN, equal to 1.51mm, is respectively 16.1% and 5.0% lower than the maximum error associated with linear prediction and LMS. The average prediction time per time step with RTRL is equal to 119ms, which is less than the 400ms marker position sampling time. The tumor position in the predicted images appears visually correct, which is confirmed by the high mean cross-correlation between the original and predicted images, equal to 0.955.
abstract_zh: 在肺癌患者的放射治疗过程中，需要最大限度地减少到达肿瘤周围健康组织的辐射，但由于呼吸运动和直线加速器系统的延迟，这很困难。在本研究中，我们首先使用 Lucas-Kanade 金字塔光流算法对四名肺癌患者的胸部计算机断层扫描图像进行变形图像配准。然后，我们根据先前计算的变形场跟踪靠近肺部肿瘤的三个内部点，并使用使用实时循环学习 (RTRL) 和梯度裁剪训练的循环神经网络 (RNN) 来预测它们的位置。呼吸数据非常有规律，采样频率约为 2.5Hz，并且包括脊柱方向的人工漂移。跟踪点的运动幅度范围为12.0mm至22.7mm。最后，我们提出了一种基于线性对应模型和 Nadaraya-Watson 非线性回归从跟踪点和初始肿瘤图像恢复和预测 3D 肿瘤图像的简单方法。与测试集上的 RNN 预测相对应的均方根误差、最大误差和抖动小于使用线性预测和最小均方 (LMS) 获得的相同性能指标。特别是，与 RNN 相关的最大预测误差等于 1.51mm，分别比与线性预测和 LMS 相关的最大误差低 16.1% 和 5.0%。 RTRL 的每个时间步的平均预测时间等于 119ms，小于 400ms 标记位置采样时间。预测图像中的肿瘤位置在视觉上看起来是正确的，原始图像和预测图像之间的高平均互相关性（等于 0.955）证实了这一点。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用递归神经网络（RNN）预测肺癌放疗中胸部内部点的运动，以补偿系统延迟，提高治疗精度。
AI.motivation: 肺癌放疗中呼吸运动和线性加速器延迟导致辐射难以精准避开健康组织，需通过预测肿瘤位置来优化治疗。
AI.method: 采用Lucas-Kanade光流算法进行图像配准，跟踪肿瘤附近内部点，并使用RTRL训练RNN结合梯度裁剪进行预测；通过线性对应模型和Nadaraya-Watson回归重建3D肿瘤图像。
AI.result: RNN预测的均方根误差、最大误差和抖动均优于线性预测和LMS算法，最大误差降低至1.51mm（较线性预测低16.1%，较LMS低5.0%），单步预测耗时119ms，低于400ms采样时间，图像相关性达0.955。
AI.conclusion: RNN方法在预测精度和实时性上优于传统算法，可有效补偿系统延迟，提升肺癌放疗的精准度与安全性。
